epochs.name: 破土而出
epochs.summary: 从零到研究预览，确立 AI 编程助手新范式
epochs.summary_en: From zero to research preview, establishing a new paradigm for AI coding assistants

epochs.name: 工具化
epochs.summary: 从研究预览到正式产品，建立方法论和生态基础
epochs.summary_en: From research preview to production product, building methodology and ecosystem foundations

epochs.name: 生态扩张
epochs.summary: 从单一工具到多 IDE 生态，2.0 大版本重构
epochs.summary_en: From a single tool to a multi-IDE ecosystem, with the 2.0 major rewrite

epochs.name: 平台化
epochs.summary: $1B ARR 里程碑、Bun 收购、Cowork 扩圈、插件生态
epochs.summary_en: $1B ARR milestone, Bun acquisition, Cowork launch, and plugin ecosystem

epochs.name: 自主化
epochs.summary: 1M 上下文、安全扫描、无人值守运行能力
epochs.summary_en: 1M context window, security scanning, and unattended operation capabilities

changes.raw: Added `--bare` flag for scripted `-p` calls — skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks; requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or an `apiKeyHelper` via `--settings` (OAuth and keychain auth disabled); auto-memory fully disabled
changes.summary: 新增脚本裸模式
changes.summary_en: Add bare mode for scripted runs
changes.why_matters: 让脚本化调用更轻量、更可控，并避免自动化场景被插件、钩子和记忆功能干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes scripted runs lighter and more predictable by avoiding hooks, plugins, and memory features.

changes.raw: Added `--channels` permission relay — channel servers that declare the permission capability can forward tool approval prompts to your phone
changes.summary: 支持通道权限转发
changes.why_matters: 可把工具审批提示转发到手机，提升远程审批的便捷性和响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets approval prompts reach your phone, making remote approvals faster and easier.

changes.raw: Fixed multiple concurrent Claude Code sessions requiring repeated re-authentication when one session refreshes its OAuth token
changes.summary: 修复多会话重复登录
changes.why_matters: 避免多个 Claude Code 会话同时刷新 OAuth 时反复要求重新认证。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents multiple Claude Code sessions from repeatedly asking for re-authentication during OAuth refresh.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode silently swallowing retry failures and showing a misleading "check your network" message instead of the actual error
changes.summary: 修复语音重试报错误导
changes.summary_en: Fix voice retry errors showing wrong message
changes.why_matters: 用户能看到真实失败原因，而不是被误导去排查网络问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Users now see the real failure reason instead of being misled into checking their network.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode audio not recovering when the server silently drops the WebSocket connection
changes.summary: 修复语音断连后恢复
changes.summary_en: Fix voice recovery after silent disconnect
changes.why_matters: WebSocket 被静默断开后，语音模式可以重新恢复工作，减少中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Voice mode can recover after a silent WebSocket drop, reducing interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS` not suppressing the structured-outputs beta header, causing 400 errors on proxy gateways forwarding to Vertex/Bedrock
changes.summary: 修复实验标头未关闭
changes.why_matters: 避免在代理到 Vertex/Bedrock 时因错误的结构化输出标头导致 400 请求失败。
changes.why_matters_en: This avoids 400 errors on proxy gateways to Vertex/Bedrock caused by an unwanted structured-outputs header.

changes.raw: Fixed `--channels` bypass for Team/Enterprise orgs with no other managed settings configured
changes.summary: 修复团队版通道绕过
changes.summary_en: Fix channel bypass for managed orgs
changes.why_matters: 确保 Team/Enterprise 组织的权限与管理策略不会被 `--channels` 绕过。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures Team/Enterprise org policies and permissions are not bypassed by `--channels`.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash on Node.js 18
changes.summary: 修复 Node18 崩溃
changes.why_matters: 直接提升旧版运行环境的稳定性，避免 CLI 无法使用。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves stability on older runtimes and prevents the CLI from crashing.

changes.raw: Fixed unnecessary permission prompts for Bash commands containing dashes in strings
changes.summary: 修复 Bash 误触审批
changes.why_matters: 减少包含连字符字符串的 Bash 命令被错误拦截，提升执行流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces false approval prompts for Bash commands with dashed strings and improves flow.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin hooks blocking prompt submission when the plugin directory is deleted mid-session
changes.summary: 修复插件钩子阻塞提交
changes.summary_en: Fix plugin hooks blocking prompt submit
changes.why_matters: 即使插件目录被删除，用户也能继续提交提示，不会卡住会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can keep submitting prompts even if the plugin directory disappears mid-session.

changes.raw: Fixed a race condition where background agent task output could hang indefinitely when the task completed between polling intervals
changes.summary: 修复后台任务输出卡死
changes.why_matters: 避免后台代理任务完成后输出无限挂起，提升长任务可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents background agent output from hanging indefinitely after task completion.

changes.raw: Resuming a session that was in a worktree now switches back to that worktree
changes.summary: 恢复工作树会话上下文
changes.summary_en: Resume sessions in the original worktree
changes.why_matters: 恢复会话时会自动切回原来的 worktree，减少上下文错位。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming a session now returns to the original worktree, reducing context mismatch.

changes.raw: Fixed `/btw` not including pasted text when used during an active response
changes.summary: 修复 /btw 粘贴丢失
changes.why_matters: 在回复进行中使用 `/btw` 时，粘贴内容不会再丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Pasted text is no longer lost when using `/btw` during an active response.

changes.raw: Fixed a race where fast Cmd+Tab followed by paste could beat the clipboard copy under tmux
changes.summary: 修复 tmux 剪贴板竞态
changes.why_matters: 减少快速切换窗口后粘贴内容不正确的问题，提升终端体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents incorrect pastes after fast window switching, improving terminal usability.

changes.raw: Fixed terminal tab title not updating with an auto-generated session description
changes.summary: 修复终端标题不更新
changes.why_matters: 自动生成会话描述后，终端标签能及时反映当前任务。
changes.why_matters_en: The terminal tab title now reflects the auto-generated session description promptly.

changes.raw: Fixed invisible hook attachments inflating the message count in transcript mode
changes.summary: 修正转录模式消息数异常
changes.summary_en: Fix hidden hooks inflating transcript count
changes.why_matters: 避免隐藏钩子导致消息统计失真，提升转录模式的准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents hidden hooks from skewing transcript counts and improves accuracy in transcript mode.

changes.raw: Fixed Remote Control sessions showing a generic title instead of deriving from the first prompt
changes.summary: 修正远程会话标题来源
changes.why_matters: 让远程控制会话标题更有意义，便于用户快速识别当前会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes Remote Control session titles meaningful so users can identify sessions more easily.

changes.raw: Fixed `/rename` not syncing the title for Remote Control sessions
changes.summary: 修正重命名不同步标题
changes.why_matters: 确保用户重命名后各处标题一致，减少混淆。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps titles consistent after renaming and reduces confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed Remote Control `/exit` not reliably archiving the session
changes.summary: 修正退出后归档不稳定
changes.why_matters: 避免远程会话退出后未正确归档，防止会话状态丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents session state from being lost when Remote Control exits.

changes.raw: Improved MCP read/search tool calls to collapse into a single "Queried {server}" line (expand with Ctrl+O)
changes.summary: MCP查询折叠更简洁
changes.summary_en: Collapse MCP queries into one line
changes.why_matters: 让输出更紧凑，减少噪音，便于阅读和回溯查询记录。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes output less noisy and easier to read by collapsing repeated MCP tool calls.

changes.raw: Improved `!` bash mode discoverability — Claude now suggests it when you need to run an interactive command
changes.summary: 增强 bash 交互命令提示
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更容易发现交互式命令运行方式，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users discover interactive command execution more easily.

changes.raw: Improved plugin freshness — ref-tracked plugins now re-clone on every load to pick up upstream changes
changes.summary: 插件加载更及时更新
changes.why_matters: 确保插件每次加载都能拿到上游最新改动，减少旧版本问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures plugins pick up upstream changes on every load and avoids stale versions.

changes.raw: Improved Remote Control session titles to refresh after your third message
changes.summary: 远程会话标题自动刷新
changes.summary_en: Refresh Remote Control titles after 3 msgs
changes.why_matters: 让会话标题更快反映对话内容，提升会话管理体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Updates titles sooner so session management stays aligned with the conversation.

changes.raw: Updated MCP OAuth to support Client ID Metadata Document (CIMD / SEP-991) for servers without Dynamic Client Registration
changes.summary: 支持 MCP OAuth 新标准
changes.why_matters: 扩大了对更多 MCP 服务器的认证兼容性，降低接入门槛。
changes.why_matters_en: Expands authentication compatibility for more MCP servers and lowers integration friction.

changes.raw: Changed plan mode to hide the "clear context" option by default (restore with `"showClearContextOnPlanAccept": true`)
changes.summary: 计划模式默认隐藏清空上下文
changes.summary_en: Hide clear-context by default in plan mode
changes.why_matters: 减少误操作风险，让计划模式默认更安全、更克制。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces accidental context clearing and makes plan mode safer by default.

changes.raw: Disabled line-by-line response streaming on Windows (including WSL in Windows Terminal) due to rendering issues
changes.summary: 关闭 Windows 分行流式输出
changes.why_matters: 修复 Windows 终端渲染问题，避免输出显示异常。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids rendering issues on Windows terminals and prevents broken output display.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed Windows PATH inheritance for Bash tool when using Git Bash (regression in v2.1.78)
changes.summary: 修正 Git Bash PATH 继承
changes.summary_en: Fix Git Bash PATH inheritance in VSCode
changes.why_matters: 恢复 Bash 工具在 VSCode 中的环境变量继承，避免命令找不到。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores PATH inheritance for Bash in VSCode so commands resolve correctly.

signals.title: Push events into a running session with channels
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code
I'm 60 years old. Claude Code killed a passion
Show HN: GitAgent – An open standard that turns any Git repo into an AI agent

changes.raw: Added `rate_limits` field to statusline scripts for displaying Claude.ai rate limit usage (5-hour and 7-day windows with `used_percentage` and `resets_at`)
changes.summary: 状态栏显示限额用量
changes.summary_en: Show rate limit usage in statusline
changes.why_matters: 用户可以直接在状态栏查看 Claude.ai 限额使用情况，便于控制 5 小时和 7 天窗口内的消耗。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see Claude.ai rate limit usage in the statusline, making it easier to manage consumption across 5-hour and 7-day windows.

changes.raw: Added `source: 'settings'` plugin marketplace source — declare plugin entries inline in settings.json
changes.summary: 设置中可内联声明插件
changes.why_matters: 用户可以直接在 settings.json 中配置插件来源，简化插件市场接入和管理。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can declare plugin entries directly in settings.json, simplifying marketplace setup and management.

changes.raw: Added CLI tool usage detection to plugin tips, in addition to file pattern matching
changes.summary: 插件提示支持 CLI 检测
changes.summary_en: Plugin tips detect CLI usage too
changes.why_matters: 插件提示不再只依赖文件模式匹配，能更准确地推荐适合的插件。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin tips are no longer limited to file pattern matching, so recommendations can be more accurate.

changes.raw: Added `effort` frontmatter support for skills and slash commands to override the model effort level when invoked
changes.summary: 技能和命令可覆写 effort
changes.summary_en: Skills and commands can override effort
changes.why_matters: 用户可在调用技能或 slash command 时指定模型 effort，获得更符合任务需求的响应。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can override model effort when invoking skills or slash commands, getting behavior better suited to the task.

changes.raw: Added `--channels` (research preview) — allow MCP servers to push messages into your session
changes.summary: 支持 MCP 推送消息
changes.summary_en: Allow MCP servers to push messages
changes.why_matters: MCP 服务器可以主动向会话推送消息，增强实时协作和自动化交互能力。
changes.why_matters_en: MCP servers can push messages into a session, improving real-time collaboration and automation.

changes.raw: Fixed `--resume` dropping parallel tool results — sessions with parallel tool calls now restore all tool_use/tool_result pairs instead of showing `[Tool result missing]` placeholders
changes.summary: 恢复并行工具结果
changes.summary_en: Restore parallel tool results on resume
changes.why_matters: 重新恢复会话时不会再丢失并行工具调用结果，避免出现缺失占位符影响上下文。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming sessions now preserves parallel tool call results, avoiding missing placeholders that break context.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode WebSocket failures caused by Cloudflare bot detection on non-browser TLS fingerprints
changes.summary: 修复语音模式连接失败
changes.why_matters: 语音模式在受 Cloudflare 反机器人检测影响时也能正常连接，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Voice mode can connect reliably even when Cloudflare bot detection affects non-browser TLS fingerprints.

changes.raw: Fixed 400 errors when using fine-grained tool streaming through API proxies, Bedrock, or Vertex
changes.summary: 修复代理流式工具 400 错误
changes.summary_en: Fix 400 errors in streamed tool calls
changes.why_matters: 通过 API 代理、Bedrock 或 Vertex 使用细粒度工具流时不再报 400，提升兼容性。
changes.why_matters_en: Fine-grained tool streaming works through API proxies, Bedrock, and Vertex without 400 errors.

changes.raw: Fixed `/remote-control` appearing for gateway and third-party provider deployments where it cannot function
changes.summary: 隐藏不可用远程控制
changes.why_matters: 网关和第三方部署中不会再显示无法使用的 /remote-control，减少误导。
changes.why_matters_en: Gateway and third-party deployments no longer show /remote-control when it cannot function.

changes.raw: Fixed `/sandbox` tab switching not responding to Tab or arrow keys
changes.summary: 修复 sandbox 标签切换
changes.why_matters: 用户可以正常用 Tab 和方向键切换 /sandbox 标签页，提升键盘操作体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can switch /sandbox tabs with Tab and arrow keys again, improving keyboard navigation.

changes.raw: Improved responsiveness of `@` file autocomplete in large git repositories
changes.summary: 大仓库文件补全更快
changes.summary_en: Faster @ file autocomplete in large repos
changes.why_matters: 在大型 git 仓库中使用 @ 文件补全时响应更快，减少等待时间。
changes.why_matters_en: File autocomplete with @ is more responsive in large git repositories, reducing wait time.

changes.raw: Improved `/effort` to show what auto currently resolves to, matching the status bar indicator
changes.summary: effort 显示自动值
changes.why_matters: 用户能看到 /effort 的 auto 最终解析结果，与状态栏保持一致，减少困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see what /effort auto resolves to, matching the status bar and reducing confusion.

changes.raw: Improved `/permissions` — Tab and arrow keys now switch tabs from within a list
changes.summary: 权限页支持键盘切换
changes.why_matters: 在 /permissions 的列表中也能用 Tab 和方向键切换标签页，操作更顺手。
changes.why_matters_en: Tab and arrow keys now switch tabs from within /permissions lists, making navigation smoother.

changes.raw: Improved background tasks panel — left arrow now closes from the list view
changes.summary: 后台任务面板更易关闭
changes.why_matters: 在列表视图中按左箭头即可返回，减少后台任务面板的操作步骤。
changes.why_matters_en: The left arrow now closes the background tasks panel from list view, reducing navigation steps.

changes.raw: Simplified plugin install tips to use a single `/plugin install` command instead of a two-step flow
changes.summary: 插件安装提示更简洁
changes.why_matters: 安装插件时只需一个 /plugin install 命令，降低学习和操作成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin installation now uses a single /plugin install command, lowering the learning and action cost.

changes.raw: Reduced memory usage on startup in large repositories (~80 MB saved on 250k-file repos)
changes.summary: 启动内存占用更低
changes.why_matters: 在大型仓库中启动时更省内存，能改善性能并降低资源占用。
changes.why_matters_en: Startup uses less memory in large repos, improving performance and reducing resource usage.

changes.raw: Fixed managed settings (`enabledPlugins`, `permissions.defaultMode`, policy-set env vars) not being applied at startup when `remote-settings.json` was cached from a prior session
changes.summary: 启动时正确应用托管设置
changes.why_matters: 修复缓存导致的配置未生效问题，确保插件、权限和策略环境变量按预期启用。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixes cached-config startup issues so plugins, permissions, and policy env vars are applied as expected.

signals.title: Push events into a running session with channels
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code
I'm 60 years old. Claude Code killed a passion
Coding after coders: The end of computer programming as we know it?

changes.raw: Added `--console` flag to `claude auth login` for Anthropic Console (API billing) authentication
changes.summary: 登录支持Console计费认证
changes.why_matters: 让用户可以直接使用 Anthropic Console 计费方式登录，扩展了可用的认证入口。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets users sign in with Anthropic Console billing, expanding available auth options.

changes.raw: Added "Show turn duration" toggle to the `/config` menu
changes.summary: 配置页可显示轮次时长
changes.summary_en: Add turn duration toggle in config
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按需查看每轮耗时，便于评估交互效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can optionally view per-turn duration to assess interaction efficiency.

changes.raw: Fixed `claude -p` hanging when spawned as a subprocess without explicit stdin (e.g. Python `subprocess.run`)
changes.summary: 修复子进程下-p卡死
changes.why_matters: 避免在脚本或自动化调用中无 stdin 时命令挂起，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents hangs when called from scripts or automation without stdin, improving reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed Ctrl+C not working in `-p` (print) mode
changes.summary: 修复-p模式Ctrl+C失效
changes.why_matters: 用户可以正常中断打印模式任务，避免无法退出。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can now interrupt print mode normally instead of being stuck.

changes.raw: Fixed `/btw` returning the main agent's output instead of answering the side question when triggered during streaming
changes.summary: 修复流式中/btw答错对象
changes.why_matters: 侧问在流式输出时能正确返回答案，避免上下文混淆。
changes.why_matters_en: Side questions now return the correct answer during streaming instead of mixing outputs.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode not activating correctly on startup when `voiceEnabled: true` is set
changes.summary: 修复语音模式启动失效
changes.why_matters: 开启语音后启动即可生效，减少手动切换步骤。
changes.why_matters_en: Voice mode now activates on startup as expected, reducing manual setup.

changes.raw: Fixed left/right arrow tab navigation in `/permissions`
changes.summary: 修复权限页左右键切换
changes.summary_en: Fix arrow tab navigation in permissions
changes.why_matters: 提升权限设置界面的键盘操作体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves keyboard navigation in the permissions UI.

changes.raw: Fixed `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TERMINAL_TITLE` not preventing terminal title from being set on startup
changes.summary: 禁用终端标题设置生效
changes.why_matters: 用户可按配置阻止程序修改终端标题，增强控制感。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can now prevent terminal title changes as configured, improving control.

changes.raw: Fixed custom status line showing nothing when workspace trust is blocking it
changes.summary: 受信任限制时状态栏可见
changes.why_matters: 在工作区信任受限时不再出现空白状态栏，减少困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: The status line no longer appears blank when workspace trust blocks it, reducing confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed enterprise users being unable to retry on rate limit (429) errors
changes.summary: 企业用户可重试429错误
changes.why_matters: 企业用户遇到限流时可以继续重试，减少任务中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Enterprise users can retry after rate limits, reducing task interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed `SessionEnd` hooks not firing when using interactive `/resume` to switch sessions
changes.summary: 修复resume切换会话钩子
changes.why_matters: 切换会话时钩子能正确触发，保证自动化收尾逻辑执行。
changes.why_matters_en: Hooks now fire correctly when switching sessions, ensuring cleanup automation runs.

changes.raw: Improved startup memory usage by ~18MB across all scenarios
changes.summary: 启动内存减少18MB
changes.why_matters: 降低启动资源占用，提升整体运行效率。
changes.why_matters_en: It lowers startup resource usage and improves overall efficiency.

changes.raw: Improved non-streaming API fallback with a 2-minute per-attempt timeout, preventing sessions from hanging indefinitely
changes.summary: 非流式回退避免无限挂起
changes.why_matters: 为回退请求增加超时，防止会话无限卡住。
changes.why_matters_en: A timeout on fallback requests prevents sessions from hanging indefinitely.

changes.raw: `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_SEED_DIR` now supports multiple seed directories separated by the platform path delimiter (`:` on Unix, `;` on Windows)
changes.summary: 插件种子目录支持多路径
changes.why_matters: 插件初始化可以从多个目录加载，配置更灵活。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin seeding can load from multiple directories, making setup more flexible.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added `/remote-control` — bridge your session to claude.ai/code to continue from a browser or phone
changes.summary: VSCode远程接管会话
changes.why_matters: 用户可将会话接到浏览器或手机继续操作，提升跨设备协作能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can continue a session from browser or phone, improving cross-device collaboration.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Session tabs now get AI-generated titles based on your first message
changes.summary: 会话标签自动生成标题
changes.why_matters: 根据首条消息自动命名会话标签，能更快识别和切换历史会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Auto-titling session tabs from the first message makes past sessions easier to पहचान and switch.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed the thinking pill showing "Thinking" instead of "Thought for Ns" after a response completes
changes.summary: 修复思考状态显示错误
changes.why_matters: 修正响应结束后状态文案，避免界面显示与实际状态不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes the status text after completion so the UI matches the actual state.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed missing session diff button when opening sessions from the left sidebar
changes.summary: 修复侧栏会话差异按钮缺失
changes.why_matters: 恢复差异查看入口后，用户从侧栏打开会话时也能正常对比变更。
changes.why_matters_en: Restoring the diff button lets users compare changes when opening sessions from the sidebar.

signals.title: Push events into a running session with channels
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code
I'm 60 years old. Claude Code killed a passion
Coding after coders: The end of computer programming as we know it?

changes.raw: Added `StopFailure` hook event that fires when the turn ends due to an API error (rate limit, auth failure, etc.)
changes.summary: 新增失败停止钩子事件
changes.why_matters: 当 API 出错导致会话结束时，插件现在可以及时接收事件并做出响应。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugins can now react when a turn ends due to API errors.

changes.raw: Added `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}` variable for plugin persistent state that survives plugin updates; `/plugin uninstall` prompts before deleting it
changes.summary: 插件持久数据可跨更新保留
changes.why_matters: 插件更新后仍能保留状态，减少配置丢失并提升插件体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin state survives updates, avoiding data loss and improving usability.

changes.raw: Added `effort`, `maxTurns`, and `disallowedTools` frontmatter support for plugin-shipped agents
changes.summary: 插件代理支持更多前置配置
changes.why_matters: 插件作者可以更精细地定义代理行为和工具权限。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin authors can define agent behavior and tool access more precisely.

changes.raw: Terminal notifications (iTerm2/Kitty/Ghostty popups, progress bar) now reach the outer terminal when running inside tmux with `set -g allow-passthrough on`
changes.summary: tmux 内通知可透传到外层终端
changes.why_matters: 在 tmux 中运行时也能正常看到终端弹窗和进度提示。
changes.why_matters_en: Terminal popups and progress indicators now work properly inside tmux.

changes.raw: Response text now streams line-by-line as it's generated
changes.summary: 回复内容按行实时流式输出
changes.summary_en: Stream response text line by line
changes.why_matters: 用户能更快看到生成结果，提升交互响应感。
changes.why_matters_en: Users see output sooner, making the interaction feel more responsive.

changes.raw: Fixed `git log HEAD` failing with "ambiguous argument" inside sandboxed Bash on Linux, and stub files polluting `git status` in the working directory
changes.summary: 修复 Linux 沙箱 git log 与状态污染
changes.summary_en: Fix git log and status pollution in sandbox
changes.why_matters: 避免沙箱环境下 Git 命令失败并污染工作区状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents Git failures in sandboxed Bash and avoids polluting the working tree.

changes.raw: Fixed `cc log` and `--resume` silently truncating conversation history on large sessions (>5 MB) that used subagents
changes.summary: 修复大会话续接历史被截断
changes.summary_en: Fix history truncation on large sessions
changes.why_matters: 长会话和子代理场景下，历史记录现在不会悄悄丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Conversation history is no longer silently lost in large sessions with subagents.

changes.raw: Fixed infinite loop when API errors triggered stop hooks that re-fed blocking errors to the model
changes.summary: 修复停止钩子导致的死循环
changes.why_matters: 避免 API 错误触发后反复重试，导致会话卡死。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents API errors from causing a self-reinforcing loop that can hang the session.

changes.raw: Fixed `deny: ["mcp__servername"]` permission rules not removing MCP server tools before sending to the model, allowing it to see and attempt blocked tools
changes.summary: 权限拒绝规则现可屏蔽 MCP 工具
changes.summary_en: Fix denied MCP tools being exposed
changes.why_matters: 被拒绝的 MCP 工具不再提前暴露给模型，减少越权尝试。
changes.why_matters_en: Denied MCP tools are no longer exposed to the model, reducing unauthorized attempts.

changes.raw: Fixed `sandbox.filesystem.allowWrite` not working with absolute paths (previously required `//` prefix)
changes.summary: 修复绝对路径写入沙箱权限
changes.summary_en: Fix sandbox write access for absolute paths
changes.why_matters: 绝对路径现在可按预期授权写入，不再需要特殊前缀。
changes.why_matters_en: Absolute paths now work with write अनुमति as expected without special prefixes.

changes.raw: Fixed `/sandbox` Dependencies tab showing Linux prerequisites on macOS instead of macOS-specific info
changes.summary: 修复 /sandbox 依赖页平台信息错误
changes.summary_en: Fix wrong platform info in /sandbox tab
changes.why_matters: macOS 用户现在能看到正确的依赖说明。
changes.why_matters_en: macOS users now see the correct dependency guidance.

changes.raw: **Security:** Fixed silent sandbox disable when `sandbox.enabled: true` is set but dependencies are missing — now shows a visible startup warning
changes.summary: 沙箱缺依赖时不再静默关闭
changes.summary_en: Warn visibly when sandbox cannot start
changes.why_matters: 避免用户误以为沙箱已启用，实际却在无保护环境中运行。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents users from assuming sandboxing is active when it has silently fallen back.

changes.raw: Fixed `.git`, `.claude`, and other protected directories being writable without a prompt in `bypassPermissions` mode
changes.summary: 修复绕过权限下受保护目录可写
changes.summary_en: Fix protected dirs writable in bypass mode
changes.why_matters: 防止 .git、.claude 等受保护目录被无提示修改。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents silent writes to protected directories like .git and .claude.

changes.raw: Fixed ctrl+u in normal mode scrolling instead of readline kill-line (ctrl+u/ctrl+d half-page scroll moved to transcript mode only)
changes.summary: 修复 Ctrl+U 误触翻页
changes.summary_en: Fix Ctrl+U scrolling in normal mode
changes.why_matters: 键盘快捷键行为恢复正常，减少编辑和浏览时的误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Keyboard shortcuts behave correctly again, reducing accidental scrolling.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode modifier-combo push-to-talk keybindings (e.g. ctrl+k) requiring a hold instead of activating immediately
changes.summary: 修复语音模式快捷键需长按
changes.summary_en: Fix voice hotkeys requiring a hold
changes.why_matters: 语音模式下按键触发更符合预期，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Voice mode hotkeys now trigger as expected, improving usability.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode not working on WSL2 with WSLg (Windows 11); WSL1/Win10 users now get a clear error
changes.summary: 修复WSL2语音模式问题
changes.why_matters: 让 Windows 11 的 WSL2 用户能正常使用语音模式，并为不支持的环境提供明确提示。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores voice mode for Windows 11 WSL2 users and gives clearer errors on unsupported setups.

changes.raw: Fixed `--worktree` flag not loading skills and hooks from the worktree directory
changes.summary: 工作树技能钩子可正常加载
changes.summary_en: Load skills and hooks from worktree
changes.why_matters: 确保 `--worktree` 下的技能和钩子能按预期生效，避免工作区配置丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures skills and hooks load correctly under `--worktree`, preventing missing workspace behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_GIT_INSTRUCTIONS` and `includeGitInstructions` setting not suppressing the git status section in the system prompt
changes.summary: 可正确隐藏Git提示段
changes.why_matters: 让相关配置真正生效，避免系统提示中出现不需要的 Git 状态信息。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes the suppression settings work as intended and removes unwanted Git status from the system prompt.

changes.raw: Fixed Bash tool not finding Homebrew and other PATH-dependent binaries when VS Code is launched from Dock/Spotlight
changes.summary: 修复VS Code启动路径问题
changes.summary_en: Fix PATH binaries in VS Code launches
changes.why_matters: 让 Bash 工具在从 Dock/Spotlight 启动的 VS Code 中也能找到 Homebrew 等依赖 PATH 的命令。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets Bash tools find PATH-dependent binaries like Homebrew even when VS Code is launched from Dock or Spotlight.

changes.raw: Fixed washed-out Claude orange color in VS Code/Cursor/code-server terminals that don't advertise truecolor support
changes.summary: 终端橙色显示更准确
changes.summary_en: Improve Claude orange in limited terminals
changes.why_matters: 在不支持 truecolor 的终端里，Claude 品牌色显示更接近预期，提升可读性和一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves color fidelity in terminals without truecolor support, making the UI more consistent and readable.

changes.raw: Added `ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_MODEL_OPTION` env var to add a custom entry to the `/model` picker, with optional `_NAME` and `_DESCRIPTION` suffixed vars for display
changes.summary: 支持自定义模型入口
changes.summary_en: Add custom model option in picker
changes.why_matters: 用户可以把自定义模型直接加入 `/model` 选择器，提升模型切换和扩展的灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can add custom models directly to the `/model` picker, making model selection more flexible and extensible.

changes.raw: Fixed `ANTHROPIC_BETAS` environment variable being silently ignored when using Haiku models
changes.summary: Haiku模型正确读取Betas
changes.why_matters: 避免环境变量被静默忽略，确保 Haiku 模型按配置启用对应 beta 功能。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents silent config loss and ensures Haiku models honor beta features set via environment variables.

changes.raw: Fixed queued prompts being concatenated without a newline separator
changes.summary: 排队提示词自动加换行
changes.why_matters: 避免多个排队输入被拼接成一条，减少提示词混乱和误执行。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents queued prompts from merging together, reducing confusion and accidental misexecution.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage and startup time when resuming large sessions
changes.summary: 大会话恢复更快更省内存
changes.why_matters: 在恢复大型会话时更快启动且占用更少内存，提升整体响应体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes resuming large sessions faster and less memory-intensive, improving overall responsiveness.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed a brief flash of the login screen when opening the sidebar while already authenticated
changes.summary: 侧边栏登录闪屏已修复
changes.summary_en: Fix login flash in VS Code sidebar
changes.why_matters: 减少已登录用户打开侧边栏时的短暂闪烁，提升界面观感。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes a brief visual flash for already authenticated users, improving polish.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed "API Error: Rate limit reached" when selecting Opus — model dropdown no longer offers 1M context variant to subscribers whose plan tier is unknown
changes.summary: Opus下拉不再误选限额版
changes.summary_en: Avoid rate-limit errors in Opus picker
changes.why_matters: 避免为未知套餐用户展示不适用的 1M 上下文版本，减少选择后报错。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents showing an unsupported 1M-context Opus variant to users with unknown plan tiers, avoiding rate-limit errors.

signals.title: Agents that run while I sleep
Push events into a running session with channels
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code
I'm 60 years old. Claude Code killed a passion

changes.raw: Increased default maximum output token limits for Claude Opus 4.6 to 64k tokens, and the upper bound for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 models to 128k tokens
changes.summary: 提升默认输出与上限
changes.summary_en: Higher default and max output tokens
changes.why_matters: 用户可以一次生成更长内容，减少分段输出和重复请求。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can generate longer outputs in one shot, reducing split responses and repeat requests.

changes.raw: Added `allowRead` sandbox filesystem setting to re-allow read access within `denyRead` regions
changes.summary: 新增只读例外设置
changes.why_matters: 用户可在受限目录中重新开放只读访问，提升沙箱配置灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can re-enable read access inside restricted regions, making sandbox policies more flexible.

changes.raw: `/copy` now accepts an optional index: `/copy N` copies the Nth-latest assistant response
changes.summary: 复制指定历史回复
changes.summary_en: Copy a specific past assistant reply
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更快取用最近的某条回复，减少翻找和重复操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can quickly copy a specific recent reply without searching through the conversation.

changes.raw: Fixed "Always Allow" on compound bash commands (e.g. `cd src && npm test`) saving a single rule for the full string instead of per-subcommand, leading to dead rules and repeated permission prompts
changes.summary: 修复复合命令授权规则
changes.summary_en: Fix Always Allow rules for compound bash
changes.why_matters: 避免复合命令被拆成无效规则，减少反复弹权限提示。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents compound commands from creating dead rules and repeated permission prompts.

changes.raw: Fixed auto-updater starting overlapping binary downloads when the slash-command overlay repeatedly opened and closed, accumulating tens of gigabytes of memory
changes.summary: 修复更新器重复下载占内存
changes.why_matters: 可防止内存和磁盘被快速耗尽，避免客户端卡死或崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents memory and disk exhaustion that could freeze or crash the client.

changes.raw: Fixed `--resume` silently truncating recent conversation history due to a race between memory-extraction writes and the main transcript
changes.summary: 修复续会历史被截断
changes.why_matters: 用户恢复会话时不会丢失最近上下文，保证连续性和可追溯性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users keep recent context when resuming sessions, preserving continuity and traceability.

changes.raw: Fixed PreToolUse hooks returning `"allow"` bypassing `deny` permission rules, including enterprise managed settings
changes.summary: 修复钩子绕过拒绝规则
changes.why_matters: 防止自动化钩子绕过权限控制，避免企业策略失效。
changes.why_matters_en: This stops automation hooks from bypassing permission controls and breaking enterprise policy.

changes.raw: Fixed Write tool silently converting line endings when overwriting CRLF files or creating files in CRLF directories
changes.summary: 修复写入时换行被改动
changes.why_matters: 可避免无意修改文件格式，减少跨平台项目中的脏改动。
changes.why_matters_en: This avoids accidental file-format changes and reduces noisy diffs in cross-platform projects.

changes.raw: Fixed memory growth in long-running sessions from progress messages surviving compaction
changes.summary: 修复长会话内存增长
changes.summary_en: Fix memory growth in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 长时间使用时更稳定，减少内存泄漏带来的性能下降。
changes.why_matters_en: Long-running sessions stay stable and avoid performance degradation from memory leaks.

changes.raw: Fixed cost and token usage not being tracked when the API falls back to non-streaming mode
changes.summary: 修复非流式计费统计
changes.summary_en: Fix usage tracking in non-streaming mode
changes.why_matters: 用户能获得准确的成本和 token 统计，便于监控与预算控制。
changes.why_matters_en: Users get accurate cost and token tracking for monitoring and budget control.

changes.raw: Fixed `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS` not stripping beta tool-schema fields, causing proxy gateways to reject requests
changes.summary: 修复禁用实验字段失效
changes.summary_en: Fix beta schema stripping for proxies
changes.why_matters: 可避免代理网关因多余字段拒绝请求，提升兼容性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents proxy gateways from rejecting requests due to unsupported beta fields.

changes.raw: Fixed Bash tool reporting errors for successful commands when the system temp directory path contains spaces
changes.summary: 修复临时目录带空格报错
changes.summary_en: Fix Bash errors with spaced temp paths
changes.why_matters: 在更多系统环境下 Bash 工具能正常返回结果，减少误报。
changes.why_matters_en: The Bash tool works correctly in more environments and avoids false error reports.

changes.raw: Fixed paste being lost when typing immediately after pasting
changes.summary: 修复粘贴后内容丢失
changes.why_matters: 避免用户输入被意外覆盖，提升编辑体验和可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents pasted text from being lost and improves input reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed Ctrl+D in `/feedback` text input deleting forward instead of the second press exiting the session
changes.summary: 修复反馈框 Ctrl+D 行为
changes.summary_en: Fix Ctrl+D behavior in feedback input
changes.why_matters: 让快捷键符合预期，减少误操作并改善终端交互。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes the shortcut behave as expected and improves terminal interaction.

changes.raw: Fixed API error when dragging a 0-byte image file into the prompt
changes.summary: 修复拖入空图片报错
changes.why_matters: 避免无效图片输入导致 API 报错，提升多模态输入鲁棒性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents API errors from invalid image input and improves multimodal robustness.

changes.raw: Fixed Claude Desktop sessions incorrectly using the terminal CLI's configured API key instead of OAuth
changes.summary: 修复桌面会话认证串用
changes.summary_en: Fix Desktop sessions using wrong auth
changes.why_matters: 避免 Claude Desktop 误用终端配置的 API key，确保登录方式和权限来源正确。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents Claude Desktop from using the terminal API key, keeping auth source and permissions correct.

changes.raw: Fixed `git-subdir` plugins at different subdirectories of the same monorepo commit colliding in the plugin cache
changes.summary: 修复插件缓存冲突
changes.why_matters: 同一 monorepo 不同子目录的插件不会再互相覆盖，减少错误复用和调试成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugins from different subdirectories no longer collide, avoiding incorrect reuse and debugging pain.

changes.raw: Fixed ordered list numbers not rendering in terminal UI
changes.summary: 修复终端列表编号显示
changes.summary_en: Fix ordered list numbering in terminal UI
changes.why_matters: 让终端界面中的有序列表正确显示，提升内容可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: Ordered lists now render correctly in the terminal UI, improving readability.

changes.raw: Fixed a race condition where stale-worktree cleanup could delete an agent worktree just resumed from a previous crash
changes.summary: 修复工作树清理误删
changes.why_matters: 避免崩溃恢复后刚恢复的 agent worktree 被误删，防止任务状态丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents a resumed agent worktree from being deleted during cleanup, avoiding lost work.

changes.raw: Fixed input deadlock when opening `/mcp` or similar dialogs while the agent is running
changes.summary: 修复运行中对话输入卡死
changes.why_matters: 打开 `/mcp` 等对话框时不会再卡住输入，保证运行中的交互不中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Opening `/mcp` and similar dialogs no longer deadlocks input, keeping interactions responsive.

changes.raw: Fixed Backspace and Delete keys not working in vim NORMAL mode
changes.summary: 修复 vim 普通模式退格删除
changes.summary_en: Fix Backspace/Delete in vim NORMAL mode
changes.why_matters: 让 vim NORMAL 模式下的编辑键恢复正常，提升键盘操作可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Backspace and Delete work again in vim NORMAL mode, improving keyboard reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed status line not updating when vim mode is toggled on or off
changes.summary: 修复 vim 模式状态栏刷新
changes.summary_en: Fix status line updates for vim mode
changes.why_matters: 切换 vim 模式时状态栏能及时反映当前状态，减少误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: The status line now updates when vim mode changes, reducing confusion and mistakes.

changes.raw: Fixed hyperlinks opening twice on Cmd+click in VS Code, Cursor, and other xterm.js-based terminals
changes.summary: 修复链接 Cmd+点开两次
changes.why_matters: 在 VS Code、Cursor 等终端里点击链接不会重复打开，避免多余窗口和误触。
changes.why_matters_en: Links no longer open twice in xterm.js-based terminals, preventing duplicate actions.

changes.raw: Fixed background colors rendering as terminal-default inside tmux with default configuration
changes.summary: 修复 tmux 默认背景色异常
changes.why_matters: 在 tmux 默认配置下 UI 颜色显示更准确，减少视觉错乱。
changes.why_matters_en: UI colors render correctly in tmux with default settings, reducing visual glitches.

changes.raw: Fixed iTerm2 session crash when selecting text inside tmux over SSH
changes.summary: 修复 tmux+SSH 选字崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix iTerm2 crash selecting text in tmux over SSH
changes.why_matters: 在远程 tmux 会话中选中文本不再导致崩溃，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Selecting text in remote tmux sessions no longer crashes iTerm2, improving stability.

changes.raw: Fixed clipboard copy silently failing in tmux sessions; copy toast now indicates whether to paste with `⌘V` or tmux `prefix+]`
changes.summary: 修复 tmux 剪贴板复制失败
changes.summary_en: Fix clipboard copy in tmux sessions
changes.why_matters: 复制内容在 tmux 中能正常使用，并明确提示粘贴方式，减少复制后无法使用的问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Clipboard copy now works in tmux and tells users how to paste, reducing failed copy workflows.

changes.raw: Fixed `←`/`→` accidentally switching tabs in settings, permissions, and sandbox dialogs while navigating lists
changes.summary: 修复方向键误切标签页
changes.summary_en: Fix arrow keys switching tabs by mistake
changes.why_matters: 在设置、权限和沙箱对话框中导航列表时不会误切标签页，操作更安全。
changes.why_matters_en: Arrow-key navigation no longer switches tabs by accident in dialogs, making navigation safer.

changes.raw: Fixed IDE integration not auto-connecting when Claude Code is launched inside tmux or screen
changes.summary: 修复 IDE 自动连接失败
changes.why_matters: 在 tmux 或 screen 中启动时 IDE 集成能自动连接，减少手动配置和断连问题。
changes.why_matters_en: IDE integration now auto-connects inside tmux or screen, reducing manual setup and connection issues.

changes.raw: Fixed CJK characters visually bleeding into adjacent UI elements when clipped at the right edge
changes.summary: 修复 CJK 字符边缘溢出
changes.summary_en: Fix CJK clipping bleed at edges
changes.why_matters: 中文等 CJK 字符在右侧裁切时不会再视觉串色，界面更整洁。
changes.why_matters_en: CJK characters no longer bleed into adjacent UI when clipped, improving visual polish.

changes.raw: Fixed teammate panes not closing when the leader exits
changes.summary: 修复队友面板退出不关闭
changes.summary_en: Fix teammate panes not closing on exit
changes.why_matters: 领导者退出时相关协作面板会正确关闭，避免残留界面和状态混乱。
changes.why_matters_en: Teammate panes now close when the leader exits, preventing stale UI and confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed iTerm2 auto mode not detecting iTerm2 for native split-pane teammates
changes.summary: 修复 iTerm2 自动模式识别
changes.why_matters: 这能让原生分屏协作场景在 iTerm2 中正常工作，减少终端兼容性问题。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores native split-pane workflows in iTerm2 and reduces terminal compatibility issues.

changes.raw: Faster startup on macOS (~60ms) by reading keychain credentials in parallel with module loading
changes.summary: macOS 启动更快
changes.why_matters: 并行读取密钥串凭据可缩短启动等待时间，让用户更快进入工作状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Parallel keychain reads reduce startup wait time and get users working sooner.

changes.raw: Faster `--resume` on fork-heavy and very large sessions — up to 45% faster loading and ~100-150MB less peak memory
changes.summary: 大会话恢复更快更省内存
changes.why_matters: 在大型或分叉很多的会话中恢复更快且占用更少内存，提升重开项目的体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming large or fork-heavy sessions is faster and uses less memory, improving reopen workflows.

changes.raw: Improved Esc to abort in-flight non-streaming API requests
changes.summary: Esc 可中止请求
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更及时地停止卡住或不需要的请求，交互更顺手。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can stop stuck or unwanted requests more quickly, making the interaction smoother.

changes.raw: Improved `claude plugin validate` to check skill, agent, and command frontmatter plus `hooks/hooks.json`, catching YAML parse errors and schema violations
changes.summary: 插件校验更全面
changes.why_matters: 更早发现 frontmatter、hooks 配置和 YAML/schema 错误，减少插件发布和运行时故障。
changes.why_matters_en: It catches frontmatter, hooks, YAML, and schema issues earlier, reducing plugin release and runtime failures.

changes.raw: Background bash tasks are now killed if output exceeds 5GB, preventing runaway processes from filling disk
changes.summary: 后台任务超量自动终止
changes.why_matters: 防止后台 bash 任务无限写入占满磁盘，降低资源耗尽和系统风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents runaway bash tasks from filling disk and reduces resource-exhaustion risk.

changes.raw: Sessions are now auto-named from plan content when you accept a plan
changes.summary: 接受计划后自动命名会话
changes.why_matters: 会话名称更有意义，方便后续查找和管理历史记录。
changes.why_matters_en: Sessions get more meaningful names, making history easier to find and manage.

changes.raw: Improved headless mode plugin installation to compose correctly with `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_SEED_DIR`
changes.summary: 头less 模式插件安装修复
changes.why_matters: 确保在 headless 场景下插件安装能正确继承种子目录配置，减少环境差异问题。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures headless installs correctly respect the seed directory configuration and avoids environment-specific breakage.

changes.raw: Show a notice when `apiKeyHelper` takes longer than 10s, preventing it from blocking the main loop
changes.summary: 慢速密钥助手提示告警
changes.why_matters: 当密钥助手过慢时会提示用户，避免它长时间阻塞主循环。
changes.why_matters_en: Users are warned when the key helper is slow, preventing it from blocking the main loop for too long.

changes.raw: The Agent tool no longer accepts a `resume` parameter — use `SendMessage({to: agentId})` to continue a previously spawned agent
changes.summary: Agent 工具移除 resume 参数
changes.summary_en: Agent tool no longer accepts resume
changes.why_matters: 这是接口变更，现有调用需要改用新的 SendMessage 方式继续已启动的 agent。
changes.why_matters_en: This is an API change, so existing calls must switch to the new SendMessage flow to continue agents.

changes.raw: `SendMessage` now auto-resumes stopped agents in the background instead of returning an error
changes.summary: SendMessage 自动续启停止代理
changes.why_matters: 用户无需手动处理已停止的 agent，协作式任务可以更顺畅地继续执行。
changes.why_matters_en: Users no longer need to manually recover stopped agents, so collaborative tasks can continue more smoothly.

changes.raw: Renamed `/fork` to `/branch` (`/fork` still works as an alias)
changes.summary: /fork 重命名为 /branch
changes.why_matters: 命令名称发生变化，脚本和习惯用法需要更新，尽管旧别名仍可用。
changes.why_matters_en: The command name changed, so scripts and habits may need updating even though the old alias still works.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Improved plan preview tab titles to use the plan's heading instead of "Claude's Plan"
changes.summary: VSCode 计划预览标题更清晰
changes.why_matters: 用计划标题替代固定文案后，预览标签更易区分和浏览。
changes.why_matters_en: Using the plan heading instead of a fixed label makes preview tabs easier to distinguish and scan.

changes.raw: [VSCode] When option+click doesn't trigger native selection on macOS, the footer now points to the `macOptionClickForcesSelection` setting
changes.summary: VSCode 选区提示更准确
changes.why_matters: 当 macOS 原生选区失效时，提示会指向正确设置，帮助用户快速修复。
changes.why_matters_en: When native selection fails on macOS, the hint points to the right setting so users can fix it quickly.

signals.title: No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Push events into a running session with channels
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code

changes.raw: Added MCP elicitation support — MCP servers can now request structured input mid-task via an interactive dialog (form fields or browser URL)
changes.summary: 支持MCP交互式补充输入
changes.why_matters: MCP服务器可在任务中途请求结构化输入，提升复杂工作流的交互性和可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: MCP servers can request structured input mid-task, improving interactivity and control for complex workflows.

changes.raw: Added new `Elicitation` and `ElicitationResult` hooks to intercept and override responses before they're sent back
changes.summary: 新增拦截补充输入钩子
changes.why_matters: 允许在响应回传前拦截并覆盖内容，便于集成自定义审批或自动化逻辑。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets integrations intercept and override responses before they are sent back, enabling custom approval or automation logic.

changes.raw: Added `-n` / `--name <name>` CLI flag to set a display name for the session at startup
changes.summary: 启动时可设会话显示名
changes.summary_en: Set session display name at startup
changes.why_matters: 会话更容易识别和管理，尤其适合多会话并行使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Sessions are easier to identify and manage, especially when running many in parallel.

changes.raw: Added `worktree.sparsePaths` setting for `claude --worktree` in large monorepos to check out only the directories you need via git sparse-checkout
changes.summary: 大仓库仅检出所需目录
changes.why_matters: 在大型单体仓库中可显著减少检出范围，节省时间和磁盘空间。
changes.why_matters_en: It can greatly reduce checkout scope in large monorepos, saving time and disk space.

changes.raw: Added `PostCompact` hook that fires after compaction completes
changes.summary: 压缩后新增后置钩子
changes.why_matters: 压缩完成后可自动触发后续处理，方便串联工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: It enables automatic follow-up actions after compaction, making workflows easier to chain.

changes.raw: Added `/effort` slash command to set model effort level
changes.summary: 可设置模型努力等级
changes.why_matters: 用户可按任务复杂度调整模型投入，平衡速度与质量。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can tune model effort by task complexity, balancing speed and quality.

changes.raw: Added session quality survey — enterprise admins can configure the sample rate via the `feedbackSurveyRate` setting
changes.summary: 新增会话质量调查
changes.why_matters: 企业可收集使用反馈并按采样率控制触达，帮助改进产品体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Enterprises can collect usage feedback with configurable sampling, helping improve product experience.

changes.raw: Fixed deferred tools (loaded via `ToolSearch`) losing their input schemas after conversation compaction, causing array and number parameters to be rejected with type errors
changes.summary: 修复压缩后工具schema丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix tool schema loss after compaction
changes.why_matters: 避免数组和数字参数被误判为类型错误，保证延迟加载工具可继续正常使用。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents array and number parameters from being rejected with type errors, keeping deferred tools usable.

changes.raw: Fixed slash commands showing "Unknown skill"
changes.summary: 修复斜杠命令技能识别
changes.why_matters: 用户执行斜杠命令时不再看到“Unknown skill”错误，减少中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Users no longer hit an "Unknown skill" error when running slash commands, reducing interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed plan mode asking for re-approval after the plan was already accepted
changes.summary: 修复计划模式重复确认
changes.summary_en: Fix repeated re-approval in plan mode
changes.why_matters: 已批准的计划不会再次要求确认，减少不必要的交互摩擦。
changes.why_matters_en: Approved plans no longer ask for confirmation again, reducing unnecessary interaction friction.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode swallowing keypresses while a permission dialog or plan editor was open
changes.summary: 修复语音模式吞键
changes.why_matters: 在权限弹窗或计划编辑器打开时仍能正常输入，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Keyboard input works correctly even when permission dialogs or the plan editor are open, improving usability.

changes.raw: Fixed `/voice` not working on Windows when installed via npm
changes.summary: 修复Windows下语音不可用
changes.why_matters: Windows 用户通过 npm 安装后也能正常使用语音功能。
changes.why_matters_en: Windows users can use voice mode properly after npm installation.

changes.raw: Fixed spurious "Context limit reached" when invoking a skill with `model:` frontmatter on a 1M-context session
changes.summary: 修复技能模型前言误报限额
changes.summary_en: Fix false context limit on model frontmatter
changes.why_matters: 避免在超大上下文会话中误报“Context limit reached”，减少错误中断。
changes.why_matters_en: It avoids false "Context limit reached" errors in very large-context sessions, reducing interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed "adaptive thinking is not supported on this model" error when using non-standard model strings
changes.summary: 修复非标准模型字符串报错
changes.summary_en: Fix adaptive thinking model string error
changes.why_matters: 使用非标准模型名称时不再误报不支持，兼容性更好。
changes.why_matters_en: Non-standard model names no longer trigger a false unsupported error, improving compatibility.

changes.raw: Fixed `Bash(cmd:*)` permission rules not matching when a quoted argument contains `#`
changes.summary: 修复带#引号参数权限匹配
changes.why_matters: 包含特殊字符的命令参数可正确匹配权限规则，避免误拦截或误放行。
changes.why_matters_en: Commands with special-character arguments now match permission rules correctly, avoiding false blocks or approvals.

changes.raw: Fixed "don't ask again" in the Bash permission dialog showing the full raw command for pipes and compound commands
changes.summary: 修复 Bash 权限提示误显示命令
changes.summary_en: Fix Bash permission prompt command display
changes.why_matters: 避免在管道和复合命令场景下误导用户，提升权限确认的准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents misleading permission prompts for pipes and compound commands, improving trust in approvals.

changes.raw: Fixed auto-compaction retrying indefinitely after consecutive failures — a circuit breaker now stops after 3 attempts
changes.summary: 修复自动压缩失败后无限重试
changes.why_matters: 加入熔断后可避免失败循环占用资源并卡住工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: A circuit breaker prevents endless failure loops that waste resources and stall the workflow.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP reconnect spinner persisting after successful reconnection
changes.summary: 修复 MCP 重连后加载圈不消失
changes.why_matters: 让用户能及时看到连接已恢复，减少界面误导。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can clearly see reconnection succeeded, reducing UI confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed LSP plugins not registering servers when the LSP Manager initialized before marketplaces were reconciled
changes.summary: 修复 LSP 插件服务器注册失败
changes.why_matters: 确保语言服务正常启用，直接影响补全和诊断能力。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures language services register correctly, directly affecting completions and diagnostics.

changes.raw: Fixed clipboard copying in tmux over SSH — now attempts both direct terminal write and tmux clipboard integration
changes.summary: 修复 tmux SSH 下复制剪贴板
changes.summary_en: Fix clipboard copy in tmux over SSH
changes.why_matters: 提升远程终端场景下的复制成功率，减少手动绕行。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves copy reliability in remote terminal setups and reduces manual workarounds.

changes.raw: Fixed `/export` showing only the filename instead of the full file path in the success message
changes.summary: 修复 /export 成功提示路径不全
changes.why_matters: 让用户更容易定位导出的文件，减少查找成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can locate exported files more easily, reducing friction.

changes.raw: Fixed transcript not auto-scrolling to new messages after selecting text
changes.summary: 修复选中文本后不自动滚动
changes.why_matters: 保持新消息可见，改善长对话阅读体验。
changes.why_matters_en: New messages stay visible, improving readability in long conversations.

changes.raw: Fixed Escape key not working to exit the login method selection screen
changes.summary: 修复 Escape 无法退出登录选择
changes.summary_en: Fix Escape key on login selection
changes.why_matters: 恢复常见键盘退出方式，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores a standard keyboard escape path and improves usability.

changes.raw: Fixed several Remote Control issues: sessions silently dying when the server reaps an idle environment, rapid messages being queued one-at-a-time instead of batched, and stale work items causing redelivery after JWT refresh
changes.summary: 修复远控会话与消息重发问题
changes.summary_en: Fix remote control session and redelivery issues
changes.why_matters: 避免会话静默失效和消息重复投递，保障远程控制稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents silent session loss and duplicate message delivery, improving remote control reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed bridge sessions failing to recover after extended WebSocket disconnects
changes.summary: 修复桥接会话断连后无法恢复
changes.summary_en: Fix bridge session recovery after disconnects
changes.why_matters: 增强长时间网络中断后的恢复能力，减少任务中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves recovery after long disconnects and reduces task interruption.

changes.raw: Fixed slash commands not found when typing the exact name of a soft-hidden command
changes.summary: 修复软隐藏命令无法被找到
changes.why_matters: 确保用户输入精确命令名时仍能正常调用。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can invoke exact command names reliably, even for soft-hidden commands.

changes.raw: Improved `--worktree` startup performance by reading git refs directly and skipping redundant `git fetch` when the remote branch is already available locally
changes.summary: 加快 worktree 启动速度
changes.why_matters: 减少启动等待时间，并避免不必要的远程拉取。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces startup latency and avoids unnecessary remote fetches.

changes.raw: Improved background agent behavior — killing a background agent now preserves its partial results in the conversation context
changes.summary: 保留后台代理未完成结果
changes.why_matters: 即使代理被终止，已有进展也不会丢失，便于继续推进。
changes.why_matters_en: Partial progress is retained even if the agent is killed, making it easier to continue work.

changes.raw: Improved model fallback notifications — now always visible instead of hidden behind verbose mode, with human-friendly model names
changes.summary: 改进模型降级提示更醒目
changes.summary_en: Make fallback model notices always visible
changes.why_matters: 用户能及时知道模型切换情况，减少对结果的误解。
changes.why_matters_en: Users are informed when model fallback happens, reducing confusion about output quality.

changes.raw: Improved blockquote readability on dark terminal themes — text is now italic with a left bar instead of dim
changes.summary: 提升深色主题引用块可读性
changes.summary_en: Improve blockquote readability on dark themes
changes.why_matters: 让终端中的引用内容更清晰，阅读更舒适。
changes.why_matters_en: Quoted content is easier to read in terminal UIs, improving comfort.

changes.raw: Improved stale worktree cleanup — worktrees left behind after an interrupted parallel run are now automatically cleaned up
changes.summary: 自动清理残留工作树
changes.why_matters: 并行运行中断后会自动清理残留工作树，减少手动维护和磁盘占用。
changes.why_matters_en: Interrupted parallel runs now clean up leftover worktrees automatically, reducing manual cleanup and disk clutter.

changes.raw: Improved Remote Control session titles — now derived from your first prompt instead of showing "Interactive session"
changes.summary: 会话标题改为首条提示
changes.why_matters: 远程控制会话标题更贴近实际任务，便于识别和管理会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Remote Control session titles now reflect the actual task, making sessions easier to identify and manage.

changes.raw: Improved `/voice` to show your dictation language on enable and warn when your `language` setting isn't supported for voice input
changes.summary: 语音模式显示语言并提示兼容性
changes.summary_en: Voice shows language and warns support
changes.why_matters: 启用语音时会明确当前听写语言，并提示不受支持的语言设置，减少配置困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: Voice mode now shows the dictation language and warns about unsupported language settings, reducing configuration confusion.

changes.raw: Updated `--plugin-dir` to only accept one path to support subcommands — use repeated `--plugin-dir` for multiple directories
changes.summary: 插件目录参数改为单路径
changes.summary_en: Plugin dir now accepts one path
changes.why_matters: 该参数行为变更可能影响现有脚本和命令行用法，需要改用重复参数传入多个目录。
changes.why_matters_en: This behavior change may break existing scripts and CLI usage, requiring repeated flags for multiple directories.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed gitignore patterns containing commas silently excluding entire filetypes from the @-mention file picker
changes.summary: 修复逗号 gitignore 误过滤
changes.why_matters: 修复 VSCode 中带逗号的 gitignore 规则误伤文件类型的问题，避免文件选择器漏显示文件。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes a VSCode bug where comma-containing gitignore patterns could hide entire file types from the file picker.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Push events into a running session with channels
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games

changes.raw: Added 1M context window for Opus 4.6 by default for Max, Team, and Enterprise plans (previously required extra usage)
changes.summary: 默认开放百万上下文
changes.why_matters: 让高端套餐用户无需额外消耗即可使用超长上下文，显著提升大项目和长对话处理能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Users on higher-tier plans get long-context support without extra usage, greatly improving large-project and long-conversation handling.

changes.raw: Added `/color` command for all users to set a prompt-bar color for your session
changes.summary: 新增会话颜色设置
changes.summary_en: Add /color to set session prompt color
changes.why_matters: 用户可以自定义会话提示栏颜色，提升可视化区分和使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can customize the prompt bar color, improving visual distinction and usability.

changes.raw: Added session name display on the prompt bar when using `/rename`
changes.summary: 显示会话名称
changes.summary_en: Show session name in the prompt bar
changes.why_matters: 重命名后能直接看到当前会话名，减少切换和确认上下文的成本。
changes.why_matters_en: After renaming, the current session name is visible at a glance, reducing context-switching and confirmation overhead.

changes.raw: Added last-modified timestamps to memory files, helping Claude reason about which memories are fresh vs. stale
changes.summary: 记忆文件显示更新时间
changes.summary_en: Show last-modified time for memory files
changes.why_matters: 帮助 Claude 判断记忆是否过时，从而更可靠地使用长期上下文。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps Claude judge whether memories are stale, making long-term context use more reliable.

changes.raw: Added hook source display (settings/plugin/skill) in permission prompts when a hook requires confirmation
changes.summary: 提示钩子来源
changes.summary_en: Show hook source in permission prompts
changes.why_matters: 用户在授权时能看清钩子来自哪里，降低误授权风险并提升可审计性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see where a hook comes from before approving it, reducing accidental grants and improving auditability.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode not activating correctly on fresh installs without toggling `/voice` twice
changes.summary: 修复新装语音模式
changes.summary_en: Fix voice mode on fresh installs
changes.why_matters: 新安装用户无需反复切换即可正常启用语音模式，减少首次使用障碍。
changes.why_matters_en: Fresh installs can now enable voice mode correctly without extra toggling, reducing first-use friction.

changes.raw: Fixed the Claude Code header not updating the displayed model name after switching models with `/model` or Option+P
changes.summary: 切模型后标题同步
changes.summary_en: Update header model name after switching
changes.why_matters: 界面会正确显示当前模型，避免用户误以为仍在使用旧模型。
changes.why_matters_en: The UI now shows the active model correctly, preventing confusion about which model is in use.

changes.raw: Fixed session crash when an attachment message computation returns undefined values
changes.summary: 修复附件导致崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash from undefined attachment values
changes.why_matters: 避免处理附件消息时直接崩溃，提升会话稳定性和数据安全性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents crashes while processing attachment messages, improving session stability and data safety.

changes.raw: Fixed Bash tool mangling `!` in piped commands (e.g., `jq 'select(.x != .y)'` now works correctly)
changes.summary: 修复 Bash 感叹号转义
changes.summary_en: Fix Bash ! mangling in piped commands
changes.why_matters: 管道命令中的特殊字符可被正确保留，减少脚本执行错误。
changes.why_matters_en: Special characters in piped commands are preserved correctly, reducing script execution errors.

changes.raw: Fixed managed-disabled plugins showing up in the `/plugin` Installed tab — plugins force-disabled by your organization are now hidden
changes.summary: 隐藏组织禁用插件
changes.summary_en: Hide org-disabled plugins in Installed tab
changes.why_matters: 用户不会再看到无法使用的插件，减少混淆并符合组织策略。
changes.why_matters_en: Users no longer see plugins they cannot use, reducing confusion and aligning with org policy.

changes.raw: Fixed token estimation over-counting for thinking and `tool_use` blocks, preventing premature context compaction
changes.summary: 修正 token 估算
changes.why_matters: 更准确的 token 估算可避免过早触发上下文压缩，保留更多有效上下文。
changes.why_matters_en: More accurate token estimation avoids premature context compaction and preserves more useful context.

changes.raw: Fixed corrupted marketplace config path handling
changes.summary: 修复市场配置路径
changes.why_matters: 插件/市场配置路径可正常解析，减少配置失败和加载异常。
changes.why_matters_en: Marketplace and plugin config paths resolve correctly, reducing setup failures and load errors.

changes.raw: Fixed `/resume` losing session names after resuming a forked or continued session
changes.summary: 恢复会话名
changes.why_matters: 恢复 fork 或续接会话时名称不丢失，便于追踪和管理历史会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Session names are preserved when resuming, making historical sessions easier to track and manage.

changes.raw: Fixed Esc not closing the `/status` dialog after visiting the Config tab
changes.summary: 关闭状态页更顺手
changes.why_matters: 提升状态对话框的键盘操作一致性，减少小的交互摩擦。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves keyboard interaction consistency for the status dialog and reduces minor friction.

changes.raw: Fixed input handling when accepting or rejecting a plan
changes.summary: 修复计划确认输入
changes.summary_en: Fix input handling for plan approval
changes.why_matters: 用户在接受或拒绝计划时输入更可靠，避免误操作影响工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Input handling is more reliable when approving or rejecting plans, preventing workflow-disrupting mistakes.

changes.raw: Fixed footer hint in agent teams showing "↓ to expand" instead of the correct "shift + ↓ to expand"
changes.summary: 修正团队页脚展开提示
changes.why_matters: 让用户看到正确的快捷键提示，减少误操作和困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: Users now see the correct shortcut hint, reducing confusion and misclicks.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance on macOS non-MDM machines by skipping unnecessary subprocess spawns
changes.summary: 提升 macOS 启动速度
changes.why_matters: 减少不必要的进程启动，能让非 MDM 机器更快进入可用状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Skipping unnecessary subprocesses makes non-MDM Macs ready faster.

changes.raw: Suppressed async hook completion messages by default (visible with `--verbose` or transcript mode)
changes.summary: 默认隐藏异步完成消息
changes.summary_en: Hide async hook completion messages by default
changes.why_matters: 降低默认输出噪音，让终端界面更清爽，必要时仍可通过详细模式查看。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces default output noise while still allowing visibility in verbose or transcript mode.

changes.raw: Breaking change: Removed deprecated Windows managed settings fallback at `C:\ProgramData\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json` — use `C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json`
changes.summary: 移除旧版 Windows 配置回退
changes.why_matters: 旧路径不再生效，管理员需要迁移到新位置以避免配置失效。
changes.why_matters_en: The old path no longer works, so admins must move settings to the new location to avoid breakage.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Push events into a running session with channels
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games

changes.raw: Added actionable suggestions to `/context` command — identifies context-heavy tools, memory bloat, and capacity warnings with specific optimization tips
changes.summary: 优化/context给出可执行建议
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户快速发现上下文膨胀问题并按建议优化，提升会话效率和稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users spot context bloat and apply concrete fixes, improving session efficiency and stability.

changes.raw: Added `autoMemoryDirectory` setting to configure a custom directory for auto-memory storage
changes.summary: 支持自定义自动记忆目录
changes.why_matters: 让用户可以把自动记忆存到指定位置，便于管理、备份和隔离项目数据。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users store auto-memory in a chosen location for easier management, backup, and project isolation.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak where streaming API response buffers were not released when the generator was terminated early, causing unbounded RSS growth on the Node.js/npm code path
changes.summary: 修复流式响应内存泄漏
changes.why_matters: 避免 Node.js/npm 路径下 RSS 持续增长，防止长时间运行时崩溃或性能恶化。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unbounded RSS growth on the Node.js/npm path, avoiding crashes and degradation in long-running sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed managed policy `ask` rules being bypassed by user `allow` rules or skill `allowed-tools`
changes.summary: 修复策略ask规则被绕过
changes.why_matters: 确保受管策略真正生效，防止用户允许规则或技能工具意外放宽安全边界。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures managed policies are enforced and prevents user allow rules or skill tools from weakening security boundaries.

changes.raw: Fixed full model IDs (e.g., `claude-opus-4-5`) being silently ignored in agent frontmatter `model:` field and `--agents` JSON config — agents now accept the same model values as `--model`
changes.summary: 代理配置支持完整模型ID
changes.why_matters: 让代理配置与主模型参数一致，避免模型名被忽略导致行为不符合预期。
changes.why_matters_en: Aligns agent config with the main model flag so model IDs are no longer ignored and behavior matches expectations.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP OAuth authentication hanging when the callback port is already in use
changes.summary: 修复MCP OAuth端口占用卡死
changes.summary_en: Fix MCP OAuth hang on port conflict
changes.why_matters: 当回调端口被占用时不再卡住，提升第三方集成登录的成功率和可恢复性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents hangs when the callback port is busy, improving sign-in reliability for third-party integrations.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP OAuth refresh never prompting for re-auth after the refresh token expires, for OAuth servers that return errors with HTTP 200 (e.g. Slack)
changes.summary: 修复OAuth过期后无法重新授权
changes.summary_en: Fix OAuth re-auth after token expiry
changes.why_matters: 避免刷新令牌失效后静默失败，确保集成服务能及时重新认证继续工作。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids silent failure after refresh token expiry and ensures integrations can re-authenticate and keep working.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode silently failing on the macOS native binary for users whose terminal had never been granted microphone permission — the binary now includes the `audio-input` entitlement so macOS prompts correctly
changes.summary: 修复macOS语音权限提示失效
changes.why_matters: 让终端首次使用麦克风时能正常弹出权限请求，避免语音模式无声失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures macOS prompts for microphone access correctly, preventing silent voice-mode failures.

changes.raw: Fixed `SessionEnd` hooks being killed after 1.5 s on exit regardless of `hook.timeout` — now configurable via `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSIONEND_HOOKS_TIMEOUT_MS`
changes.summary: 支持配置SessionEnd钩子超时
changes.why_matters: 让退出钩子有足够时间完成清理或上报，减少任务被过早终止。
changes.why_matters_en: Gives exit hooks enough time to finish cleanup or reporting instead of being killed too early.

changes.raw: Fixed `/plugin install` failing inside the REPL for marketplace plugins with local sources
changes.summary: 修复REPL内安装本地插件失败
changes.summary_en: Fix REPL install for local plugins
changes.why_matters: 提升在交互式环境中安装 marketplace 本地源插件的成功率。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves the success rate of installing marketplace plugins with local sources in the REPL.

changes.raw: Fixed marketplace update not syncing git submodules — plugin sources in submodules no longer break after update
changes.summary: 更新插件时同步git子模块
changes.summary_en: Sync git submodules on plugin update
changes.why_matters: 避免插件更新后子模块源码缺失或损坏，减少更新后故障。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents plugin breakage after updates by keeping submodule sources in sync.

changes.raw: Fixed unknown slash commands with arguments silently dropping input — now shows your input as a warning
changes.summary: 未知斜杠命令保留输入提示
changes.summary_en: Warn on unknown slash command input
changes.why_matters: 避免用户输入被悄悄丢弃，减少命令拼写错误带来的困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents user input from being silently dropped, reducing confusion from mistyped commands.

changes.raw: Fixed Hebrew, Arabic, and other RTL text not rendering correctly in Windows Terminal, conhost, and VS Code integrated terminal
changes.summary: 修复Windows终端RTL文本显示
changes.summary_en: Fix RTL rendering on Windows terminals
changes.why_matters: 让希伯来语、阿拉伯语等右到左文本在常用终端中正确显示。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes Hebrew, Arabic, and other RTL text render correctly in common Windows terminals.

changes.raw: Fixed LSP servers not working on Windows due to malformed file URIs
changes.summary: 修复Windows上LSP文件URI错误
changes.summary_en: Fix malformed file URIs for LSP on Windows
changes.why_matters: 恢复 Windows 上语言服务器正常工作，提升代码导航和诊断能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores LSP functionality on Windows, improving code navigation and diagnostics.

changes.raw: Changed `--plugin-dir` so local dev copies now override installed marketplace plugins with the same name (unless that plugin is force-enabled by managed settings)
changes.summary: 本地开发插件优先覆盖同名插件
changes.summary_en: Local dev plugins override same-name installs
changes.why_matters: 方便开发者调试本地插件版本，减少反复卸载安装的成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes it easier to test local plugin changes without repeatedly uninstalling and reinstalling marketplace versions.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed delete button not working for Untitled sessions
changes.summary: 修复未命名会话删除按钮失效
changes.summary_en: Fix delete button for Untitled sessions
changes.why_matters: 用户现在可以正常删除未命名会话，避免界面操作卡住或残留无用会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can now delete Untitled sessions properly, avoiding stuck UI actions and leftover sessions.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Improved scroll wheel responsiveness in the integrated terminal with terminal-aware acceleration
changes.summary: 提升终端滚轮滚动响应
changes.why_matters: 集成终端滚动更顺畅，长输出和交互时的操作体验更好。
changes.why_matters_en: The integrated terminal scrolls more smoothly, improving usability during long outputs and interactive work.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
I'm 60 years old. Claude Code killed a passion

changes.raw: Added `modelOverrides` setting to map model picker entries to custom provider model IDs (e.g. Bedrock inference profile ARNs)
changes.summary: 支持模型映射到自定义ID
changes.summary_en: Map picker models to custom IDs
changes.why_matters: 用户可以把模型选择器里的条目映射到自定义提供方模型 ID，提升多云和企业模型接入灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can map picker entries to custom provider model IDs, improving flexibility for multi-cloud and enterprise model access.

changes.raw: Added actionable guidance when OAuth login or connectivity checks fail due to SSL certificate errors (corporate proxies, `NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS`)
changes.summary: SSL失败时给出排障指引
changes.why_matters: 当 OAuth 登录或连通性检查因证书问题失败时，用户能更快定位代理或 CA 配置问题。
changes.why_matters_en: When OAuth login or connectivity checks fail due to certificate issues, users can diagnose proxy or CA configuration problems faster.

changes.raw: Fixed freezes and 100% CPU loops triggered by permission prompts for complex bash commands
changes.summary: 修复复杂命令权限卡死
changes.why_matters: 复杂 bash 命令触发权限提示时不再卡死或占满 CPU，避免严重阻塞工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Complex bash commands no longer freeze or spin at 100% CPU on permission prompts, preventing major workflow stalls.

changes.raw: Fixed a deadlock that could freeze Claude Code when many skill files changed at once (e.g. during `git pull` in a repo with a large `.claude/skills/` directory)
changes.summary: 修复技能文件变更死锁
changes.summary_en: Fix deadlock on many skill changes
changes.why_matters: 大量 skill 文件同时变更时不会再冻结，提升大型仓库中拉取更新后的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Claude Code no longer freezes when many skill files change at once, improving stability after pulls in large repos.

changes.raw: Fixed Bash tool output being lost when running multiple Claude Code sessions in the same project directory
changes.summary: 修复多会话 Bash 输出丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix lost Bash output across sessions
changes.why_matters: 同一项目目录下运行多个会话时，Bash 工具输出不会再丢失，便于并行使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Bash tool output is no longer lost when multiple sessions run in the same project directory, enabling safer parallel use.

changes.raw: Fixed subagents with `model: opus`/`sonnet`/`haiku` being silently downgraded to older model versions on Bedrock, Vertex, and Microsoft Foundry
changes.summary: 修复子代理模型被降级
changes.why_matters: 子代理在 Bedrock、Vertex 和 Foundry 上会正确使用指定模型，避免能力下降和行为不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Subagents now use the intended model on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry, avoiding capability regressions and inconsistent behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed background bash processes spawned by subagents not being cleaned up when the agent exits
changes.summary: 修复子代理后台进程残留
changes.why_matters: 子代理退出时后台 bash 进程会被清理，减少资源泄漏和残留任务。
changes.why_matters_en: Background bash processes spawned by subagents are cleaned up on exit, reducing resource leaks and leftover tasks.

changes.raw: Fixed `/resume` showing the current session in the picker
changes.summary: 修复恢复会话列表显示错误
changes.why_matters: 恢复会话时不会再把当前会话混入列表，选择目标更准确。
changes.why_matters_en: The current session no longer appears in the /resume picker, making session selection more accurate.

changes.raw: Fixed `/ide` crashing with `onInstall is not defined` when auto-installing the extension
changes.summary: 修复IDE自动安装崩溃
changes.why_matters: 自动安装扩展时不会再因未定义函数崩溃，提升 IDE 集成可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Auto-installing the extension no longer crashes due to an undefined function, improving IDE integration reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed `/loop` not being available on Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry and when telemetry was disabled
changes.summary: 恢复 Bedrock 等平台的 /loop
changes.why_matters: 在 Bedrock、Vertex、Foundry 以及关闭遥测时也能使用 /loop，增强自动化可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: /loop is now available on Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry, and with telemetry disabled, improving automation availability.

changes.raw: Fixed SessionStart hooks firing twice when resuming a session via `--resume` or `--continue`
changes.summary: 修复恢复会话重复触发钩子
changes.why_matters: 通过 --resume 或 --continue 恢复会话时，SessionStart 钩子只会执行一次，避免重复副作用。
changes.why_matters_en: When resuming with --resume or --continue, SessionStart hooks fire only once, preventing duplicate side effects.

changes.raw: Fixed JSON-output hooks injecting no-op system-reminder messages into the model's context on every turn
changes.summary: 修复钩子注入无效提醒
changes.why_matters: JSON 输出钩子不再向上下文注入无意义消息，减少上下文污染和 token 浪费。
changes.why_matters_en: JSON-output hooks no longer inject meaningless messages into context, reducing context pollution and token waste.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode session corruption when a slow connection overlaps a new recording
changes.summary: 修复语音模式会话损坏
changes.why_matters: 慢网络与新录音重叠时不会再损坏会话，提升语音模式稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Voice mode sessions no longer corrupt when a slow connection overlaps a new recording, improving stability.

changes.raw: Fixed Linux sandbox failing to start with "ripgrep (rg) not found" on native builds
changes.summary: 修复 Linux 沙箱缺少 rg
changes.summary_en: Fix Linux sandbox rg startup failure
changes.why_matters: Linux 原生构建可以正常启动沙箱，不再因缺少 ripgrep 而失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Linux native builds can start the sandbox successfully instead of failing due to missing ripgrep.

changes.raw: Fixed Linux native modules not loading on Amazon Linux 2 and other glibc 2.26 systems
changes.summary: 修复老 glibc 系统模块加载
changes.summary_en: Fix native modules on older glibc
changes.why_matters: Amazon Linux 2 等旧版 glibc 环境也能正常加载原生模块，扩大可运行平台范围。
changes.why_matters_en: Native modules now load correctly on Amazon Linux 2 and other older glibc environments, expanding platform support.

changes.raw: Fixed "media_type: Field required" API error when receiving images via Remote Control
changes.summary: 修复远控收图API报错
changes.summary_en: Fix image upload API error in Remote Control
changes.why_matters: 避免远程控制接收图片时失败，提升图像交互可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents failures when receiving images via Remote Control, improving image-based workflows.

changes.raw: Fixed `/heapdump` failing on Windows with `EEXIST` error when the Desktop folder already exists
changes.summary: 修复Windows heapdump失败
changes.why_matters: 避免在桌面文件夹已存在时导出堆转储失败，提升排障稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents /heapdump from failing when the Desktop folder already exists, improving debugging reliability.

changes.raw: Improved Up arrow after interrupting Claude — now restores the interrupted prompt and rewinds the conversation in one step
changes.summary: 中断后可一键恢复提示词
changes.summary_en: Restore interrupted prompt with Up arrow
changes.why_matters: 让用户中断后更快回到原输入并继续对话，减少手动重输。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users quickly restore interrupted input and continue the conversation with less retyping.

changes.raw: Improved IDE detection speed at startup
changes.summary: 启动时IDE检测更快
changes.why_matters: 缩短启动等待时间，让工具更快可用。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces startup wait time so the tool becomes usable sooner.

changes.raw: Improved clipboard image pasting performance on macOS
changes.summary: macOS剪贴板贴图更快
changes.summary_en: Faster clipboard image pasting on macOS
changes.why_matters: 提升粘贴图片的响应速度，改善多模态输入体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves responsiveness when pasting images, making multimodal input smoother.

changes.raw: Improved `/effort` to work while Claude is responding, matching `/model` behavior
changes.summary: /effort可在回复中调整
changes.why_matters: 用户无需等待当前回复结束即可调整推理强度，交互更灵活。
