changes.why_matters_en: Users can adjust effort without waiting for the current response to finish, making interaction more flexible.

changes.raw: Improved voice mode to automatically retry transient connection failures during rapid push-to-talk re-press
changes.summary: 语音模式自动重试连接
changes.summary_en: Voice mode retries transient connection failures
changes.why_matters: 减少快速连按按键时的临时连接失败，提升语音模式稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces transient failures during rapid push-to-talk re-presses, improving voice mode reliability.

changes.raw: Improved the Remote Control spawn mode selection prompt with better context
changes.summary: 远控启动模式提示更清晰
changes.summary_en: Better context for Remote Control spawn mode
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更容易选对启动模式，减少配置困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users choose the right spawn mode more easily and reduces configuration confusion.

changes.raw: Changed default Opus model on Bedrock, Vertex, and Microsoft Foundry to Opus 4.6 (was Opus 4.1)
changes.summary: 默认Opus模型升级到4.6
changes.why_matters: 默认模型变更可能影响输出风格、成本和兼容性，需要用户留意。
changes.why_matters_en: A default model change can affect output style, cost, and compatibility, so users should be aware.

changes.raw: Deprecated `/output-style` command — use `/config` instead. Output style is now fixed at session start for better prompt caching
changes.summary: /output-style已弃用
changes.why_matters: 旧命令不再推荐使用，用户需要迁移到新配置方式以避免失效。
changes.why_matters_en: The old command is no longer recommended, so users need to migrate to the new config flow to avoid breakage.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed HTTP 400 errors for users behind proxies or on Bedrock/Vertex with Claude 4.5 models
changes.summary: 修复VSCode代理400错误
changes.why_matters: 解决代理或特定云环境下的请求失败，提升编辑器集成可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixes request failures in proxy or cloud environments, improving editor integration reliability.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
I'm 60 years old. Claude Code killed a passion

changes.raw: Fixed tool search to activate even with `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` as long as `ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH` is set.
changes.summary: 工具搜索支持自定义API地址
changes.summary_en: Tool search works with custom base URL
changes.why_matters: 即使使用自定义 Anthropic 接口地址，也能正常启用工具搜索，减少配置受限问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Tool search now works even with a custom Anthropic base URL, reducing configuration limitations.

changes.raw: Added `w` key in `/copy` to write the focused selection directly to a file, bypassing the clipboard (useful over SSH)
changes.summary: 复制内容可直接写入文件
changes.summary_en: Copy selection directly to a file
changes.why_matters: 在 SSH 等无剪贴板环境下也能快速导出选中内容，提升远程使用便利性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users export selected content even over SSH without a clipboard, improving remote workflows.

changes.raw: Added optional description argument to `/plan` (e.g., `/plan fix the auth bug`) that enters plan mode and immediately starts
changes.summary: 计划模式可直接带描述启动
changes.summary_en: Start plan mode with a description
changes.why_matters: 用户可以一条命令直接进入计划并开始任务，减少额外交互步骤。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can enter plan mode and start immediately in one command, reducing extra steps.

changes.raw: Added `ExitWorktree` tool to leave an `EnterWorktree` session
changes.summary: 新增退出工作树工具
changes.summary_en: Added tool to exit a worktree session
changes.why_matters: 提供了与进入工作树相对应的退出能力，方便在不同工作区间切换。
changes.why_matters_en: This adds a matching way to leave a worktree session, making workspace switching smoother.

changes.raw: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON` environment variable to immediately stop scheduled cron jobs mid-session
changes.summary: 可立即停用定时任务
changes.why_matters: 用户可在会话中快速关闭定时任务，避免继续触发不需要的自动操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can disable scheduled jobs during a session to prevent unwanted automation from continuing.

changes.raw: Added `lsof`, `pgrep`, `tput`, `ss`, `fd`, and `fdfind` to the bash auto-approval allowlist, reducing permission prompts for common read-only operations
changes.summary: 常用只读命令免确认
changes.why_matters: 减少常见只读命令的权限提示，让日常排查和浏览更顺畅。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces permission prompts for common read-only commands, making routine inspection smoother.

changes.raw: Restored the `model` parameter on the Agent tool for per-invocation model overrides
changes.summary: Agent工具支持单次模型覆盖
changes.summary_en: Agent tool supports per-call model override
changes.why_matters: 用户可针对单次调用选择不同模型，更灵活地平衡成本与能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can choose a different model per call, giving more flexibility to balance cost and capability.

changes.raw: Simplified effort levels to low/medium/high (removed max) with new symbols (○ ◐ ●) and a brief notification instead of a persistent icon. Use `/effort auto` to reset to default
changes.summary: 简化努力等级显示
changes.why_matters: 界面更简洁，且可用 `/effort auto` 快速恢复默认设置。
changes.why_matters_en: The UI is cleaner, and `/effort auto` quickly restores the default setting.

changes.raw: Improved `/config` — Escape now cancels changes, Enter saves and closes, Space toggles settings
changes.summary: 配置界面操作更顺手
changes.why_matters: 键盘操作更符合直觉，能更快取消、保存或切换设置。
changes.why_matters_en: Keyboard controls are more intuitive, making it faster to cancel, save, or toggle settings.

changes.raw: Improved up-arrow history to show current session's messages first when running multiple concurrent sessions
changes.summary: 多会话历史优先当前会话
changes.why_matters: 在并发会话中更容易找到当前上下文的消息，减少误选历史记录。
changes.why_matters_en: In concurrent sessions, it is easier to find the current context and avoid picking the wrong history entry.

changes.raw: Improved voice input transcription accuracy for repo names and common dev terms (regex, OAuth, JSON)
changes.summary: 语音输入更懂开发术语
changes.summary_en: Better voice transcription for dev terms
changes.why_matters: 对仓库名和常见技术词的识别更准，减少语音输入后的修正成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Recognition of repo names and common technical terms is more accurate, reducing cleanup after dictation.

changes.raw: Improved bash command parsing by switching to a native module — faster initialization and no memory leak
changes.summary: bash解析更快更稳定
changes.why_matters: 启动更快且避免内存泄漏，提升长时间使用时的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Startup is faster and memory leaks are avoided, improving stability during long sessions.

changes.raw: Reduced bundle size by ~510 KB
changes.summary: 安装包体积显著减小
changes.why_matters: 更小的包体积通常意味着更快下载和更轻量的分发。
changes.why_matters_en: A smaller bundle usually means faster downloads and lighter distribution.

changes.raw: Changed CLAUDE.md HTML comments (`<!-- ... -->`) to be hidden from Claude when auto-injected. Comments remain visible when read with the Read tool
changes.summary: 注释自动注入时对Claude隐藏
changes.why_matters: 减少无关注释进入模型上下文，避免干扰 Claude 的理解。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps irrelevant comments out of the model context, reducing noise for Claude.

changes.raw: Fixed slow exits when background tasks or hooks were slow to respond
changes.summary: 后台任务慢也能快速退出
changes.summary_en: Faster exit when background tasks lag
changes.why_matters: 即使后台任务或钩子响应慢，用户也能更快结束会话，减少卡住感。
changes.why_matters_en: Even if background tasks or hooks are slow, users can exit sessions faster and avoid getting stuck.

changes.raw: Fixed agent task progress stuck on "Initializing…"
changes.summary: 修复任务进度卡住
changes.summary_en: Fix task progress stuck on initializing
changes.why_matters: 避免代理任务看似无响应，提升长任务的可见性和可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents agent tasks from appearing frozen and improves long-task visibility.

changes.raw: Fixed skill hooks firing twice per event when a hooks-enabled skill is invoked by the model
changes.summary: 修复技能钩子重复触发
changes.why_matters: 避免同一事件被重复处理，减少意外副作用和重复执行。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids duplicate event handling and reduces unintended side effects.

changes.raw: Fixed several voice mode issues: occasional input lag, false "No speech detected" errors after releasing push-to-talk, and stale transcripts re-filling the prompt after submission
changes.summary: 修复语音模式多项问题
changes.why_matters: 改善语音输入稳定性，减少误报和文本回填带来的中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves voice input reliability and reduces interruptions from false errors and stale text.

changes.raw: Fixed `--continue` not resuming from the most recent point after `--compact`
changes.summary: 修复继续会话恢复位置
changes.summary_en: Fix continue resuming from latest point
changes.why_matters: 确保压缩后继续会话时能回到最新上下文，避免从旧位置恢复。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures continue resumes from the latest context after compaction instead of an older point.

changes.raw: Fixed bash security parsing edge cases
changes.summary: 修复 bash 安全解析边界
changes.summary_en: Fix bash security parsing edge cases
changes.why_matters: 降低命令解析漏洞风险，增强执行 shell 相关操作时的安全性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces command parsing risk and improves safety for shell-related execution.

changes.raw: Added support for marketplace git URLs without `.git` suffix (Azure DevOps, AWS CodeCommit)
changes.summary: 支持无 .git 的仓库地址
changes.why_matters: 让更多托管平台的仓库链接可直接使用，减少手动改写地址。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes more repository URLs usable directly and reduces manual URL rewriting.

changes.raw: Improved marketplace clone failure messages to show diagnostic info even when git produces no stderr
changes.summary: 克隆失败提示更详细
changes.why_matters: 即使 git 没有输出错误，也能更快定位市场仓库克隆失败原因。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps diagnose marketplace clone failures faster even when git emits no stderr.

changes.raw: Fixed several plugin issues: installation failing on Windows with `EEXIST` error in OneDrive folders, marketplace blocking user-scope installs when a project-scope install exists, `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR` creating literal `~` directories, and `plugin.json` with marketplace-only fields failing to load
changes.summary: 修复插件安装与加载问题
changes.why_matters: 提升插件在不同系统和作用域下的兼容性，减少安装失败和加载异常。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves plugin compatibility across systems and scopes, reducing install and load failures.

changes.raw: Fixed feedback survey appearing too frequently in long sessions
changes.summary: 降低问卷弹出频率
changes.why_matters: 减少长会话中的打扰，让用户更专注于持续工作。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces interruptions in long sessions so users can stay focused.

changes.raw: Fixed `--effort` CLI flag being reset by unrelated settings writes on startup
changes.summary: 修复 effort 标志被重置
changes.why_matters: 避免启动时被无关设置覆盖，保证 CLI 行为符合用户预期。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unrelated settings from overriding startup behavior and preserves user intent.

changes.raw: Fixed backgrounded Ctrl+B queries losing their transcript or corrupting the new conversation after `/clear`
changes.summary: 修复后台查询丢失内容
changes.why_matters: 防止后台提问在清空对话后丢失或污染新会话内容。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents background queries from losing transcripts or corrupting new conversations after clear.

changes.raw: Fixed `/clear` killing background agent/bash tasks — only foreground tasks are now cleared
changes.summary: 清空仅结束前台任务
changes.why_matters: 避免误杀后台代理和 bash 任务，减少工作中断和数据丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents accidental termination of background agent and bash tasks, reducing disruption and loss.

changes.raw: Fixed worktree isolation issues: Task tool resume not restoring cwd, and background task notifications missing `worktreePath` and `worktreeBranch`
changes.summary: 修复 worktree 隔离信息
changes.why_matters: 确保恢复任务和通知都带上正确工作区信息，避免上下文串扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures resumed tasks and notifications carry correct worktree context to avoid cross-talk.

changes.raw: Fixed `/model` not displaying results when run while Claude is working
changes.summary: 修复工作中切换模型显示
changes.why_matters: 让用户在 Claude 忙碌时也能看到模型切换结果，提升可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users see model switch results even while Claude is busy, improving control.

changes.raw: Fixed digit keys selecting menu options instead of typing in plan mode permission prompt's text input
changes.summary: 修复计划模式数字键输入
changes.summary_en: Fix digit keys in plan mode prompt
changes.why_matters: 避免数字键误触菜单选择，保证权限提示中的文本输入可正常使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents digit keys from selecting menu items and preserves normal text entry in permission prompts.

changes.raw: Fixed sandbox permission issues: certain file write operations incorrectly allowed without prompting, and output redirections to allowlisted directories (like `/tmp/claude/`) prompting unnecessarily
changes.summary: 修复沙箱权限误放行/误提示
changes.why_matters: 这能避免未授权写入被错误放行，同时减少对安全目录的多余打扰提示。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents unauthorized writes from being incorrectly allowed and reduces unnecessary prompts for safe directories.

changes.raw: Improved CPU utilization in long sessions
changes.summary: 提升长会话 CPU 利用率
changes.summary_en: Improve CPU usage in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 这能让长时间运行的会话更省资源、更流畅。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes long-running sessions more resource-efficient and smoother.

changes.raw: Fixed prompt cache invalidation in SDK `query()` calls, reducing input token costs up to 12x
changes.summary: 修复 query 缓存失效降成本
changes.summary_en: Fix query cache invalidation cost spike
changes.why_matters: 这能显著减少 SDK 查询的输入 token 消耗，直接降低使用成本。
changes.why_matters_en: This can greatly reduce input token usage for SDK queries, directly lowering cost.

changes.raw: Fixed Escape key becoming unresponsive after cancelling a query
changes.summary: 修复取消后 Esc 失灵
changes.summary_en: Fix Escape key after cancelling query
changes.why_matters: 这能恢复键盘中断后的正常交互，避免界面卡住感。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores normal keyboard interaction after cancellation and avoids a stuck UI feel.

changes.raw: Fixed double Ctrl+C not exiting when background agents or tasks are running
changes.summary: 修复后台任务下双击退出
changes.summary_en: Fix double Ctrl+C exit with background tasks
changes.why_matters: 这能让用户在后台代理运行时仍可可靠退出，提升可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users reliably exit even while background agents are running, improving control.

changes.raw: Fixed team agents to inherit the leader's model
changes.summary: 修复团队代理继承模型
changes.summary_en: Fix team agents inheriting leader model
changes.why_matters: 这能保证团队代理使用一致的模型配置，减少行为偏差。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures team agents use consistent model settings and reduces behavior drift.

changes.raw: Fixed "Always Allow" saving permission rules that never match again
changes.summary: 修复 Always Allow 规则失效
changes.summary_en: Fix Always Allow rules never matching again
changes.why_matters: 这能让已授权规则真正持续生效，减少重复确认。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes granted rules actually persist and reduces repeated confirmations.

changes.raw: Fixed several hooks issues: `transcript_path` pointing to the wrong directory for resumed/forked sessions, agent `prompt` being silently deleted from settings.json on every settings write, PostToolUse block reason displaying twice, async hooks not receiving stdin with bash `read -r`, and validation error message showing an example that fails validation
changes.summary: 修复多项 hooks 配置与显示问题
changes.summary_en: Fix multiple hooks config and display bugs
changes.why_matters: 这能让 hooks 在续会、异步输入和配置保存中更稳定可靠。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes hooks more stable and reliable across resumed sessions, async input, and config saves.

changes.raw: Fixed session crashes in Desktop/SDK when Read returned files containing U+2028/U+2029 characters
changes.summary: 修复含特殊字符文件导致崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crashes on files with special chars
changes.why_matters: 这能避免在 Desktop/SDK 读取特定文件时直接崩溃，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents Desktop/SDK crashes when reading certain files, improving reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed terminal title being cleared on exit even when `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TERMINAL_TITLE` was set
changes.summary: 修复退出时终端标题被清空
changes.summary_en: Fix terminal title clearing on exit
changes.why_matters: 这能避免在禁用终端标题时仍被意外改动，减少环境干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents the terminal title from being changed unexpectedly when title control is disabled.

changes.raw: Fixed several permission rule matching issues: wildcard rules not matching commands with heredocs, embedded newlines, or no arguments; `sandbox.excludedCommands` failing with env var prefixes; "always allow" suggesting overly broad prefixes for nested CLI tools; and deny rules not applying to all command forms
changes.summary: 修复命令规则匹配多种形式
changes.summary_en: Fix command rule matching edge cases
changes.why_matters: 这能让允许/拒绝规则对复杂命令形式更准确生效，提升安全性。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes allow/deny rules work more accurately for complex command forms, improving safety.

changes.raw: Fixed oversized and truncated images from Bash data-URL output
changes.summary: 修复 Bash 图片输出过大/截断
changes.summary_en: Fix oversized or truncated Bash images
changes.why_matters: 这能让通过 Bash 传递的图片更完整可用，减少显示异常。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps images passed through Bash intact and usable, reducing display issues.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash when resuming sessions that contained Bedrock API errors
changes.summary: 修复续会时 Bedrock 崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix resume crash on Bedrock errors
changes.why_matters: 这能让含 API 错误的会话仍可安全恢复，避免工作中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This allows sessions with API errors to resume safely instead of interrupting work.

changes.raw: Fixed intermittent "expected boolean, received string" validation errors on Edit, Bash, and Grep tool inputs
changes.summary: 修复工具输入布尔校验报错
changes.summary_en: Fix boolean validation errors in tools
changes.why_matters: 这能减少 Edit、Bash、Grep 等工具的偶发校验失败，提高稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces intermittent validation failures in Edit, Bash, and Grep, improving stability.

changes.raw: Fixed multi-line session titles when forking from a conversation whose first message contained newlines
changes.summary: 修复分叉会话标题换行异常
changes.summary_en: Fix multiline session titles on fork
changes.why_matters: 这能让会话标题更整洁，避免界面显示混乱。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps session titles tidy and avoids messy UI display.

changes.raw: Fixed queued messages not showing attached images, and images being lost when pressing ↑ to edit a queued message
changes.summary: 修复队列消息图片丢失
changes.why_matters: 避免排队消息中的图片附件在编辑或显示时丢失，提升多模态输入的可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents attached images from disappearing in queued messages, improving reliability for multimodal input.

changes.raw: Fixed parallel tool calls where a failed Read/WebFetch/Glob would cancel its siblings — only Bash errors now cascade
changes.summary: 修复并行工具误取消
changes.why_matters: 减少并行工具调用中无关失败导致的连锁取消，让任务执行更稳定。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unrelated failures from canceling sibling parallel tool calls, making execution more stable.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed scroll speed in integrated terminals not matching native terminals
changes.summary: 修复终端滚动速度
changes.why_matters: 让 VSCode 集成终端的滚动体验与原生终端一致，提升使用舒适度。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes VSCode integrated terminal scrolling match native terminals for a smoother experience.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed Shift+Enter submitting input instead of inserting a newline for users with older keybindings
changes.summary: 修复旧快捷键换行
changes.why_matters: 避免旧键位配置下误提交输入，减少编辑长提示词时的操作失误。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents accidental submission for users with older keybindings, reducing mistakes while editing prompts.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added effort level indicator on the input border
changes.summary: 输入框显示努力等级
changes.summary_en: Show effort level in input border
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更直观地了解当前推理/执行强度设置，便于调整使用策略。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users quickly see the current effort setting and adjust their workflow accordingly.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added `vscode://anthropic.claude-code/open` URI handler to open a new Claude Code tab programmatically, with optional `prompt` and `session` query parameters
changes.summary: 支持 URI 打开新会话
changes.summary_en: Add URI handler to open Claude Code
changes.why_matters: 允许外部应用通过链接直接打开 Claude Code 并传入提示词或会话，增强自动化集成能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets external apps open Claude Code with prompts or sessions via URI, improving automation and integration.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Anthropic Cowork feature creates 10GB VM bundle on macOS without warning
Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games

changes.raw: Added `/loop` command to run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. `/loop 5m check the deploy`)
changes.summary: 新增循环执行命令
changes.why_matters: 用户可以让提示词或命令按间隔自动重复执行，适合持续检查和定时任务。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can run prompts or commands on a recurring interval, which is useful for monitoring and scheduled tasks.

changes.raw: Added cron scheduling tools for recurring prompts within a session
changes.summary: 支持会话内定时提示
changes.why_matters: 用户能在同一会话中设置周期性提示，减少手动重复操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can schedule recurring prompts within a session, reducing repetitive manual work.

changes.raw: Added `voice:pushToTalk` keybinding to make the voice activation key rebindable in `keybindings.json` (default: space) — modifier+letter combos like `meta+k` have zero typing interference
changes.summary: 语音按键可重绑定
changes.why_matters: 用户可以把语音激活键改成更顺手的组合，降低输入冲突。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can rebind the voice activation key to a more convenient combo with less typing interference.

changes.raw: Added `fmt`, `comm`, `cmp`, `numfmt`, `expr`, `test`, `printf`, `getconf`, `seq`, `tsort`, and `pr` to the bash auto-approval allowlist
changes.summary: 扩展 Bash 自动放行命令
changes.why_matters: 更多常用只读命令可自动通过，减少频繁确认打断工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: More common safe commands can pass automatically, reducing approval prompts and interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed stdin freeze in long-running sessions where keystrokes stop being processed but the process stays alive
changes.summary: 修复长会话输入卡死
changes.summary_en: Fix stdin freeze in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 避免长时间运行后键盘输入失效，防止会话被迫中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents keyboard input from stopping in long-running sessions, avoiding forced interruption.

changes.raw: Fixed a 5–8 second startup freeze for users with voice mode enabled, caused by CoreAudio initialization blocking the main thread after system wake
changes.summary: 修复语音模式启动卡顿
changes.why_matters: 启用语音时启动更快，减少系统唤醒后的明显卡顿。
changes.why_matters_en: Startup is faster with voice mode enabled, reducing noticeable freezes after system wake.

changes.raw: Fixed startup UI freeze when many claude.ai proxy connectors refresh an expired OAuth token simultaneously
changes.summary: 修复代理刷新导致界面卡顿
changes.summary_en: Fix UI freeze on token refresh
changes.why_matters: 大量连接器同时刷新令牌时不再阻塞界面，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: The UI no longer blocks when many connectors refresh tokens at once, improving responsiveness.

changes.raw: Fixed forked conversations (`/fork`) sharing the same plan file, which caused plan edits in one fork to overwrite the other
changes.summary: 修复分叉会话计划冲突
changes.why_matters: 不同分叉会话的计划编辑不会互相覆盖，避免工作内容丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Plan edits in forked conversations no longer overwrite each other, preventing lost work.

changes.raw: Fixed the Read tool putting oversized images into context when image processing failed, breaking subsequent turns in long image-heavy sessions
changes.summary: 修复大图占满上下文
changes.why_matters: 图片处理失败时不会把超大图塞进上下文，减少后续对话被破坏。
changes.why_matters_en: Failed image processing no longer injects oversized images into context, protecting later turns.

changes.raw: Fixed false-positive permission prompts for compound bash commands containing heredoc commit messages
changes.summary: 修复 heredoc 误触发授权
changes.summary_en: Fix false permission prompts for heredoc
changes.why_matters: 复杂 Bash 命令不再被误判为危险操作，减少不必要的权限弹窗。
changes.why_matters_en: Compound Bash commands are less likely to be misclassified as risky, reducing unnecessary permission prompts.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin installations being lost when running multiple Claude Code instances
changes.summary: 修复多实例插件丢失
changes.why_matters: 同时运行多个 Claude Code 实例时，插件安装状态更稳定，不会丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin installations remain stable when running multiple Claude Code instances.

changes.raw: Fixed claude.ai connectors failing to reconnect after OAuth token refresh
changes.summary: 修复连接器刷新后重连
changes.why_matters: OAuth 刷新后连接器能自动恢复，减少手动重新连接。
changes.why_matters_en: Connectors can recover automatically after OAuth refresh, reducing manual reconnection.

changes.raw: Fixed claude.ai MCP connector startup notifications appearing for every org-configured connector instead of only previously connected ones
changes.summary: 修复连接器启动通知过多
changes.why_matters: 只提示真正需要关注的连接器，降低启动时噪音。
changes.why_matters_en: Only relevant connectors now trigger startup notices, reducing noise at launch.

changes.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
changes.summary: 补全后台代理结果路径
changes.summary_en: Include output path in agent notices
changes.why_matters: 父代理更容易在上下文压缩后找回子代理结果，提高协作可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Parent agents can recover child-agent results more easily after compaction, improving reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate output in Bash tool error messages when commands exit with non-zero status
changes.summary: 修复 Bash 错误重复输出
changes.why_matters: 错误信息更简洁，便于快速定位命令失败原因。
changes.why_matters_en: Error messages are cleaner, making it easier to diagnose failed commands quickly.

changes.raw: Fixed Chrome extension auto-detection getting permanently stuck on "not installed" after running on a machine without local Chrome
changes.summary: 修复 Chrome 扩展误判卡死
changes.summary_en: Fix Chrome extension detection stuck state
changes.why_matters: 避免在无本地 Chrome 的机器上把扩展状态永久误判为未安装，减少后续检测失效。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents extension detection from getting permanently stuck as not installed on machines without local Chrome.

changes.raw: Fixed `/plugin marketplace update` failing with merge conflicts when the marketplace is pinned to a branch/tag ref
changes.summary: 修复插件市场更新冲突
changes.why_matters: 让锁定到分支或标签的插件市场更新能正常执行，避免更新失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows marketplace updates to work correctly when pinned to a branch or tag ref.

changes.raw: Fixed `/plugin marketplace add owner/repo@ref` incorrectly parsing `@` — previously only `#` worked as a ref separator, causing undiagnosable errors with `strictKnownMarketplaces`
changes.summary: 修复插件 ref 解析错误
changes.summary_en: Fix plugin ref parsing for @ syntax
changes.why_matters: 支持 `@ref` 语法后，用户可稳定安装指定版本插件，减少难排查错误。
changes.why_matters_en: Supports `@ref` syntax so users can reliably install specific plugin versions without opaque errors.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate entries in `/permissions` Workspace tab when the same directory is added with and without a trailing slash
changes.summary: 修复权限页重复目录项
changes.why_matters: 避免同一路径因是否带斜杠而重复显示，提升权限管理清晰度。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents duplicate display of the same path with and without a trailing slash, making permissions easier to manage.

changes.raw: Fixed `--print` hanging forever when team agents are configured — the exit loop no longer waits on long-lived `in_process_teammate` tasks
changes.summary: 修复 print 模式卡死
changes.why_matters: 确保 `--print` 能在团队代理配置下正常退出，避免自动化流程无限等待。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures `--print` exits properly with team agents configured, preventing automation from hanging indefinitely.

changes.raw: Fixed "❯ Tool loaded." appearing in the REPL after every `ToolSearch` call
changes.summary: 移除 REPL 额外提示噪音
changes.why_matters: 减少每次工具搜索后的无关输出，让交互更干净。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces irrelevant output after each tool search, making the REPL cleaner.

changes.raw: Fixed prompting for `cd <cwd> && git ...` on Windows when the model uses a mingw-style path
changes.summary: 修复 Windows git 路径提示
changes.summary_en: Fix Windows git path prompt handling
changes.why_matters: 避免在 Windows 上因 mingw 风格路径导致错误提示，提升跨平台可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents incorrect prompts on Windows when mingw-style paths are used, improving cross-platform reliability.

changes.raw: Improved startup time by deferring native image processor loading to first use
changes.summary: 延迟加载图像处理器提速
changes.summary_en: Speed up startup by lazy-loading image processor
changes.why_matters: 减少启动时的初始化开销，让 Claude Code 更快可用。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces startup initialization overhead so Claude Code becomes usable faster.

changes.raw: Improved bridge session reconnection to complete within seconds after laptop wake from sleep, instead of waiting up to 10 minutes
changes.summary: 睡眠唤醒后更快重连会话
changes.summary_en: Reconnect bridge sessions faster after wake
changes.why_matters: 让笔记本唤醒后几秒内恢复连接，显著减少长时间离线等待。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores bridge connections within seconds after laptop wake, greatly reducing downtime.

changes.raw: Improved `/plugin uninstall` to disable project-scoped plugins in `.claude/settings.local.json` instead of modifying `.claude/settings.json`, so changes don't affect teammates
changes.summary: 卸载插件仅改本地配置
changes.summary_en: Uninstall plugins in local settings only
changes.why_matters: 避免卸载项目级插件时影响团队共享配置，降低协作风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents project-scoped plugin uninstall from affecting shared team settings, reducing collaboration risk.

changes.raw: Improved plugin-provided MCP server deduplication — servers that duplicate a manually-configured server (same command/URL) are now skipped, preventing duplicate connections and tool sets. Suppressions are shown in the `/plugin` menu.
changes.summary: 插件 MCP 去重并可见抑制
changes.why_matters: 避免重复连接和重复工具集，减少冲突并让插件抑制状态更透明。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids duplicate connections and tool sets while making suppressions visible in the plugin menu.

changes.raw: Updated `/debug` to toggle debug logging on mid-session, since debug logs are no longer written by default
changes.summary: 支持会话中开启调试日志
changes.why_matters: 用户无需重启即可临时打开调试，便于排查运行中的问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users turn on debugging without restarting, making live troubleshooting easier.

changes.raw: Removed startup notification noise for unauthenticated org-registered claude.ai connectors
changes.summary: 减少未登录连接启动通知
changes.summary_en: Reduce startup noise for unauthenticated connectors
changes.why_matters: 降低无关通知干扰，让启动信息更聚焦。
changes.why_matters_en: Cuts down irrelevant notifications so startup output stays focused.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Anthropic Cowork feature creates 10GB VM bundle on macOS without warning

changes.raw: Fixed API 400 errors when using `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` with a third-party gateway — tool search now correctly detects proxy endpoints and disables `tool_reference` blocks
changes.summary: 修复代理网关API 400错误
changes.why_matters: 使用第三方网关时工具搜索和请求格式现在能正确适配，避免接口报错中断工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Tool search and request formatting now work with third-party gateways, preventing API errors from breaking the workflow.

changes.raw: Fixed `API Error: 400 This model does not support the effort parameter` when using custom Bedrock inference profiles or other model identifiers not matching standard Claude naming patterns
changes.summary: 修复自定义模型努力参数报错
changes.summary_en: Fix effort-param errors for custom models
changes.why_matters: 自定义 Bedrock 或非标准模型标识现在不会因不支持的参数而失败，提升兼容性。
changes.why_matters_en: Custom Bedrock or nonstandard model IDs no longer fail on unsupported parameters, improving compatibility.

changes.raw: Fixed empty model responses immediately after `ToolSearch` — the server renders tool schemas with system-prompt-style tags at the prompt tail, which could confuse models into stopping early
changes.summary: 修复ToolSearch后空回复
changes.why_matters: 模型不再因工具 schema 位置导致过早停止，减少空响应和任务中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Models no longer stop early due to tool schema placement, reducing empty responses and interrupted tasks.

changes.raw: Fixed prompt-cache bust when an MCP server with `instructions` connects after the first turn
changes.summary: 修复MCP后首轮缓存失效
changes.summary_en: Fix prompt cache bust after MCP connect
changes.why_matters: MCP 服务器后续接入时仍能保持提示缓存，减少重复开销并提升响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: Prompt caching now survives late MCP connections, reducing repeated overhead and improving speed.

changes.raw: Fixed Enter inserting a newline instead of submitting when typing over a slow SSH connection
changes.summary: 修复慢SSH下回车换行问题
changes.summary_en: Fix Enter inserting newline over slow SSH
changes.why_matters: 在慢速 SSH 连接下输入体验更稳定，避免误换行导致命令无法及时提交。
changes.why_matters_en: Typing is more reliable over slow SSH connections, avoiding accidental newlines and delayed command submission.

changes.raw: Fixed clipboard corrupting non-ASCII text (CJK, emoji) on Windows/WSL by using PowerShell `Set-Clipboard`
changes.summary: 修复Windows剪贴板乱码
changes.why_matters: 中文、emoji 等非 ASCII 文本复制粘贴不再损坏，提升跨平台文本处理可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Copying and pasting non-ASCII text like CJK and emoji no longer gets corrupted, improving cross-platform reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed extra VS Code windows opening at startup on Windows when running from the VS Code integrated terminal
changes.summary: 修复Windows启动多开VS Code
changes.summary_en: Fix extra VS Code windows on startup
changes.why_matters: 减少 Windows 启动时的多余窗口，避免干扰开发环境和工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unnecessary windows on Windows startup, reducing disruption to the development environment.

changes.raw: Fixed voice mode failing on Windows native binary with "native audio module could not be loaded"
changes.summary: 修复Windows语音模块加载失败
changes.summary_en: Fix Windows native voice module loading
changes.why_matters: Windows 原生二进制现在可正常使用语音模式，恢复语音交互能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Windows native binaries can now use voice mode properly, restoring voice interaction.

changes.raw: Fixed push-to-talk not activating on session start when `voiceEnabled: true` was set in settings
changes.summary: 修复会话开始即失效的按住说话
changes.summary_en: Fix push-to-talk not starting on session
changes.why_matters: 开启语音后会话一开始就能正常按住说话，避免首次交互失灵。
changes.why_matters_en: Push-to-talk now works immediately when a session starts, avoiding failed first interactions.

changes.raw: Fixed markdown links containing `#NNN` references incorrectly pointing to the current repository instead of the linked URL
changes.summary: 修复Markdown链接锚点跳错
changes.why_matters: 带锚点的链接会正确跳转到目标 URL，减少文档导航错误。
changes.why_matters_en: Markdown links with anchors now point to the correct URL, reducing documentation navigation errors.

changes.raw: Fixed repeated "Model updated to Opus 4.6" notification when a project's `.claude/settings.json` has a legacy Opus model string pinned
changes.summary: 修复旧Opus模型重复提示更新
changes.why_matters: 避免因旧模型字符串被反复提示更新，减少无意义通知干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids repeated update notices caused by legacy model strings, reducing notification noise.

changes.raw: Fixed plugins showing as inaccurately installed in `/plugin`
changes.summary: 修复插件安装状态显示错误
changes.why_matters: 插件状态展示更准确，帮助用户判断插件是否真正可用。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin status is now shown accurately, helping users know whether a plugin is actually available.

changes.raw: Fixed plugins showing "not found in marketplace" errors on fresh startup by auto-refreshing after marketplace installation
changes.summary: 修复插件市场安装后未刷新
changes.summary_en: Fix marketplace plugin refresh on startup
changes.why_matters: 新装插件在启动后能及时出现在市场中，减少“找不到”误报。
changes.why_matters_en: Freshly installed plugins now appear after startup, reducing false 'not found' errors.

changes.raw: Fixed `/security-review` command failing with `unknown option merge-base` on older git versions
changes.summary: 修复旧版git下安全审查失败
changes.why_matters: 在旧版 git 环境中也能正常运行安全审查命令，提升兼容性。
changes.why_matters_en: The security review command now works on older git versions, improving compatibility.

changes.raw: Fixed `/color` command having no way to reset back to the default color — `/color default`, `/color gray`, `/color reset`, and `/color none` now restore the default
changes.summary: 支持重置颜色为默认值
changes.summary_en: Add ways to reset color to default
changes.why_matters: 用户现在可以方便地恢复默认主题色，减少误配置带来的困扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can now easily restore the default theme color, reducing issues from accidental customization.

changes.raw: Fixed a performance regression in the `AskUserQuestion` preview dialog that re-ran markdown rendering on every keystroke in the notes input
changes.summary: 修复预览对话框输入卡顿
changes.summary_en: Fix preview dialog input re-render lag
changes.why_matters: 减少每次输入都重复渲染 Markdown 带来的卡顿，提升问答预览的流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids repeated Markdown rendering on every keystroke, making the AskUserQuestion preview feel much smoother.

changes.raw: Fixed feature flags read during early startup never refreshing their disk cache, causing stale values to persist across sessions
changes.summary: 修复启动特性标志缓存过期
changes.summary_en: Fix stale feature flags across sessions
changes.why_matters: 避免早期启动读取的特性开关一直停留旧值，确保跨会话行为正确一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents stale feature-flag values from persisting across sessions, keeping startup behavior correct and consistent.

changes.raw: Fixed `permissions.defaultMode` settings values other than `acceptEdits` or `plan` being applied in Claude Code Remote environments — they are now ignored
changes.summary: 忽略远程环境无效权限模式
changes.summary_en: Ignore unsupported permission modes in Remote
changes.why_matters: 防止 Claude Code Remote 误应用不支持的默认权限配置，减少权限行为异常。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unsupported default permission settings from being applied in Remote environments, reducing permission misbehavior.

changes.raw: Fixed skill listing being re-injected on every `--resume` (~600 tokens saved per resume)
changes.summary: 减少续会话技能重复注入
changes.why_matters: 每次恢复会话都少注入一大段内容，降低 token 消耗并提升续会话效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Cuts repeated token overhead on resume, making continued sessions cheaper and more efficient.

changes.raw: Fixed teleport marker not rendering in VS Code teleported sessions
changes.summary: 修复 VS Code 传送标记不显示
changes.summary_en: Fix teleport marker in VS Code sessions
changes.why_matters: 让远程传送会话中的位置标记正常显示，帮助用户确认当前会话状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores the teleport marker in VS Code teleported sessions so users can see session state correctly.

changes.raw: Improved error message when microphone captures silence to distinguish from "no speech detected"
changes.summary: 麦克风静音报错更清晰
changes.why_matters: 让“录到静音”和“完全没检测到语音”更容易区分，便于用户排查麦克风问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes it easier to distinguish silence from no speech detected, improving microphone troubleshooting.

changes.raw: Improved compaction to preserve images in the summarizer request, allowing prompt cache reuse for faster and cheaper compaction
changes.summary: 压缩时保留图片提升复用
changes.why_matters: 保留图片后可复用提示缓存，让压缩更快、更省 token，也更省成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeping images enables prompt-cache reuse, making compaction faster, cheaper, and more efficient.

changes.raw: Improved `/rename` to work while Claude is processing, instead of being silently queued
changes.summary: 处理时也可重命名会话
changes.why_matters: 用户无需等待模型空闲即可改名，减少被静默排队带来的操作阻塞。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can rename immediately without waiting for Claude to finish, avoiding silent queuing delays.

changes.raw: Reduced prompt input re-renders during turns by ~74%
changes.summary: 减少轮次输入重渲染
changes.why_matters: 显著降低交互过程中的界面重绘，提升整体响应速度和流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: Cuts UI re-rendering during turns, improving responsiveness and overall interaction smoothness.

changes.raw: Reduced startup memory by ~426KB for users without custom CA certificates
changes.summary: 降低启动内存占用
changes.why_matters: 减少无自定义 CA 证书用户的启动内存占用，改善资源效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces startup memory usage for users without custom CA certificates, improving resource efficiency.

changes.raw: Reduced Remote Control `/poll` rate to once per 10 minutes while connected (was 1–2s), cutting server load ~300×. Reconnection is unaffected — transport loss immediately wakes fast polling.
changes.summary: 大幅降低远程轮询频率
changes.why_matters: 显著降低在线连接时的服务器负载，同时保持断线后的快速恢复能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Massively reduces server load while connected, without hurting fast recovery after transport loss.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added spark icon in VS Code activity bar that lists all Claude Code sessions, with sessions opening as full editors
changes.summary: VS Code 会话列表入口
changes.summary_en: Add VS Code session list entry
changes.why_matters: 让用户能在 VS Code 活动栏直接查看并打开所有 Claude Code 会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users browse and open all Claude Code sessions directly from the VS Code activity bar.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added full markdown document view for plans in VS Code, with support for adding comments to provide feedback
changes.summary: VS Code 支持计划文档评论
changes.summary_en: Add markdown plan view with comments
changes.why_matters: 把计划以完整文档形式呈现并支持评论反馈，增强协作审阅体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Shows plans as full markdown documents with comments, improving review and collaboration workflows.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added native MCP server management dialog — use `/mcp` in the chat panel to enable/disable servers, reconnect, and manage OAuth authentication without switching to the terminal
changes.summary: 内置 MCP 服务管理界面
changes.summary_en: Add native MCP server management dialog
changes.why_matters: 可直接在聊天面板管理 MCP 服务和 OAuth，无需切到终端，降低操作成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows managing MCP servers and OAuth from the chat panel, reducing context switching and setup friction.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
Agents that run while I sleep
Anthropic Cowork feature creates 10GB VM bundle on macOS without warning

changes.raw: Added the `/claude-api` skill for building applications with the Claude API and Anthropic SDK
changes.summary: 新增 Claude API 开发技能
changes.why_matters: 让用户更方便地用 Claude API 和 Anthropic SDK 构建应用，降低上手成本。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes it easier to build apps with the Claude API and Anthropic SDK, lowering the barrier to entry.

changes.raw: Added Ctrl+U on an empty bash prompt (`!`) to exit bash mode, matching `escape` and `backspace`
changes.summary: 空 bash 提示支持 Ctrl+U 退出
changes.why_matters: 补齐了退出 bash 模式的快捷键一致性，减少误操作和学习成本。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves shortcut consistency for exiting bash mode and reduces friction from accidental mode changes.

changes.raw: Added numeric keypad support for selecting options in Claude's interview questions (previously only the number row above QWERTY worked)
changes.summary: 数字小键盘可选面试答案
changes.summary_en: Numeric keypad works for interview choices
changes.why_matters: 让用户可以用小键盘快速选择答案，提升交互效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users answer interview prompts with the numeric keypad, improving interaction speed.

changes.raw: Added optional name argument to `/remote-control` and `claude remote-control` (`/remote-control My Project` or `--name "My Project"`) to set a custom session title visible in claude.ai/code
changes.summary: 远程控制可自定义会话名
changes.summary_en: Remote control can set custom session title
changes.why_matters: 便于在 claude.ai/code 中识别和管理不同会话。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes it easier to identify and manage different sessions in claude.ai/code.

changes.raw: Added Voice STT support for 10 new languages (20 total) — Russian, Polish, Turkish, Dutch, Ukrainian, Greek, Czech, Danish, Swedish, Norwegian
changes.summary: 语音识别新增 10 种语言
changes.why_matters: 扩大了语音输入可用范围，让更多语言用户能直接使用语音交互。
changes.why_matters_en: This expands voice input availability so more language users can interact naturally by speech.

changes.raw: Added effort level display (e.g., "with low effort") to the logo and spinner, making it easier to see which effort setting is active
changes.summary: 显示当前 effort 等级
changes.why_matters: 用户能更直观看到当前推理/执行强度设置，减少配置不确定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can more easily see the active effort setting, reducing uncertainty about configuration.

changes.raw: Added agent name display in terminal title when using `claude --agent`
changes.summary: 终端标题显示 agent 名称
changes.why_matters: 在多 agent 场景下更容易区分当前正在运行的代理。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes it easier to distinguish which agent is currently running in multi-agent workflows.

changes.raw: Added `sandbox.enableWeakerNetworkIsolation` setting (macOS only) to allow Go programs like `gh`, `gcloud`, and `terraform` to verify TLS certificates when using a custom MITM proxy with `httpProxyPort`
changes.summary: 自定义代理网络隔离可放宽
changes.summary_en: Weaker network isolation for custom proxy
changes.why_matters: 解决了使用自定义 MITM 代理时 Go 工具 TLS 校验失败的问题，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes TLS verification failures for Go tools behind a custom MITM proxy, improving usability.

changes.raw: Added `includeGitInstructions` setting (and `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_GIT_INSTRUCTIONS` env var) to remove built-in commit and PR workflow instructions from Claude's system prompt
changes.summary: 可关闭内置 Git 工作流提示
changes.why_matters: 让团队可以按自己的流程定制系统提示，避免默认 Git 指令干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets teams customize the system prompt to their own workflow and avoid unwanted Git guidance.

changes.raw: Added `/reload-plugins` command to activate pending plugin changes without restarting
changes.summary: 支持重载插件无需重启
changes.why_matters: 插件更新后可立即生效，减少中断并提升迭代效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin changes can take effect immediately, reducing interruptions and speeding iteration.

changes.raw: Added a one-time startup prompt suggesting Claude Code Desktop on macOS and Windows (max 3 showings, dismissible)
changes.summary: 新增桌面版推荐提示
changes.why_matters: 帮助更多用户发现桌面版，但对核心功能影响较小。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users discover the desktop app, though it has limited impact on core functionality.

changes.raw: Added `${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}` variable for skills to reference their own directory in SKILL.md content
changes.summary: 技能可引用自身目录
changes.summary_en: Skills can reference their own directory
changes.why_matters: 让技能编写更灵活，便于组织相对路径资源。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes skill authoring more flexible by enabling relative-path resource references.

changes.raw: Added `InstructionsLoaded` hook event that fires when CLAUDE.md or `.claude/rules/*.md` files are loaded into context
changes.summary: 新增指令加载事件钩子
changes.why_matters: 外部自动化可以感知上下文加载时机，便于做审计或联动处理。
changes.why_matters_en: External automation can detect when instructions are loaded, enabling auditing and coordinated actions.

changes.raw: Added `agent_id` (for subagents) and `agent_type` (for subagents and `--agent`) to hook events
changes.summary: 钩子事件新增 agent 标识
changes.why_matters: 让钩子系统能区分不同子代理，便于精细化编排与监控。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps hooks distinguish between subagents, enabling finer-grained orchestration and monitoring.

changes.raw: Added `worktree` field to status line hook commands with name, path, branch, and original repo directory when running in a `--worktree` session
changes.summary: 工作树状态栏显示更完整
changes.summary_en: Status line shows richer worktree info
changes.why_matters: 在 worktree 场景下更容易确认当前分支和仓库位置，减少操作失误。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes it easier to confirm the current branch and repo location in worktree sessions, reducing mistakes.

changes.raw: Added `pluginTrustMessage` in managed settings to append organization-specific context to the plugin trust warning shown before installation
changes.summary: 可自定义插件信任提示
changes.why_matters: 让组织能在插件安装前补充内部说明，降低误授权风险并提升合规性。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets orgs add internal guidance before plugin installs, reducing accidental trust and improving compliance.

changes.raw: Added policy limit fetching (e.g., remote control restrictions) for Team plan OAuth users, not just Enterprise
changes.summary: Team版也支持策略限制
changes.summary_en: Policy limits now for Team OAuth
changes.why_matters: Team 计划 OAuth 用户也能获取策略限制，便于统一管控远程控制等能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Team plan OAuth users can now receive policy limits, enabling consistent control over features like remote control.

changes.raw: Added `pathPattern` to `strictKnownMarketplaces` for regex-matching file/directory marketplace sources alongside `hostPattern` restrictions
changes.summary: 市场源支持路径正则
changes.why_matters: 可按文件或目录路径精确限制 marketplace 来源，增强来源白名单的灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows precise marketplace source restrictions by file or directory path, making allowlists more flexible.

changes.raw: Added plugin source type `git-subdir` to point to a subdirectory within a git repo
changes.summary: 支持 git 子目录插件源
changes.why_matters: 插件可以直接指向仓库子目录，减少仓库拆分成本并简化分发。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugins can point to a subdirectory in a repo, reducing repo splitting overhead and simplifying distribution.

changes.raw: Added `oauth.authServerMetadataUrl` config option for MCP servers to specify a custom OAuth metadata discovery URL when standard discovery fails
changes.summary: MCP 支持自定义 OAuth 元数据
changes.summary_en: Custom OAuth metadata URL for MCP
changes.why_matters: 当标准发现失败时，MCP 服务器可指定元数据地址，提高 OAuth 接入成功率。
changes.why_matters_en: MCP servers can specify a metadata URL when standard discovery fails, improving OAuth setup reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed a security issue where nested skill discovery could load skills from gitignored directories like `node_modules`
changes.summary: 修复忽略目录技能泄露
changes.summary_en: Fix skill loading from ignored dirs
changes.why_matters: 避免从 gitignored 目录加载技能，防止意外引入不应被执行的内容。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents skills from being loaded out of gitignored directories, avoiding unintended execution of excluded content.

changes.raw: Fixed trust dialog silently enabling all `.mcp.json` servers on first run. You'll now see the per-server approval dialog as expected
changes.summary: 修复首轮信任弹窗漏显示
changes.why_matters: 首次运行时会正确逐个服务器确认，避免静默放行所有 `.mcp.json` 服务。
changes.why_matters_en: First run now properly asks per-server approval instead of silently allowing all `.mcp.json` servers.

changes.raw: Fixed `claude remote-control` crashing immediately on npm installs with "bad option: --sdk-url" (anthropics/claude-code#28334)
changes.summary: 修复 remote-control 安装崩溃
changes.why_matters: npm 安装时不再因参数错误立即崩溃，提升安装可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: npm installs no longer crash immediately due to a bad option, improving install reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed `--model claude-opus-4-0` and `--model claude-opus-4-1` resolving to deprecated Opus versions instead of current
changes.summary: 修复 Opus 模型解析错误
changes.why_matters: 指定新模型时会解析到正确版本，避免误用已弃用模型。
changes.why_matters_en: Requested Opus models now resolve to the correct current versions instead of deprecated ones.

changes.raw: Fixed macOS keychain corruption when using multiple OAuth MCP servers. Large OAuth metadata blobs could overflow the `security -i` stdin buffer, silently leaving stale credentials behind and causing repeated `/login` prompts.
changes.summary: 修复多 OAuth 证书损坏
changes.why_matters: 避免 macOS 钥匙串写入失败导致凭据残留和反复登录，提升安全与稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents keychain write failures that leave stale credentials and trigger repeated logins, improving security and stability.

changes.raw: Fixed `.credentials.json` losing `subscriptionType` (showing "Claude API" instead of "Claude Pro"/"Claude Max") when the profile endpoint transiently fails during token refresh (anthropics/claude-code#30185)
changes.summary: 修复订阅类型丢失
changes.why_matters: 刷新失败时仍能正确显示 Claude Pro/Max，避免账户状态误判。
changes.why_matters_en: Subscription type stays correct even if refresh fails transiently, preventing mislabeling of account status.

changes.raw: Fixed ghost dotfiles (`.bashrc`, `HEAD`, etc.) appearing as untracked files in the working directory after sandboxed Bash commands on Linux
changes.summary: 修复沙箱 Bash 伪文件
changes.summary_en: Fix ghost dotfiles after sandboxed Bash
changes.why_matters: 减少工作区被错误标记为未跟踪文件，避免干扰版本控制和编辑流程。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents the workspace from being polluted with false untracked files, reducing VCS and workflow noise.

changes.raw: Fixed Shift+Enter printing `[27;2;13~` instead of inserting a newline in Ghostty over SSH
changes.summary: 修复 Ghostty 换行键异常
changes.summary_en: Fix Shift+Enter in Ghostty over SSH
changes.why_matters: 在特定终端和 SSH 场景下可正常插入换行，提升输入体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Shift+Enter works correctly in a specific terminal/SSH setup, improving text entry reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed stash (Ctrl+S) being cleared when submitting a message while Claude is working
changes.summary: 修复提交时 stash 被清空
changes.summary_en: Fix stash cleared on message submit
changes.why_matters: 用户在 Claude 处理时提交消息不会丢失暂存内容，减少上下文和工作丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Submitting a message while Claude is working no longer clears the stash, preventing loss of saved work.

changes.raw: Fixed ctrl+o (transcript toggle) freezing for many seconds in long sessions with lots of file edits
changes.summary: 修复长会话转录卡顿
changes.why_matters: 长会话中切换转录更流畅，避免因大量编辑记录导致界面长时间无响应。
changes.why_matters_en: Transcript toggling stays responsive in long sessions, avoiding long freezes from many file edits.

changes.raw: Fixed plan mode feedback input not supporting multi-line text entry (backslash+Enter and Shift+Enter now insert newlines)
changes.summary: 计划模式支持多行输入
changes.summary_en: Plan mode now accepts multiline input
changes.why_matters: 用户在计划模式下可以更方便地输入和编辑长内容，减少误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can enter and edit longer plan text more naturally, reducing input friction.

changes.raw: Fixed cursor not moving down into blank lines at the top of the input box
changes.summary: 修复输入框顶部空行光标
changes.summary_en: Cursor now moves into blank top lines
changes.why_matters: 这修复了输入光标的基础编辑体验问题，让文本编辑更顺手。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes a basic text-editing issue and makes cursor movement feel correct.

changes.raw: Fixed `/stats` crash when transcript files contain entries with missing or malformed timestamps
changes.summary: 统计命令不再因坏时间戳崩溃
changes.summary_en: /stats no longer crashes on bad timestamps
changes.why_matters: 即使转录文件有损坏数据，用户也能继续查看统计而不会中断工作。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can still view stats even when transcript data is malformed, avoiding workflow interruption.

changes.raw: Fixed a brief hang after a streaming error on long sessions (the transcript was being fully rewritten to drop one line; it is now truncated in place)
changes.summary: 流式错误后长会话不卡顿
changes.summary_en: Long sessions no longer hang after stream errors
changes.why_matters: 减少长会话中的卡顿和重写开销，提升稳定性与响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces hangs and rewrite overhead in long sessions, improving stability and responsiveness.

changes.raw: Fixed `--setting-sources user` not blocking dynamically discovered project skills
changes.summary: 用户级设置阻止动态技能
changes.summary_en: User settings now block dynamic project skills
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更可靠地限制项目侧自动发现的能力，避免配置越权。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can reliably restrict dynamically discovered project capabilities and avoid configuration overreach.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate CLAUDE.md, slash commands, agents, and rules when running from a worktree nested inside its main repo (e.g. `claude -w`)
changes.summary: worktree 中不再重复加载配置
changes.summary_en: No duplicate config loading in nested worktrees
changes.why_matters: 避免在嵌套 worktree 中重复出现命令、规则和技能，减少混乱。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents duplicated commands, rules, and skills in nested worktrees, reducing confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin Stop/SessionEnd/etc hooks not firing after any `/plugin` operation
changes.summary: 插件操作后钩子恢复触发
changes.summary_en: Plugin hooks now fire after plugin ops
changes.why_matters: 插件安装或管理后，生命周期钩子能正常执行，保证自动化流程完整。
changes.why_matters_en: Lifecycle hooks now run correctly after plugin operations, preserving automation flows.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin hooks being silently dropped when two plugins use the same `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/...` command template
changes.summary: 同模板插件钩子不再丢失
changes.summary_en: Hooks no longer drop for shared command templates
changes.why_matters: 多个插件使用相同命令模板时也能稳定保留钩子，提升插件兼容性。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugins remain compatible even when they share command templates, improving reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in long-running SDK/CCR sessions where conversation messages were retained unnecessarily
changes.summary: 长会话内存占用更低
changes.summary_en: Lower memory use in long-running sessions
changes.why_matters: 减少 SDK/CCR 长时间运行时的内存泄漏，提升稳定性并降低资源消耗。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes a memory leak in long-running SDK/CCR sessions, improving stability and reducing resource use.

changes.raw: Fixed API 400 errors in forked agents (autocompact, summarization) when resuming sessions that were interrupted mid-tool-batch
changes.summary: 恢复中断代理不再报 400
changes.summary_en: Resuming forked agents no longer hits 400s
changes.why_matters: 中断后恢复自动压缩或总结任务更可靠，减少代理工作流失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming interrupted compaction or summarization agents is now more reliable, reducing workflow failures.

changes.raw: Fixed "unexpected tool_use_id found in tool_result blocks" error when resuming conversations that start with an orphaned tool result
changes.summary: 恢复含孤立结果的对话不报错
changes.summary_en: Resume works with orphaned tool results
changes.why_matters: 用户可以恢复异常中断的对话，而不会被工具结果不一致阻断。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can resume interrupted conversations without being blocked by inconsistent tool-result state.

changes.raw: Fixed teammates accidentally spawning nested teammates via the Agent tool's `name` parameter
changes.summary: 避免代理工具嵌套生成队友
changes.summary_en: Agent tool no longer spawns nested teammates
changes.why_matters: 防止代理意外递归创建子代理，避免资源浪费和行为失控。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents accidental recursive teammate creation, avoiding wasted resources and runaway behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS` being ignored during conversation compaction
changes.summary: 压缩时输出上限生效
changes.summary_en: Output token limit now applies during compaction
changes.why_matters: 压缩阶段会遵守用户设置的输出限制，避免生成过长内容。
changes.why_matters_en: Compaction now respects the configured output limit, preventing overly long outputs.

changes.raw: Fixed `/compact` summary rendering as a user bubble in SDK consumers (Claude Code Remote web UI, VSCode extension)
changes.summary: 压缩摘要不再显示成用户气泡
changes.summary_en: /compact summary renders correctly in SDK UIs
changes.why_matters: SDK 和远程 UI 中的压缩结果展示更准确，减少界面误解。
changes.why_matters_en: Compaction summaries now display correctly in SDK and remote UIs, reducing visual confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed voice space bar getting stuck after a failed voice activation (module loading race, cold GrowthBook)
changes.summary: 语音激活失败后空格键恢复
changes.summary_en: Space bar no longer sticks after voice failure
changes.why_matters: 语音功能失败后不会影响后续输入，提升交互稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: A failed voice activation no longer breaks subsequent input, improving interaction reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed worktree file copy on Windows
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 工作树复制
changes.summary_en: Fix worktree file copy on Windows
changes.why_matters: 提升 Windows 上工作树相关操作的可靠性，避免文件复制失败影响日常使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves reliability of worktree operations on Windows and prevents file copy failures.

changes.raw: Fixed global `.claude` folder detection on Windows
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 全局 .claude 识别
changes.why_matters: 让 Windows 用户能正确加载全局配置，减少环境识别错误。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures Windows users can load global configuration correctly and avoids environment detection issues.

changes.raw: Fixed symlink bypass where writing new files through a symlinked parent directory could escape the working directory in `acceptEdits` mode
changes.summary: 阻止符号链接越权写入
changes.why_matters: 防止通过符号链接绕过工作目录限制写入任意位置，避免严重越权风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents symlink-based escapes from the working directory and avoids serious unauthorized write risk.

changes.raw: Fixed sandbox prompting users to approve non-allowed domains when `allowManagedDomainsOnly` is enabled in managed settings — non-allowed domains are now blocked automatically with no bypass
changes.summary: 受管域名自动拦截
changes.why_matters: 在受管配置下自动阻止非允许域名，避免用户误放行带来的安全风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Automatically blocks disallowed domains under managed settings to avoid accidental approval risks.

changes.raw: Fixed interactive tools (e.g., `AskUserQuestion`) being silently auto-allowed when listed in a skill's allowed-tools, bypassing the permission prompt and running with empty answers
changes.summary: 修复交互工具权限绕过
changes.why_matters: 避免技能中的交互工具绕过权限提示并以空答案运行，防止错误或不受控行为。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents interactive tools in skills from bypassing permission prompts and running with empty answers.

changes.raw: Fixed multi-GB memory spike when committing with large untracked binary files in the working tree
changes.summary: 修复大文件提交内存暴涨
changes.summary_en: Fix memory spike on large binary commit
changes.why_matters: 减少提交大体积未跟踪二进制文件时的内存占用，避免卡顿或崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces memory usage when committing large untracked binary files and avoids slowdowns or crashes.

changes.raw: Fixed Escape not interrupting a running turn when the input box has draft text. Use Up arrow to pull queued messages back for editing, or Ctrl+U to clear the input line.
changes.summary: Escape 可中断运行轮次
changes.why_matters: 让用户在输入框有草稿时也能及时中断当前轮次，提升交互控制感。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users interrupt a running turn even with draft text present, improving interactive control.

changes.raw: Fixed Android app crash when running local slash commands (`/voice`, `/cost`) in Remote Control sessions
changes.summary: 修复 Android 远控命令崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix Android crash in remote slash commands
changes.why_matters: 避免 Android 远程控制会话中执行本地命令时崩溃，提升移动端稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents crashes when running local commands in Android remote control sessions and improves mobile stability.

changes.raw: Fixed a memory leak where old message array versions accumulated in React Compiler `memoCache` over long sessions
changes.summary: 修复消息缓存内存泄漏
changes.why_matters: 减少长会话中的内存持续增长，提升稳定性和可持续运行时间。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces memory growth in long sessions and improves stability and runtime longevity.

changes.raw: Fixed a memory leak where REPL render scopes accumulated over long sessions (~35MB over 1000 turns)
changes.summary: 修复 REPL 渲染内存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fix REPL render scope memory leak
changes.why_matters: 降低长时间使用 REPL 时的内存占用，避免逐步变慢或耗尽资源。
changes.why_matters_en: Lowers memory usage during long REPL sessions and helps prevent slowdown or resource exhaustion.

changes.raw: Fixed memory retention in in-process teammates where the parent's full conversation history was pinned for the teammate's lifetime, preventing GC after `/clear` or auto-compact
changes.summary: 修复 teammate 历史占用内存
changes.why_matters: 让清理后的对话历史能被回收，减少协作场景中的长期内存占用。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows cleared conversation history to be garbage-collected and reduces long-term memory use in teammate scenarios.

changes.raw: Fixed a memory leak in interactive mode where hook events could accumulate unboundedly during long sessions
changes.summary: 修复交互模式事件泄漏
changes.why_matters: 防止长会话中事件无限累积导致内存增长和性能下降。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unbounded event accumulation in long sessions and avoids memory growth and performance degradation.

changes.raw: Fixed hang when `--mcp-config` points to a corrupted file
changes.summary: 修复损坏 MCP 配置卡死
changes.summary_en: Fix hang on corrupted MCP config
changes.why_matters: 避免配置文件损坏时启动或加载流程卡住，提高工具可恢复性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents startup or loading from hanging on corrupted config files and improves recoverability.

changes.raw: Fixed slow startup when many skills/plugins are installed
changes.summary: 加快大量技能插件启动
changes.why_matters: 在安装大量技能或插件时缩短启动时间，改善大规模扩展体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Shortens startup time when many skills or plugins are installed and improves large-scale extension experience.

changes.raw: Fixed `cd <outside-dir> && <cmd>` permission prompt to surface the chained command instead of only showing "Yes, allow reading from <dir>/"
changes.summary: 显示完整链式命令提示
changes.summary_en: Show full chained command in prompt
changes.why_matters: 让权限提示展示真实执行命令，帮助用户更准确判断是否允许。
changes.why_matters_en: Shows the actual chained command in permission prompts so users can judge approvals more accurately.

changes.raw: Fixed conditional `.claude/rules/*.md` files (with `paths:` frontmatter) and nested CLAUDE.md files not loading in print mode (`claude -p`)
changes.summary: 修复打印模式规则加载
changes.summary_en: Fix rule loading in print mode
changes.why_matters: 确保条件规则和嵌套配置在 `claude -p` 下也能生效，避免输出与交互模式不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures conditional rules and nested configs work in `claude -p`, keeping print mode consistent with interactive mode.

changes.raw: Fixed `/clear` not fully clearing all session caches, reducing memory retention in long sessions
changes.summary: 清理会话缓存更彻底
changes.why_matters: 减少长会话中的内存残留，让 `/clear` 真正释放上下文相关状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces memory retention in long sessions so `/clear` actually resets session state.

changes.raw: Fixed terminal flicker caused by animated elements at the scrollback boundary
changes.summary: 减少滚动边界闪烁
changes.why_matters: 改善终端渲染稳定性，减少动画元素在滚动边界处的视觉干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves terminal rendering stability and reduces visual distraction near the scrollback boundary.

changes.raw: Fixed UI frame drops on macOS when using MCP servers with OAuth (regression from 2.1.x)
changes.summary: 修复 macOS MCP OAuth 卡顿
changes.summary_en: Fix macOS MCP OAuth frame drops
changes.why_matters: 恢复使用带 OAuth 的 MCP 服务时的界面流畅度，避免明显掉帧。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores UI smoothness when using OAuth-enabled MCP servers and avoids noticeable frame drops.

changes.raw: Fixed occasional frame stalls during typing caused by synchronous debug log flushes
changes.summary: 减少输入时卡顿
changes.why_matters: 避免同步调试日志刷新阻塞输入，提高编辑和交互响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents synchronous debug log flushes from blocking input and improves interaction responsiveness.

changes.raw: Fixed `TeammateIdle` and `TaskCompleted` hooks to support `{"continue": false, "stopReason": "..."}` to stop the teammate, matching `Stop` hook behavior
changes.summary: 支持中止同伴任务钩子
changes.why_matters: 让更多钩子能像 Stop 一样终止同伴任务，增强自动化控制能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets more hooks stop teammate tasks like Stop does, improving automation control.

changes.raw: Fixed `WorktreeCreate` and `WorktreeRemove` plugin hooks being silently ignored
changes.summary: 修复工作树钩子失效
changes.why_matters: 确保插件能正确响应工作树创建和移除事件，避免扩展逻辑静默失效。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures plugins respond to worktree create/remove events instead of failing silently.

changes.raw: Fixed skill descriptions with colons (e.g., "Triggers include: X, Y, Z") failing to load from SKILL.md frontmatter
changes.summary: 支持带冒号的技能描述
changes.why_matters: 避免 SKILL.md frontmatter 解析失败，让技能元数据更灵活可用。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents SKILL.md frontmatter parsing failures and makes skill metadata more flexible.

changes.raw: Fixed project skills without a `description:` frontmatter field not appearing in Claude's available skills list
changes.summary: 无描述技能也能显示
changes.why_matters: 让项目技能在缺少 description 时仍可出现在可用列表中，减少配置门槛。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps project skills visible in the available list even without a description field, lowering setup friction.

changes.raw: Fixed `/context` showing identical token counts for all MCP tools from a server
changes.summary: 修复工具 token 统计
changes.why_matters: 让 `/context` 显示更准确的工具占用信息，便于判断上下文预算。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes `/context` show accurate tool usage so users can better manage context budget.

changes.raw: Fixed literal `nul` file creation on Windows when the model uses CMD-style `2>nul` redirection in Git Bash
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 误建 nul 文件
changes.summary_en: Fix accidental nul file creation on Windows
changes.why_matters: 避免在 Git Bash 下因重定向语法产生错误文件，减少跨平台脚本问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents accidental file creation from redirection syntax in Git Bash and reduces cross-platform scripting issues.

changes.raw: Fixed extra blank lines appearing below each tool call in the expanded subagent transcript view (Ctrl+O)
changes.summary: 去除子代理多余空行
changes.summary_en: Remove extra blank lines in subagent view
changes.why_matters: 改善展开后的子代理转录可读性，让工具调用记录更紧凑。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves readability of expanded subagent transcripts by making tool-call logs more compact.

changes.raw: Fixed Tab/arrow keys not cycling Settings tabs when `/config` search box is focused but empty
changes.summary: 修复设置页键盘切换
changes.why_matters: 让搜索框为空时仍可用方向键和 Tab 切换设置页，提高可操作性。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows Tab and arrow keys to switch Settings tabs when the search box is empty, improving usability.

changes.raw: Fixed service key OAuth sessions (CCR containers) spamming `[ERROR]` logs with 403s from profile-scoped endpoints
changes.summary: 修复 OAuth 403 日志刷屏
changes.why_matters: 减少 CCR 容器中无意义的错误日志，提升排障信噪比。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces noisy error logs in CCR containers and improves signal-to-noise during troubleshooting.

changes.raw: Fixed inconsistent color for "Remote Control active" status indicator
changes.summary: 统一远程控制状态颜色
changes.summary_en: Make remote control status color consistent
changes.why_matters: 让状态提示更一致，减少界面视觉混淆。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes status indicators visually consistent and reduces UI confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed Voice waveform cursor covering the first suffix letter when dictating mid-input
changes.summary: 修复语音光标遮挡首字母
changes.summary_en: Fix voice cursor covering first letter
changes.why_matters: 这能避免口述输入时首字母被遮住，提升语音编辑的可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents the first letter from being obscured during dictation, improving voice input usability.

changes.raw: Fixed Voice input showing all 5 spaces during warmup instead of capping at ~2 (aligning with the "keep holding…" hint)
changes.summary: 修复语音热身空格过多
changes.summary_en: Fix voice warmup showing too many spaces
changes.why_matters: 这让语音输入的热身提示更符合预期，减少界面误导。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes the voice warmup behavior match expectations and reduces UI confusion.

changes.raw: Improved spinner performance by isolating the 50ms animation loop from the surrounding shell, reducing render and CPU overhead during turns
changes.summary: 提升转圈动画性能
changes.why_matters: 这能降低转场期间的渲染和 CPU 开销，让界面更流畅。
changes.why_matters_en: This lowers render and CPU overhead during turns, making the UI smoother.

changes.raw: Improved UI rendering performance in native binaries with React Compiler
changes.summary: 提升原生二进制渲染性能
changes.summary_en: Improve rendering performance in native binaries
changes.why_matters: 这能减少原生版本的界面卡顿，提升整体交互体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces UI jank in native builds and improves overall responsiveness.

changes.raw: Improved `--worktree` startup by eliminating a git subprocess on the startup path
changes.summary: 加快 worktree 启动
changes.why_matters: 这能缩短使用 worktree 时的启动等待时间。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces startup latency when using --worktree.

changes.raw: Improved macOS startup by eliminating redundant settings-file reloads when managed settings resolve
changes.summary: 加快 macOS 启动
changes.why_matters: 这能减少 macOS 上的启动延迟，让应用更快可用。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces startup delay on macOS and gets the app ready sooner.

changes.raw: Improved macOS startup for Claude.ai enterprise/team users by skipping an unnecessary keychain lookup
changes.summary: 跳过无用钥匙串查询
changes.why_matters: 这能让企业和团队用户在 macOS 上更快启动。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps enterprise and team users start faster on macOS.

changes.raw: Improved MCP `-p` startup by pipelining claude.ai config fetch with local connections and using a concurrency pool instead of sequential batching
changes.summary: 加快 MCP 启动连接
changes.why_matters: 这能显著缩短 MCP 启动时间，提升多连接场景的响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: This significantly shortens MCP startup time and improves responsiveness in multi-connection setups.

changes.raw: Improved voice startup by removing imperceptible warmup pulse animations that were causing re-render stutter
changes.summary: 移除语音热身闪动动画
changes.why_matters: 这能减少不必要的重渲染抖动，让语音启动更顺滑。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes unnecessary re-render stutter and makes voice startup smoother.

changes.raw: Improved MCP binary content handling: tools returning PDFs, Office documents, or audio now save decoded bytes to disk with the correct file extension instead of dumping raw base64 into the conversation context. WebFetch also saves binary responses alongside its summary.
changes.summary: 二进制内容自动落盘保存
changes.summary_en: Save binary tool outputs to disk
changes.why_matters: 这避免 PDF、Office、音频等二进制内容污染对话上下文，并保留正确文件。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps PDFs, Office files, and audio out of chat context while preserving them as proper files.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage in long sessions by stabilizing `onSubmit` across message updates
changes.summary: 降低长会话内存占用
changes.summary_en: Reduce memory usage in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 这能让长时间对话更稳定，减少内存增长带来的卡顿或崩溃风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps long sessions more stable and lowers the risk of slowdown or crashes from memory growth.

changes.raw: Improved LSP tool rendering and memory context building to no longer read entire files
changes.summary: 避免整文件读取构建上下文
changes.summary_en: Avoid reading whole files for context
changes.why_matters: 这能减少 LSP 工具渲染和上下文构建的开销，提升大文件场景性能。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces overhead in LSP rendering and context building, improving performance on large files.

changes.raw: Improved session upload and memory sync to avoid reading large files into memory before size/binary checks
changes.summary: 上传与同步前先做大小检查
changes.summary_en: Check size before upload and sync
changes.why_matters: 这能避免把大文件先读入内存再判断，显著降低上传和同步成本。
changes.why_matters_en: This avoids loading large files into memory before validation, cutting upload and sync overhead.

changes.raw: Improved file operation performance by avoiding reading file contents for existence checks (6 sites)
changes.summary: 文件检查不再读内容
changes.summary_en: Avoid reading file contents for existence checks
changes.why_matters: 这能减少多处文件操作的无谓 I/O，提高常见路径性能。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes unnecessary I/O from common file checks and improves everyday performance.

changes.raw: Improved documentation to clarify that `--append-system-prompt-file` and `--system-prompt-file` work in interactive mode (the docs previously said print mode only)
changes.summary: 澄清系统提示文件用法
changes.why_matters: 这修正文档说明，帮助用户在交互模式下正确使用相关参数。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes the docs so users can correctly use the flags in interactive mode.

changes.raw: Reduced baseline memory by ~16MB by deferring Yoga WASM preloading
changes.summary: 降低基础内存占用
changes.why_matters: 减少启动和常驻内存开销，让 Claude Code 在低内存环境下更轻量。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces startup and resident memory overhead, making Claude Code lighter on low-memory systems.

changes.raw: Reduced memory footprint for SDK and CCR sessions using stream-json output
changes.summary: 降低会话内存占用
changes.why_matters: SDK 和 CCR 会话更省内存，能提升长时间运行和大会话场景的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: SDK and CCR sessions use less memory, improving stability for long-running and large-session workflows.

changes.raw: Reduced memory usage when resuming large sessions (including compacted history)
changes.summary: 大会话恢复更省内存
changes.summary_en: Use less memory when resuming large sessions
changes.why_matters: 恢复大会话时内存压力更小，降低卡顿或失败风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming large sessions is less memory-intensive, reducing the risk of slowdowns or failures.

changes.raw: Reduced token usage on multi-agent tasks with more concise subagent final reports
changes.summary: 多代理任务更省 token
changes.summary_en: Use fewer tokens in multi-agent tasks
changes.why_matters: 子代理汇报更简洁，能降低成本并延长可用上下文。
changes.why_matters_en: More concise subagent reports lower cost and preserve more usable context.

changes.raw: Changed Sonnet 4.5 users on Pro/Max/Team Premium to be automatically migrated to Sonnet 4.6
changes.summary: 自动迁移到 Sonnet 4.6
changes.why_matters: 符合条件的用户会自动切换到更新模型，减少手动操作并获得新能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Eligible users are automatically moved to the newer model, reducing manual work and gaining newer capabilities.

changes.raw: Changed the `/resume` picker to show your most recent prompt instead of the first one. This also resolves some titles appearing as `(session)`.
changes.summary: 恢复列表显示最近提示
changes.summary_en: Resume picker shows the latest prompt
changes.why_matters: 更容易快速找回最近一次对话入口，也修复了标题显示异常。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes it easier to reopen the most recent conversation and fixes incorrect session titles.

changes.raw: Changed claude.ai MCP connector failures to show a notification instead of silently disappearing from the tool list
changes.summary: MCP 连接失败可见通知
changes.summary_en: Show notifications for MCP connector failures
changes.why_matters: 连接失败不再静默消失，用户更容易发现并排查集成问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Connector failures are no longer silent, making integration issues easier to notice and debug.

changes.raw: Changed example command suggestions to be generated deterministically instead of calling Haiku
changes.summary: 示例命令建议改为确定性
changes.why_matters: 避免依赖模型生成带来的波动，让建议更稳定可复现。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes model-generated variability, making suggestions more stable and reproducible.

changes.raw: Changed resuming after compaction to no longer produce a preamble recap before continuing
changes.summary: 压缩后续接更简洁
changes.why_matters: 恢复压缩后的会话时少一段重复前言，交互更直接。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming a compacted session skips redundant recap text, making the interaction more direct.

changes.raw: [SDK] Changed task creation to no longer require the `activeForm` field — the spinner falls back to the task subject
changes.summary: SDK 任务创建更宽松
changes.summary_en: SDK task creation no longer needs activeForm
changes.why_matters: 减少必填字段要求，降低 SDK 集成和迁移成本。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces required fields, lowering SDK integration and migration friction.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added compaction display as a collapsible "Compacted chat" card with the summary inside
changes.summary: VSCode 显示压缩聊天卡片
changes.summary_en: VSCode shows a collapsible compacted chat card
changes.why_matters: 压缩内容以可折叠卡片展示，便于查看摘要并节省界面空间。
changes.why_matters_en: Compacted content is shown as a collapsible card, making summaries easier to review and saving space.

changes.raw: [VSCode] The permission mode picker now respects `permissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode` from your effective Claude Code settings (including managed/policy settings) — when set to `disable`, bypass permissions mode is hidden from the picker
changes.summary: 权限模式遵循有效设置
changes.why_matters: 管理或策略设置会正确影响权限选择，避免用户选到被禁用的模式。
changes.why_matters_en: Managed or policy settings now correctly affect the picker, preventing users from selecting disabled modes.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed RTL text (Arabic, Hebrew, Persian) rendering reversed in the chat panel (regression in v2.1.63)
changes.summary: 修复 RTL 文本反向显示
changes.summary_en: Fix reversed RTL text rendering in chat
changes.why_matters: 阿拉伯语、希伯来语和波斯语用户可以正常阅读聊天内容。
changes.why_matters_en: Arabic, Hebrew, and Persian users can now read chat content correctly.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
Claude Code Remote Control
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user

changes.raw: Opus 4.6 now defaults to medium effort for Max and Team subscribers. Medium effort works well for most tasks — it's the sweet spot between speed and thoroughness. You can change this anytime with `/model`
changes.summary: 默认中等推理力度
changes.why_matters: 让大多数任务在速度和推理深度之间取得更好的平衡，默认体验更稳妥。
changes.why_matters_en: It gives most tasks a better balance between speed and thoroughness by default.

changes.raw: Re-introduced the "ultrathink" keyword to enable high effort for the next turn
