changes.summary: 恢复 ultrathink 高强度模式
changes.why_matters: 用户可以用关键词快速切换到下一轮高强度推理，提升复杂问题处理能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can quickly enable high-effort reasoning for the next turn on harder tasks.

changes.raw: Removed Opus 4 and 4.1 from Claude Code on the first-party API — users with these models pinned are automatically moved to Opus 4.6
changes.summary: 旧模型自动迁移到 4.6
changes.why_matters: 移除旧模型会影响已固定模型的用户，但自动迁移可减少中断并保持可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Removing older models affects pinned users, but auto-migration reduces disruption and preserves access.

What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
Claude Code Remote Control
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user

changes.raw: Reduced spurious error logging
changes.summary: 减少误报错误日志
changes.why_matters: 减少无意义的错误日志，帮助用户更快定位真实问题。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces noisy logs so users can spot real issues faster.

signals.title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
Claude Code Remote Control
No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user

changes.raw: Added `/simplify` and `/batch` bundled slash commands
changes.summary: 新增简化与批量斜杠命令
changes.why_matters: 让用户能更快调用常用工作流，减少重复输入。
changes.why_matters_en: This gives users faster access to common workflows with less repetitive typing.

changes.raw: Fixed local slash command output like /cost appearing as user-sent messages instead of system messages in the UI
changes.summary: 修复本地命令消息显示
changes.summary_en: Fixed local slash command output display
changes.why_matters: 避免系统输出被误显示为用户消息，提升界面可读性和可信度。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents system output from being shown as user messages, improving UI clarity and trust.

changes.raw: Project configs & auto memory now shared across git worktrees of the same repository
changes.summary: 工作树共享配置与记忆
changes.summary_en: Shared configs and memory across worktrees
changes.why_matters: 同一仓库的多个工作树可复用配置和记忆，减少重复设置并保持一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: Multiple worktrees for the same repo can reuse configs and memory, reducing setup duplication and keeping behavior consistent.

changes.raw: Added `ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS=false` env var to opt out from making claude.ai MCP servers available
changes.summary: 可关闭 claude.ai MCP 服务
changes.summary_en: Added opt-out for claude.ai MCP servers
changes.why_matters: 允许用户显式禁用外部 MCP 服务暴露，增强控制权和安全边界。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users explicitly disable exposure to external MCP servers, improving control and security boundaries.

changes.raw: Improved `/model` command to show the currently active model in the slash command menu
changes.summary: 模型菜单显示当前模型
changes.summary_en: Model menu now shows active model
changes.why_matters: 用户能更快确认当前正在使用的模型，减少误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can confirm the active model more quickly, reducing mistakes.

changes.raw: Added HTTP hooks, which can POST JSON to a URL and receive JSON instead of running a shell command
changes.summary: 新增 HTTP Hooks 支持
changes.summary_en: Added HTTP hooks with JSON POST/response
changes.why_matters: 让自动化集成更灵活，可直接对接 Web 服务而不必写 shell 脚本。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes automation integrations more flexible by connecting directly to web services without shell scripts.

changes.raw: Fixed listener leak in bridge polling loop
changes.summary: 修复桥接轮询监听泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed listener leak in bridge polling
changes.why_matters: 减少长期运行时的资源泄漏，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces resource leaks in long-running sessions and improves stability.

changes.raw: Fixed listener leak in MCP OAuth flow cleanup
changes.summary: 修复 MCP OAuth 清理泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed listener leak in MCP OAuth cleanup
changes.why_matters: 避免认证流程结束后残留监听器，降低内存和事件异常风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents leftover listeners after auth cleanup, lowering memory use and event-related issues.

changes.raw: Added manual URL paste fallback during MCP OAuth authentication. If the automatic localhost redirect doesn't work, you can paste the callback URL to complete authentication.
changes.summary: 支持手动粘贴 OAuth 回调
changes.summary_en: Added manual URL paste fallback for OAuth
changes.why_matters: 当自动回调失败时仍可完成认证，提高集成可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Authentication can still complete when automatic callbacks fail, improving integration reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak when navigating hooks configuration menu
changes.summary: 修复 hooks 菜单内存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed memory leak in hooks menu navigation
changes.why_matters: 减少配置界面中的内存增长，提升长期使用稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces memory growth in the config UI and improves long-term stability.

changes.raw: Fixed listener leak in interactive permission handler during auto-approvals
changes.summary: 修复自动批准监听泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed listener leak in auto-approval handler
changes.why_matters: 避免权限处理器在自动批准场景下持续占用资源。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents the permission handler from retaining resources during auto-approval flows.

changes.raw: Fixed file count cache ignoring glob ignore patterns
changes.summary: 修复文件计数忽略规则
changes.summary_en: Fixed file count cache with ignore patterns
changes.why_matters: 文件统计更准确，避免把被忽略文件算进去影响分析结果。
changes.why_matters_en: File counts are now accurate, avoiding ignored files skewing analysis results.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in bash command prefix cache
changes.summary: 修复 bash 前缀缓存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed memory leak in bash prefix cache
changes.why_matters: 降低命令前缀缓存带来的内存占用，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lowers memory usage from the command prefix cache and improves stability.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP tool/resource cache leak on server reconnect
changes.summary: 修复 MCP 重连缓存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed MCP cache leak on reconnect
changes.why_matters: 服务重连后不再累积过期缓存，减少资源浪费。
changes.why_matters_en: Expired caches no longer accumulate after reconnects, reducing wasted resources.

changes.raw: Fixed IDE host IP detection cache incorrectly sharing results across ports
changes.summary: 修复 IDE 主机 IP 缓存串用
changes.summary_en: Fixed IDE host IP cache cross-port sharing
changes.why_matters: 避免不同端口之间误用缓存结果，提升连接准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents cache results from being reused across ports, improving connection accuracy.

changes.raw: Fixed WebSocket listener leak on transport reconnect
changes.summary: 修复重连时 WebSocket 监听泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed WebSocket listener leak on reconnect
changes.why_matters: 避免重连后监听器累积导致资源泄漏和异常行为。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents listener buildup after reconnects, avoiding leaks and erratic behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in git root detection cache that could cause unbounded growth in long-running sessions
changes.summary: 修复 Git 根检测缓存内存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed unbounded git root cache growth
changes.why_matters: 防止长会话中缓存无限增长，避免内存占用持续升高。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unbounded cache growth in long sessions and keeps memory usage stable.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in JSON parsing cache that grew unbounded over long sessions
changes.summary: 修复 JSON 解析缓存内存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fixed unbounded JSON parse cache growth
changes.why_matters: 减少长时间运行时的内存膨胀，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces memory bloat during long runs and improves stability.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed remote sessions not appearing in conversation history
changes.summary: 修复 VSCode 远程会话历史缺失
changes.summary_en: Fixed remote sessions missing in history
changes.why_matters: 让远程会话能正常出现在历史记录中，便于继续工作。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures remote sessions appear in history so users can resume work.

changes.raw: Fixed a race condition in the REPL bridge where new messages could arrive at the server interleaved with historical messages during the initial connection flush, causing message ordering issues.
changes.summary: 修复 REPL 桥接消息乱序问题
changes.summary_en: Fixed REPL bridge message ordering race
changes.why_matters: 避免初始连接时历史消息与新消息交错，保证对话顺序正确。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents historical and new messages from interleaving during connect, preserving order.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak where long-running teammates retained all messages in AppState even after conversation compaction
changes.summary: 修复长会话中队友消息泄漏
changes.why_matters: 防止压缩后仍保留全部消息导致内存持续增长。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents all messages from being retained after compaction, avoiding memory growth.

changes.raw: Fixed a memory leak where MCP server fetch caches were not cleared on disconnect, causing growing memory usage with servers that reconnect frequently
changes.summary: 修复 MCP 断连后缓存未清理
changes.summary_en: Fixed MCP fetch cache not cleared on disconnect
changes.why_matters: 避免频繁重连的 MCP 服务不断累积缓存占用内存。
changes.why_matters_en: Stops reconnecting MCP servers from accumulating cache and consuming memory.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage in long sessions with subagents by stripping heavy progress message payloads during context compaction
changes.summary: 压缩时精简子代理进度消息
changes.summary_en: Reduced subagent progress payloads on compaction
changes.why_matters: 降低长会话中的上下文和内存开销，让多子代理场景更流畅。
changes.why_matters_en: Cuts context and memory overhead in long sessions, making subagent workflows smoother.

changes.raw: Added "Always copy full response" option to the `/copy` picker. When selected, future `/copy` commands will skip the code block picker and copy the full response directly.
changes.summary: 新增一键复制完整回复选项
changes.summary_en: Added always copy full response option
changes.why_matters: 让常用完整复制更快捷，减少每次选择代码块的操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes full-response copying faster by skipping the picker when preferred.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added session rename and remove actions to the sessions list
changes.summary: VSCode 会话列表支持重命名删除
changes.summary_en: Added rename and remove actions in VSCode sessions
changes.why_matters: 提升会话管理效率，方便整理和清理历史会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves session management by making it easier to organize and clean up sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed `/clear` not resetting cached skills, which could cause stale skill content to persist in the new conversation
changes.summary: 修复 /clear 后技能缓存未重置
changes.why_matters: 避免新对话继续使用旧技能内容，减少上下文污染。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents stale skill content from leaking into new conversations.

How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
What Claude Code chooses

changes.raw: Fixed prompt suggestion cache regression that reduced cache hit rates
changes.summary: 修复提示建议缓存命中率回退
changes.summary_en: Fix prompt suggestion cache hit regression
changes.why_matters: 恢复缓存命中率可减少重复计算并提升交互响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: Restoring cache hit rates reduces repeated computation and improves interaction latency.

Claude Code Remote Control
Anthropic Cowork feature creates 10GB VM bundle on macOS without warning

changes.raw: Fixed concurrent writes corrupting config file on Windows
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 配置文件并发写入损坏
changes.summary_en: Fix Windows config corruption on concurrent writes
changes.why_matters: 避免在 Windows 上并发写入时损坏配置文件，提升稳定性和数据安全。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents config file corruption during concurrent writes on Windows, improving stability and data safety.

signals.title: How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
Claude Code Remote Control

changes.raw: Claude automatically saves useful context to auto-memory. Manage with /memory
changes.summary: 自动保存有用上下文到记忆
changes.why_matters: 减少重复输入，让 Claude Code 更能延续上下文并提升长会话效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces repeated context sharing and helps Claude Code stay effective across longer sessions.

changes.raw: Added `/copy` command to show an interactive picker when code blocks are present, allowing selection of individual code blocks or the full response.
changes.summary: 代码块可交互复制选择
changes.summary_en: Interactive copy picker for code blocks
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更精确地复制需要的代码片段，减少手动挑选和误复制。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can copy exactly the code they need, reducing manual selection and mistakes.

changes.raw: Improved "always allow" prefix suggestions for compound bash commands (e.g. `cd /tmp && git fetch && git push`) to compute smarter per-subcommand prefixes instead of treating the whole command as one
changes.summary: 复合命令白名单更智能
changes.summary_en: Smarter allow-listing for compound bash commands
changes.why_matters: 对多段 shell 命令按子命令判断更安全也更少打断工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Evaluating compound shell commands per subcommand is safer and interrupts workflows less often.

changes.raw: Improved ordering of short task lists
changes.summary: 短任务列表排序更合理
changes.summary_en: Better ordering for short task lists
changes.why_matters: 让任务展示更清晰，帮助用户更快理解和执行待办事项。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes task lists easier to scan and helps users act on them faster.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage in multi-agent sessions by releasing completed subagent task state
changes.summary: 多代理会话内存占用更低
changes.summary_en: Lower memory use in multi-agent sessions
changes.why_matters: 释放已完成子代理状态可减少资源占用，提升长时间并发会话稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Releasing completed subagent state lowers resource usage and improves stability in long concurrent sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP OAuth token refresh race condition when running multiple Claude Code instances simultaneously
changes.summary: 修复多实例 OAuth 刷新竞态
changes.summary_en: Fix OAuth token refresh race in multi-instance runs
changes.why_matters: 避免多个 Claude Code 实例同时运行时认证失效或刷新失败。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents auth failures or refresh issues when multiple Claude Code instances run at once.

changes.raw: Fixed shell commands not showing a clear error message when the working directory has been deleted
changes.summary: 工作目录删除时提示更清晰
changes.summary_en: Clearer error when working directory is deleted
changes.why_matters: 用户能更快定位 shell 命令失败原因，减少排查时间。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can identify why shell commands failed more quickly, reducing troubleshooting time.

changes.raw: Fixed config file corruption that could wipe authentication when multiple Claude Code instances ran simultaneously
changes.summary: 修复多实例配置损坏与认证丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix config corruption and auth loss with multi-instances
changes.why_matters: 防止并发运行时配置被破坏并导致认证信息丢失，这是高影响稳定性问题。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents config corruption and auth loss during concurrent runs, which is a high-impact stability issue.

changes.raw: Expand Remote Control to more users
changes.summary: 扩大远程控制可用范围
changes.why_matters: 让更多用户可以使用远程控制能力，提升协作和操作灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: More users can use Remote Control, improving collaboration and operational flexibility.

changes.raw: VS Code: Fixed another cause of "command 'claude-vscode.editor.openLast' not found" crashes
changes.summary: 修复 VS Code 命令缺失崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix VS Code missing command crash
changes.why_matters: 减少因命令缺失导致的 VS Code 崩溃，提升编辑器使用稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces VS Code crashes caused by missing commands and improves editor stability.

signals.title: How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%

changes.raw: Fixed BashTool failing on Windows with EINVAL error
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 上 BashTool 失败
changes.why_matters: 解决了 Windows 用户在执行 BashTool 时遇到的 EINVAL 错误，提升了跨平台可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes the EINVAL error on Windows, improving cross-platform reliability for users.

signals.title: How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
Claude Code Remote Control

changes.raw: Fixed a UI flicker where user input would briefly disappear after submission before the message rendered
changes.summary: 修复提交后输入闪烁
changes.why_matters: 避免用户提交后输入内容短暂消失，提升界面稳定感。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents the input from briefly disappearing after submit, improving UI stability.

changes.raw: Fixed bulk agent kill (ctrl+f) to send a single aggregate notification instead of one per agent, and to properly clear the command queue
changes.summary: 批量终止仅发一条通知
changes.summary_en: Send one notification for bulk kill
changes.why_matters: 减少批量终止时的通知噪音，并确保命令队列被正确清空。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces notification spam during bulk termination and ensures the command queue is cleared correctly.

changes.raw: Fixed graceful shutdown sometimes leaving stale sessions when using Remote Control by parallelizing teardown network calls
changes.summary: 远程控制关闭更彻底
changes.why_matters: 避免关闭后残留会话，提升远程控制的可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents stale sessions after shutdown and improves Remote Control reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed `--worktree` sometimes being ignored on first launch
changes.summary: 首次启动正确应用工作树
changes.why_matters: 确保首次启动时工作树参数生效，避免进入错误目录环境。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures the worktree option takes effect on first launch, avoiding the wrong workspace context.

changes.raw: Fixed a panic ("switch on corrupted value") on Windows
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 崩溃与 panic
changes.why_matters: 解决 Windows 上的严重稳定性问题，避免工具直接不可用。
changes.why_matters_en: Resolves a severe Windows stability issue that could make the tool unusable.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash that could occur when spawning many processes on Windows
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 多进程崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix Windows crash when spawning many processes
changes.why_matters: 提升高并发进程场景下的可靠性，减少任务中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves reliability in high-process-count scenarios and reduces task interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash in the WebAssembly interpreter on Linux x64 & Windows x64
changes.summary: 修复 Linux/Windows WASM 崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix WASM interpreter crash on Linux/Windows
changes.why_matters: 修复跨平台运行时崩溃，扩大可用环境范围。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixes a cross-platform runtime crash and broadens supported environments.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash that sometimes occurred after 2 minutes on Windows ARM64
changes.summary: 修复 Windows ARM64 定时崩溃
changes.why_matters: 消除特定架构上的间歇性崩溃，提升长期运行稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Eliminates an intermittent crash on a specific architecture and improves long-running stability.

Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
