changes.raw: VS Code: Fixed extension crash on Windows ("command 'claude-vscode.editor.openLast' not found")
changes.summary: 修复 VS Code 扩展崩溃
changes.why_matters: 解决 Windows 上扩展崩溃问题，避免用户无法正常使用 Claude Code 的编辑器集成。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixes a Windows crash so users can keep using the Claude Code editor integration.

signals.title: How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
Claude Code Remote Control

changes.raw: Added `claude remote-control` subcommand for external builds, enabling local environment serving for all users.
changes.summary: 新增远程控制子命令
changes.why_matters: 支持外部构建场景下的本地环境服务，提升了工具的自动化接入能力。
changes.why_matters_en: It enables local environment serving for external builds, improving automation integration.

changes.raw: Updated plugin marketplace default git timeout from 30s to 120s and added `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS` to configure.
changes.summary: 插件拉取超时可配置
changes.why_matters: 延长默认超时并支持配置后，插件市场在慢网络或大仓库下更稳定。
changes.why_matters_en: A longer default timeout with configurability makes the plugin marketplace more reliable on slow networks or large repos.

changes.raw: Added support for custom npm registries and specific version pinning when installing plugins from npm sources
changes.summary: 支持npm插件源与版本锁定
changes.summary_en: Support npm registries and version pinning
changes.why_matters: 用户可以从自定义 npm 源安装并锁定版本，便于企业分发和可重复安装。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can install from custom npm registries and pin versions, which helps enterprise distribution and reproducibility.

changes.raw: BashTool now skips login shell (`-l` flag) by default when a shell snapshot is available, improving command execution performance. Previously this required setting `CLAUDE_BASH_NO_LOGIN=true`.
changes.summary: 默认跳过登录shell提速
changes.why_matters: 在已有 shell 快照时跳过登录 shell 可减少命令启动开销，提升执行速度。
changes.why_matters_en: Skipping the login shell when a snapshot is available reduces startup overhead and speeds up command execution.

changes.raw: Fixed a security issue where `statusLine` and `fileSuggestion` hook commands could execute without workspace trust acceptance in interactive mode.
changes.summary: 修复钩子越权执行漏洞
changes.why_matters: 修复后可避免未获工作区信任的钩子命令在交互模式下被执行，降低安全风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents untrusted hook commands from running in interactive mode without workspace trust, reducing security risk.

changes.raw: Tool results larger than 50K characters are now persisted to disk (previously 100K). This reduces context window usage and improves conversation longevity.
changes.summary: 大结果落盘节省上下文
changes.summary_en: Persist large tool results to disk
changes.why_matters: 将更大的工具结果写入磁盘可减少上下文占用，让长对话更持久。
changes.why_matters_en: Writing larger tool results to disk reduces context usage and helps conversations last longer.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where duplicate `control_response` messages (e.g. from WebSocket reconnects) could cause API 400 errors by pushing duplicate assistant messages into the conversation.
changes.summary: 修复重复响应致400错误
changes.why_matters: 避免 WebSocket 重连等场景产生重复消息导致 API 400，提升会话稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents duplicate messages from reconnect scenarios from causing API 400 errors, improving session stability.

changes.raw: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_ACCOUNT_UUID`, `CLAUDE_CODE_USER_EMAIL`, and `CLAUDE_CODE_ORGANIZATION_UUID` environment variables for SDK callers to provide account info synchronously, eliminating a race condition where early telemetry events lacked account metadata.
changes.summary: SDK可同步传账户信息
changes.summary_en: SDK can pass account info synchronously
changes.why_matters: 提前提供账户元数据可消除早期遥测竞态，保证统计和归属更准确。
changes.why_matters_en: Providing account metadata earlier removes a telemetry race and makes attribution more accurate.

changes.raw: Fixed slash command autocomplete crashing when a plugin's SKILL.md description is a YAML array or other non-string type
changes.summary: 修复补全崩溃问题
changes.why_matters: 避免插件描述类型异常时补全功能崩溃，提升命令行交互稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents autocomplete from crashing on malformed plugin descriptions, improving CLI interaction stability.

changes.raw: The `/model` picker now shows human-readable labels (e.g., "Sonnet 4.5") instead of raw model IDs for pinned model versions, with an upgrade hint when a newer version is available.
changes.summary: /model显示更易读
changes.why_matters: 更清晰的模型名称和升级提示能帮助用户更快选择合适版本。
changes.why_matters_en: Clearer model names and upgrade hints help users choose the right version faster.

changes.raw: Managed settings can now be set via macOS plist or Windows Registry. Learn more at https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#settings-files
changes.summary: 支持系统级管理配置
changes.summary_en: Support managed settings via OS config
changes.why_matters: 可通过系统配置统一下发管理设置，方便企业集中管控和部署。
changes.why_matters_en: Managed settings can now be centrally deployed through OS configuration, which helps enterprise administration.

signals.title: How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
Claude Code Remote Control

changes.raw: Added support for `startupTimeout` configuration for LSP servers
changes.summary: 支持LSP启动超时配置
changes.why_matters: 用户可以为语言服务器设置启动超时，减少卡住或启动过慢带来的体验问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can set an LSP startup timeout to avoid hangs or slow-start issues.

changes.raw: Added `WorktreeCreate` and `WorktreeRemove` hook events, enabling custom VCS setup and teardown when agent worktree isolation creates or removes worktrees.
changes.summary: 新增工作树创建/移除钩子
changes.why_matters: 这让用户能在代理工作树隔离时自动执行VCS初始化和清理流程。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users automate VCS setup and teardown when agent worktree isolation creates or removes worktrees.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where resumed sessions could be invisible when the working directory involved symlinks, because the session storage path was resolved at different times during startup. Also fixed session data loss on SSH disconnect by flushing session data before hooks and analytics in the graceful shutdown sequence.
changes.summary: 修复符号链接下会话不可见与丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix hidden sessions and data loss on symlinks/SSH
changes.why_matters: 这避免了恢复会话时找不到记录以及SSH断开后会话数据丢失的严重问题。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents resumed sessions from disappearing and avoids session data loss after SSH disconnects.

changes.raw: Linux: Fixed native modules not loading on systems with glibc older than 2.30 (e.g., RHEL 8)
changes.summary: 修复旧版glibc下原生模块加载
changes.summary_en: Fix native modules on older glibc Linux
changes.why_matters: 这让RHEL 8等较旧Linux环境也能正常运行Claude Code。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores Claude Code functionality on older Linux environments like RHEL 8.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in agent teams where completed teammate tasks were never garbage collected from session state
changes.summary: 修复团队任务完成后内存泄漏
changes.why_matters: 这能防止长会话中会话状态持续膨胀，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents session state from growing unbounded in long-running sessions and improves stability.

changes.raw: Fixed `CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE` to fully strip down skills, session memory, custom agents, and CLAUDE.md token counting
changes.summary: CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE更彻底精简
changes.why_matters: 这让简单模式真正只保留最基础能力，减少干扰和资源占用。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes simple mode truly minimal, reducing clutter and resource usage.

changes.raw: Fixed `/mcp reconnect` freezing the CLI when given a server name that doesn't exist
changes.summary: 修复不存在MCP服务器重连卡死
changes.summary_en: Fix /mcp reconnect freeze on missing server
changes.why_matters: 这避免了输入错误服务器名时CLI无响应。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents the CLI from freezing when reconnecting to a nonexistent server name.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak where completed task state objects were never removed from AppState
changes.summary: 修复AppState完成任务内存泄漏
changes.why_matters: 这减少了长时间运行时的内存增长风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces the risk of memory growth during long-running sessions.

changes.raw: Added support for `isolation: worktree` in agent definitions, allowing agents to declaratively run in isolated git worktrees.
changes.summary: 支持代理使用隔离工作树
changes.why_matters: 这让代理可以声明式地在独立git工作树中运行，提升隔离性和并行性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets agents run declaratively in isolated git worktrees, improving isolation and parallelism.

changes.raw: `CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE` mode now also disables MCP tools, attachments, hooks, and CLAUDE.md file loading for a fully minimal experience.
changes.summary: CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE进一步禁用扩展
changes.summary_en: Disable MCP, hooks, attachments in simple mode
changes.why_matters: 这确保简单模式提供真正最小化的体验，避免额外功能干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures simple mode stays truly minimal and avoids extra feature overhead.

changes.raw: Fixed bug where MCP tools were not discovered when tool search is enabled and a prompt is passed in as a launch argument
changes.summary: 修复启动参数下MCP发现失败
changes.summary_en: Fix MCP discovery with launch prompt
changes.why_matters: 这保证在带启动提示词时仍能正确发现MCP工具。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures MCP tools are still discovered when a launch prompt is provided.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage during long sessions by clearing internal caches after compaction
changes.summary: 压缩后清理缓存降内存
changes.summary_en: Reduce memory by clearing caches after compaction
changes.why_matters: 这能让长会话更省内存，降低性能退化风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps long sessions use less memory and reduces the risk of performance degradation.

changes.raw: Added `claude agents` CLI command to list all configured agents
changes.summary: 新增列出代理命令
changes.why_matters: 用户可以快速查看当前配置的所有代理，便于管理。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can quickly list all configured agents for easier management.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage during long sessions by clearing large tool results after they have been processed
changes.summary: 处理后清理大工具结果
changes.summary_en: Clear large tool results after processing
changes.why_matters: 这减少了长会话中的内存占用，提升持续运行稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lowers memory usage in long sessions and improves sustained stability.

changes.raw: Fixed a memory leak where LSP diagnostic data was never cleaned up after delivery, causing unbounded memory growth in long sessions
changes.summary: 修复LSP诊断数据泄漏
changes.why_matters: 这防止长会话中诊断数据无限累积导致内存暴涨。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents diagnostic data from accumulating indefinitely and causing memory growth in long sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed a memory leak where completed task output was not freed from memory, reducing memory usage in long sessions with many tasks
changes.summary: 修复任务输出内存泄漏
changes.why_matters: 减少长会话中已完成任务输出占用的内存，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces memory usage from completed task output in long sessions and improves stability.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance for headless mode (`-p` flag) by deferring Yoga WASM and UI component imports
changes.summary: 提升无头模式启动速度
changes.why_matters: 通过延后不必要的导入，减少无头模式启动等待时间。
changes.why_matters_en: Deferring unnecessary imports reduces startup latency in headless mode.

changes.raw: Fixed prompt suggestion cache regression that reduced cache hit rates
changes.summary: 修复提示建议缓存命中率
changes.why_matters: 恢复缓存效果后，提示建议响应会更稳定、更高效。
changes.why_matters_en: Restoring cache effectiveness makes prompt suggestions more consistent and efficient.

changes.raw: Fixed unbounded memory growth in long sessions by capping file history snapshots
changes.summary: 限制文件历史快照内存增长
changes.why_matters: 避免长会话中文件历史无限增长导致内存耗尽。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents unbounded memory growth in long sessions and reduces the risk of exhaustion.

changes.raw: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT` environment variable to disable 1M context window support
changes.summary: 支持关闭1M上下文窗口
changes.summary_en: Add env var to disable 1M context
changes.why_matters: 为需要更低资源占用或兼容性的用户提供可控开关。
changes.why_matters_en: This gives users a control to reduce resource usage or improve compatibility.

changes.raw: Opus 4.6 (fast mode) now includes the full 1M context window
changes.summary: Opus 4.6支持完整1M上下文
changes.why_matters: 让模型在更长代码和对话中保留更多上下文信息。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets the model retain more context across longer codebases and conversations.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added `/extra-usage` command support in VS Code sessions
changes.summary: VSCode支持/extra-usage命令
changes.why_matters: 扩展了 VS Code 会话中的可用命令，提升集成体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This expands available commands in VS Code sessions and improves integration.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak where TaskOutput retained recent lines after cleanup
changes.summary: 修复TaskOutput清理后残留内存
changes.why_matters: 避免任务清理后仍保留最近行内容，降低长期内存占用。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents recent lines from lingering after cleanup and lowers long-term memory use.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in CircularBuffer where cleared items were retained in the backing array
changes.summary: 修复循环缓冲区残留引用
changes.why_matters: 清除数据后不再保留底层数组引用，减少无效内存占用。
changes.why_matters_en: Cleared items are no longer retained in the backing array, reducing wasted memory.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in shell command execution where ChildProcess and AbortController references were retained after cleanup
changes.summary: 修复Shell执行资源未释放
changes.why_matters: 避免子进程和中止控制器在清理后仍被引用，提升长时间运行稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents ChildProcess and AbortController references from lingering and improves long-running stability.

signals.title: How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
Claude Code Remote Control
Show HN: A real-time strategy game that AI agents can play

changes.raw: Improved MCP OAuth authentication with step-up auth support and discovery caching, reducing redundant network requests during server connections
changes.summary: 优化MCP OAuth与发现缓存
changes.summary_en: Improve MCP OAuth auth and caching
changes.why_matters: 减少服务器连接时的重复网络请求，并提升认证流程的稳定性与体验。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces redundant network requests during server connections and improves auth reliability.

changes.raw: Added `--worktree` (`-w`) flag to start Claude in an isolated git worktree
changes.summary: 支持隔离git工作树启动
changes.summary_en: Start Claude in isolated git worktree
changes.why_matters: 让用户在独立工作区中安全试验修改，降低对主分支的干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets users work in an isolated workspace and reduces risk to the main branch.

changes.raw: Subagents support `isolation: "worktree"` for working in a temporary git worktree
changes.summary: 子代理支持工作树隔离
changes.summary_en: Subagents can run in worktree isolation
changes.why_matters: 子代理可在临时工作树中并行处理任务，提升隔离性与任务安全性。
changes.why_matters_en: Subagents can work in temporary worktrees, improving isolation and task safety.

changes.raw: Added Ctrl+F keybinding to kill background agents (two-press confirmation)
changes.summary: 新增快捷键终止后台代理
changes.summary_en: Add hotkey to kill background agents
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更快停止失控的后台代理，减少资源占用和等待时间。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can stop runaway background agents faster, reducing resource use and wait time.

changes.raw: Agent definitions support `background: true` to always run as a background task
changes.summary: 代理定义支持后台运行
changes.why_matters: 允许特定代理默认作为后台任务运行，更适合长耗时自动化流程。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets certain agents run as background tasks by default, which fits long-running automation.

changes.raw: Plugins can ship `settings.json` for default configuration
changes.summary: 插件可提供默认设置文件
changes.why_matters: 插件作者可以预置默认配置，降低安装后手动设置成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin authors can provide defaults, reducing manual setup after installation.

changes.raw: Fixed file-not-found errors to suggest corrected paths when the model drops the repo folder
changes.summary: 修复路径丢失时的提示
changes.summary_en: Suggest corrected paths on file errors
changes.why_matters: 当模型误丢仓库目录时，用户更容易定位并修正文件路径问题。
changes.why_matters_en: When the model drops the repo folder, users can more easily recover from path mistakes.

changes.raw: Fixed Ctrl+C and ESC being silently ignored when background agents are running and the main thread is idle. Pressing twice within 3 seconds now kills all background agents.
changes.summary: 修复后台代理中断快捷键
changes.why_matters: 避免后台代理运行时按键无响应，提升终止控制的可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents unresponsive stop keys while background agents run, improving control reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed prompt suggestion cache regression that reduced cache hit rates.
changes.summary: 修复提示建议缓存回退
changes.why_matters: 提高缓存命中率，减少重复计算并改善交互响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: It restores cache hit rates, reducing repeated work and improving responsiveness.

changes.raw: Fixed `plugin enable` and `plugin disable` to auto-detect the correct scope when `--scope` is not specified, instead of always defaulting to user scope
changes.summary: 插件启停自动识别作用域
changes.why_matters: 用户无需手动指定作用域，减少误操作并简化插件管理。
changes.why_matters_en: Users no longer need to specify scope manually, reducing mistakes and simplifying plugin management.

changes.raw: Simple mode (`CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE`) now includes the file edit tool in addition to the Bash tool, allowing direct file editing in simple mode.
changes.summary: 简单模式支持直接编辑文件
changes.summary_en: Simple mode now includes file editing
changes.why_matters: 在简化模式下也能直接修改文件，提升轻量场景下的实用性。
changes.why_matters_en: It enables direct file edits in simple mode, making the lightweight mode more useful.

changes.raw: Permission suggestions are now populated when safety checks trigger an ask response, enabling SDK consumers to display permission options
changes.summary: 安全检查返回权限建议
changes.why_matters: SDK 消费者可以展示可选权限操作，让用户更容易做出授权决策。
changes.why_matters_en: SDK consumers can show permission options, helping users make authorization decisions.

changes.raw: Sonnet 4.5 with 1M context is being removed from the Max plan in favor of our frontier Sonnet 4.6 model, which now has 1M context. Please switch in /model.
changes.summary: Max计划模型切换到Sonnet 4.6
changes.summary_en: Max plan moves to Sonnet 4.6 1M context
changes.why_matters: 用户需要切换模型以继续使用 1M 上下文能力，避免服务中断或行为变化。
changes.why_matters_en: Users must switch models to keep 1M context support and avoid service disruption or behavior changes.

changes.raw: Fixed verbose mode not updating thinking block display when toggled via `/config` — memo comparators now correctly detect verbose changes
changes.summary: 修复verbose切换不刷新显示
changes.why_matters: 切换调试模式后界面能正确更新，便于查看推理过程。
changes.why_matters_en: The UI now updates correctly after toggling debug mode, making reasoning output visible.

changes.raw: Fixed unbounded WASM memory growth during long sessions by periodically resetting the tree-sitter parser
changes.summary: 修复WASM内存持续增长
changes.why_matters: 长会话中更稳定，避免内存泄漏导致性能下降或崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: It keeps long sessions stable and avoids memory leaks that can degrade performance or crash.

changes.raw: Fixed potential rendering issues caused by stale yoga layout references
changes.summary: 修复陈旧布局引用渲染问题
changes.summary_en: Fix rendering issues from stale layout refs
changes.why_matters: 这能避免界面在特定情况下渲染异常，提升编辑体验的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents UI rendering glitches in certain cases and improves stability.

changes.raw: Improved performance in non-interactive mode (`-p`) by skipping unnecessary API calls during startup
changes.summary: 非交互模式启动更快
changes.why_matters: 跳过不必要的 API 调用可减少启动等待时间，适合脚本和自动化场景。
changes.why_matters_en: Skipping unnecessary API calls reduces startup latency, especially for scripts and automation.

changes.raw: Improved performance by caching authentication failures for HTTP and SSE MCP servers, avoiding repeated connection attempts to servers requiring auth
changes.summary: 缓存认证失败减少重复连接
changes.summary_en: Cache auth failures to avoid retries
changes.why_matters: 对需要认证的 MCP 服务器避免反复重试，可减少无效请求和启动卡顿。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoiding repeated retries against auth-required MCP servers reduces wasted requests and startup delays.

changes.raw: Fixed unbounded memory growth during long-running sessions caused by Yoga WASM linear memory never shrinking
changes.summary: 修复长会话内存持续增长
changes.summary_en: Fix unbounded memory growth in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 这能防止长时间运行时内存泄漏式增长，提升稳定性并降低崩溃风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents leak-like memory growth in long-running sessions, improving stability and reducing crash risk.

changes.raw: SDK model info now includes `supportsEffort`, `supportedEffortLevels`, and `supportsAdaptiveThinking` fields so consumers can discover model capabilities.
changes.summary: 模型信息新增能力字段
changes.summary_en: Add model capability fields to SDK info
changes.why_matters: 消费者可以据此发现模型是否支持特定思维能力，从而做更准确的功能适配。
changes.why_matters_en: Consumers can discover model capabilities and adapt features more accurately.

changes.raw: Added `ConfigChange` hook event that fires when configuration files change during a session, enabling enterprise security auditing and optional blocking of settings changes.
changes.summary: 新增配置变更审计钩子
changes.why_matters: 这让企业能够监控并在必要时阻止会话中的配置修改，增强安全治理。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets enterprises audit and optionally block configuration changes during a session, strengthening governance.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance by caching MCP auth failures to avoid redundant connection attempts
changes.summary: 缓存 MCP 认证失败加速启动
changes.summary_en: Cache MCP auth failures to speed startup
changes.why_matters: 减少重复的认证连接尝试可以明显改善启动速度和网络开销。
changes.why_matters_en: Reducing repeated auth connection attempts improves startup speed and lowers network overhead.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance by reducing HTTP calls for analytics token counting
changes.summary: 减少分析令牌统计 HTTP 调用
changes.summary_en: Reduce HTTP calls for analytics token counting
changes.why_matters: 更少的网络请求能让启动更快，并降低对外部服务的依赖。
changes.why_matters_en: Fewer network requests make startup faster and reduce dependence on external services.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance by batching MCP tool token counting into a single API call
changes.summary: 批量统计 MCP 工具令牌
changes.why_matters: 将多次调用合并为一次可减少启动延迟并提升整体效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Combining multiple calls into one reduces startup latency and improves efficiency.

changes.raw: Fixed `disableAllHooks` setting to respect managed settings hierarchy — non-managed settings can no longer disable managed hooks set by policy (#26637)
changes.summary: 修复受管钩子禁用绕过问题
changes.summary_en: Fix managed hooks bypass via disableAllHooks
changes.why_matters: 这能防止非受管设置绕过策略禁用关键钩子，避免安全和合规风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents non-managed settings from bypassing policy-managed hooks, avoiding security and compliance risks.

changes.raw: Fixed `--resume` session picker showing raw XML tags for sessions that start with commands like `/clear`. Now correctly falls through to the session ID fallback.
changes.summary: 恢复会话选择器正确回退
changes.summary_en: Fix resume picker fallback for XML tags
changes.why_matters: 这能让 `--resume` 在特殊会话名下正常工作，减少选择会话时的困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps `--resume` working correctly for special session names and reduces confusion when picking sessions.

changes.raw: Improved permission prompts for path safety and working directory blocks to show the reason for the restriction instead of a bare prompt with no context
changes.summary: 权限提示显示限制原因
changes.why_matters: 用户能更清楚地理解为什么被拦截，从而更快决定是否调整路径或工作目录。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can better understand why access is blocked and decide faster whether to adjust the path or working directory.

signals.title: Warcraft III Peon Voice Notifications for Claude Code
How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
What Claude Code chooses
Claude Code Remote Control

changes.raw: Fixed FileWriteTool line counting to preserve intentional trailing blank lines instead of stripping them with `trimEnd()`.
changes.summary: 保留文件末尾空行计数
changes.why_matters: 避免写入文件时误删用户刻意保留的空行，提升编辑结果准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents intentional blank lines from being lost, making file edits more accurate.

changes.raw: Fixed Windows terminal rendering bugs caused by `os.EOL` (`\r\n`) in display code — line counts now show correct values instead of always showing 1 on Windows.
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 行数显示
changes.why_matters: 让 Windows 终端中的行数和渲染结果正确，避免误导用户判断内容长度。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures line counts and rendering are correct on Windows, avoiding misleading output.

changes.raw: Improved VS Code plan preview: auto-updates as Claude iterates, enables commenting only when the plan is ready for review, and keeps the preview open when rejecting so Claude can revise.
changes.summary: 计划预览自动同步可评论
changes.why_matters: 让 VS Code 中的计划预览更及时、更适合审阅和反馈，提升协作效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps the VS Code plan preview current and review-ready, improving collaboration flow.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where bold and colored text in markdown output could shift to the wrong characters on Windows due to `\r\n` line endings.
changes.summary: 修复 Windows Markdown 高亮错位
changes.why_matters: 避免 Windows 下 Markdown 渲染错位，保证加粗和颜色标记对应正确文本。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents markdown styling from shifting on Windows so bold and color apply to the right text.

changes.raw: Fixed compaction failing when conversation contains many PDF documents by stripping document blocks alongside images before sending to the compaction API (anthropics/claude-code#26188)
changes.summary: 修复含 PDF 的压缩失败
changes.why_matters: 让长对话在包含大量 PDF 时仍能顺利压缩，避免会话中断或失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows compaction to succeed even in PDF-heavy conversations, preventing session failures.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage in long-running sessions by releasing API stream buffers, agent context, and skill state after use
changes.summary: 长会话更省内存
changes.summary_en: Reduce memory use in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 降低长时间运行时的内存占用，减少卡顿和资源耗尽风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Cuts memory usage in long-running sessions, reducing slowdown and resource exhaustion.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance by deferring SessionStart hook execution, reducing time-to-interactive by ~500ms.
changes.summary: 启动更快
changes.why_matters: 缩短进入可用状态的等待时间，让用户更快开始工作。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces time to interactive so users can start working sooner.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where bash tool output was silently discarded on Windows when using MSYS2 or Cygwin shells.
changes.summary: 修复 Windows bash 输出丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix lost bash output on Windows
changes.why_matters: 确保在 MSYS2 或 Cygwin 环境下能看到 bash 工具输出，避免调试信息丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures bash tool output is visible on MSYS2/Cygwin, preventing silent loss of results.

changes.raw: Improved performance of `@` file mentions - file suggestions now appear faster by pre-warming the index on startup and using session-based caching with background refresh.
changes.summary: 文件补全建议更快
changes.why_matters: 让 `@` 文件提示更快出现，提升补全体验和输入效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes `@` file suggestions appear faster, improving completion responsiveness.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage by trimming agent task message history after tasks complete
changes.summary: 任务完成后更省内存
changes.why_matters: 减少已完成任务占用的内存，提升长会话稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Frees memory from finished tasks, improving stability in long sessions.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage during long agent sessions by eliminating O(n²) message accumulation in progress updates
changes.summary: 减少进度更新内存膨胀
changes.why_matters: 防止长代理会话中进度更新导致内存快速增长，提升可扩展性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents progress updates from causing runaway memory growth in long agent sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed the bash permission classifier to validate that returned match descriptions correspond to actual input rules, preventing hallucinated descriptions from incorrectly granting permissions
changes.summary: 修复 bash 权限误放行
changes.why_matters: 防止模型伪造匹配描述绕过权限判断，降低错误授权风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents hallucinated match descriptions from incorrectly granting permissions.

changes.raw: Fixed user-defined agents only loading one file on NFS/FUSE filesystems that report zero inodes (anthropics/claude-code#26044)
changes.summary: 修复 NFS/FUSE 代理加载
changes.why_matters: 让在特殊文件系统上的用户定义代理能正确加载全部文件。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures user-defined agents load correctly on NFS/FUSE filesystems.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin agent skills silently failing to load when referenced by bare name instead of fully-qualified plugin name (anthropics/claude-code#25834)
changes.summary: 修复插件技能按名加载
changes.why_matters: 避免插件技能因引用方式不同而静默失败，提高可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents plugin skills from silently failing when referenced by bare name.

changes.raw: Search patterns in collapsed tool results are now displayed in quotes for clarity
changes.summary: 折叠结果搜索词加引号
changes.summary_en: Quote search patterns in collapsed results
changes.why_matters: 让折叠后的工具结果更易读，减少搜索模式歧义。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes collapsed tool results clearer by reducing ambiguity around search patterns.

changes.raw: Windows: Fixed CWD tracking temp files never being cleaned up, causing them to accumulate indefinitely (anthropics/claude-code#17600)
changes.summary: 清理Windows临时文件
changes.why_matters: 避免临时文件无限累积，占用磁盘并影响长期使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents temp files from piling up indefinitely and wasting disk space.

changes.raw: Use `ctrl+f` to kill all background agents instead of double-pressing ESC. Background agents now continue running when you press ESC to cancel the main thread, giving you more control over agent lifecycle.
changes.summary: ESC仅停主线程，Ctrl+F杀后台
changes.summary_en: ESC stops main thread; Ctrl+F kills agents
changes.why_matters: 让用户更精细地控制主流程和后台代理的停止方式。
changes.why_matters_en: Gives users finer control over stopping the main flow versus background agents.

changes.raw: Fixed API 400 errors ("thinking blocks cannot be modified") that occurred in sessions with concurrent agents, caused by interleaved streaming content blocks preventing proper message merging.
changes.summary: 修复并发代理400报错
changes.why_matters: 解决多代理并发时的请求失败，提升复杂任务的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixes request failures in concurrent-agent sessions and improves stability for complex tasks.

changes.raw: Simplified teammate navigation to use only Shift+Down (with wrapping) instead of both Shift+Up and Shift+Down.
changes.summary: 团队导航简化为Shift+Down
changes.why_matters: 减少快捷键记忆负担，让导航操作更一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces shortcut complexity and makes navigation more consistent.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where a single file write/edit error would abort all other parallel file write/edit operations. Independent file mutations now complete even when a sibling fails.
changes.summary: 单个文件失败不再拖垮并行写入
changes.summary_en: One file error no longer aborts others
changes.why_matters: 避免一个文件出错导致整批并行编辑失败，提高批量修改成功率。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents one file error from canceling all parallel edits and improves batch edit reliability.

changes.raw: Added `last_assistant_message` field to Stop and SubagentStop hook inputs, providing the final assistant response text so hooks can access it without parsing transcript files.
changes.summary: Hook可直接拿到最后回复
changes.why_matters: 让钩子无需解析转录文件即可获取最终回复，集成更简单。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets hooks access the final reply directly without parsing transcripts, simplifying integrations.

changes.raw: Fixed custom session titles set via `/rename` being lost after resuming a conversation (anthropics/claude-code#23610)
changes.summary: 恢复后保留自定义会话标题
changes.summary_en: Keep custom session titles after resume
changes.why_matters: 避免重连后标题丢失，改善会话管理体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents custom titles from disappearing after resume and improves session management.

changes.raw: Fixed collapsed read/search hint text overflowing on narrow terminals by truncating from the start.
changes.summary: 窄终端提示文字不再溢出
changes.summary_en: Prevent hint text overflow on narrow terminals
changes.why_matters: 在小窗口下界面更整洁，减少显示错乱。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps the UI tidy in small terminals and avoids display overflow.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where bash commands with backslash-newline continuation lines (e.g., long commands split across multiple lines with `\`) would produce spurious empty arguments, potentially breaking command execution.
changes.summary: 修复反斜杠换行命令解析
changes.why_matters: 避免长命令被错误拆分成空参数，防止命令执行失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents long commands from being split into empty args and breaking execution.

changes.raw: Fixed built-in slash commands (`/help`, `/model`, `/compact`, etc.) being hidden from the autocomplete dropdown when many user skills are installed (anthropics/claude-code#22020)
changes.summary: 内置斜杠命令恢复可见
changes.summary_en: Restore built-in slash commands in autocomplete
changes.why_matters: 让常用内置命令在自动补全中可见，提升可发现性。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes built-in commands visible in autocomplete again, improving discoverability.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP servers not appearing in the MCP Management Dialog after deferred loading
changes.summary: MCP服务器延迟加载后可见
changes.summary_en: Show MCP servers after deferred loading
changes.why_matters: 确保管理界面能正确展示已加载的外部服务。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures the management dialog correctly shows externally loaded services.

changes.raw: Fixed session name persisting in status bar after `/clear` command (anthropics/claude-code#26082)
changes.summary: 清空后状态栏不再残留会话名
changes.summary_en: Clear session name from status bar on /clear
changes.why_matters: 避免状态栏显示过期信息，减少用户混淆。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents stale status-bar information and reduces confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed crash when a skill's `name` or `description` in SKILL.md frontmatter is a bare number (e.g., `name: 3000`) — the value is now properly coerced to a string (anthropics/claude-code#25837)
changes.summary: 技能数字名称不再崩溃
changes.summary_en: Avoid crash on numeric skill metadata
changes.why_matters: 提升对异常技能元数据的容错性，避免启动或加载崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves tolerance of malformed skill metadata and avoids load-time crashes.

changes.raw: Fixed /resume silently dropping sessions when the first message exceeds 16KB or uses array-format content (anthropics/claude-code#25721)
changes.summary: 恢复长会话不再丢失
changes.why_matters: 防止大消息或数组格式内容导致会话无法恢复。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents sessions from being lost during resume when messages are large or array-formatted.

changes.raw: Added `chat:newline` keybinding action for configurable multi-line input (anthropics/claude-code#26075)
changes.summary: 新增可配置多行输入换行键
changes.why_matters: 让多行输入操作更灵活，适配不同键盘习惯。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes multiline input more flexible and adaptable to different keyboard habits.

changes.raw: Added `added_dirs` to the statusline JSON `workspace` section, exposing directories added via `/add-dir` to external scripts (anthropics/claude-code#26096)
changes.summary: 状态栏暴露新增目录
changes.summary_en: Expose added dirs in statusline JSON
changes.why_matters: 外部脚本现在可以读取 `/add-dir` 添加的目录，提升自动化和集成能力。
changes.why_matters_en: External scripts can now read directories added via `/add-dir`, improving automation and integrations.

changes.raw: Fixed `claude doctor` misclassifying mise and asdf-managed installations as native installs (anthropics/claude-code#26033)
changes.summary: 修正安装类型误判
changes.why_matters: 避免 `claude doctor` 把 mise 和 asdf 管理的安装误判为原生安装，减少排障误导。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents `claude doctor` from misreporting mise/asdf-managed installs as native, reducing misleading diagnostics.

changes.raw: Fixed zsh heredoc failing with "read-only file system" error in sandboxed commands (anthropics/claude-code#25990)
changes.summary: 修复沙箱 heredoc 报错
changes.summary_en: Fix zsh heredoc in sandboxed commands
changes.why_matters: 沙箱命令中的 zsh heredoc 不再因只读文件系统失败，提升受限环境下的可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Zsh heredocs in sandboxed commands no longer fail on read-only file systems, improving usability in restricted environments.

changes.raw: Fixed agent progress indicator showing inflated tool use count (anthropics/claude-code#26023)
changes.summary: 修正进度计数显示
changes.why_matters: 代理进度指示更准确，减少用户对工具调用量的误解。
changes.why_matters_en: Agent progress indicators are now accurate, reducing confusion about tool usage.

changes.raw: Fixed image pasting not working on WSL2 systems where Windows copies images as BMP format (anthropics/claude-code#25935)
changes.summary: 修复 WSL2 图片粘贴
changes.summary_en: Fix image paste on WSL2 BMP copies
changes.why_matters: 在 WSL2 上从 Windows 复制 BMP 图片时可正常粘贴，改善跨平台图片输入体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Image pasting now works on WSL2 when Windows copies images as BMP, improving cross-platform image input.

changes.raw: Fixed background agent results returning raw transcript data instead of the agent's final answer (anthropics/claude-code#26012)
changes.summary: 返回代理最终答案
changes.summary_en: Return final answer from background agents
changes.why_matters: 后台代理结果现在返回最终答复而不是原始转录，便于直接使用输出。
changes.why_matters_en: Background agent results now return the final answer instead of raw transcript data, making outputs directly usable.

changes.raw: Fixed Warp terminal incorrectly prompting for Shift+Enter setup when it supports it natively (anthropics/claude-code#25957)
changes.summary: 修复 Warp 快捷键误提示
changes.why_matters: Warp 终端不再被错误提示配置 Shift+Enter，减少干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Warp terminal users are no longer incorrectly prompted to set up Shift+Enter, reducing friction.

changes.raw: Fixed CJK wide characters causing misaligned timestamps and layout elements in the TUI (anthropics/claude-code#26084)
changes.summary: 修复 CJK 布局错位
changes.summary_en: Fix CJK layout alignment in TUI
changes.why_matters: 中文等宽字符不再导致时间戳和界面元素错位，提升可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: Wide CJK characters no longer misalign timestamps and UI elements, improving readability.

changes.raw: Fixed custom agent `model` field in `.claude/agents/*.md` being ignored when spawning team teammates (anthropics/claude-code#26064)
changes.summary: 修复自定义模型字段生效
changes.why_matters: 自定义代理的 `model` 配置现在会被正确使用，确保按预期派生团队成员。
changes.why_matters_en: Custom agent `model` settings are now respected when spawning teammates, ensuring the intended model is used.

changes.raw: Fixed plan mode being lost after context compaction, causing the model to switch from planning to implementation mode (anthropics/claude-code#26061)
changes.summary: 保留压缩后的计划模式
changes.why_matters: 上下文压缩后不会丢失计划模式，避免模型意外切换到实现阶段。
changes.why_matters_en: Plan mode now survives context compaction, preventing unintended switches from planning to implementation.

changes.raw: Fixed `alwaysThinkingEnabled: true` in settings.json not enabling thinking mode on Bedrock and Vertex providers (anthropics/claude-code#26074)
changes.summary: 修复始终思考未启用
changes.why_matters: `alwaysThinkingEnabled` 现在在 Bedrock 和 Vertex 上也能生效，保证一致的推理行为。
changes.why_matters_en: `alwaysThinkingEnabled` now works on Bedrock and Vertex providers, ensuring consistent reasoning behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed `tool_decision` OTel telemetry event not being emitted in headless/SDK mode (anthropics/claude-code#26059)
changes.summary: 补发 OTel 工具决策事件
changes.summary_en: Emit tool_decision OTel event in SDK
changes.why_matters: 无头和 SDK 模式下也能记录工具决策遥测，便于监控和分析。
changes.why_matters_en: Tool decision telemetry is now emitted in headless/SDK mode, improving observability and analysis.

changes.raw: Fixed session name being lost after context compaction — renamed sessions now preserve their custom title through compaction (anthropics/claude-code#26121)
changes.summary: 保留重命名会话标题
changes.why_matters: 上下文压缩后自定义会话名不再丢失，方便识别和恢复会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Renamed session titles now survive context compaction, making sessions easier to identify and resume.

changes.raw: Increased initial session count in resume picker from 10 to 50 for faster session discovery (anthropics/claude-code#26123)
changes.summary: 增加恢复列表初始数量
changes.summary_en: Show more sessions in resume picker
changes.why_matters: 恢复会话时可更快看到更多历史记录，减少翻页和搜索成本。
changes.why_matters_en: The resume picker now shows more sessions up front, reducing paging and search effort.

changes.raw: Windows: fixed worktree session matching when drive letter casing differs (anthropics/claude-code#26123)
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 工作树匹配
changes.why_matters: Windows 上驱动器字母大小写不同也能正确匹配工作树会话，提升恢复准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: Worktree sessions on Windows now match correctly even when drive-letter casing differs, improving resume accuracy.

changes.raw: Fixed `/resume <session-id>` failing to find sessions whose first message exceeds 16KB (anthropics/claude-code#25920)
changes.summary: 修复大首条消息会话可恢复
changes.why_matters: 避免长会话因为首条消息过大而无法继续，提升会话恢复可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents long sessions from becoming unrecoverable when the first message is large.

changes.raw: Fixed "Always allow" on multiline bash commands creating invalid permission patterns that corrupt settings (anthropics/claude-code#25909)
changes.summary: 修复多行命令授权规则损坏
changes.summary_en: Fix invalid allow rules for multiline bash
changes.why_matters: 防止“始终允许”生成错误权限配置，避免设置被破坏。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents malformed permission settings from corrupting the user's configuration.

changes.raw: Fixed React crash (error #31) when a skill's `argument-hint` in SKILL.md frontmatter uses YAML sequence syntax (e.g., `[topic: foo | bar]`) — the value is now properly coerced to a string (anthropics/claude-code#25826)
changes.summary: 修复技能参数提示解析崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash parsing skill argument hints
changes.why_matters: 让技能元数据更稳健，避免因 YAML 写法导致界面崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes skill metadata parsing more robust and avoids UI crashes from YAML syntax.

changes.raw: Fixed crash when using `/fork` on sessions that used web search — null entries in search results from transcript deserialization are now handled gracefully (anthropics/claude-code#25811)
changes.summary: 修复 fork 含搜索结果会崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix /fork crash with web search results
changes.why_matters: 提升带网页搜索会话的分叉稳定性，避免历史会话无法继续使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves fork stability for sessions with web search so history remains usable.

changes.raw: Fixed read-only git commands triggering FSEvents file watcher loops on macOS by adding --no-optional-locks flag (anthropics/claude-code#25750)
changes.summary: 修复只读 git 命令触发循环
changes.summary_en: Fix watcher loops from read-only git commands
changes.why_matters: 减少 macOS 上无意义的文件监听循环，降低卡顿和资源占用。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces pointless file-watcher loops on macOS, lowering lag and resource use.

changes.raw: Fixed custom agents and skills not being discovered when running from a git worktree — project-level `.claude/agents/` and `.claude/skills/` from the main repository are now included (anthropics/claude-code#25816)
changes.summary: 修复 worktree 中技能与代理发现
changes.summary_en: Fix agent and skill discovery in worktrees
changes.why_matters: 让在 git worktree 中运行时仍能正确加载项目级扩展能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures project-level agents and skills are still discovered in git worktrees.

changes.raw: Fixed non-interactive subcommands like `claude doctor` and `claude plugin validate` being blocked inside nested Claude sessions (anthropics/claude-code#25803)
changes.summary: 修复嵌套会话阻塞非交互命令
changes.summary_en: Fix non-interactive commands in nested sessions
changes.why_matters: 让诊断和校验类命令可在嵌套 Claude 会话中正常运行。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows diagnostic and validation commands to run properly inside nested Claude sessions.

changes.raw: Windows: Fixed the same CLAUDE.md file being loaded twice when drive letter casing differs between paths (anthropics/claude-code#25756)
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 上 CLAUDE.md 重复加载
changes.summary_en: Fix duplicate CLAUDE.md loading on Windows
changes.why_matters: 避免因盘符大小写差异导致重复读取配置，减少环境不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents duplicate config loading caused by drive-letter casing differences.

changes.raw: Fixed inline code spans in markdown being incorrectly parsed as bash commands (anthropics/claude-code#25792)
changes.summary: 修复内联代码被误判为命令
changes.summary_en: Fix inline code misparsed as bash commands
changes.why_matters: 减少 Markdown 解析误判，避免错误执行或提示干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces Markdown parsing mistakes that could trigger wrong command handling.

changes.raw: Fixed teammate spinners not respecting custom spinnerVerbs from settings (anthropics/claude-code#25748)
changes.summary: 修复自定义转圈文案不生效
changes.summary_en: Fix custom spinner verbs not applied
changes.why_matters: 让界面文案配置真正生效，提升可定制性和一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes spinner text settings actually take effect, improving customization consistency.

changes.raw: Fixed shell commands permanently failing after a command deletes its own working directory (anthropics/claude-code#26136)
changes.summary: 修复删目录后命令永久失败
changes.summary_en: Fix commands failing after deleting cwd
changes.why_matters: 避免工作目录被删除后整个命令流失效，提升任务连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents command execution from breaking permanently when the working directory is removed.

changes.raw: Fixed hooks (PreToolUse, PostToolUse) silently failing to execute on Windows by using Git Bash instead of cmd.exe (anthropics/claude-code#25981)
changes.summary: 修复 Windows hooks 无法执行
changes.why_matters: 确保 PreToolUse 和 PostToolUse 钩子在 Windows 上可靠运行。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures PreToolUse and PostToolUse hooks run reliably on Windows.

changes.raw: Fixed LSP `findReferences` and other location-based operations returning results from gitignored files (e.g., `node_modules/`, `venv/`) (anthropics/claude-code#26051)
changes.summary: 修复 LSP 返回忽略文件结果
changes.summary_en: Fix LSP results from gitignored files
changes.why_matters: 避免引用查找等结果混入无关文件，提高代码导航准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps reference and location results free of irrelevant ignored files for better code navigation.

changes.raw: Moved config backup files from home directory root to `~/.claude/backups/` to reduce home directory clutter (anthropics/claude-code#26130)
changes.summary: 备份文件移至专用目录
changes.summary_en: Move config backups to a dedicated folder
changes.why_matters: 减少主目录杂乱，让配置备份更易管理。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces home-directory clutter and makes config backups easier to manage.

changes.raw: Fixed sessions with large first prompts (>16KB) disappearing from the /resume list (anthropics/claude-code#26140)
changes.summary: 修复大首条提示会话消失
changes.summary_en: Fix /resume list for large first prompts
changes.why_matters: 避免长提示会话从恢复列表中丢失，保障会话可找回。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents sessions with large first prompts from disappearing from the resume list.

changes.raw: Fixed shell functions with double-underscore prefixes (e.g., `__git_ps1`) not being preserved across shell sessions (anthropics/claude-code#25824)
changes.summary: 保留双下划线 shell 函数
changes.why_matters: 避免像 `__git_ps1` 这类函数在会话间丢失，提升 shell 集成稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents functions like `__git_ps1` from disappearing between sessions, improving shell integration reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed spinner showing "0 tokens" counter before any tokens have been received (anthropics/claude-code#26105)
changes.summary: 修正 0 token 计数显示
changes.why_matters: 避免在尚未收到 token 时误显示计数，减少界面误导。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids misleading UI by not showing a token count before any tokens arrive.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed conversation messages appearing dimmed while the AskUserQuestion dialog is open (anthropics/claude-code#26078)
changes.summary: 修正 AskUserQuestion 变暗问题
changes.why_matters: 让 VSCode 中的对话消息在弹窗打开时保持可读，改善交互体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps conversation messages readable in VSCode while the dialog is open, improving UX.

changes.raw: Fixed background tasks failing in git worktrees due to remote URL resolution reading from worktree-specific gitdir instead of the main repository config (anthropics/claude-code#26065)
changes.summary: 修复 worktree 后台任务失败
changes.summary_en: Fix background tasks in git worktrees
changes.why_matters: 确保在 git worktree 中也能正确解析远程地址，避免后台任务中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures remote URLs resolve correctly in git worktrees so background tasks do not fail.

changes.raw: Fixed Right Alt key leaving visible `[25~` escape sequence residue in the input field on Windows/Git Bash terminals (anthropics/claude-code#25943)
changes.summary: 修复 Windows Alt 键残留字符
changes.summary_en: Fix Alt key escape residue on Windows
changes.why_matters: 避免输入框中出现多余转义序列，提升 Windows 终端输入体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents stray escape sequences in the input field, improving Windows terminal input experience.

changes.raw: The `/rename` command now updates the terminal tab title by default (anthropics/claude-code#25789)
changes.summary: 重命名时自动更新标签页标题
changes.why_matters: 让终端标签标题随会话名称同步，便于区分多个任务。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps terminal tab titles in sync with session names, making multiple tasks easier to distinguish.

changes.raw: Fixed Edit tool silently corrupting Unicode curly quotes (\u201c\u201d \u2018\u2019) by replacing them with straight quotes when making edits (anthropics/claude-code#26141)
changes.summary: 修复 Unicode 引号被改坏
changes.why_matters: 避免编辑时悄悄破坏文本字符，防止代码和文档内容出错。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents silent text corruption during edits, avoiding errors in code and documents.

changes.raw: Fixed OSC 8 hyperlinks only being clickable on the first line when link text wraps across multiple terminal lines.
changes.summary: 修复换行链接可点击范围
changes.why_matters: 让跨多行的终端链接都能正常点击，提升终端可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes wrapped terminal links clickable across all lines, improving terminal usability.

signals.title: Claude Code is being dumbed down?
Warcraft III Peon Voice Notifications for Claude Code
How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
Claude Code Remote Control

changes.raw: Fixed orphaned CC processes after terminal disconnect on macOS
changes.summary: 修复断开终端后残留进程
changes.why_matters: 避免 macOS 终端断开后 Claude Code 进程残留占用资源或失控运行。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents Claude Code processes from lingering after terminal disconnect and wasting resources.

changes.raw: Added support for using claude.ai MCP connectors in Claude Code
changes.summary: 支持 claude.ai MCP 连接器
changes.why_matters: 让 Claude Code 能接入 claude.ai 的 MCP 连接器，扩展可用工具和集成能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets Claude Code use claude.ai MCP connectors, expanding available tools and integrations.

changes.raw: Added support for Claude Sonnet 4.6
changes.summary: 支持 Claude Sonnet 4.6
changes.why_matters: 用户可以直接使用更新的模型能力，获得更好的代码生成与推理体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can use the newer model for better coding and reasoning quality.

changes.raw: Added support for reading `enabledPlugins` and `extraKnownMarketplaces` from `--add-dir` directories
changes.summary: 支持目录插件配置读取
changes.why_matters: 用户可通过额外目录自动加载插件市场配置，减少手动配置成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can auto-load plugin marketplace settings from added directories with less manual setup.

changes.raw: Added `spinnerTipsOverride` setting to customize spinner tips — configure `tips` with an array of custom tip strings, and optionally set `excludeDefault: true` to show only your custom tips instead of the built-in ones
changes.summary: 可自定义加载提示语
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按需替换或精简启动提示文案，提升个性化体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can tailor startup tips to better fit their preferences.

changes.raw: Added `SDKRateLimitInfo` and `SDKRateLimitEvent` types to the SDK, enabling consumers to receive rate limit status updates including utilization, reset times, and overage information
changes.summary: SDK 增加限流状态事件
changes.summary_en: Add SDK rate limit status events
changes.why_matters: SDK 使用者可实时感知限流状态，便于做重试、告警和流控。
changes.why_matters_en: SDK consumers can react to rate limits in real time for retries, alerts, and throttling.

changes.raw: Fixed Agent Teams teammates failing on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry by propagating API provider environment variables to tmux-spawned processes (anthropics/claude-code#23561)
changes.summary: 修复团队模式云端环境变量传递
changes.summary_en: Fix env vars for team mode on cloud
changes.why_matters: 在 Bedrock、Vertex 和 Foundry 上的后台协作流程可正常运行，避免任务失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Background team workflows now work on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry instead of failing.

changes.raw: Fixed sandbox "operation not permitted" errors when writing temporary files on macOS by using the correct per-user temp directory (anthropics/claude-code#21654)
changes.summary: 修复 macOS 沙箱临时文件报错
changes.summary_en: Fix macOS sandbox temp file errors
changes.why_matters: 用户在 macOS 上写临时文件时不再因权限问题中断工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Users on macOS no longer hit permission errors when writing temp files.

changes.raw: Fixed Task tool (backgrounded agents) crashing with a `ReferenceError` on completion (anthropics/claude-code#22087)
changes.summary: 修复后台任务完成时崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix Task tool crash on completion
changes.why_matters: 后台代理任务完成后可稳定返回结果，提升长任务可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Background agent tasks now complete reliably without crashing.

changes.raw: Fixed autocomplete suggestions not being accepted on Enter when images are pasted in the input
changes.summary: 修复粘贴图片后回车补全失效
changes.summary_en: Fix Enter autocomplete after image paste
changes.why_matters: 用户在输入框中粘贴图片后仍能正常接受自动补全建议。
changes.why_matters_en: Autocomplete suggestions still work after pasting images into the input.

changes.raw: Fixed skills invoked by subagents incorrectly appearing in main session context after compaction
changes.summary: 修复子代理技能上下文污染
changes.summary_en: Fix subagent skills leaking into context
changes.why_matters: 压缩后主会话不会被子代理技能误污染，减少上下文混乱。
changes.why_matters_en: Main session context stays clean after compaction, avoiding confusion from leaked subagent skills.

changes.raw: Fixed excessive `.claude.json.backup` files accumulating on every startup
changes.summary: 修复启动时备份文件过多
changes.summary_en: Fix backup file buildup on startup
changes.why_matters: 减少无意义的备份文件堆积，避免目录变乱并节省空间。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents unnecessary backup file buildup and keeps directories cleaner.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin-provided commands, agents, and hooks not being available immediately after installation without requiring a restart
changes.summary: 插件命令安装后立即可用
changes.why_matters: 安装插件后无需重启即可使用命令、代理和钩子，提升工作流效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugin commands, agents, and hooks work immediately after install without a restart.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance by removing eager loading of session history for stats caching
changes.summary: 提升启动速度
changes.why_matters: 移除不必要的历史预加载后，启动更快，等待时间更短。
changes.why_matters_en: Startup is faster because unnecessary history loading was removed.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage for shell commands that produce large output — RSS no longer grows unboundedly with command output size
changes.summary: 大输出命令更省内存
changes.summary_en: Reduce memory use for large outputs
changes.why_matters: 处理大输出命令时内存不再无限增长，降低卡顿和崩溃风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Memory no longer grows unbounded for large command output, reducing lag and crash risk.

changes.raw: Improved collapsed read/search groups to show the current file or search pattern being processed beneath the summary line while active
changes.summary: 折叠结果显示当前处理项
changes.summary_en: Show current item in collapsed groups
changes.why_matters: 用户在折叠视图中也能知道当前正在处理的文件或搜索词，便于跟踪进度。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see which file or search pattern is being processed even in collapsed views.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Improved permission destination choice (project/user/session) to persist across sessions
changes.summary: VSCode 权限选择可记忆
changes.why_matters: 用户在 VSCode 中选择权限作用域后可跨会话保留，减少重复设置。
changes.why_matters_en: Permission scope choices in VSCode persist across sessions, reducing repeated setup.

signals.title: Claude Code is being dumbed down?
Warcraft III Peon Voice Notifications for Claude Code
How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
Show HN: Emdash – Open-source agentic development environment

changes.raw: Fixed ENAMETOOLONG errors for deeply-nested directory paths
changes.summary: 修复深层目录路径过长错误
changes.why_matters: 避免在深度嵌套目录中因路径过长导致操作失败，提升大项目可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents failures on deeply nested paths, improving usability for large projects.

changes.raw: Fixed auth refresh errors
changes.summary: 修复认证刷新失败
changes.why_matters: 确保登录态能正常续期，减少使用过程中因认证过期而中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps sessions renewing properly and reduces interruptions from expired authentication.

signals.title: Claude Code is being dumbed down?
Warcraft III Peon Voice Notifications for Claude Code
How I use Claude Code: Separation of planning and execution
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
Show HN: AI agents play SimCity through a REST API

changes.raw: Fixed AWS auth refresh hanging indefinitely by adding a 3-minute timeout
changes.summary: 修复 AWS 认证刷新卡死
changes.why_matters: 避免认证刷新无限等待，提升 CLI 在 AWS 场景下的可用性和稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents auth refresh from hanging forever, improving reliability in AWS workflows.

changes.raw: Fixed spurious warnings for non-agent markdown files in `.claude/agents/` directory
changes.summary: 消除 agents 目录误报警告
changes.summary_en: Remove false warnings in agents dir
changes.why_matters: 减少对非 agent Markdown 文件的误报，降低噪音并改善用户体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces noisy false warnings for non-agent Markdown files and improves UX.

changes.raw: Fixed structured-outputs beta header being sent unconditionally on Vertex/Bedrock
changes.summary: 修复结构化输出头误发送
changes.why_matters: 避免在 Vertex/Bedrock 上发送不该启用的 beta 头，减少兼容性问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents sending an unsupported beta header on Vertex/Bedrock, reducing compatibility issues.

changes.raw: Improved startup performance by deferring Zod schema construction
changes.summary: 延迟构建Schema，加快启动
changes.summary_en: Faster startup by deferring schema build
changes.why_matters: 减少启动时的初始化开销，让用户更快进入工作状态。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces startup overhead so users can begin working sooner.

changes.raw: Improved prompt cache hit rates by moving date out of system prompt
changes.summary: 移除日期提升缓存命中率
changes.summary_en: Better cache hits by removing date from prompt
changes.why_matters: 提高提示缓存命中率，降低重复请求成本并改善响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves prompt cache hit rates, reducing repeated request cost and latency.

changes.raw: Added one-time Opus 4.6 effort callout for eligible users
changes.summary: 为符合条件用户提示Opus 4.6
changes.summary_en: One-time Opus 4.6 effort callout for eligible users
changes.why_matters: 帮助符合条件的用户了解可用能力与使用建议。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps eligible users notice available capability and usage guidance.

changes.raw: Fixed /resume showing interrupt messages as session titles
changes.summary: 修复恢复会话标题显示错误
changes.why_matters: 避免会话列表显示混乱，提升恢复历史会话时的可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents confusing session titles and improves readability when resuming history.

changes.raw: Fixed image dimension limit errors to suggest /compact
changes.summary: 图片超限时提示使用/compact
changes.why_matters: 在图片超限时给出明确下一步操作，减少用户卡住的情况。
changes.why_matters_en: It gives a clear next step when image limits are hit, reducing user friction.

signals.title: Claude Code is being dumbed down?
Warcraft III Peon Voice Notifications for Claude Code
Anthropic officially bans using subscription auth for third party use
Speed up responses with fast mode
Show HN: AI agents play SimCity through a REST API

changes.raw: Added guard against launching Claude Code inside another Claude Code session
changes.summary: 防止嵌套启动会话
changes.why_matters: 避免在已有 Claude Code 会话中再次启动导致状态混乱和操作冲突。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents nested sessions that can cause state confusion and command conflicts.

changes.raw: Fixed Agent Teams using wrong model identifier for Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry customers
changes.summary: 修复云厂商模型标识错误
changes.summary_en: Fix wrong model IDs for cloud providers
changes.why_matters: 确保 Bedrock、Vertex 和 Foundry 用户能正确调用模型，避免代理团队功能失效。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry users can invoke the right models and avoid broken Agent Teams behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash when MCP tools return image content during streaming
changes.summary: 修复流式图片内容崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash on streamed image tool output
changes.why_matters: 避免 MCP 工具在流式返回图片内容时导致整个客户端崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents the client from crashing when MCP tools stream image content.

changes.raw: Fixed /resume session previews showing raw XML tags instead of readable command names
changes.summary: 会话预览显示可读命令名
changes.summary_en: Show readable names in resume previews
changes.why_matters: 让 /resume 预览更易读，帮助用户快速识别历史会话内容。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes /resume previews easier to read so users can quickly identify past sessions.

changes.raw: Improved model error messages for Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry users with fallback suggestions
changes.summary: 模型报错更清晰并给建议
changes.summary_en: Clearer model errors with fallback tips
changes.why_matters: 帮助 Bedrock、Vertex 和 Foundry 用户更快定位问题并切换可用方案。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry users diagnose issues faster and switch to a workable fallback.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin browse showing misleading "Space to Toggle" hint for already-installed plugins
changes.summary: 修复插件浏览提示误导
changes.why_matters: 减少已安装插件页面上的误导性提示，避免用户误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Removes a misleading hint on installed plugins, reducing user confusion and misclicks.

changes.raw: Fixed hook blocking errors (exit code 2) not showing stderr to the user
changes.summary: 显示 hook 阻塞错误详情
changes.summary_en: Show stderr for blocking hook errors
changes.why_matters: 让用户看到 hook 失败原因，便于排查自动化流程中的阻塞问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Exposes hook failure details so users can debug blocked automation flows.

changes.raw: Added `speed` attribute to OTel events and trace spans for fast mode visibility
changes.summary: OTel 事件增加速度字段
changes.summary_en: Add speed field to OTel traces
changes.why_matters: 提升 fast mode 的可观测性，便于分析性能和行为差异。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves fast-mode observability for analyzing performance and behavior differences.

changes.raw: Added `claude auth login`, `claude auth status`, and `claude auth logout` CLI subcommands
changes.summary: 新增 auth 登录状态退出命令
changes.why_matters: 提供更完整的认证管理能力，方便用户在 CLI 内直接管理登录状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Adds complete auth management so users can handle login state directly in the CLI.

changes.raw: Added Windows ARM64 (win32-arm64) native binary support
changes.summary: 支持 Windows ARM64 原生版
changes.why_matters: 让更多 Windows ARM64 设备可以原生运行 Claude Code，提升兼容性和性能。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets more Windows ARM64 devices run Claude Code natively for better compatibility and performance.

changes.raw: Improved `/rename` to auto-generate session name from conversation context when called without arguments
changes.summary: 自动生成会话重命名
changes.why_matters: 在不输入参数时也能快速生成有意义的会话名，减少手动操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Generates a useful session name even without arguments, reducing manual effort.

changes.raw: Improved narrow terminal layout for prompt footer
changes.summary: 窄终端底栏布局优化
changes.summary_en: Improve footer layout on narrow terminals
changes.why_matters: 在小窗口里提升界面可读性，减少提示信息被截断。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves readability in small terminals and reduces truncated footer text.

changes.raw: Fixed file resolution failing for @-mentions with anchor fragments (e.g., `@README.md#installation`)
changes.summary: 修复带锚点的 @ 引用解析
changes.why_matters: 确保引用 README#section 这类路径时能正确定位文件内容。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures references like README#section resolve to the correct file content.

changes.raw: Fixed FileReadTool blocking the process on FIFOs, `/dev/stdin`, and large files
changes.summary: 修复特殊文件读取阻塞
changes.summary_en: Fix FileReadTool blocking on special files
changes.why_matters: 避免读取 FIFO、标准输入和大文件时卡住进程，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents hangs when reading FIFOs, stdin, and large files, improving stability.

changes.raw: Fixed background task notifications not being delivered in streaming Agent SDK mode
changes.summary: 流式 SDK 补发后台通知
changes.summary_en: Deliver background notifications in streaming SDK
changes.why_matters: 让 Agent SDK 流式模式下也能收到后台任务通知，避免漏消息。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures background task notifications arrive in streaming Agent SDK mode so messages are not missed.

changes.raw: Fixed cursor jumping to end on each keystroke in classifier rule input
changes.summary: 修复规则输入光标跳尾
changes.summary_en: Fix cursor jumping in rule input
changes.why_matters: 避免用户编辑规则时光标乱跳，提升输入体验和可编辑性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents cursor jumps while editing rules, improving input usability.

changes.raw: Fixed markdown link display text being dropped for raw URL
changes.summary: 修复链接文本显示丢失
changes.why_matters: 确保 Markdown 链接按预期展示，避免信息被错误替换成原始 URL。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures markdown links render correctly instead of losing their display text.

changes.raw: Fixed auto-compact failure error notifications being shown to users
changes.summary: 隐藏自动压缩失败通知
changes.why_matters: 减少无关错误提示干扰，让用户界面更干净。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces noisy error notifications and keeps the UI cleaner.

changes.raw: Fixed permission wait time being included in subagent elapsed time display
changes.summary: 修正子代理耗时统计
changes.summary_en: Exclude permission wait from subagent time
changes.why_matters: 让子代理耗时更准确，便于用户判断实际执行效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes subagent timing more accurate for understanding real execution time.

changes.raw: Fixed proactive ticks firing while in plan mode
changes.summary: 修复计划模式误触发主动轮询
changes.summary_en: Stop proactive ticks in plan mode
changes.why_matters: 避免计划模式下不该发生的自动行为，防止打断用户工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unintended automation in plan mode from interrupting the workflow.

changes.raw: Fixed clear stale permission rules when settings change on disk
changes.summary: 设置变更后清理旧权限规则
changes.summary_en: Clear stale permission rules on settings change
changes.why_matters: 确保磁盘上的设置更新后权限规则同步生效，减少权限混乱。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps permission rules in sync with updated settings and avoids stale access behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed hook blocking errors showing stderr content in UI
changes.summary: 修复钩子阻断错误泄露 stderr
changes.summary_en: Hide stderr in hook blocking errors
changes.why_matters: 避免将内部错误输出暴露给用户，提升安全性和可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents internal stderr output from leaking into the UI, improving safety and clarity.

changes.raw: Improved terminal rendering performance
changes.summary: 提升终端渲染性能
changes.why_matters: 终端刷新更快，能减少卡顿并提升交互流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: Faster terminal updates reduce lag and make the CLI feel smoother.

changes.raw: Fixed fatal errors being swallowed instead of displayed
changes.summary: 显示致命错误而非吞掉
changes.summary_en: Show fatal errors instead of swallowing
changes.why_matters: 错误能被及时看到，便于排查问题并避免误以为任务成功。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see critical failures immediately, making debugging easier and preventing false success.

changes.raw: Fixed process hanging after session close
changes.summary: 修复会话关闭后进程卡住
changes.summary_en: Fix process hang after session close
changes.why_matters: 避免会话结束后残留卡死进程，提升稳定性和资源释放。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents stuck processes after a session ends, improving stability and resource cleanup.

changes.raw: Fixed character loss at terminal screen boundary
changes.summary: 修复屏幕边界字符丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix character loss at screen boundary
changes.why_matters: 减少终端显示错误，避免代码或输出内容被截断。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents display corruption at the terminal edge so output is not lost or truncated.

changes.raw: Fixed blank lines in verbose transcript view
changes.summary: 修复详细记录中的空行
changes.summary_en: Fix blank lines in verbose transcript
changes.why_matters: 让转录内容更紧凑易读，减少无意义空白干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes verbose transcripts cleaner and easier to read by removing unnecessary blank lines.

changes.raw: Fixed VS Code terminal scroll-to-top regression introduced in 2.1.37
changes.summary: 修复 VS Code 终端滚动回顶
changes.why_matters: 避免终端在 VS Code 中异常跳回顶部，提升日常使用流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents the terminal from jumping to the top in VS Code, improving everyday usability.

changes.raw: Fixed Tab key queueing slash commands instead of autocompleting
changes.summary: 修复 Tab 键补全行为
changes.why_matters: 让 Tab 键按预期补全而不是排队执行斜杠命令，减少误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes Tab behave as expected for autocomplete instead of queuing slash commands, reducing mistakes.

changes.raw: Fixed bash permission matching for commands using environment variable wrappers
changes.summary: 修复 bash 环境变量包装匹配
changes.summary_en: Fix bash permission matching with env wrappers
changes.why_matters: 确保带环境变量包装的命令能正确匹配权限规则，避免误拦截。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures commands wrapped with environment variables match permission rules correctly and avoid false blocks.

changes.raw: Fixed text between tool uses disappearing when not using streaming
changes.summary: 修复非流式输出文本丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix missing text between tool uses
changes.why_matters: 防止工具调用之间的文本在非流式模式下消失，保证输出完整。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents text between tool uses from disappearing in non-streaming mode, preserving complete output.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate sessions when resuming in VS Code extension
changes.summary: 修复 VS Code 恢复会话重复
changes.summary_en: Fix duplicate sessions on VS Code resume
changes.why_matters: 避免恢复会话时出现重复实例，减少混乱并提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids duplicate instances when resuming sessions, reducing confusion and improving stability.

changes.raw: Improved heredoc delimiter parsing to prevent command smuggling
changes.summary: 加固 heredoc 解析防命令注入
changes.summary_en: Harden heredoc parsing against command smuggling
changes.why_matters: 降低通过 heredoc 伪造命令的风险，直接提升命令执行安全性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces the risk of command smuggling through heredoc parsing and directly improves execution safety.

changes.raw: Blocked writes to `.claude/skills` directory in sandbox mode
changes.summary: 沙箱禁写 .claude/skills
changes.why_matters: 防止沙箱内写入技能目录，减少越权修改和供应链风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents sandboxed writes to the skills directory, reducing unauthorized changes and supply-chain risk.

changes.summary: Opus 4.6 支持快速模式

changes.why_matters_en: Gives users faster responses and a more efficient experience with Opus 4.6.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash when agent teams setting changed between renders
changes.summary: 修复代理团队切换导致崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash when agent teams change
changes.why_matters: 避免在界面重渲染时因配置变化导致工具崩溃，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents crashes when settings change between renders, improving stability.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where commands excluded from sandboxing (via `sandbox.excludedCommands` or `dangerouslyDisableSandbox`) could bypass the Bash ask permission rule when `autoAllowBashIfSandboxed` was enabled
changes.summary: 修复沙箱绕过权限漏洞
changes.why_matters: 修复后可防止被排除的命令绕过 Bash 询问权限规则，避免未授权执行风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents excluded commands from bypassing Bash permission prompts and reduces unauthorized execution risk.

signals.title: Claude Code is being dumbed down?
Warcraft III Peon Voice Notifications for Claude Code
Claude Code is suddenly everywhere inside Microsoft
Orchestrate teams of Claude Code sessions
Claude Code: connect to a local model when your quota runs out

changes.raw: Fixed agent teammate sessions in tmux to send and receive messages
changes.summary: 修复tmux队友会话收发
changes.summary_en: Fix teammate session messaging in tmux
changes.why_matters: 这让多代理在 tmux 中能正常双向通信，避免协作流程中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores reliable two-way messaging for multi-agent collaboration in tmux.

changes.raw: Fixed warnings about agent teams not being available on your current plan
changes.summary: 修复团队功能计划警告
changes.why_matters: 这消除了误导性提示，减少用户对功能可用性的困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes misleading warnings and reduces confusion about feature availability.

changes.raw: Added `TeammateIdle` and `TaskCompleted` hook events for multi-agent workflows
changes.summary: 新增多代理钩子事件
changes.why_matters: 这让工作流能更精确地监听代理状态，便于自动化编排。
changes.why_matters_en: This enables workflows to react to agent state changes and orchestrate automation more precisely.

changes.raw: Added support for restricting which sub-agents can be spawned via `Task(agent_type)` syntax in agent "tools" frontmatter
changes.summary: 限制可派生子代理
changes.why_matters: 这帮助控制代理可调用的子任务类型，提升安全性和可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users control which sub-agent types can be spawned, improving safety and governance.

changes.raw: Added `memory` frontmatter field support for agents, enabling persistent memory with `user`, `project`, or `local` scope
changes.summary: 支持代理持久记忆
changes.why_matters: 这让代理能按用户、项目或本地范围保留上下文，提升连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets agents retain context across user, project, or local scopes for better continuity.

changes.raw: Added plugin name to skill descriptions and `/skills` menu for better discoverability
changes.summary: 技能菜单显示插件名
changes.summary_en: Show plugin names in skills menu
changes.why_matters: 这让用户更容易找到技能来源并快速识别相关功能。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes skills easier to discover and helps users identify their source quickly.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where submitting a new message while the model was in extended thinking would interrupt the thinking phase
changes.summary: 修复扩展思考消息中断
changes.why_matters: 这避免模型在深度思考时被打断，保证回答质量和稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents interruptions during extended thinking, preserving response quality and stability.

changes.raw: Fixed an API error that could occur when aborting mid-stream, where whitespace text combined with a thinking block would bypass normalization and produce an invalid request
changes.summary: 修复中断流式请求报错
changes.why_matters: 这避免流式中断时产生无效请求，减少任务失败和重试成本。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents invalid requests when aborting streams, reducing failures and retry overhead.

changes.raw: Fixed API proxy compatibility issue where 404 errors on streaming endpoints no longer triggered non-streaming fallback
changes.summary: 修复代理404回退问题
changes.why_matters: 这提升了代理环境下流式请求的兼容性，避免错误回退影响体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves streaming compatibility behind proxies and avoids disruptive fallback behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where proxy settings configured via `settings.json` environment variables were not applied to WebFetch and other HTTP requests on the Node.js build
changes.summary: 修复Node代理设置失效
changes.summary_en: Fix Node proxy settings for HTTP requests
changes.why_matters: 这确保 WebFetch 等网络请求遵循代理配置，便于企业和受限网络使用。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures HTTP requests respect proxy settings, which is important in enterprise and restricted networks.

changes.raw: Fixed `/resume` session picker showing raw XML markup instead of clean titles for sessions started with slash commands
changes.summary: 修复会话标题显示乱码
changes.summary_en: Fix raw XML in resume session titles
changes.why_matters: 这让会话列表更易读，帮助用户更快找到要恢复的会话。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes session lists readable and helps users find the right session faster.

changes.raw: Improved error messages for API connection failures — now shows specific cause (e.g., ECONNREFUSED, SSL errors) instead of generic "Connection error"
changes.summary: 连接失败提示更具体
changes.why_matters: 这帮助用户更快定位网络或证书问题，减少排障时间。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users diagnose network or SSL issues faster and reduces troubleshooting time.

changes.raw: Errors from invalid managed settings are now surfaced
changes.summary: 暴露无效管理设置错误
changes.why_matters: 这让配置问题更早被发现，避免隐藏错误影响运行。
changes.why_matters_en: This surfaces configuration problems earlier so hidden errors do not affect execution.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added support for remote sessions, allowing OAuth users to browse and resume sessions from claude.ai
changes.summary: VSCode支持远程会话
changes.why_matters: 这让 OAuth 用户可在 VSCode 中浏览和恢复云端会话，提升跨设备连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets OAuth users browse and resume cloud sessions in VSCode, improving cross-device continuity.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added git branch and message count to the session picker, with support for searching by branch name
changes.summary: 会话列表显示分支信息
changes.summary_en: Add branch info to session picker
changes.why_matters: 这让用户能按分支快速筛选会话，更容易找回正确上下文。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users filter sessions by branch and recover the right context more easily.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed scroll-to-bottom under-scrolling on initial session load and session switch
changes.summary: 修复 VSCode 初始加载滚动不足
changes.why_matters: 避免会话首次加载或切换时内容没有滚到底，提升查看最新输出的体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents the view from stopping short of the bottom on initial load or session switch, improving access to the latest output.
