changes.raw: Claude Opus 4.6 is now available!
changes.summary: 新增 Opus 4.6 支持
changes.why_matters: 用户可以立即使用更强的新模型能力提升代码生成与推理效果。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can immediately benefit from the newer model's stronger coding and reasoning capabilities.

changes.raw: Added research preview agent teams feature for multi-agent collaboration (token-intensive feature, requires setting CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1)
changes.summary: 新增多智能体协作团队
changes.why_matters: 这让 Claude Code 能以多代理方式并行协作，适合更复杂的任务分解与研究工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: This enables parallel multi-agent collaboration, which is useful for complex task decomposition and research workflows.

changes.raw: Claude now automatically records and recalls memories as it works
changes.summary: 自动记录并回忆记忆
changes.why_matters: 工具可以跨会话保留关键信息，减少重复说明并提升连续工作效率。
changes.why_matters_en: The tool can retain key information across sessions, reducing repetition and improving continuity.

changes.raw: Added "Summarize from here" to the message selector, allowing partial conversation summarization.
changes.summary: 支持从此处摘要对话
changes.why_matters: 用户可以只总结对话的某一段，便于压缩上下文并聚焦当前任务。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can summarize only part of a conversation, helping compress context and focus on the current task.

changes.raw: Skills defined in `.claude/skills/` within additional directories (`--add-dir`) are now loaded automatically.
changes.summary: 自动加载额外目录技能
changes.why_matters: 在扩展工作区时，相关技能会自动生效，减少手动配置成本。
changes.why_matters_en: When expanding the workspace, relevant skills load automatically, reducing manual setup.

changes.raw: Fixed `@` file completion showing incorrect relative paths when running from a subdirectory
changes.summary: 修复子目录下路径补全
changes.why_matters: 文件补全更准确，能减少在子目录中选择错误路径的情况。
changes.why_matters_en: File completion is now more accurate, reducing wrong path selection from subdirectories.

changes.raw: Updated --resume to re-use --agent value specified in previous conversation by default.
changes.summary: 续会话默认沿用代理
changes.why_matters: 恢复历史会话时能保持相同代理设置，减少重复调整并保持行为一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming a past conversation now keeps the same agent setting, reducing reconfiguration and preserving consistency.

changes.raw: Fixed: Bash tool no longer throws "Bad substitution" errors when heredocs contain JavaScript template literals like `${index + 1}`, which previously interrupted tool execution
changes.summary: 修复 Bash heredoc 语法报错
changes.why_matters: 避免 Bash 工具因模板字符串误报错而中断执行，提升脚本运行稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents Bash tool execution from being interrupted by false heredoc substitution errors, improving script reliability.

changes.raw: Skill character budget now scales with context window (2% of context), so users with larger context windows can see more skill descriptions without truncation
changes.summary: 技能描述预算随上下文扩展
changes.summary_en: Skill budget scales with context window
changes.why_matters: 大上下文用户能看到更多技能说明，减少被截断导致的选择困难。
changes.why_matters_en: Users with larger context windows can see more skill descriptions, reducing truncation and selection friction.

changes.raw: Fixed Thai/Lao spacing vowels (สระ า, ำ) not rendering correctly in the input field
changes.summary: 修复泰语老挝语元音显示
changes.why_matters: 输入框中的文字显示更正确，改善相关语言用户的输入体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Text renders correctly in the input field, improving the typing experience for Thai and Lao users.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed slash commands incorrectly being executed when pressing Enter with preceding text in the input field
changes.summary: 修复 VSCode 回车误触发命令
changes.why_matters: 避免在输入已有文本时误执行斜杠命令，减少编辑器内的意外操作。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents accidental slash-command execution when text is already present, reducing unintended actions in the editor.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added spinner when loading past conversations list
changes.summary: 会话列表加载显示转圈
changes.summary_en: Added loading spinner for past chats
changes.why_matters: 用户能更清楚地知道历史会话正在加载，提升界面反馈。
changes.why_matters_en: Users get clearer feedback that past conversations are loading, improving UI responsiveness.

signals.title: Claude Code is being dumbed down?
Warcraft III Peon Voice Notifications for Claude Code
Claude Code daily benchmarks for degradation tracking
Claude Code is suddenly everywhere inside Microsoft
Orchestrate teams of Claude Code sessions

changes.raw: Added session resume hint on exit, showing how to continue your conversation later
changes.summary: 退出时提示会话续接方式
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更容易在之后继续同一段对话，提升会话连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps users continue the same conversation later, improving session continuity.

changes.raw: Added support for full-width (zenkaku) space input from Japanese IME in checkbox selection
changes.summary: 支持日文全角空格输入
changes.why_matters: 提升日文输入法在选择框中的可用性，减少输入兼容问题。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves IME compatibility for Japanese users and reduces input friction.

changes.raw: Fixed PDF too large errors permanently locking up sessions, requiring users to start a new conversation
changes.summary: 修复PDF过大导致会话锁死
changes.why_matters: 避免因大文件错误导致整个会话不可恢复，防止用户被迫重开对话。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents large-file errors from permanently breaking a session and forcing users to restart.

changes.raw: Fixed bash commands incorrectly reporting failure with "Read-only file system" errors when sandbox mode was enabled
changes.summary: 修复沙箱下bash误报失败
changes.summary_en: Fix false bash failures in sandbox
changes.why_matters: 减少沙箱模式下的误判失败，避免用户被错误错误信息误导。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces false failures in sandbox mode and avoids misleading error reports.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash that made sessions unusable after entering plan mode when project config in `~/.claude.json` was missing default fields
changes.summary: 修复计划模式崩溃问题
changes.why_matters: 防止配置缺失时会话直接崩溃，保障核心工作流可用。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents crashes from missing config fields and keeps the core workflow usable.

changes.raw: Fixed `temperatureOverride` being silently ignored in the streaming API path, causing all streaming requests to use the default temperature (1) regardless of the configured override
changes.summary: 修复流式API温度覆盖失效
changes.why_matters: 确保流式请求按配置生成，避免输出风格与预期不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: It ensures streaming requests honor the configured temperature and behave as expected.

changes.raw: Fixed LSP shutdown/exit compatibility with strict language servers that reject null params
changes.summary: 修复LSP退出兼容性
changes.why_matters: 提高与严格语言服务器的兼容性，减少工具集成失败。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves compatibility with strict language servers and reduces integration failures.

changes.raw: Improved system prompts to more clearly guide the model toward using dedicated tools (Read, Edit, Glob, Grep) instead of bash equivalents (`cat`, `sed`, `grep`, `find`), reducing unnecessary bash command usage
changes.summary: 引导优先用专用工具
changes.summary_en: Guide model to use dedicated tools
changes.why_matters: 减少不必要的bash调用，让文件操作更稳定、更可控。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces unnecessary bash usage and makes file operations more reliable and controlled.

changes.raw: Improved PDF and request size error messages to show actual limits (100 pages, 20MB)
changes.summary: 错误信息显示真实限制
changes.summary_en: Show actual PDF and request limits
changes.why_matters: 让用户更快理解失败原因并调整输入，减少反复试错。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps users understand limits quickly and adjust inputs with less trial and error.

changes.raw: Reduced layout jitter in the terminal when the spinner appears and disappears during streaming
changes.summary: 减少流式输出布局抖动
changes.why_matters: 改善终端交互体验，让输出更稳定、更易阅读。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves terminal UX by making streaming output feel steadier and easier to read.

changes.raw: Removed misleading Anthropic API pricing from model selector for third-party provider (Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry) users
changes.summary: 隐藏第三方用户的误导定价
changes.summary_en: Remove misleading pricing for third-party users
changes.why_matters: 避免Bedrock、Vertex、Foundry用户看到不适用的Anthropic定价信息。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry users from seeing irrelevant Anthropic pricing.

signals.title: Claude Code is being dumbed down?

changes.raw: Added `pages` parameter to the Read tool for PDFs, allowing specific page ranges to be read (e.g., `pages: "1-5"`). Large PDFs (>10 pages) now return a lightweight reference when `@` mentioned instead of being inlined into context.
changes.summary: PDF按页读取，超长文档轻量引用
changes.summary_en: Read PDFs by page range; large PDFs use lightweight refs
changes.why_matters: 用户可以只读取需要的 PDF 页码，减少上下文占用并提升处理大文档效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can read only the needed PDF pages, saving context and improving large-document handling.

changes.raw: Added pre-configured OAuth client credentials for MCP servers that don't support Dynamic Client Registration (e.g., Slack). Use `--client-id` and `--client-secret` with `claude mcp add`.
changes.summary: MCP支持预配置OAuth凭据
changes.summary_en: Support preconfigured OAuth creds for MCP servers
changes.why_matters: 让不支持动态注册的 MCP 服务也能更顺利接入，降低集成门槛。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes MCP servers without dynamic registration easier to connect, lowering integration friction.

changes.raw: Added `/debug` for Claude to help troubleshoot the current session
changes.summary: 新增/debug排查当前会话
changes.summary_en: Add /debug to troubleshoot the current session
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更快定位会话问题，减少排障时间。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can diagnose session issues faster and spend less time troubleshooting.

changes.raw: Added support for additional `git log` and `git show` flags in read-only mode (e.g., `--topo-order`, `--cherry-pick`, `--format`, `--raw`)
changes.summary: 只读模式支持更多git log/show参数
changes.summary_en: Support more git log/show flags in read-only mode
changes.why_matters: 增强对 Git 历史的查看能力，便于更精确地理解代码变更。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves Git history inspection and helps users understand changes more precisely.

changes.raw: Added token count, tool uses, and duration metrics to Task tool results
changes.summary: Task结果显示耗时与工具统计
changes.summary_en: Task results now show tokens, tool uses, duration
changes.why_matters: 用户能更清楚评估任务成本和执行效率，便于优化工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can better assess task cost and efficiency, helping them optimize workflows.

changes.raw: Added reduced motion mode to the config
changes.summary: 配置新增减少动态效果模式
changes.summary_en: Add reduced motion mode to config
changes.why_matters: 提升部分用户的可用性与舒适度，尤其是对动画敏感的人群。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves usability and comfort for users sensitive to motion and animations.

changes.raw: Fixed phantom "(no content)" text blocks appearing in API conversation history, reducing token waste and potential model confusion
changes.summary: 修复会话历史空内容块
changes.summary_en: Fix phantom empty content blocks in history
changes.why_matters: 减少无效 token 消耗，并避免模型被错误历史内容干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces wasted tokens and avoids confusion from bogus history entries.

changes.raw: Fixed prompt cache not correctly invalidating when tool descriptions or input schemas changed, only when tool names changed
changes.summary: 修复工具描述变更后缓存失效
changes.summary_en: Fix cache invalidation for tool schema changes
changes.why_matters: 确保工具定义更新后不会继续使用旧缓存，避免行为不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures updated tool definitions are respected instead of stale cached behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed 400 errors that could occur after running `/login` when the conversation contained thinking blocks
changes.summary: 修复/login后含思考块的400错误
changes.summary_en: Fix 400 errors after /login with thinking blocks
changes.why_matters: 避免登录后会话因历史内容格式问题而报错中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents sessions from breaking after login due to thinking-block history issues.

changes.raw: Fixed a hang when resuming sessions with corrupted transcript files containing `parentUuid` cycles
changes.summary: 修复损坏会话恢复卡死
changes.summary_en: Fix hang when resuming corrupted sessions
changes.why_matters: 提升异常会话恢复的可靠性，避免用户卡在恢复流程中。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves recovery reliability and prevents users from getting stuck on resume.

changes.raw: Fixed rate limit message showing incorrect "/upgrade" suggestion for Max 20x users when extra-usage is unavailable
changes.summary: 修复限流提示误导升级建议
changes.summary_en: Fix incorrect upgrade prompt for Max 20x users
changes.why_matters: 减少错误引导，避免用户在不可升级场景下被误导。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces misleading guidance when extra usage is unavailable.

changes.raw: Fixed permission dialogs stealing focus while actively typing
changes.summary: 修复权限弹窗抢占输入焦点
changes.summary_en: Fix permission dialogs stealing typing focus
changes.why_matters: 避免用户输入被打断，提升交互流畅性和可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents typing interruptions and improves interaction flow.

changes.raw: Fixed subagents not being able to access SDK-provided MCP tools because they were not synced to the shared application state
changes.summary: 修复子代理无法用共享MCP工具
changes.summary_en: Fix subagents losing access to shared MCP tools
changes.why_matters: 让子代理能正确调用共享工具，恢复复杂自动化任务能力。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores subagents' ability to use shared tools for complex automation tasks.

changes.raw: Fixed a regression where Windows users with a `.bashrc` file could not run bash commands
changes.summary: 修复Windows下bashrc导致命令失败
changes.summary_en: Fix Windows bash commands with .bashrc present
changes.why_matters: 提升 Windows 环境兼容性，减少本地命令执行失败。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves Windows compatibility and reduces local command execution failures.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage for `--resume` (68% reduction for users with many sessions) by replacing the session index with lightweight stat-based loading and progressive enrichment
changes.summary: resume内存占用大幅降低
changes.why_matters: 在会话很多时显著降低内存占用，让恢复更快更稳定。
changes.why_matters_en: This significantly lowers memory use for users with many sessions, making resume faster and more stable.

changes.raw: Improved `TaskStop` tool to display the stopped command/task description in the result line instead of a generic "Task stopped" message
changes.summary: 停止任务结果显示更具体
changes.summary_en: Show stopped task details in result
changes.why_matters: 让用户更清楚知道被停止的是哪个命令或任务，减少上下文混淆。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes it clear which command or task was stopped, reducing confusion.

changes.raw: Changed `/model` to execute immediately instead of being queued
changes.summary: /model 立即执行
changes.why_matters: 用户切换模型时无需等待队列处理，交互更直接、更高效。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can switch models without waiting in a queue, making the interaction faster and more direct.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added multiline input support to the "Other" text input in question dialogs (use Shift+Enter for new lines)
changes.summary: 问题对话支持多行输入
changes.why_matters: 用户可以在对话框中输入更完整的问题或说明，提升可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can enter fuller questions or notes in the dialog, improving usability.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed duplicate sessions appearing in the session list when starting a new conversation
changes.summary: 修复会话列表重复项
changes.why_matters: 避免新建对话时出现重复会话，提升会话列表的准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents duplicate sessions when starting a new conversation, improving list accuracy.

changes.raw: Fixed startup performance issues when resuming sessions that have `saved_hook_context`
changes.summary: 修复带保存钩子上下文会话启动慢
changes.summary_en: Fix slow startup when resuming sessions
changes.why_matters: 恢复带有 saved_hook_context 的会话时启动更快，减少等待时间。
changes.why_matters_en: Resuming sessions with saved_hook_context starts faster, reducing wait time.

changes.raw: Added tool call failures and denials to debug logs
changes.summary: 调试日志记录工具失败与拒绝
changes.summary_en: Log tool call failures and denials
changes.why_matters: 便于排查工具调用问题，提升故障定位效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes tool-call issues easier to diagnose and speeds up troubleshooting.

changes.raw: Fixed context management validation error for gateway users, ensuring `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS=1` avoids the error
changes.summary: 修复网关用户上下文校验报错
changes.summary_en: Fix context validation for gateway users
changes.why_matters: 避免网关用户在关闭实验特性时仍触发错误，保证可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents gateway users from hitting validation errors and keeps the CLI usable.

changes.raw: Added `--from-pr` flag to resume sessions linked to a specific GitHub PR number or URL
changes.summary: 支持按PR恢复会话
changes.why_matters: 可直接回到关联 PR 的上下文，提升审查和协作效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users jump back into the right PR context and improves review workflow efficiency.

changes.raw: Sessions are now automatically linked to PRs when created via `gh pr create`
changes.summary: gh创建PR时自动关联会话
changes.why_matters: 减少手动关联步骤，让会话与 PR 流程自动对齐。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes manual linking and keeps sessions aligned with the PR workflow automatically.

changes.raw: Fixed /context command not displaying colored output
changes.summary: /context 彩色输出恢复
changes.why_matters: 改善命令输出可读性，但对核心功能影响较小。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves readability of the command output, though it is not core functionality.

changes.raw: Fixed status bar duplicating background task indicator when PR status was shown
changes.summary: 修复状态栏任务指示重复显示
changes.why_matters: 避免状态栏信息混乱，提升界面清晰度。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents cluttered status bar output and makes the UI clearer.

changes.raw: Windows: Fixed bash command execution failing for users with `.bashrc` files
changes.summary: 修复 Windows bash 命令执行失败
changes.summary_en: Fix bash command execution on Windows
changes.why_matters: 解决 Windows 用户因 .bashrc 导致的命令执行失败，恢复基本可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes a Windows-specific command execution failure and restores basic usability.

changes.raw: Windows: Fixed console windows flashing when spawning child processes
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 子进程窗口闪烁
changes.summary_en: Fix flashing console windows on Windows
changes.why_matters: 减少子进程启动时的视觉干扰，提升使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces visual disruption when spawning child processes and improves the experience.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed OAuth token expiration causing 401 errors after extended sessions
changes.summary: 修复 VSCode OAuth 过期 401 问题
changes.why_matters: 避免长会话中认证失效导致中断，保证持续工作不中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents long-running sessions from failing due to expired auth and keeps work uninterrupted.

changes.raw: Fixed beta header validation error for gateway users on Bedrock and Vertex, ensuring `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS=1` avoids the error
changes.summary: 修复网关用户 beta 头校验错误
changes.summary_en: Fix beta header validation for gateway users
changes.why_matters: 避免 Bedrock 和 Vertex 网关用户因实验性 beta 头校验失败而无法正常使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents Bedrock and Vertex gateway users from being blocked by experimental beta header validation errors.

changes.raw: Added customizable spinner verbs setting (`spinnerVerbs`)
changes.summary: 可自定义转圈提示词
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按偏好调整加载提示文案，提升交互可配置性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can tailor loading spinner text to their preference, improving configurability.

changes.raw: Fixed mTLS and proxy connectivity for users behind corporate proxies or using client certificates
changes.summary: 修复代理与mTLS连接
changes.why_matters: 这解决了企业代理和客户端证书环境下无法正常连接的问题。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores connectivity for users behind corporate proxies or using client certificates.

changes.raw: Fixed per-user temp directory isolation to prevent permission conflicts on shared systems
changes.summary: 修复共享系统临时目录冲突
changes.why_matters: 它避免了共享机器上因权限冲突导致的运行失败。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents permission conflicts that could break runs on shared systems.

changes.raw: Fixed a race condition that could cause 400 errors when prompt caching scope was enabled
changes.summary: 修复缓存作用域400错误
changes.why_matters: 这减少了启用提示缓存作用域时的请求失败。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces request failures when prompt caching scope is enabled.

changes.raw: Fixed pending async hooks not being cancelled when headless streaming sessions ended
changes.summary: 结束流式会话时取消异步钩子
changes.summary_en: Cancel pending async hooks on end
changes.why_matters: 它避免了头less流式会话结束后仍残留后台任务。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents lingering background tasks after headless streaming sessions end.

changes.raw: Fixed tab completion not updating the input field when accepting a suggestion
changes.summary: 补全建议可正确填入输入框
changes.summary_en: Tab completion now fills the input
changes.why_matters: 用户接受补全建议后，输入内容会正确更新，减少手动修正。
changes.why_matters_en: Accepted completion suggestions now update the input correctly, reducing manual fixes.

changes.raw: Fixed ripgrep search timeouts silently returning empty results instead of reporting errors
changes.summary: 搜索超时会明确报错
changes.why_matters: 这避免了超时被误判为无结果，提升排障准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: This avoids mistaking timeouts for empty results and improves troubleshooting.

changes.raw: Improved terminal rendering performance with optimized screen data layout
changes.summary: 终端渲染性能更快
changes.why_matters: 优化后的屏幕数据布局可提升界面刷新速度和流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: The optimized screen data layout improves UI refresh speed and smoothness.

changes.raw: Changed Bash commands to show timeout duration alongside elapsed time
changes.summary: Bash超时显示更清晰
changes.why_matters: 用户能同时看到超时和已耗时信息，更容易判断命令状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see timeout and elapsed time together, making command status clearer.

changes.raw: Changed merged pull requests to show a purple status indicator in the prompt footer
changes.summary: 合并PR显示紫色状态
changes.why_matters: 这只是提示栏视觉状态优化，帮助快速识别已合并项。
changes.why_matters_en: This is a visual prompt-footer tweak that helps identify merged items at a glance.

changes.raw: [IDE] Fixed model options displaying incorrect region strings for Bedrock users in headless mode
changes.summary: 修复Bedrock区域显示错误
changes.why_matters: 它修正了 headless 模式下模型选项的区域字符串显示，避免误导用户。
changes.why_matters_en: It corrects misleading region strings in model options for headless Bedrock users.

changes.raw: Fixed structured outputs for non-interactive (-p) mode
changes.summary: 修复非交互模式结构化输出
changes.summary_en: Fix structured output in non-interactive mode
changes.why_matters: 这确保在非交互（-p）模式下输出格式稳定，便于脚本和自动化工具可靠解析。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures stable output formatting in non-interactive (-p) mode, so scripts and automation tools can parse it reliably.

changes.raw: Added support for full-width (zenkaku) number input from Japanese IME in option selection prompts
changes.summary: 支持日文全角数字输入
changes.why_matters: 让日文输入法用户能更顺畅地在选项提示中选择内容。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes option selection work smoothly for users typing with Japanese IMEs.

changes.raw: Fixed shell completion cache files being truncated on exit
changes.summary: 修复补全缓存截断
changes.why_matters: 避免 shell 补全缓存损坏，减少退出后补全异常。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents corrupted shell completion caches and avoids broken completions after exit.

changes.raw: Fixed API errors when resuming sessions that were interrupted during tool execution
changes.summary: 修复中断会话恢复报错
changes.summary_en: Fix resume errors after interrupted tool runs
changes.why_matters: 让被工具执行打断的会话可以正常恢复，减少工作流中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets interrupted sessions resume correctly and reduces workflow disruption.

changes.raw: Fixed auto-compact triggering too early on models with large output token limits
changes.summary: 修复过早自动压缩
changes.why_matters: 避免在长输出模型上过早压缩上下文，减少信息丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents premature context compaction on long-output models and reduces information loss.

changes.raw: Fixed task IDs potentially being reused after deletion
changes.summary: 修复任务ID重复复用
changes.summary_en: Fix task ID reuse after deletion
changes.why_matters: 避免删除后 ID 冲突导致任务状态混淆或引用错误。
changes.why_matters_en: This avoids ID collisions that can confuse task state or cause wrong references.

changes.raw: Fixed file search not working in VS Code extension on Windows
changes.summary: 修复 VS Code Windows 搜索
changes.summary_en: Fix file search in VS Code on Windows
changes.why_matters: 让 Windows 上的 VS Code 扩展可以正常搜索文件，恢复核心功能。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores file search in the VS Code extension on Windows, which is a core workflow.

changes.raw: Improved read/search progress indicators to show "Reading…" while in progress and "Read" when complete
changes.summary: 优化读写进度提示
changes.why_matters: 让用户更清楚当前操作状态，提升交互反馈。
changes.why_matters_en: This gives clearer feedback about ongoing operations and improves usability.

changes.raw: Improved Claude to prefer file operation tools (Read, Edit, Write) over bash equivalents (cat, sed, awk)
changes.summary: 优先使用文件工具
changes.summary_en: Prefer file tools over bash equivalents
changes.why_matters: 减少用 bash 处理文件带来的风险，让编辑更稳更可控。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces risk from using bash for file handling and makes edits safer and more reliable.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added automatic Python virtual environment activation, ensuring `python` and `pip` commands use the correct interpreter (configurable via `claudeCode.usePythonEnvironment` setting)
changes.summary: VS Code 自动激活 Python 环境
changes.summary_en: Auto-activate Python env in VS Code
changes.why_matters: 确保 python 和 pip 使用正确解释器，减少环境配置错误。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures python and pip use the right interpreter and reduces environment setup mistakes.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed message action buttons having incorrect background colors
changes.summary: 修复消息按钮背景色
changes.why_matters: 改善界面显示一致性，提升视觉体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves UI consistency and the overall visual experience.

changes.raw: Added arrow key history navigation in vim normal mode when cursor cannot move further
changes.summary: 修复边界时方向键翻历史
changes.summary_en: Arrow keys navigate history at line ends
changes.why_matters: 在普通模式下光标到达边界时仍可方便回看历史，减少操作卡顿。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes history navigation smoother when the cursor can no longer move.

changes.raw: Added external editor shortcut (Ctrl+G) to the help menu for better discoverability
changes.summary: 帮助菜单显示外部编辑器快捷键
changes.summary_en: Help menu shows external editor shortcut
changes.why_matters: 提升快捷键可发现性，帮助用户更快切换到外部编辑器。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves shortcut discoverability and helps users switch editors faster.

changes.raw: Added PR review status indicator to the prompt footer, showing the current branch's PR state (approved, changes requested, pending, or draft) as a colored dot with a clickable link
changes.summary: 提示栏显示PR审核状态
changes.summary_en: Prompt footer shows PR review status
changes.why_matters: 用户可直接看到当前分支的 PR 审核进度，减少切换上下文查看状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see the current branch PR status at a glance without leaving the CLI.

changes.raw: Added support for loading `CLAUDE.md` files from additional directories specified via `--add-dir` flag (requires setting `CLAUDE_CODE_ADDITIONAL_DIRECTORIES_CLAUDE_MD=1`)
changes.summary: 支持额外目录加载CLAUDE.md
changes.why_matters: 可在更多项目目录中自动读取配置与指引，增强多目录工作流支持。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets Claude Code pick up instructions from more project directories automatically.

changes.raw: Added ability to delete tasks via the `TaskUpdate` tool
changes.summary: 支持删除任务
changes.why_matters: 用户可以清理不需要的任务，保持任务列表更简洁可控。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can remove unwanted tasks to keep the task list cleaner and easier to manage.

changes.raw: Fixed session compaction issues that could cause resume to load full history instead of the compact summary
changes.summary: 修复恢复时压缩历史丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix resume loading full history after compaction
changes.why_matters: 避免恢复会话时加载过多历史，确保压缩摘要真正生效。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents resume from pulling in full history and preserves compacted session state.

changes.raw: Fixed agents sometimes ignoring user messages sent while actively working on a task
changes.summary: 修复任务中忽略新消息
changes.summary_en: Fix agents missing user messages mid-task
changes.why_matters: 代理能及时响应用户在执行中的新指令，避免任务偏离预期。
changes.why_matters_en: Agents now catch user messages while working, reducing missed instructions and drift.

changes.raw: Fixed wide character (emoji, CJK) rendering artifacts where trailing columns were not cleared when replaced by narrower characters
changes.summary: 修复宽字符渲染残影
changes.why_matters: 终端显示更干净，emoji 和中文等宽字符不会留下脏列。
changes.why_matters_en: Terminal rendering is cleaner, with no leftover columns after wide characters are replaced.

changes.raw: Fixed JSON parsing errors when MCP tool responses contain special Unicode characters
changes.summary: 修复MCP特殊Unicode解析错误
changes.summary_en: Fix JSON parsing for special Unicode
changes.why_matters: 提升 MCP 工具响应兼容性，避免因特殊字符导致调用失败。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves MCP compatibility and prevents tool calls from failing on special Unicode.

changes.raw: Fixed up/down arrow keys in multi-line and wrapped text input to prioritize cursor movement over history navigation
changes.summary: 多行输入方向键优先移动光标
changes.summary_en: Arrow keys prioritize cursor in multiline input
changes.why_matters: 在多行和换行输入中编辑更符合预期，减少误触历史导航。
changes.why_matters_en: Editing multiline input feels more natural and avoids accidental history navigation.

changes.raw: Fixed draft prompt being lost when pressing UP arrow to navigate command history
changes.summary: 修复上箭头丢失草稿提示
changes.summary_en: Fix draft prompt lost on history up
changes.why_matters: 用户在浏览历史后能保留当前草稿，减少内容丢失风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Users keep their draft when navigating history, reducing the risk of losing input.

changes.raw: Fixed ghost text flickering when typing slash commands mid-input
changes.summary: 修复斜杠命令幽灵文本闪烁
changes.summary_en: Fix ghost text flicker for slash commands
changes.why_matters: 输入体验更稳定，减少命令补全时的视觉闪烁。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes command typing feel more stable by removing flicker during slash command input.

changes.raw: Fixed marketplace source removal not properly deleting settings
changes.summary: 修复移除市场源未删设置
changes.why_matters: 删除来源后相关配置会同步清理，避免残留无效设置。
changes.why_matters_en: Removing a marketplace source now also cleans up its settings, preventing stale config.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate output in some commands like `/context`
changes.summary: 修复部分命令重复输出
changes.summary_en: Fix duplicate output in some commands
changes.why_matters: 命令输出更简洁准确，减少阅读干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Command output is cleaner and less confusing with duplicate lines removed.

changes.raw: Fixed task list sometimes showing outside the main conversation view
changes.summary: 修复任务列表越界显示
changes.summary_en: Fix task list rendering outside view
changes.why_matters: 任务列表会正确限制在主对话区域内，避免界面错位。
changes.why_matters_en: The task list now stays within the main conversation view, preventing layout glitches.

changes.raw: Fixed syntax highlighting for diffs occurring within multiline constructs like Python docstrings
changes.summary: 修复多行差异高亮
changes.summary_en: Fix diff highlighting in multiline text
changes.why_matters: 让 Python docstring 等多行结构中的 diff 显示更准确，减少阅读代码变更时的误判。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes diffs inside multiline constructs like Python docstrings render correctly, reducing confusion when reviewing changes.

changes.raw: Fixed crashes when cancelling tool use
changes.summary: 修复取消工具调用崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash when cancelling tool use
changes.why_matters: 取消工具调用时不再崩溃，提升交互稳定性并避免中断工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Cancelling tool use no longer crashes, improving CLI stability and preventing workflow interruptions.

changes.raw: Improved `/sandbox` command UI to show dependency status with installation instructions when dependencies are missing
changes.summary: 沙盒缺依赖时提示安装
changes.why_matters: 当依赖缺失时直接展示状态和安装说明，能更快完成沙盒环境配置。
changes.why_matters_en: Showing dependency status and install instructions helps users set up the sandbox faster when prerequisites are missing.

changes.raw: Improved thinking status text with a subtle shimmer animation
changes.summary: 思考状态增加微妙闪烁
changes.summary_en: Add subtle shimmer to thinking status
changes.why_matters: 让正在思考的状态反馈更清晰，提升等待时的交互感受。
changes.why_matters_en: A subtle shimmer makes the thinking state more noticeable and improves the waiting experience.

changes.raw: Improved task list to dynamically adjust visible items based on terminal height
changes.summary: 任务列表随终端高度自适应
changes.summary_en: Auto-fit task list to terminal height
changes.why_matters: 任务列表会根据终端空间动态调整，避免内容被截断或浪费屏幕区域。
changes.why_matters_en: The task list now adapts to terminal height, reducing truncation and making better use of screen space.

changes.raw: Improved fork conversation hint to show how to resume the original session
changes.summary: 分叉会话提示可续原会话
changes.summary_en: Show how to resume original session
changes.why_matters: 用户在分叉对话后更容易回到原始会话，减少上下文切换成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can more easily return to the original session after forking, reducing context-switching overhead.

changes.raw: Changed collapsed read/search groups to show present tense ("Reading", "Searching for") while in progress, and past tense ("Read", "Searched for") when complete
changes.summary: 读搜分组用时态区分状态
changes.summary_en: Use tense to show read/search progress
changes.why_matters: 通过进行时和过去时区分进度与完成状态，让输出更易读。
changes.why_matters_en: Using present and past tense to distinguish in-progress from completed actions makes the output easier to scan.

changes.raw: Changed `ToolSearch` results to appear as a brief notification instead of inline in the conversation
changes.summary: 搜索结果改为短通知
changes.summary_en: Show ToolSearch results as brief notice
changes.why_matters: 将搜索结果从对话正文中移出，减少干扰并让主对话更聚焦。
changes.why_matters_en: Moving search results out of the conversation stream reduces clutter and keeps the main dialogue focused.

changes.raw: Changed the `/commit-push-pr` skill to automatically post PR URLs to Slack channels when configured via MCP tools
changes.summary: PR 自动发 Slack 链接
changes.summary_en: Auto-post PR URLs to Slack via MCP
changes.why_matters: 配置后可自动把 PR 链接同步到 Slack，减少手动通知成本并加快协作。
changes.why_matters_en: When configured, PR URLs can be automatically posted to Slack, reducing manual updates and speeding collaboration.

changes.raw: Changed the `/copy` command to be available to all users
changes.summary: /copy 命令对所有用户开放
changes.why_matters: 更多用户可以直接使用复制功能，降低使用门槛。
changes.why_matters_en: All users can now use the copy command, lowering the barrier to a common workflow.

changes.raw: Changed background agents to prompt for tool permissions before launching
changes.summary: 后台代理先请求权限
changes.summary_en: Prompt for permissions before launching agents
changes.why_matters: 在启动后台代理前先确认工具权限，能减少越权执行风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Requesting tool permissions before launching background agents reduces the risk of unauthorized actions.

changes.raw: Changed permission rules like `Bash(*)` to be accepted and treated as equivalent to `Bash`
changes.summary: 权限规则支持通配写法
changes.summary_en: Accept Bash(*) as equivalent to Bash
changes.why_matters: 更宽松的规则解析减少配置摩擦，让权限设置更兼容。
changes.why_matters_en: More flexible rule parsing reduces configuration friction and improves compatibility for permission settings.

changes.raw: Changed config backups to be timestamped and rotated (keeping 5 most recent) to prevent data loss
changes.summary: 配置备份自动轮转保留
changes.why_matters: 自动保留最近 5 份备份，降低配置损坏或误操作导致的数据丢失风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeping the five most recent timestamped backups helps prevent data loss from config corruption or mistakes.

changes.raw: Added env var `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TASKS`, set to `false` to keep the old system temporarily
changes.summary: 可临时关闭新任务系统
changes.summary_en: Toggle off new task system temporarily
changes.why_matters: 允许用户在新任务系统不稳定时回退到旧行为，降低升级风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users fall back to the old behavior if the new task system is unstable, reducing upgrade risk.

changes.raw: Added shorthand `$0`, `$1`, etc. for accessing individual arguments in custom commands
changes.summary: 自定义命令支持$0等参数
changes.why_matters: 让自定义命令更方便地引用单个参数，提升命令编写效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes custom commands easier to write by referencing individual arguments directly.

changes.raw: Fixed crashes on processors without AVX instruction support
changes.summary: 修复无AVX处理器崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crashes on CPUs without AVX
changes.why_matters: 避免在不支持AVX的机器上直接崩溃，扩大可运行硬件范围。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents crashes on machines without AVX support, broadening usable hardware.

changes.raw: Fixed dangling Claude Code processes when terminal is closed by catching EIO errors from `process.exit()` and using SIGKILL as fallback
changes.summary: 终端关闭时清理残留进程
changes.summary_en: Kill dangling processes on terminal close
changes.why_matters: 减少终端关闭后遗留的僵尸进程，避免资源泄漏和后台失控。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces leftover processes after terminal close, avoiding resource leaks and runaway background jobs.

changes.raw: Fixed `/rename` and `/tag` not updating the correct session when resuming from a different directory (e.g., git worktrees)
changes.summary: 恢复会话时正确更新重命名
changes.summary_en: Fix rename/tag updates on resumed sessions
changes.why_matters: 确保在不同目录恢复会话时，标题和标签更新到正确的会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures rename and tag changes apply to the correct session when resuming from another directory.

changes.raw: Fixed resuming sessions by custom title not working when run from a different directory
changes.summary: 按自定义标题恢复会话修复
changes.summary_en: Fix resume by custom title from other dirs
changes.why_matters: 让用户能从任意目录稳定找回指定标题的历史会话。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users reliably resume a titled session from any directory.

changes.raw: Fixed pasted text content being lost when using prompt stash (Ctrl+S) and restore
changes.summary: 修复粘贴内容丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix lost pasted text with stash/restore
changes.why_matters: 避免在暂存与恢复提示词时丢失用户输入，减少编辑损失。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents user input from being lost during prompt stash and restore.

changes.raw: Fixed agent list displaying "Sonnet (default)" instead of "Inherit (default)" for agents without an explicit model setting
changes.summary: 代理默认模型显示修正
changes.summary_en: Fix default model label for agents
changes.why_matters: 让界面显示更准确，减少对代理模型继承状态的误解。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves UI accuracy and avoids confusion about whether an agent inherits its model.

changes.raw: Fixed backgrounded hook commands not returning early, potentially causing the session to wait on a process that was intentionally backgrounded
changes.summary: 后台hook不再阻塞会话
changes.summary_en: Backgrounded hooks no longer block sessions
changes.why_matters: 避免已后台执行的hook仍阻塞会话流程，提升自动化响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents intentionally backgrounded hooks from still blocking the session flow.

changes.raw: Fixed file write preview omitting empty lines
changes.summary: 文件写入预览保留空行
changes.summary_en: File write preview keeps empty lines
changes.why_matters: 让写入预览更准确，便于用户检查最终文件内容。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes file write previews more accurate so users can verify final content.

changes.raw: Changed skills without additional permissions or hooks to be allowed without requiring approval
changes.summary: 无额外权限的技能免审批
changes.summary_en: Skills without extra perms skip approval
changes.why_matters: 减少低风险技能的审批摩擦，让工作流更顺畅。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces approval friction for low-risk skills and makes workflows smoother.

changes.raw: Changed indexed argument syntax from `$ARGUMENTS.0` to `$ARGUMENTS[0]` (bracket syntax)
changes.summary: 索引参数语法改为方括号
changes.summary_en: Indexed args now use bracket syntax
changes.why_matters: 旧的参数索引写法将不再推荐，用户需要更新自定义命令。
changes.why_matters_en: The old indexed-argument syntax is no longer preferred, so custom commands need updating.

changes.raw: [SDK] Added replay of `queued_command` attachment messages as `SDKUserMessageReplay` events when `replayUserMessages` is enabled
changes.summary: SDK重放排队命令附件消息
changes.why_matters: 让SDK在重放用户消息时保留更多上下文，便于一致性处理。
changes.why_matters_en: Preserves more context during SDK message replay for more consistent handling.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Enabled session forking and rewind functionality for all users
changes.summary: VSCode全员支持分叉回溯
changes.summary_en: VSCode fork and rewind for all users
changes.why_matters: 所有用户都能使用会话分叉和回溯，显著提升调试与探索能力。
changes.why_matters_en: All users can fork and rewind sessions, greatly improving debugging and exploration.

changes.summary: 支持自定义快捷键
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按上下文配置快捷键和组合键，提升操作效率并更贴合个人工作流。

changes.raw: Added new task management system, including new capabilities like dependency tracking
changes.summary: 新增任务管理与依赖追踪
changes.why_matters: 让用户能更系统地拆分和跟踪复杂任务，提升多步骤工作的可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps users break down and track complex work more systematically, improving control over multi-step tasks.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added native plugin management support
changes.summary: 支持VSCode原生插件管理
changes.why_matters: 用户可以直接在编辑器内管理插件，减少切换成本并提升扩展使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can manage plugins directly in the editor, reducing context switching and improving extension usability.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added ability for OAuth users to browse and resume remote Claude sessions from the Sessions dialog
changes.summary: 可浏览并续接远程会话
changes.why_matters: OAuth 用户可以更方便地继续远程 Claude 会话，提升跨设备工作连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: OAuth users can more easily continue remote Claude sessions, improving continuity across devices.

changes.raw: Fixed out-of-memory crashes when resuming sessions with heavy subagent usage
changes.summary: 修复续会话时内存溢出崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix OOM crashes when resuming sessions
changes.why_matters: 避免高负载会话恢复时崩溃，显著提升稳定性和可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents crashes when resuming heavy sessions, significantly improving stability and availability.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where the "context remaining" warning was not hidden after running `/compact`
changes.summary: 修复压缩后剩余提示未隐藏
changes.why_matters: 减少误导性提示，让上下文状态显示更准确。
changes.why_matters_en: It removes misleading warnings and makes context status display more accurate.

changes.raw: Fixed session titles on the resume screen not respecting the user's language setting
changes.summary: 修复会话标题语言不一致
changes.why_matters: 让恢复页标题遵循用户语言设置，提升本地化一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes resume-screen titles follow the user's language setting, improving localization consistency.

changes.raw: [IDE] Fixed a race condition on Windows where the Claude Code sidebar view container would not appear on start
changes.summary: 修复Windows侧边栏启动竞态
changes.why_matters: 避免 IDE 启动时侧边栏不显示，提升 Windows 上的可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents the sidebar from failing to appear on startup, improving reliability on Windows.

changes.raw: Added deprecation notification for npm installations - run `claude install` or see https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/getting-started for more options
changes.summary: npm 安装新增弃用提示
changes.summary_en: Added deprecation notice for npm installs
changes.why_matters: 提醒用户迁移到新的安装方式，避免后续使用受影响。
changes.why_matters_en: It guides users toward the new install path before the old one is phased out.

changes.raw: Improved UI rendering performance with React Compiler
changes.summary: UI 渲染更快更流畅
changes.why_matters: 提升界面响应速度，减少卡顿感，改善日常使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes the interface feel faster and smoother during normal use.

changes.raw: Fixed the "Context left until auto-compact" warning not disappearing after running `/compact`
changes.summary: 修复压缩后警告不消失
changes.why_matters: 避免用户在执行压缩后仍看到过期提示，减少困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents stale warnings from lingering after `/compact`, reducing confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP stdio server timeout not killing child process, which could cause UI freezes
changes.summary: 修复 MCP 超时卡死界面
changes.summary_en: Fixed MCP timeout causing UI freezes
changes.why_matters: 确保超时后能正确结束子进程，避免界面冻结影响操作。
changes.why_matters_en: It ensures timed-out MCP processes are terminated so the UI does not freeze.

changes.raw: Added history-based autocomplete in bash mode (`!`) - type a partial command and press Tab to complete from your bash command history
changes.summary: bash模式支持历史补全
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更快复用常用命令，减少手动输入和查找历史记录的成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can reuse common commands faster, reducing manual typing and history lookup.

changes.raw: Added search to installed plugins list - type to filter by name or description
changes.summary: 插件列表支持搜索
changes.why_matters: 用户能更快定位已安装插件，提升管理效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can find installed plugins faster, improving plugin management efficiency.

changes.raw: Added support for pinning plugins to specific git commit SHAs, allowing marketplace entries to install exact versions
changes.summary: 插件支持锁定指定提交
changes.summary_en: Pin plugins to specific git SHAs
changes.why_matters: 可安装精确版本，避免插件更新带来的不确定性和回归。
changes.why_matters_en: Exact versions can be installed, avoiding uncertainty and regressions from plugin updates.

changes.raw: Fixed a regression where the context window blocking limit was calculated too aggressively, blocking users at ~65% context usage instead of the intended ~98%
changes.summary: 修正上下文阻断阈值过早触发
changes.why_matters: 避免用户在上下文仍充足时被错误阻断，直接影响可用性和工作连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents users from being blocked while context is still available, directly affecting usability and workflow continuity.

changes.raw: Fixed memory issues that could cause crashes when running parallel subagents
changes.summary: 修复并行子代理内存崩溃
changes.why_matters: 减少运行崩溃，提升复杂并行任务的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces crashes and improves stability for complex parallel tasks.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in long-running sessions where stream resources were not cleaned up after shell commands completed
changes.summary: 修复长会话内存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fix memory leak in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 长时间使用时更稳定，降低资源耗尽和崩溃风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves stability during long-running use and lowers the risk of resource exhaustion and crashes.

changes.raw: Fixed `@` symbol incorrectly triggering file autocomplete suggestions in bash mode
changes.summary: 修复bash模式@误触发补全
changes.why_matters: 减少误触发，避免干扰输入和补全体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces false triggers and avoids disrupting typing and autocomplete flow.

changes.raw: Fixed `@`-mention menu folder click behavior to navigate into directories instead of selecting them
changes.summary: @提及菜单文件夹可正常进入
changes.why_matters: 用户可以顺畅浏览目录并选择目标文件，提升交互一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can browse directories and select targets smoothly, improving interaction consistency.

changes.raw: Fixed `/feedback` command generating invalid GitHub issue URLs when description is very long
changes.summary: 修复反馈链接过长失效
changes.summary_en: Fix invalid feedback URLs for long text
changes.why_matters: 确保用户提交反馈时链接可用，避免问题上报失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures feedback links remain valid so issue reporting does not fail.

changes.raw: Fixed `/context` command to show the same token count and percentage as the status line in verbose mode
changes.summary: 上下文命令显示与状态栏一致
changes.why_matters: 让用户看到一致的上下文信息，减少误解和判断偏差。
changes.why_matters_en: Gives users consistent context information, reducing confusion and misjudgment.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where `/config`, `/context`, `/model`, and `/todos` command overlays could close unexpectedly
changes.summary: 修复命令面板意外关闭
changes.why_matters: 减少操作中断，提升命令配置和查看的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces interruptions and improves stability when configuring or viewing commands.

changes.raw: Fixed slash command autocomplete selecting wrong command when typing similar commands (e.g., `/context` vs `/compact`)
changes.summary: 修复斜杠命令补全选错项
changes.why_matters: 避免选中错误命令，提升输入效率和准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents selecting the wrong command, improving input speed and accuracy.

changes.raw: Fixed inconsistent back navigation in plugin marketplace when only one marketplace is configured
changes.summary: 插件市场返回导航更一致
changes.why_matters: 让插件浏览流程更可预测，减少迷路和重复操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes plugin browsing more predictable and reduces getting lost or repeating actions.

changes.raw: Fixed iTerm2 progress bar not clearing properly on exit, preventing lingering indicators and bell sounds
changes.summary: 退出时清理iTerm2进度条
changes.summary_en: Clear iTerm2 progress bar on exit
changes.why_matters: 避免残留指示和提示音，改善终端收尾体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents lingering indicators and bell sounds, improving terminal exit behavior.

changes.raw: Improved backspace to delete pasted text as a single token instead of one character at a time
changes.summary: 粘贴文本支持整块退格
changes.summary_en: Backspace pasted text as one token
changes.why_matters: 删除粘贴内容更高效，减少逐字删除的麻烦。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes deleting pasted content more efficient by avoiding character-by-character deletion.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added `/usage` command to display current plan usage
changes.summary: 新增 /usage 查看当前套餐用量
changes.summary_en: Added /usage to view current plan usage
changes.why_matters: 用户可以直接在 VSCode 中查看当前套餐使用情况，便于控制额度和避免超限。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can check current plan usage directly in VSCode, helping them manage limits and avoid overages.

changes.raw: Added new `Setup` hook event that can be triggered via `--init`, `--init-only`, or `--maintenance` CLI flags for repository setup and maintenance operations
changes.summary: 新增初始化维护钩子
changes.why_matters: 让仓库初始化和维护流程可以通过钩子自动化，提升可扩展性和一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: It enables automation hooks for repo setup and maintenance, improving extensibility and consistency.

changes.raw: Added keyboard shortcut 'c' to copy OAuth URL when browser doesn't open automatically during login
changes.summary: 登录可复制授权链接
changes.summary_en: Copy OAuth URL with a shortcut
changes.why_matters: 当浏览器无法自动打开时，用户可以更快完成登录授权。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can complete login authorization faster when the browser does not open automatically.

changes.raw: Fixed a crash when running bash commands containing heredocs with JavaScript template literals like `${index + 1}`
changes.summary: 修复 heredoc 命令崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash on bash heredoc commands
changes.why_matters: 避免在常见 Bash 复杂命令场景下崩溃，直接提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents crashes in common complex Bash command scenarios, directly improving stability.

changes.raw: Improved startup to capture keystrokes typed before the REPL is fully ready
changes.summary: 启动时保留早期按键
changes.why_matters: 减少启动阶段的输入丢失，让交互更顺畅。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces lost input during startup and makes the interaction smoother.

changes.raw: Improved file suggestions to show as removable attachments instead of inserting text when accepted
changes.summary: 文件建议改为可移除附件
changes.summary_en: Accept file suggestions as removable attachments
changes.why_matters: 让用户更容易管理已接受的文件引用，减少误插入文本带来的编辑成本。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes accepted file references easier to manage and reduces editing cost from accidental text insertion.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added install count display to plugin listings
changes.summary: 插件列表显示安装量
changes.summary_en: Show install counts in plugin listings
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更快判断插件受欢迎程度，辅助选择更合适的扩展。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps users gauge plugin popularity faster and choose extensions more confidently.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added trust warning when installing plugins
changes.summary: 安装插件时提示信任风险
changes.summary_en: Warn about trust when installing plugins
changes.why_matters: 在安装第三方插件前提醒风险，有助于降低供应链和权限滥用问题。
changes.why_matters_en: It warns about risk before installing third-party plugins, helping reduce supply-chain and permission abuse issues.

changes.raw: Added `auto:N` syntax for configuring the MCP tool search auto-enable threshold, where N is the context window percentage (0-100)
changes.summary: 支持自动启用阈值配置
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按上下文窗口占比自动控制工具搜索启用时机，更灵活地管理成本与体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can auto-control when tool search enables based on context usage, improving flexibility and cost control.

changes.raw: Added `plansDirectory` setting to customize where plan files are stored
changes.summary: 可自定义计划文件目录
changes.why_matters: 用户可以把计划文件存到自己指定的位置，便于整理和集成现有工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can store plan files where they want, making organization and workflow integration easier.

changes.raw: Added external editor support (Ctrl+G) in AskUserQuestion "Other" input field
changes.summary: 支持外部编辑器输入
changes.why_matters: 在交互输入中可直接调用外部编辑器，提升长文本编辑效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can open an external editor for input, improving efficiency for longer text editing.

changes.raw: Added session URL attribution to commits and PRs created from web sessions
changes.summary: 提交和PR附加会话来源
changes.summary_en: Add session URL to commits and PRs
changes.why_matters: 能追踪 web 会话生成的提交和 PR 来源，增强可审计性和协作透明度。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can trace commits and PRs back to web sessions, improving auditability and collaboration transparency.

changes.raw: Added support for `PreToolUse` hooks to return `additionalContext` to the model
changes.summary: Hook可回传额外上下文
changes.summary_en: Allow hooks to return extra context
changes.why_matters: 预工具钩子可以把更多上下文注入模型，提升决策质量和自动化能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Pre-tool hooks can inject more context into the model, improving decision quality and automation.

changes.raw: Added `${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}` string substitution for skills to access the current session ID
changes.summary: 技能支持会话ID替换
changes.summary_en: Add session ID substitution for skills
changes.why_matters: 技能可以读取当前会话 ID，便于生成会话相关内容和做状态关联。
changes.why_matters_en: Skills can access the current session ID, enabling session-aware content and state linkage.

changes.raw: Fixed long sessions with parallel tool calls failing with an API error about orphan tool_result blocks
changes.summary: 修复长会话工具结果报错
changes.summary_en: Fix orphan tool_result errors in long sessions
changes.why_matters: 避免长会话并行调用时中断，提升复杂任务的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents long parallel sessions from failing, improving stability for complex tasks.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP server reconnection hanging when cached connection promise never resolves
changes.summary: 修复MCP重连卡住问题
changes.why_matters: MCP 连接恢复更可靠，减少外部工具不可用带来的阻塞。
changes.why_matters_en: MCP reconnection becomes more reliable, reducing blocking when external tools are unavailable.

changes.raw: Fixed Ctrl+Z suspend not working in terminals using Kitty keyboard protocol (Ghostty, iTerm2, kitty, WezTerm)
changes.summary: 修复Ctrl+Z挂起失效
changes.summary_en: Fix Ctrl+Z suspend in Kitty protocol
changes.why_matters: 在多种终端中恢复正常挂起操作，改善日常命令行使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores normal suspend behavior across several terminals, improving everyday CLI usability.

changes.raw: Added `showTurnDuration` setting to hide turn duration messages (e.g., "Cooked for 1m 6s")
changes.summary: 可隐藏轮次耗时提示
changes.why_matters: 减少终端输出噪音，让界面更简洁。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces terminal noise and keeps the UI cleaner.

changes.raw: Added ability to provide feedback when accepting permission prompts
changes.summary: 接受权限时可反馈
changes.why_matters: 让用户在授权时能直接表达意见，帮助改进权限体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users give feedback during authorization, improving the permission flow.

changes.raw: Added inline display of agent's final response in task notifications, making it easier to see results without reading the full transcript file
changes.summary: 任务通知直接显示结果
changes.summary_en: Show final task result in notifications
changes.why_matters: 无需打开完整记录文件就能快速看到代理最终输出。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes it easier to see the agent's final result without opening the full transcript.

changes.raw: Fixed security vulnerability where wildcard permission rules could match compound commands containing shell operators
changes.summary: 修复通配权限绕过漏洞
changes.why_matters: 防止带 shell 操作符的复合命令绕过权限规则，避免安全风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents compound commands with shell operators from bypassing permission rules and reduces security risk.

changes.raw: Fixed false "file modified" errors on Windows when cloud sync tools, antivirus scanners, or Git touch file timestamps without changing content
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 误报文件修改
changes.summary_en: Fix false file-modified errors on Windows
changes.why_matters: 避免同步工具或杀毒软件仅改时间戳就触发错误，提升 Windows 可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids false errors when tools only touch timestamps, improving Windows reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed orphaned tool_result errors when sibling tools fail during streaming execution
changes.summary: 修复流式执行残留结果错误
changes.why_matters: 减少并行工具执行失败时的异常中断，提升任务稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces failures during parallel tool execution and improves task stability.

changes.raw: Fixed context window blocking limit being calculated using the full context window instead of the effective context window (which reserves space for max output tokens)
changes.summary: 修复上下文窗口计算错误
changes.why_matters: 避免过早阻塞或截断，确保可用上下文空间计算更准确。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents premature blocking or truncation by calculating usable context more accurately.

changes.raw: Fixed spinner briefly flashing when running local slash commands like `/model` or `/theme`
changes.summary: 修复本地命令闪烁
changes.summary_en: Fix spinner flash on local commands
changes.why_matters: 改善本地斜杠命令执行时的视觉体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves visual polish when running local slash commands.

changes.raw: Fixed terminal title animation jitter by using fixed-width braille characters
changes.summary: 修复终端标题动画抖动
changes.why_matters: 让终端标题动画更平滑，减少视觉抖动。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes the terminal title animation smoother and less jittery.

changes.raw: Fixed plugins with git submodules not being fully initialized when installed
changes.summary: 修复插件子模块未初始化
changes.why_matters: 确保带 Git 子模块的插件安装后可正常使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures plugins with Git submodules work correctly after installation.

changes.raw: Fixed bash commands failing on Windows when temp directory paths contained characters like `t` or `n` that were misinterpreted as escape sequences
changes.summary: 修复 Windows Bash 转义问题
changes.why_matters: 避免临时目录路径中的字符被误当作转义序列，导致命令失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents temp-path characters from being misread as escape sequences and breaking commands.

changes.raw: Improved typing responsiveness by reducing memory allocation overhead in terminal rendering
changes.summary: 提升终端渲染输入响应
changes.why_matters: 减少渲染开销后，输入和界面响应会更流畅。
changes.why_matters_en: Lower rendering overhead makes typing and UI response feel smoother.

changes.raw: Enabled MCP tool search auto mode by default for all users. When MCP tool descriptions exceed 10% of the context window, they are automatically deferred and discovered via the MCPSearch tool instead of being loaded upfront. This reduces context usage for users with many MCP tools configured. Users can disable this by adding `MCPSearch` to `disallowedTools` in their settings.
changes.summary: 默认启用MCP搜索自动模式
changes.summary_en: Enable MCP search auto mode by default
changes.why_matters: 在 MCP 工具很多时可节省上下文空间，提升大规模工具配置的可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Saves context when many MCP tools are configured, improving usability at scale.

changes.raw: Changed OAuth and API Console URLs from console.anthropic.com to platform.claude.com
changes.summary: OAuth与控制台网址变更
changes.why_matters: 用户需要更新书签、脚本或集成配置以适配新域名。
changes.why_matters_en: Users may need to update bookmarks, scripts, or integrations for the new domain.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed `claudeProcessWrapper` setting passing the wrapper path instead of the Claude binary path
changes.summary: 修复 VSCode 包装器路径错误
changes.why_matters: 确保 VSCode 集成实际启动 Claude 二进制而不是包装器路径。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures the VSCode integration launches the Claude binary instead of the wrapper path.
