changes.why_matters: 用户可以更快找到并修改所需配置，减少在大量设置中手动查找的时间。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can find and edit settings faster, reducing time spent scanning large configs.

changes.raw: Added Updates section to `/doctor` showing auto-update channel and available npm versions (stable/latest)
changes.summary: /doctor 显示更新通道与版本
changes.summary_en: Show update channel and npm versions
changes.why_matters: 用户能更清楚了解当前更新来源和可用版本，便于排查升级相关问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see their update source and available versions, which helps troubleshoot upgrade issues.

changes.raw: Added date range filtering to `/stats` command - press `r` to cycle between Last 7 days, Last 30 days, and All time
changes.summary: /stats 支持日期范围筛选
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按时间段查看统计数据，更方便分析近期或长期使用情况。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can inspect stats by time range, making it easier to analyze recent or long-term usage.

changes.raw: Added automatic discovery of skills from nested `.claude/skills` directories when working with files in subdirectories
changes.summary: 自动发现子目录技能
changes.why_matters: 在子目录工作时也能自动加载相关技能，提升上下文相关性和工作流连贯性。
changes.why_matters_en: Relevant skills are loaded automatically in subdirectories, improving context relevance and workflow continuity.

changes.raw: Added `context_window.used_percentage` and `context_window.remaining_percentage` fields to status line input for easier context window display
changes.summary: 状态栏显示上下文占用百分比
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更直观地掌握上下文剩余空间，及时调整输入内容避免超限。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see remaining context more clearly and adjust input before hitting limits.

changes.raw: Added an error display when the editor fails during Ctrl+G
changes.summary: 编辑器失败时显示错误
changes.summary_en: Show error when editor fails on Ctrl+G
changes.why_matters: 当外部编辑器启动失败时，用户能立即知道原因并采取修复措施。
changes.why_matters_en: Users get immediate feedback when the editor launch fails, making it easier to recover.

changes.raw: Fixed permission bypass via shell line continuation that could allow blocked commands to execute
changes.summary: 修复续行绕过命令拦截
changes.why_matters: 这堵住了可能让被阻止命令绕过权限检查执行的安全漏洞。
changes.why_matters_en: This closes a security hole that could let blocked commands bypass permission checks.

changes.raw: Fixed false "File has been unexpectedly modified" errors when file watchers touch files without changing content
changes.summary: 修复文件未改动误报
changes.why_matters: 减少文件监视器触发的误报，避免不必要的中断和重复确认。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces false alarms from file watchers and avoids unnecessary interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed text styling (bold, colors) getting progressively misaligned in multi-line responses
changes.summary: 修复多行文本样式错位
changes.why_matters: 多行回复的显示更稳定，提升可读性和界面一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: Multiline responses render more consistently, improving readability and UI polish.

changes.raw: Fixed the feedback panel closing unexpectedly when typing 'n' in the description field
changes.summary: 修复反馈面板误关闭
changes.why_matters: 避免在填写反馈时误触导致面板关闭，减少内容丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents accidental panel closure while typing feedback, reducing lost input.

changes.raw: Fixed rate limit warning appearing at low usage after weekly reset (now requires 70% usage)
changes.summary: 修复重置后误报限流
changes.summary_en: Fix false rate-limit warning after reset
changes.why_matters: 用户在低使用量时不会被错误警告打扰，限流提示更准确。
changes.why_matters_en: Users won’t see misleading warnings at low usage, and rate-limit alerts are more accurate.

changes.raw: Fixed rate limit options menu incorrectly auto-opening when resuming a previous session
changes.summary: 修复恢复会话时菜单误开
changes.summary_en: Fix rate-limit menu auto-opening on resume
changes.why_matters: 恢复历史会话时界面行为更符合预期，减少干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Resumed sessions behave more predictably, reducing UI interruptions.

changes.raw: Fixed numpad keys outputting escape sequences instead of characters in Kitty keyboard protocol terminals
changes.summary: 修复 Kitty 终端数字键异常
changes.summary_en: Fix numpad keys in Kitty protocol
changes.why_matters: 在支持 Kitty 键盘协议的终端里，数字小键盘可正常输入。
changes.why_matters_en: Numpad input works correctly in terminals using the Kitty keyboard protocol.

changes.raw: Fixed Option+Return not inserting newlines in Kitty keyboard protocol terminals
changes.summary: 修复 Kitty 终端换行键异常
changes.why_matters: 在 Kitty 协议终端中，Option+Return 可正常插入换行。
changes.why_matters_en: Option+Return now inserts newlines properly in Kitty protocol terminals.

changes.raw: Fixed corrupted config backup files accumulating in the home directory (now only one backup is created per config file)
changes.summary: 修复配置备份文件堆积
changes.summary_en: Fix backup file buildup in home dir
changes.why_matters: 减少家目录中的损坏备份文件堆积，保持环境更整洁。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents corrupted backup files from piling up in the home directory.

changes.raw: Fixed `mcp list` and `mcp get` commands leaving orphaned MCP server processes
changes.summary: 修复 MCP 进程残留
changes.why_matters: 避免 `mcp list` 和 `mcp get` 后留下孤儿进程，减少资源泄漏和异常状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents orphaned processes after `mcp list` and `mcp get`, reducing resource leaks and stale state.

changes.raw: Fixed visual artifacts in ink2 mode when nodes become hidden via `display:none`
changes.summary: 修复隐藏节点渲染异常
changes.summary_en: Fix ink2 artifacts for hidden nodes
changes.why_matters: 当节点通过 `display:none` 隐藏时，界面显示更稳定，减少视觉干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps the UI stable when nodes are hidden via `display:none`, reducing visual glitches.

changes.raw: Improved the external CLAUDE.md imports approval dialog to show which files are being imported and from where
changes.summary: 外部导入提示更清晰
changes.summary_en: Show imported files and sources in approval dialog
changes.why_matters: 让用户在批准外部 `CLAUDE.md` 导入前更清楚知道来源和内容，提升决策透明度。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes external `CLAUDE.md` imports more transparent by showing sources and files before approval.

changes.raw: Improved the `/tasks` dialog to go directly to task details when there's only one background task running
changes.summary: 单任务直达详情
changes.summary_en: Open task details directly for one task
changes.why_matters: 只有一个后台任务时可直接进入详情，减少一步操作，提高效率。
changes.why_matters_en: When only one background task is running, users can jump straight to details and save a click.

changes.raw: Improved @ autocomplete with icons for different suggestion types and single-line formatting
changes.summary: @补全更易识别
changes.why_matters: 补全项加入图标和单行展示后，更容易快速区分不同建议类型。
changes.why_matters_en: Icons and single-line formatting make autocomplete suggestions easier to scan and distinguish.

changes.raw: Updated "Help improve Claude" setting fetch to refresh OAuth and retry when it fails due to a stale OAuth token
changes.summary: 过期 OAuth 自动重试
changes.summary_en: Refresh OAuth and retry stale token fetches
changes.why_matters: 当 OAuth 令牌过期时自动刷新并重试，减少设置项失败和手动排障。
changes.why_matters_en: Automatically refreshes and retries when OAuth tokens are stale, reducing setup failures and manual recovery.

changes.raw: Changed task notification display to cap at 3 lines with overflow summary when multiple background tasks complete simultaneously
changes.summary: 任务通知更紧凑
changes.why_matters: 多个后台任务同时完成时，通知不会占用过多空间，界面更整洁。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps notifications compact when multiple background tasks finish at once, preserving screen space.

changes.raw: Changed terminal title to "Claude Code" on startup for better window identification
changes.summary: 终端标题更易识别
changes.summary_en: Set terminal title to Claude Code
changes.why_matters: 启动时设置终端标题，方便在多个窗口中快速识别 Claude Code。
changes.why_matters_en: Sets the terminal title on startup so Claude Code is easier to identify among multiple windows.

changes.raw: Removed ability to @-mention MCP servers to enable/disable - use `/mcp enable <name>` instead
changes.summary: 移除 @ 切换 MCP
changes.why_matters: 原有通过 @ 提及启用/禁用 MCP 的方式被移除，需要改用新命令。
changes.why_matters_en: The old @-mention flow for enabling/disabling MCP servers is removed, requiring the new command path.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed usage indicator not updating after manual compact
changes.summary: 修复 VSCode 用量指示
changes.summary_en: Fix VSCode usage indicator after compact
changes.why_matters: 手动 compact 后用量指示能正确更新，避免信息显示错误。
changes.why_matters_en: The usage indicator now updates correctly after manual compact, preventing stale display.

signals.title: Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work
How to code Claude Code in 200 lines of code
Anthropic blocks third-party use of Claude Code subscriptions
Stop Doom Scrolling, Start Doom Coding: Build via the terminal from your phone
We put Claude Code in Rollercoaster Tycoon

changes.raw: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_TMPDIR` environment variable to override the temp directory used for internal temp files, useful for environments with custom temp directory requirements
changes.summary: 可自定义内部临时目录
changes.summary_en: Custom temp directory for internal files
changes.why_matters: 允许在有特殊临时目录要求的环境中正常运行，提升部署灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets Claude Code run in environments with custom temp directory requirements, improving deployment flexibility.

signals.title: Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work
How to code Claude Code in 200 lines of code
Anthropic blocks third-party use of Claude Code subscriptions
Stop Doom Scrolling, Start Doom Coding: Build via the terminal from your phone
Claude Code On-the-Go

changes.raw: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BACKGROUND_TASKS` environment variable to disable all background task functionality including auto-backgrounding and the Ctrl+B shortcut
changes.summary: 可关闭后台任务功能
changes.summary_en: Disable background tasks via env var
changes.why_matters: 让用户可以通过环境变量彻底关闭后台任务和自动后台化，便于控制行为与排查问题。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets users fully disable background tasks and auto-backgrounding for better control and easier troubleshooting.

changes.raw: Fixed "Help improve Claude" setting fetch to refresh OAuth and retry when it fails due to a stale OAuth token
changes.summary: 修复帮助改进设置刷新失败
changes.summary_en: Fix Help improve setting token refresh
changes.why_matters: 当 OAuth 令牌过期导致设置拉取失败时会自动刷新并重试，减少功能异常。
changes.why_matters_en: It refreshes OAuth and retries when a stale token causes the setting fetch to fail, reducing breakage.

signals.title: Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work
How to code Claude Code in 200 lines of code
Anthropic blocks third-party use of Claude Code subscriptions
Stop Doom Scrolling, Start Doom Coding: Build via the terminal from your phone
Claude Code On-the-Go

changes.raw: Merged slash commands and skills, simplifying the mental model with no change in behavior
changes.summary: 合并命令与技能，简化心智模型
changes.summary_en: Merged commands and skills for simpler mental model
changes.why_matters: 减少概念重复，让用户更容易理解和使用 Claude Code。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces conceptual duplication and makes Claude Code easier to understand and use.

changes.raw: Added release channel (`stable` or `latest`) toggle to `/config`
changes.summary: 配置中可切换发布通道
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更方便地选择稳定版或最新功能版。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can more easily choose between stable releases and the latest features.

changes.raw: Added detection and warnings for unreachable permission rules, with warnings in `/doctor` and after saving rules that include the source of each rule and actionable fix guidance
changes.summary: 提示无效权限规则并给出修复
changes.summary_en: Warn on unreachable permission rules with fixes
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户及时发现无效权限配置，避免规则看似生效却实际失效。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users catch invalid permission configs before they silently fail.

changes.raw: Fixed plan files persisting across `/clear` commands, now ensuring a fresh plan file is used after clearing a conversation
changes.summary: 清空对话后重建计划文件
changes.why_matters: 避免旧计划残留影响新对话的执行结果。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents stale plans from affecting a new conversation.

changes.raw: Fixed false skill duplicate detection on filesystems with large inodes (e.g., ExFAT) by using 64-bit precision for inode values
changes.summary: 修复大 inode 下技能重复误判
changes.summary_en: Fixed false duplicate skill detection on large inodes
changes.why_matters: 在特定文件系统上减少误报，避免技能文件被错误判重。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces false positives on certain filesystems and avoids incorrect duplicate detection.

changes.raw: Fixed mismatch between background task count in status bar and items shown in tasks dialog
changes.summary: 修复状态栏任务数与弹窗不一致
changes.summary_en: Fixed task count mismatch in status bar
changes.why_matters: 让用户看到的任务状态更准确，减少困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps task status consistent and reduces user confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed sub-agents using the wrong model during conversation compaction
changes.summary: 修复压缩时子代理模型错误
changes.summary_en: Fixed wrong model used by sub-agents during compaction
changes.why_matters: 确保子代理在压缩对话时继续使用正确模型，避免质量下降。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures sub-agents keep using the right model during compaction and avoid degraded output.

changes.raw: Fixed web search in sub-agents using incorrect model
changes.summary: 修复子代理网页搜索模型错误
changes.summary_en: Fixed wrong model for sub-agent web search
changes.why_matters: 保证子代理联网检索时的行为与预期一致，提升结果可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: This keeps sub-agent web search behavior aligned with expectations and improves reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed trust dialog acceptance when running from the home directory not enabling trust-requiring features like hooks during the session
changes.summary: 修复家目录信任后功能未启用
changes.summary_en: Fixed trust acceptance not enabling trusted features
changes.why_matters: 避免用户已授权却仍无法使用 hooks 等信任功能，影响工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents trust-approved sessions from still blocking trusted features like hooks.

changes.raw: Improved terminal rendering stability by preventing uncontrolled writes from corrupting cursor state
changes.summary: 提升终端渲染稳定性
changes.why_matters: 减少光标状态损坏和界面异常，提升长时间使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces cursor corruption and terminal glitches during longer sessions.

changes.raw: Improved slash command suggestion readability by truncating long descriptions to 2 lines
changes.summary: 缩短命令建议描述，提升可读性
changes.summary_en: Shortened slash command descriptions for readability
changes.why_matters: 让命令建议列表更清晰，便于快速浏览和选择。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes slash command suggestions easier to scan and choose from.

changes.raw: Changed tool hook execution timeout from 60 seconds to 10 minutes
changes.summary: 工具钩子超时延长到十分钟
changes.summary_en: Extended tool hook timeout to 10 minutes
changes.why_matters: 允许更耗时的钩子任务完成，减少因超时失败。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets slower hooks finish successfully instead of timing out too early.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added clickable destination selector for permission requests, allowing you to choose where settings are saved (this project, all projects, shared with team, or session only)
changes.summary: VSCode 许可请求可选保存位置
changes.summary_en: VSCode permission requests can choose save target
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更精细地控制权限保存范围，适配项目或团队场景。
changes.why_matters_en: This gives users finer control over where permissions are saved for project or team workflows.

signals.title: Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work
How to code Claude Code in 200 lines of code
Anthropic blocks third-party use of Claude Code subscriptions
Stop Doom Scrolling, Start Doom Coding: Build via the terminal from your phone
The creator of Claude Code's Claude setup

changes.raw: Added source path metadata to images dragged onto the terminal, helping Claude understand where images originated
changes.summary: 图片拖拽保留来源路径
changes.summary_en: Preserve source path for dragged images
changes.why_matters: 让 Claude 更容易理解图片来源，提升多模态输入的上下文质量。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps Claude understand image provenance, improving multimodal context quality.

changes.raw: Added clickable hyperlinks for file paths in tool output in terminals that support OSC 8 (like iTerm)
changes.summary: 终端文件路径可点击
changes.summary_en: Clickable file paths in terminal output
changes.why_matters: 在支持 OSC 8 的终端中可直接打开文件路径，减少手动查找和跳转成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can open file paths directly in OSC 8-capable terminals, reducing manual navigation.

changes.raw: Added support for Windows Package Manager (winget) installations with automatic detection and update instructions
changes.summary: 支持 winget 安装更新
changes.why_matters: 让 Windows 用户可以通过包管理器更顺畅地安装和更新 Claude Code。
changes.why_matters_en: Windows users can install and update Claude Code more smoothly via the package manager.

changes.raw: Added Shift+Tab keyboard shortcut in plan mode to quickly select "auto-accept edits" option
changes.summary: 计划模式快捷切换自动接受
changes.summary_en: Shift+Tab toggles auto-accept in plan mode
changes.why_matters: 减少在计划模式下切换编辑确认选项的操作步骤，提高交互效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces steps to change edit confirmation in plan mode and speeds up interaction.

changes.raw: Added `FORCE_AUTOUPDATE_PLUGINS` environment variable to allow plugin autoupdate even when the main auto-updater is disabled
changes.summary: 插件可强制自动更新
changes.summary_en: Force plugin autoupdates via env var
changes.why_matters: 即使主自动更新关闭，也能保持插件版本更新，减少功能和兼容性问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugins can stay updated even when the main updater is disabled, reducing drift and compatibility issues.

changes.raw: Added `agent_type` to SessionStart hook input, populated if `--agent` is specified
changes.summary: 会话钩子增加 agent 类型
changes.why_matters: 让钩子脚本能区分不同 agent 启动场景，便于自动化处理。
changes.why_matters_en: Hook scripts can distinguish agent startup contexts, enabling better automation.

changes.raw: Fixed a command injection vulnerability in bash command processing where malformed input could execute arbitrary commands
changes.summary: 修复 bash 命令注入漏洞
changes.why_matters: 这是可被恶意输入利用的高危漏洞，可能导致执行任意命令。
changes.why_matters_en: This is a high-risk vulnerability that could allow malicious input to execute arbitrary commands.

changes.raw: Fixed a memory leak where tree-sitter parse trees were not being freed, causing WASM memory to grow unbounded over long sessions
changes.summary: 修复长会话内存泄漏
changes.why_matters: 避免 WASM 内存持续增长，提升长时间使用时的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents unbounded WASM memory growth and improves stability in long sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed binary files (images, PDFs, etc.) being accidentally included in memory when using `@include` directives in CLAUDE.md files
changes.summary: 排除记忆中的二进制文件
changes.summary_en: Exclude binary files from memory includes
changes.why_matters: 防止图片和 PDF 等被错误纳入上下文，减少噪音和潜在解析问题。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents images and PDFs from polluting context and causing parsing issues.

changes.raw: Fixed updates incorrectly claiming another installation is in progress
changes.summary: 修复更新中安装占用误报
changes.why_matters: 减少更新流程中的误报，避免用户被错误阻止升级。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces false update blockers and prevents users from being incorrectly stopped from upgrading.

changes.raw: Fixed crash when socket files exist in watched directories (defense-in-depth for EOPNOTSUPP errors)
changes.summary: 修复监视目录 socket 崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash on socket files in watched dirs
changes.why_matters: 提升在复杂目录结构下的健壮性，避免因特殊文件导致崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves robustness in complex directories and avoids crashes from special files.

changes.raw: Fixed remote session URL and teleport being broken when using `/tasks` command
changes.summary: 修复远程会话任务链接
changes.summary_en: Fix remote session URL and teleport
changes.why_matters: 恢复 `/tasks` 下远程会话跳转能力，保障跨设备工作流可用。
changes.why_matters_en: This restores remote session navigation under `/tasks`, keeping cross-device workflows usable.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP tool names being exposed in analytics events by sanitizing user-specific server configurations
changes.summary: 分析事件脱敏 MCP 名称
changes.summary_en: Sanitize MCP names in analytics events
changes.why_matters: 避免把用户自定义服务器信息泄露到分析数据中，保护隐私。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents user-specific server details from leaking into analytics and protects privacy.

changes.raw: Improved Option-as-Meta hint on macOS to show terminal-specific instructions for native CSIu terminals like iTerm2, Kitty, and WezTerm
changes.summary: Mac 提示更贴合终端
changes.why_matters: 让不同终端用户更容易按正确方式配置按键输入。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users of different terminals configure key input correctly.

changes.raw: Improved error message when pasting images over SSH to suggest using `scp` instead of the unhelpful clipboard shortcut hint
changes.summary: SSH 贴图报错更有帮助
changes.summary_en: Better SSH image paste error message
changes.why_matters: 在 SSH 场景下给出更实用的替代方案，减少用户困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: This provides a more useful alternative in SSH scenarios and reduces confusion.

changes.raw: Improved permission explainer to not flag routine dev workflows (git fetch/rebase, npm install, tests, PRs) as medium risk
changes.summary: 降低常规开发操作误报
changes.summary_en: Reduce false risk flags for routine dev tasks
changes.why_matters: 减少对常见开发流程的误判，让权限提示更准确，降低不必要的打断。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes permission prompts more accurate and reduces unnecessary interruptions during normal development workflows.

changes.raw: Changed large bash command outputs to be saved to disk instead of truncated, allowing Claude to read the full content
changes.summary: 大 Bash 输出可完整读取
changes.summary_en: Save large Bash outputs to disk for full reading
changes.why_matters: 避免长输出被截断，Claude 可以读取完整结果，提升排错和分析能力。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents truncation of long outputs so Claude can read the full result for better debugging and analysis.

changes.raw: Changed large tool outputs to be persisted to disk instead of truncated, providing full output access via file references
changes.summary: 大工具输出改为落盘保存
changes.summary_en: Persist large tool outputs to disk instead of truncating
changes.why_matters: 让大体量工具结果可通过文件引用完整访问，减少信息丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: This preserves full access to large tool results via file references and avoids losing information.

changes.raw: Changed `/plugins` installed tab to unify plugins and MCPs with scope-based grouping
changes.summary: 插件页统一展示 MCP
changes.summary_en: Unify plugins and MCPs in the installed tab
changes.why_matters: 让已安装项按作用域统一分组，浏览和管理更清晰。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes installed items easier to browse and manage by grouping them consistently by scope.

changes.raw: Deprecated Windows managed settings path `C:\ProgramData\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json` - administrators should migrate to `C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json`
changes.summary: Windows 管理设置路径变更
changes.summary_en: Windows managed settings path has changed
changes.why_matters: 旧路径已弃用，管理员需要迁移配置以避免管理设置失效。
changes.why_matters_en: The old path is deprecated, so administrators must migrate settings to avoid losing managed configuration.

changes.raw: [SDK] Changed minimum zod peer dependency to ^4.0.0
changes.summary: SDK 最低 zod 版本提升
changes.why_matters: 依赖版本门槛提高，现有项目可能需要升级才能继续使用 SDK。
changes.why_matters_en: This raises the dependency floor, so existing projects may need upgrades to keep using the SDK.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed usage display not updating after manual compact
changes.summary: 修复 VSCode 用量显示刷新
changes.summary_en: Fix VSCode usage display after manual compact
changes.why_matters: 手动压缩后用量信息能正确更新，避免界面显示过时。
changes.why_matters_en: Usage information now updates correctly after manual compact, preventing stale UI display.

signals.title: Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work
How to code Claude Code in 200 lines of code
Anthropic blocks third-party use of Claude Code subscriptions
Stop Doom Scrolling, Start Doom Coding: Build via the terminal from your phone
The creator of Claude Code's Claude setup

changes.raw: Added automatic skill hot-reload - skills created or modified in `~/.claude/skills` or `.claude/skills` are now immediately available without restarting the session
changes.summary: 技能自动热重载
changes.why_matters: 技能修改后无需重启即可立即生效，提升迭代效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Skill changes take effect immediately without restarting, speeding up iteration.

changes.raw: Added support for running skills and slash commands in a forked sub-agent context using `context: fork` in skill frontmatter
changes.summary: 技能支持分叉子代理执行
changes.why_matters: 可在独立子代理上下文中运行技能和命令，增强复杂任务的隔离与并行能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Skills and commands can run in isolated sub-agent contexts, improving separation and parallel task handling.

changes.raw: Added support for `agent` field in skills to specify agent type for execution
changes.summary: 技能可指定执行代理类型
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按任务选择更合适的执行代理，提升技能执行的适配性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can choose a better-suited agent type for each task, improving skill execution fit.

changes.raw: Added `language` setting to configure Claude's response language (e.g., language: "japanese")
changes.summary: 可配置回复语言
changes.why_matters: 可按偏好设置 Claude 的输出语言，提升本地化使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Claude's output language can be set to match user preference, improving localization.

changes.raw: Changed Shift+Enter to work out of the box in iTerm2, WezTerm, Ghostty, and Kitty without modifying terminal configs
changes.summary: 终端快捷键即开即用
changes.why_matters: 减少终端配置成本，让常用输入快捷键在更多终端中直接可用。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces terminal setup friction by making a common input shortcut work out of the box.

changes.raw: Added `respectGitignore` support in `settings.json` for per-project control over @-mention file picker behavior
changes.summary: 支持按项目忽略 Git 文件
changes.why_matters: 项目可单独控制文件选择器行为，减少误选不该暴露的文件。
changes.why_matters_en: Projects can control file picker behavior individually, reducing accidental selection of ignored files.

changes.raw: Added `IS_DEMO` environment variable to hide email and organization from the UI, useful for streaming or recording sessions
changes.summary: 演示模式隐藏敏感信息
changes.why_matters: 录屏或直播时可隐藏邮箱和组织信息，避免泄露个人或公司身份。
changes.why_matters_en: Email and organization details can be hidden during recordings or streams to avoid identity leakage.

changes.raw: Fixed security issue where sensitive data (OAuth tokens, API keys, passwords) could be exposed in debug logs
changes.summary: 修复调试日志泄密
changes.summary_en: Fix sensitive data in debug logs
changes.why_matters: 避免 OAuth token、API key 和密码出现在日志中，降低严重泄露风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents OAuth tokens, API keys, and passwords from appearing in logs, reducing serious leakage risk.

changes.raw: Fixed files and skills not being properly discovered when resuming sessions with `-c` or `--resume`
changes.summary: 恢复会话可正确找回文件
changes.summary_en: Fix file and skill discovery on resume
changes.why_matters: 使用恢复会话时文件和技能能正确加载，避免上下文缺失影响继续工作。
changes.why_matters_en: Files and skills load correctly when resuming, preventing missing context from disrupting work.

changes.raw: Fixed pasted content being lost when replaying prompts from history using up arrow or Ctrl+R search
changes.summary: 修复历史回放粘贴丢失
changes.summary_en: Fix pasted text lost in history replay
changes.why_matters: 重放历史提示时不会丢失粘贴内容，减少输入错误和重复编辑。
changes.why_matters_en: Pasted content is preserved when replaying prompts, reducing input errors and rework.

changes.raw: Fixed Esc key with queued prompts to only move them to input without canceling the running task
changes.summary: Esc 不再误取消任务
changes.summary_en: Esc no longer cancels running task
changes.why_matters: 队列提示下按 Esc 只会转移输入，不会误中断正在运行的任务。
changes.why_matters_en: With queued prompts, Esc now moves input without accidentally canceling the running task.

changes.raw: Reduced permission prompts for complex bash commands
changes.summary: 减少复杂命令权限弹窗
changes.why_matters: 复杂 bash 命令触发更少权限确认，提升连续执行效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Complex bash commands trigger fewer permission prompts, improving uninterrupted execution.

changes.raw: Fixed command search to prioritize exact and prefix matches on command names over fuzzy matches in descriptions
changes.summary: 命令搜索更准
changes.summary_en: Command search ranks exact matches first
changes.why_matters: 命令名的精确和前缀匹配优先，能更快找到目标命令。
changes.why_matters_en: Exact and prefix matches on command names are prioritized, making commands easier to find.

changes.raw: Fixed PreToolUse hooks to allow `updatedInput` when returning `ask` permission decision, enabling hooks to act as middleware while still requesting user consent
changes.summary: Hook 可改写输入继续询问
changes.why_matters: Hooks 既能像中间件一样修改输入，又能继续请求用户确认，流程更灵活。
changes.why_matters_en: Hooks can act like middleware while still asking for consent, making workflows more flexible.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin path resolution for file-based marketplace sources
changes.summary: 修复插件路径解析
changes.why_matters: 文件型市场源的插件能被正确定位和加载，减少安装与使用失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugins from file-based marketplace sources resolve correctly, reducing install and load failures.

changes.raw: Fixed LSP tool being incorrectly enabled when no LSP servers were configured
changes.summary: 修复无LSP时误启用工具
changes.summary_en: Fix LSP tool enabling without servers
changes.why_matters: 避免在未配置 LSP 服务器时错误暴露工具，减少无效操作和潜在误用。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents exposing a tool when no LSP servers are configured, reducing invalid actions and misuse.

changes.raw: Fixed background tasks failing with "git repository not found" error for repositories with dots in their names
changes.summary: 修复含点仓库后台任务失败
changes.summary_en: Fix background tasks for dotted repos
changes.why_matters: 让带点号的仓库名也能正常执行后台任务，避免常见项目结构下的失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures background tasks work for repositories with dots in their names, avoiding failures on common repo naming patterns.

changes.raw: Fixed Claude in Chrome support for WSL environments
changes.summary: 修复WSL下Chrome支持
changes.summary_en: Fix Claude in Chrome on WSL
changes.why_matters: 提升 Windows/WSL 用户在 Chrome 中使用 Claude 的可用性，减少环境兼容问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves compatibility for Windows/WSL users using Claude in Chrome and reduces environment-specific breakage.

changes.raw: Fixed Windows native installer silently failing when executable creation fails
changes.summary: 修复Windows安装器静默失败
changes.why_matters: 避免安装失败却无提示，帮助用户更可靠地完成安装和排障。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents silent install failures and makes Windows installation more reliable and diagnosable.

changes.raw: Improved CLI help output to display options and subcommands in alphabetical order for easier navigation
changes.summary: 帮助信息按字母排序
changes.why_matters: 让帮助信息更易浏览和查找命令，提高日常使用效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes help output easier to scan and navigate, improving everyday CLI usability.

changes.raw: Added wildcard pattern matching for Bash tool permissions using `*` at any position in rules (e.g., `Bash(npm *)`, `Bash(* install)`, `Bash(git * main)`)
changes.summary: Bash权限支持通配符匹配
changes.why_matters: 让权限规则更灵活，能更精确地控制 Bash 命令的允许范围。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes permission rules more flexible and allows finer-grained control over allowed Bash commands.

changes.raw: Added unified Ctrl+B backgrounding for both bash commands and agents - pressing Ctrl+B now backgrounds all running foreground tasks simultaneously
changes.summary: 统一Ctrl+B后台化任务
changes.why_matters: 可一次性后台化所有前台任务，提升多任务处理效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users background all foreground tasks at once, improving multitasking efficiency.

changes.raw: Added support for MCP `list_changed` notifications, allowing MCP servers to dynamically update their available tools, prompts, and resources without requiring reconnection
changes.summary: 支持MCP动态更新工具
changes.why_matters: MCP 服务器可动态更新能力而无需重连，减少中断并提升集成灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows MCP servers to update capabilities without reconnecting, reducing interruptions and improving integration flexibility.

changes.raw: Added `/teleport` and `/remote-env` slash commands for claude.ai subscribers, allowing them to resume and configure remote sessions
changes.summary: 新增远程会话恢复命令
changes.why_matters: 让订阅用户更方便地恢复和配置远程会话，提升跨环境工作连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps subscribers resume and configure remote sessions more easily, improving continuity across environments.

changes.raw: Added support for disabling specific agents using `Task(AgentName)` syntax in settings.json permissions or the `--disallowedTools` CLI flag
changes.summary: 支持禁用指定Agent
changes.why_matters: 可按需关闭特定 Agent，增强权限控制和工作流可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users disable specific agents as needed, improving control over permissions and workflows.

changes.raw: Added hooks support to agent frontmatter, allowing agents to define PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and Stop hooks scoped to the agent's lifecycle
changes.summary: Agent支持生命周期钩子
changes.why_matters: Agent 可在执行前后和停止时自动触发钩子，便于定制自动化流程。
changes.why_matters_en: Agents can trigger hooks before and after tools and on stop, enabling customized automation flows.

changes.raw: Added hooks support for skill and slash command frontmatter
changes.summary: 技能和斜杠命令支持钩子
changes.summary_en: Add hooks to skills and slash commands
changes.why_matters: 让更多可扩展组件具备自动化触发能力，增强一致性和可编排性。
changes.why_matters_en: Extends automation triggers to more extensible components, improving consistency and orchestration.

changes.raw: Added new Vim motions: `;` and `,` to repeat f/F/t/T motions, `y` operator for yank with `yy`/`Y`, `p`/`P` for paste, text objects (`iw`, `aw`, `iW`, `aW`, `i"`, `a"`, `i'`, `a'`, `i(`, `a(`, `i[`, `a[`, `i{`, `a{`), `>>` and `<<` for indent/dedent, and `J` to join lines
changes.summary: 新增更多Vim编辑动作
changes.summary_en: Add more Vim motions and operators
changes.why_matters: 提升 Vim 模式下的编辑效率，让文本操作更完整顺手。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves editing efficiency in Vim mode with a more complete and natural set of text operations.

changes.raw: Added `/plan` command shortcut to enable plan mode directly from the prompt
changes.summary: 新增/plan快捷进入计划模式
changes.why_matters: 让用户更快切换到计划模式，减少输入步骤并提升规划效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users enter plan mode faster with fewer steps, improving planning efficiency.

changes.raw: Added slash command autocomplete support when `/` appears anywhere in input, not just at the beginning
changes.summary: 斜杠命令支持任意位置补全
changes.why_matters: 在输入中任意位置都能补全命令，减少打字和查找成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Enables command autocomplete anywhere in input, reducing typing and lookup effort.

changes.raw: Added `--tools` flag support in interactive mode to restrict which built-in tools Claude can use during interactive sessions
changes.summary: 交互模式限制可用工具
changes.summary_en: Restrict built-in tools in interactive mode
changes.why_matters: 让用户在交互会话中更精细地控制 Claude 可调用的工具，提升安全性和可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: Gives users finer control over which tools Claude can use during interactive sessions, improving safety and predictability.

changes.raw: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_FILE_READ_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS` environment variable to override the default file read token limit
changes.summary: 文件读取可调输出上限
changes.why_matters: 允许根据不同项目和文件大小调整读取输出上限，减少截断或资源浪费。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users tune file read output limits for different projects and file sizes, reducing truncation or wasted tokens.

changes.raw: Added support for `once: true` config for hooks
changes.summary: 支持一次性钩子配置
changes.why_matters: 让钩子在特定场景只执行一次，便于构建更精确的自动化流程。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows hooks to run only once in specific scenarios, enabling more precise automation workflows.

changes.raw: Added support for YAML-style lists in frontmatter `allowed-tools` field for cleaner skill declarations
changes.summary: 前置说明支持列表语法
changes.why_matters: 让技能声明更简洁易读，也更方便维护允许工具配置。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes skill declarations cleaner and easier to maintain when specifying allowed tools.

changes.raw: Added support for prompt and agent hook types from plugins (previously only command hooks were supported)
changes.summary: 插件支持提示与代理钩子
changes.summary_en: Plugins can provide prompt and agent hooks
changes.why_matters: 扩展了插件可接入的自动化触发点，让生态中的定制能力更完整。
changes.why_matters_en: Expands plugin automation entry points, making the ecosystem more complete and customizable.

changes.raw: Added Cmd+V support for image paste in iTerm2 (maps to Ctrl+V)
changes.summary: iTerm2 支持粘贴图片
changes.why_matters: 在终端里直接粘贴图片更方便，提升多模态输入体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes it easier to paste images directly in the terminal, improving multimodal input experience.

changes.raw: Added left/right arrow key navigation for cycling through tabs in dialogs
changes.summary: 对话框支持左右切换标签
changes.summary_en: Arrow keys cycle tabs in dialogs
changes.why_matters: 让对话框导航更顺手，减少键盘操作成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes dialog navigation smoother and reduces keyboard interaction friction.

changes.raw: Added real-time thinking block display in Ctrl+O transcript mode
changes.summary: 实时显示思考块内容
changes.summary_en: Show thinking blocks in real time
changes.why_matters: 用户能更及时看到模型推理过程，便于理解和调试交互结果。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can see model reasoning as it happens, which helps understand and debug interactions.

changes.raw: Added filepath to full output in background bash task details dialog
changes.summary: 后台任务显示完整路径
changes.summary_en: Show file path in task details
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更快定位后台 bash 任务对应的文件输出。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users quickly locate the file output associated with background bash tasks.

changes.raw: Added Skills as a separate category in the context visualization
changes.summary: 上下文图新增技能分类
changes.summary_en: Skills shown as a separate context category
changes.why_matters: 让上下文可视化更清晰，便于区分技能与其他上下文来源。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes context visualization clearer by separating skills from other context sources.

changes.raw: Fixed OAuth token refresh not triggering when server reports token expired but local expiration check disagrees
changes.summary: 修复 OAuth 过期刷新失败
changes.summary_en: Fix OAuth refresh when token is expired
changes.why_matters: 避免令牌已过期时无法自动刷新，减少登录中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents auth interruptions when expired tokens fail to refresh automatically.

changes.raw: Fixed session persistence getting stuck after transient server errors by recovering from 409 conflicts when the entry was actually stored
changes.summary: 修复会话持久化卡住
changes.why_matters: 在临时服务错误后能恢复保存，减少会话丢失和重复操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Recovers session saving after transient server errors, reducing session loss and rework.

changes.raw: Fixed session resume failures caused by orphaned tool results during concurrent tool execution
changes.summary: 修复并发工具结果导致恢复失败
changes.summary_en: Fix resume failures from orphaned tool results
changes.why_matters: 提升并发工具执行后的会话恢复可靠性，避免中断后无法继续。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves resume reliability after concurrent tool execution, preventing failed continuation.

changes.raw: Fixed a race condition where stale OAuth tokens could be read from the keychain cache during concurrent token refresh attempts
changes.summary: 修复并发刷新读到旧令牌
changes.summary_en: Fix stale OAuth token cache race
changes.why_matters: 避免并发刷新时使用过期凭据，提升认证稳定性和安全性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents stale credentials during concurrent refreshes, improving auth stability and security.

changes.raw: Fixed AWS Bedrock subagents not inheriting EU/APAC cross-region inference model configuration, causing 403 errors when IAM permissions are scoped to specific regions
changes.summary: 修复 Bedrock 子代理跨区配置
changes.why_matters: 避免子代理因区域配置缺失而报 403，确保受限 IAM 环境下可正常运行。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents 403 errors from missing region config, ensuring subagents work in restricted IAM environments.

changes.raw: Fixed API context overflow when background tasks produce large output by truncating to 30K chars with file path reference
changes.summary: 修复后台输出导致上下文溢出
changes.summary_en: Fix context overflow from large background output
changes.why_matters: 避免后台任务输出过大时截断失败导致上下文异常，提升长任务稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents large background output from breaking context handling and improves long-running task stability.

changes.raw: Fixed a hang when reading FIFO files by skipping symlink resolution for special file types
changes.summary: 修复FIFO读取卡死问题
changes.summary_en: Fix hang when reading FIFO files
changes.why_matters: 避免读取特殊文件时进程挂起，提升文件处理可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents hangs when handling special files and improves file-processing reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed terminal keyboard mode not being reset on exit in Ghostty, iTerm2, Kitty, and WezTerm
changes.summary: 修复退出后终端模式未重置
changes.summary_en: Reset terminal mode correctly on exit
changes.why_matters: 避免退出后终端键盘状态异常，减少对用户终端环境的影响。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents terminal keyboard state from being left broken after exit.

changes.raw: Fixed Alt+B and Alt+F (word navigation) not working in iTerm2, Ghostty, Kitty, and WezTerm
changes.summary: 修复Alt快捷键词跳转失效
changes.why_matters: 让命令行编辑快捷键在更多终端中可用，提升输入效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores word-navigation shortcuts across more terminals and improves typing efficiency.

changes.raw: Fixed `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` not being substituted in plugin `allowed-tools` frontmatter, which caused tools to incorrectly require approval
changes.summary: 修复插件工具权限误判
changes.why_matters: 正确替换插件根路径后，工具不再被错误要求审批，减少不必要阻塞。
changes.why_matters_en: Correctly substituting the plugin root avoids unnecessary approval prompts and workflow blocks.

changes.raw: Fixed files created by the Write tool using hardcoded 0o600 permissions instead of respecting the system umask
changes.summary: 修复Write文件权限遵循umask
changes.why_matters: 让新建文件权限符合系统策略，避免权限过严或不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures created files follow system policy and avoids overly restrictive or inconsistent permissions.

changes.raw: Fixed commands with `$()` command substitution failing with parse errors
changes.summary: 修复$()命令替换解析失败
changes.why_matters: 支持更复杂的 Bash 命令，减少因语法解析错误导致的执行失败。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves support for complex Bash commands and reduces failures from parse errors.

changes.raw: Fixed multi-line bash commands with backslash continuations being incorrectly split and flagged for permissions
changes.summary: 修复反斜杠续行命令拆分错误
changes.summary_en: Fix splitting of multiline bash continuations
changes.why_matters: 避免多行命令被误拆并触发错误审批，提升脚本执行准确性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents multiline commands from being split incorrectly and triggering false permission checks.

changes.raw: Fixed bash command prefix extraction to correctly identify subcommands after global options (e.g., `git -C /path log` now correctly matches `Bash(git log:*)` rules)
changes.summary: 修复git子命令匹配识别
changes.summary_en: Fix bash prefix matching for subcommands
changes.why_matters: 让权限规则更准确地匹配真实子命令，减少误判和重复授权。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes permission rules match the actual subcommand more accurately and reduces false matches.

changes.raw: Fixed slash commands passed as CLI arguments (e.g., `claude /context`) not being executed properly
changes.summary: 修复CLI参数中的斜杠命令执行
changes.summary_en: Fix slash commands passed as CLI args
changes.why_matters: 让通过命令行直接传入的斜杠命令能够正常运行，提升自动化启动体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Allows slash commands passed via CLI arguments to run correctly and improves startup automation.

changes.raw: Fixed pressing Enter after Tab-completing a slash command selecting a different command instead of submitting the completed one
changes.summary: 修复补全后回车提交异常
changes.summary_en: Fix Enter after slash command completion
changes.why_matters: 避免补全后误选其他命令，提升斜杠命令输入流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents the wrong command from being selected after completion and improves command entry flow.

changes.raw: Fixed slash command argument hint flickering and inconsistent display when typing commands with arguments
changes.summary: 修复斜杠命令参数提示闪烁
changes.summary_en: Fix flickering slash command arg hints
changes.why_matters: 让参数提示更稳定清晰，减少输入时的视觉干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes argument hints stable and clearer, reducing visual noise while typing.

changes.raw: Fixed Claude sometimes redundantly invoking the Skill tool when running slash commands directly
changes.summary: 修复直接运行斜杠命令重复调Skill
changes.why_matters: 减少不必要的工具调用，提升斜杠命令执行效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces unnecessary tool calls and improves slash command execution efficiency.

changes.raw: Fixed skill token estimates in `/context` to accurately reflect frontmatter-only loading
changes.summary: 修复Skill估算更准确
changes.summary_en: Fix more accurate Skill token estimates
changes.why_matters: 让 `/context` 的资源预估更可信，帮助用户更好判断上下文成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes `/context` resource estimates more reliable so users can better judge context cost.

changes.raw: Fixed subagents sometimes not inheriting the parent's model by default
changes.summary: 修复子代理继承模型失败
changes.why_matters: 确保子代理默认使用父级模型，避免行为不一致和额外配置。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures subagents inherit the parent model by default, avoiding inconsistent behavior and extra setup.

changes.raw: Fixed model picker showing incorrect selection for Bedrock/Vertex users using `--model haiku`
changes.summary: 修正Bedrock/Vertex模型选择
changes.why_matters: 避免用户在选择模型时看到错误结果，减少配置和执行混淆。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents incorrect model selection UI for Bedrock/Vertex users and reduces confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate Bash commands appearing in permission request option labels
changes.summary: 修正权限选项重复命令
changes.summary_en: Remove duplicate Bash commands in labels
changes.why_matters: 让权限请求更清晰，减少用户误判将要执行的命令。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes permission prompts clearer and reduces user confusion about what will run.

changes.raw: Fixed noisy output when background tasks complete - now shows clean completion message instead of raw output
changes.summary: 后台任务完成输出更干净
changes.why_matters: 减少噪音输出，让用户更容易确认任务已完成。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces noisy output so users can more easily confirm task completion.

changes.raw: Fixed background task completion notifications to appear proactively with bullet point
changes.summary: 后台任务完成通知更主动
changes.why_matters: 让用户更快注意到后台任务结束，提升并行工作体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users notice background task completion sooner and improves parallel workflow.

changes.raw: Fixed forked slash commands showing "AbortError" instead of "Interrupted" message when cancelled
changes.summary: 取消斜杠命令显示正确提示
changes.summary_en: Show Interrupted for cancelled slash cmds
changes.why_matters: 避免取消操作被误报为错误，提升命令状态可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids misreporting cancellations as errors and improves command status clarity.

changes.raw: Fixed cursor disappearing after dismissing permission dialogs
changes.summary: 修复权限弹窗后光标消失
changes.why_matters: 保证交互不中断，避免用户在确认权限后失去输入焦点。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps interaction smooth by preventing focus loss after permission prompts.

changes.raw: Fixed `/hooks` menu selecting wrong hook type when scrolling to a different option
changes.summary: 修正/hooks菜单选错类型
changes.why_matters: 避免滚动选择时配置到错误的 hook 类型。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents configuring the wrong hook type when scrolling through the menu.

changes.raw: Fixed images in queued prompts showing as "[object Object]" when pressing Esc to cancel
changes.summary: 取消队列提示时图片显示正常
changes.why_matters: 避免图片内容在取消时变成无意义文本，改善提示可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents images from turning into meaningless text when cancelling queued prompts.

changes.raw: Fixed images being silently dropped when queueing messages while backgrounding a task
changes.summary: 队列中背景任务不丢图片
changes.summary_en: Keep images when queueing during background
changes.why_matters: 确保多模态输入在后台执行场景下不会被静默丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures multimodal inputs are not silently dropped during background execution.

changes.raw: Fixed large pasted images failing with "Image was too large" error
changes.summary: 修复大图粘贴失败问题
changes.why_matters: 让用户能更稳定地提交大尺寸图片输入。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes large image pastes more reliable for multimodal input.

changes.raw: Fixed extra blank lines in multiline prompts containing CJK characters (Japanese, Chinese, Korean)
changes.summary: 修复CJK多行提示空行
changes.summary_en: Fix extra blank lines in CJK prompts
changes.why_matters: 提升中文、日文、韩文提示的排版和可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves formatting and readability for Chinese, Japanese, and Korean prompts.

changes.raw: Fixed ultrathink keyword highlighting being applied to wrong characters when user prompt text wraps to multiple lines
changes.summary: 修正ultrathink高亮位置
changes.summary_en: Fix ultrathink highlighting on wrapped text
changes.why_matters: 避免关键词高亮错位，减少长提示换行时的视觉误导。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents misaligned highlighting and reduces visual confusion in wrapped prompts.

changes.raw: Fixed collapsed "Reading X files…" indicator incorrectly switching to past tense when thinking blocks appear mid-stream
changes.summary: 读取中状态文案更准确
changes.why_matters: 让流式输出中的状态提示更自然、更一致。
changes.why_matters_en: Keeps streaming status messages natural and consistent.

changes.raw: Fixed Bash read commands (like `ls` and `cat`) not being counted in collapsed read/search groups, causing groups to incorrectly show "Read 0 files"
changes.summary: 统计读取命令更准确
changes.summary_en: Count Bash reads in collapsed groups
changes.why_matters: 避免折叠统计显示错误，帮助用户正确理解工具读取了多少文件。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents incorrect collapsed counts and helps users understand how much was read.

changes.raw: Fixed spinner token counter to properly accumulate tokens from subagents during execution
changes.summary: 子代理令牌统计更准确
changes.why_matters: 让执行过程的资源消耗统计更可信，便于监控成本与效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes execution resource accounting more reliable for monitoring cost and efficiency.

changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in git diff parsing where sliced strings retained large parent strings
changes.summary: 修复 git diff 内存泄漏
changes.summary_en: Fix memory leak in git diff parsing
changes.why_matters: 避免解析大 diff 时占用过多内存，提升稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents excessive memory use when parsing large diffs, improving stability.

changes.raw: Fixed race condition where LSP tool could return "no server available" during startup
changes.summary: 修复 LSP 启动竞态问题
changes.why_matters: 减少启动阶段工具不可用的情况，提升编辑器集成可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces startup failures where the tool is unavailable, improving editor integration reliability.

changes.raw: Fixed feedback submission hanging indefinitely when network requests timeout
changes.summary: 修复反馈提交卡死
changes.why_matters: 避免网络超时后界面一直等待，提升反馈流程可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents the UI from hanging on network timeouts, improving feedback flow usability.

changes.raw: Fixed search mode in plugin discovery and log selector views exiting when pressing up arrow
changes.summary: 修复搜索视图误退出
changes.summary_en: Fix search views exiting on up arrow
changes.why_matters: 让插件发现和日志筛选更顺手，减少误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes plugin discovery and log filtering smoother by avoiding accidental exits.

changes.raw: Fixed hook success message showing trailing colon when hook has no output
changes.summary: 修复 hook 成功提示多冒号
changes.summary_en: Fix extra colon in hook success message
changes.why_matters: 改善提示文本显示，减少视觉噪音。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves message formatting and reduces visual noise.

changes.raw: Multiple optimizations to improve startup performance
changes.summary: 提升启动速度
changes.why_matters: 缩短进入可用状态的等待时间，提升整体体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Shortens time to readiness and improves the overall experience.

changes.raw: Improved terminal rendering performance when using native installer or Bun, especially for text with emoji, ANSI codes, and Unicode characters
changes.summary: 提升终端渲染性能
changes.why_matters: 在复杂文本场景下更流畅，减少界面卡顿。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes the UI smoother with complex text and reduces rendering lag.

changes.raw: Improved performance when reading Jupyter notebooks with many cells
changes.summary: 加快 Jupyter 笔记本读取
changes.why_matters: 处理多单元笔记本时更快，提升分析效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Speeds up handling of large notebooks and improves analysis efficiency.

changes.raw: Improved reliability for piped input like `cat refactor.md | claude`
changes.summary: 提升管道输入可靠性
changes.why_matters: 让从命令管道输入任务更稳定，适合自动化工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes piped command input more reliable for automation workflows.

changes.raw: Improved reliability for AskQuestion tool
changes.summary: 提升 AskQuestion 工具可靠性
changes.why_matters: 减少交互式提问失败，提升复杂任务协作质量。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces failures in interactive questioning and improves collaboration on complex tasks.

changes.raw: Improved sed in-place edit commands to render as file edits with diff preview
changes.summary: 让 sed 编辑显示差异预览
changes.summary_en: Show diff preview for sed edits
changes.why_matters: 让批量改文件更直观，便于在执行前确认修改。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes file edits more transparent and easier to review before applying.

changes.raw: Improved Claude to automatically continue when response is cut off due to output token limit, instead of showing an error message
changes.summary: 自动续写被截断回复
changes.why_matters: 避免因输出长度限制中断任务，减少人工重试。
changes.why_matters_en: Avoids task interruption from output limits and reduces manual retries.

changes.raw: Improved compaction reliability
changes.summary: 提升压缩整理可靠性
changes.why_matters: 让长会话整理更稳定，减少上下文丢失风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes long-session compaction more stable and reduces context loss risk.

changes.raw: Improved subagents (Task tool) to continue working after permission denial, allowing them to try alternative approaches
changes.summary: 权限拒绝后继续尝试
changes.why_matters: 子代理可在受限操作失败后改走替代方案，提高任务完成率。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets subagents try alternative approaches after permission denials, improving completion rates.

changes.raw: Improved skills to show progress while executing, displaying tool uses as they happen
changes.summary: 技能执行时显示进度
changes.why_matters: 让用户更清楚当前在做什么，减少等待焦虑。
changes.why_matters_en: Gives users better visibility into ongoing work and reduces wait anxiety.

changes.raw: Improved skills from `/skills/` directories to be visible in the slash command menu by default (opt-out with `user-invocable: false` in frontmatter)
changes.summary: 技能默认显示于斜杠菜单
changes.summary_en: Show skills in slash menu by default
changes.why_matters: 用户更容易发现并直接使用可用技能，减少查找成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can discover and invoke available skills more easily, reducing lookup friction.

changes.raw: Improved skill suggestions to prioritize recently and frequently used skills
changes.summary: 优先推荐常用近期技能
changes.why_matters: 技能建议更贴近用户习惯，能提高命中率和操作效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Skill suggestions better match user habits, improving relevance and efficiency.

changes.raw: Improved spinner feedback when waiting for the first response token
changes.summary: 等待首 token 时反馈更好
changes.summary_en: Better spinner while waiting for first token
changes.why_matters: 用户在等待模型首个输出时能获得更清晰的状态感知。
changes.why_matters_en: Users get clearer feedback while waiting for the model's first output token.

changes.raw: Improved token count display in spinner to include tokens from background agents
changes.summary: 转圈显示含后台 token 数
changes.summary_en: Spinner token count includes background agents
changes.why_matters: 总 token 统计更准确，便于用户判断当前消耗和进度。
changes.why_matters_en: Token totals are more accurate, helping users gauge usage and progress.

changes.raw: Improved incremental output for async agents to give the main thread more control and visibility
changes.summary: 异步代理输出更可控可见
changes.summary_en: Async agent output is more visible
changes.why_matters: 主线程能更好地掌控异步输出，提升交互稳定性和可观察性。
changes.why_matters_en: The main thread has better control over async output, improving stability and visibility.

changes.raw: Improved permission prompt UX with Tab hint moved to footer, cleaner Yes/No input labels with contextual placeholders
changes.summary: 权限提示更清晰易用
changes.why_matters: 用户更容易理解并快速完成授权决策，减少误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can understand and respond to permission prompts faster with fewer mistakes.

changes.raw: Improved the Claude in Chrome notification with shortened help text and persistent display until dismissed
changes.summary: Chrome 通知更简洁持久
changes.why_matters: 通知更不打扰，同时在用户关闭前保持可见，避免错过信息。
changes.why_matters_en: The notification is less intrusive while staying visible until dismissed, reducing missed info.

changes.raw: Improved macOS screenshot paste reliability with TIFF format support
changes.summary: 修复 macOS 截图粘贴
changes.why_matters: 用户在 macOS 上粘贴截图更稳定，减少工作流中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Screenshot pasting on macOS becomes more reliable, reducing workflow interruptions.

changes.raw: Improved `/stats` output
changes.summary: 优化 /stats 输出
changes.why_matters: 统计信息更易读、更有用，方便用户快速了解状态。
changes.why_matters_en: Stats output is easier to read and more useful for quickly understanding status.

changes.raw: Updated Atlassian MCP integration to use a more reliable default configuration (streamable HTTP)
changes.summary: Atlassian 集成默认更可靠
changes.why_matters: 默认配置更稳定，能减少集成连接失败和维护成本。
changes.why_matters_en: A more stable default configuration reduces integration failures and maintenance overhead.

changes.raw: Changed "Interrupted" message color from red to grey for a less alarming appearance
changes.summary: Interrupted 提示更柔和
changes.why_matters: 界面提示更不吓人，改善整体使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: The UI feels less alarming, improving the overall user experience.

changes.raw: Removed permission prompt when entering plan mode - users can now enter plan mode without approval
changes.summary: 计划模式免审批进入
changes.why_matters: 计划模式的权限流程被移除，改变了原有交互和安全边界。
changes.why_matters_en: The permission flow for plan mode was removed, changing the prior interaction and security boundary.

changes.raw: Removed underline styling from image reference links
changes.summary: 图片引用去掉下划线
changes.why_matters: 视觉样式更干净，减少对图片引用的干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: The visual style is cleaner and less distracting for image references.

changes.raw: [SDK] Changed minimum zod peer dependency to ^4.0.0
changes.summary: SDK zod 依赖升级
changes.why_matters: 依赖最低版本提高，可能需要用户同步升级相关包。
changes.why_matters_en: The minimum dependency version increased, so users may need to upgrade related packages.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added currently selected model name to the context menu
changes.summary: VSCode 菜单显示当前模型
changes.summary_en: Show current model in VSCode menu
changes.why_matters: 用户在菜单中即可确认当前模型，减少切换和误选。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can confirm the active model directly in the menu, reducing misselection.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added descriptive labels on auto-accept permission button (e.g., "Yes, allow npm for this project" instead of "Yes, and don't ask again")
changes.summary: 自动授权按钮更清晰
changes.why_matters: 更明确的按钮文案能帮助用户快速理解授权范围，减少误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Clearer button text helps users understand the permission scope and avoid mistakes.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed paragraph breaks not rendering in markdown content
changes.summary: 修复 Markdown 段落显示
changes.why_matters: 修复后 Markdown 内容排版正常，提升阅读体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixing this restores proper markdown formatting and improves readability.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Fixed scrolling in the extension inadvertently scrolling the parent iframe
changes.summary: 修复扩展滚动联动问题
changes.summary_en: Fix extension scroll leaking to iframe
changes.why_matters: 避免滚动事件误传到父页面，减少界面操作干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Preventing scroll events from leaking to the parent iframe reduces UI interference.

changes.raw: [Windows] Fixed issue with improper rendering
changes.summary: 修复 Windows 渲染异常
changes.why_matters: 修复平台渲染问题可提升 Windows 用户的可用性和稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixing platform rendering issues improves usability and stability for Windows users.

changes.raw: Fixed issue with macOS code-sign warning when using Claude in Chrome integration
changes.summary: 修复 macOS 代码签名警告
changes.why_matters: 减少在 macOS 上使用 Chrome 集成时的警告干扰，提升使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes a distracting warning when using the Chrome integration on macOS, improving the user experience.
