changes.raw: Minor bugfixes
changes.summary: 修复一些小问题
changes.why_matters: 减少一些已知小问题带来的使用干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces small issues that can interrupt normal use.

signals.title: Claude Code gets native LSP support
Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Show HN: Vibium – Browser automation for AI and humans, by Selenium's creator
Show HN: Mysti – Claude, Codex, and Gemini debate your code, then synthesize
Codex vs. Claude Code (today)

changes.raw: Added LSP (Language Server Protocol) tool for code intelligence features like go-to-definition, find references, and hover documentation
changes.summary: 新增LSP代码智能支持
changes.why_matters: 可直接跳转定义、查找引用和查看文档，提升代码理解与导航效率。
changes.why_matters_en: It enables go-to-definition, references, and hover docs, making code navigation and understanding faster.

changes.raw: Added `/terminal-setup` support for Kitty, Alacritty, Zed, and Warp terminals
changes.summary: 新增多终端安装支持
changes.summary_en: Added setup support for more terminals
changes.why_matters: 让更多终端用户能快速完成配置并使用 Claude Code。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps more terminal users set up Claude Code quickly and reliably.

changes.raw: Added ctrl+t shortcut in `/theme` to toggle syntax highlighting on/off
changes.summary: 主题中可切换语法高亮
changes.why_matters: 用户可按偏好快速开关高亮，改善阅读体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can quickly toggle highlighting to match their preference and reading comfort.

changes.raw: Added syntax highlighting info to theme picker
changes.summary: 主题选择器显示高亮信息
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户在选择主题时更清楚地了解显示效果。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps users understand the display impact before choosing a theme.

changes.raw: Added guidance for macOS users when Alt shortcuts fail due to terminal configuration
changes.summary: 补充macOS快捷键提示
changes.why_matters: 当终端配置导致 Alt 快捷键失效时，用户更容易找到解决办法。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps macOS users resolve shortcut issues caused by terminal configuration.

changes.raw: Fixed skill `allowed-tools` not being applied to tools invoked by the skill
changes.summary: 修复技能工具权限生效问题
changes.why_matters: 确保技能只能调用被允许的工具，避免越权行为。
changes.why_matters_en: It ensures skills only use allowed tools, preventing unauthorized tool access.

changes.raw: Fixed Opus 4.5 tip incorrectly showing when user was already using Opus
changes.summary: 修正Opus 4.5提示显示
changes.why_matters: 避免向已在使用 Opus 的用户展示误导性提示。
changes.why_matters_en: It avoids showing misleading upgrade tips to users already on Opus.

changes.raw: Fixed a potential crash when syntax highlighting isn't initialized correctly
changes.summary: 修复语法高亮初始化崩溃
changes.why_matters: 减少因高亮初始化异常导致的程序崩溃。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents crashes caused by syntax highlighting initialization failures.

changes.raw: Fixed visual bug in `/plugins discover` where list selection indicator showed while search box was focused
changes.summary: 修复插件发现列表显示异常
changes.why_matters: 改善搜索时的界面状态，减少视觉干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves UI clarity by removing distracting selection indicators during search.

changes.raw: Fixed macOS keyboard shortcuts to display 'opt' instead of 'alt'
changes.summary: macOS快捷键显示更准确
changes.why_matters: 让快捷键提示更符合 macOS 用户习惯，降低理解成本。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes shortcut labels match macOS conventions and easier to understand.

changes.raw: Improved `/context` command visualization with grouped skills and agents by source, slash commands, and sorted token count
changes.summary: 优化上下文视图展示
changes.why_matters: 更清晰地展示技能、代理和命令占用，便于管理上下文。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes context usage easier to inspect and manage across skills, agents, and commands.

changes.raw: [Windows] Fixed issue with improper rendering
changes.summary: 修复Windows渲染问题
changes.why_matters: 提升 Windows 平台上的界面可用性和稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves UI reliability and usability on Windows.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added gift tag pictogram for year-end promotion message
changes.summary: VSCode促销消息新增图标
changes.why_matters: 让促销信息在 VSCode 中更醒目、更有辨识度。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes the promotional message more noticeable and recognizable in VSCode.

signals.title: Claude Code gets native LSP support
Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Show HN: Vibium – Browser automation for AI and humans, by Selenium's creator
Show HN: Mysti – Claude, Codex, and Gemini debate your code, then synthesize
Codex vs. Claude Code (today)

changes.raw: Added clickable `[Image #N]` links that open attached images in the default viewer
changes.summary: 可点开图片附件查看
changes.summary_en: Clickable image links open attached images
changes.why_matters: 让用户能直接查看对话中的图片附件，减少切换步骤。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users open attached image attachments directly without extra steps.

changes.raw: Added alt-y yank-pop to cycle through kill ring history after ctrl-y yank
changes.summary: 支持历史粘贴切换
changes.why_matters: 方便在多次粘贴内容间快速切换，提高编辑效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes it faster to switch among recently yanked text while editing.

changes.raw: Added search filtering to the plugin discover screen (type to filter by name, description, or marketplace)
changes.summary: 插件发现支持搜索筛选
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更快找到目标插件，提升插件浏览效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users find the right plugin faster and browse more efficiently.

changes.raw: Added support for custom session IDs when forking sessions with `--session-id` combined with `--resume` or `--continue` and `--fork-session`
changes.summary: 支持自定义会话ID分叉
changes.summary_en: Custom session IDs for forked sessions
changes.why_matters: 让用户在恢复或分叉会话时更容易管理和追踪不同分支。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes it easier to manage and track different branches when resuming or forking sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed slow input history cycling and race condition that could overwrite text after message submission
changes.summary: 修复历史切换卡顿与丢字
changes.summary_en: Fix slow history cycling and text overwrite
changes.why_matters: 避免输入内容被意外覆盖，并提升长历史场景下的响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents accidental text loss and improves responsiveness when cycling long input history.

changes.raw: Improved `/theme` command to open theme picker directly
changes.summary: 主题命令直达选择器
changes.why_matters: 减少操作层级，让切换主题更快更顺手。
changes.why_matters_en: Reduces steps so users can change themes more quickly.

changes.raw: Improved theme picker UI
changes.summary: 主题选择器界面更好用
changes.why_matters: 提升主题选择体验，让界面更清晰易用。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves the theme selection experience with a clearer, easier UI.

changes.raw: Improved search UX across resume session, permissions, and plugins screens with a unified SearchBox component
changes.summary: 统一搜索体验更顺滑
changes.why_matters: 让恢复会话、权限和插件页面的搜索方式一致，降低学习成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes search behavior consistent across resume, permissions, and plugins screens, lowering learning cost.

changes.raw: [VSCode] Added tab icon badges showing pending permissions (blue) and unread completions (orange)
changes.summary: VSCode标签显示状态徽标
changes.summary_en: VSCode tabs show permission and completion badges
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户一眼识别待授权和未读完成项，减少遗漏。
changes.why_matters_en: Helps users spot pending permissions and unread completions at a glance, reducing misses.

signals.title: Claude Code gets native LSP support
Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Show HN: Vibium – Browser automation for AI and humans, by Selenium's creator
Show HN: Mysti – Claude, Codex, and Gemini debate your code, then synthesize
Show HN: Superset – Terminal to run 10 parallel coding agents

changes.raw: Added Claude in Chrome (Beta) feature that works with the Chrome extension (https://claude.ai/chrome) to let you control your browser directly from Claude Code
changes.summary: Chrome中直接控制浏览器
changes.summary_en: Control Chrome directly from Claude Code
changes.why_matters: 让用户可以在 Claude Code 中直接操控浏览器，显著扩展了自动化能力和工作流覆盖面。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets users control the browser directly from Claude Code, greatly expanding automation and workflow coverage.

changes.raw: Reduced terminal flickering
changes.summary: 减少终端闪烁
changes.why_matters: 降低界面闪烁能提升终端使用体验和可读性。
changes.why_matters_en: Less flickering improves terminal usability and readability.

changes.raw: Added scannable QR code to mobile app tip for quick app downloads
changes.summary: 提示扫码下载移动端
changes.summary_en: Add QR code for mobile app downloads
changes.why_matters: 让用户更方便地从桌面快速安装移动端应用。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes it easier for users to quickly install the mobile app from desktop.

changes.raw: Added loading indicator when resuming conversations for better feedback
changes.summary: 恢复会话时显示加载
changes.why_matters: 提供加载反馈可以减少等待时的不确定感。
changes.why_matters_en: Loading feedback reduces uncertainty while users wait.

changes.raw: Fixed `/context` command not respecting custom system prompts in non-interactive mode
changes.summary: 修复非交互模式上下文
changes.why_matters: 确保自定义系统提示在非交互模式下也能正确生效，避免上下文错误。
changes.why_matters_en: It ensures custom system prompts work correctly in non-interactive mode and avoids context errors.

changes.raw: Fixed order of consecutive Ctrl+K lines when pasting with Ctrl+Y
changes.summary: 修复粘贴时Ctrl+K顺序
changes.why_matters: 修正连续快捷键顺序可避免输入内容错乱。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixing shortcut order prevents pasted input from being scrambled.

changes.raw: Improved @ mention file suggestion speed (~3× faster in git repositories)
changes.summary: @提及文件建议更快
changes.why_matters: 更快的文件建议能明显提升大型仓库中的交互效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Faster file suggestions noticeably improve interaction speed in large repositories.

changes.raw: Improved file suggestion performance in repos with `.ignore` or `.rgignore` files
changes.summary: 忽略文件下建议更快
changes.why_matters: 在包含忽略规则的仓库中提升文件建议性能，减少等待时间。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves file suggestion performance in repos with ignore rules and reduces waiting time.

changes.raw: Improved settings validation errors to be more prominent
changes.summary: 设置校验错误更醒目
changes.why_matters: 更醒目的错误提示有助于用户更快发现并修正配置问题。
changes.why_matters_en: Clearer errors help users spot and fix configuration issues faster.

changes.raw: Changed thinking toggle from Tab to Alt+T to avoid accidental triggers
changes.summary: 思考开关改为Alt+T
changes.why_matters: 快捷键变更可能影响既有习惯，但能减少误触发带来的干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: The shortcut change may affect existing habits, but it reduces accidental triggers.

signals.title: Claude Code gets native LSP support
Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Show HN: Vibium – Browser automation for AI and humans, by Selenium's creator
Show HN: Mysti – Claude, Codex, and Gemini debate your code, then synthesize
Show HN: Superset – Terminal to run 10 parallel coding agents

changes.raw: Added /config toggle to enable/disable prompt suggestions
changes.summary: 可开关提示建议
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按需关闭或开启提示建议，减少干扰并提升使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can now enable or disable prompt suggestions to reduce noise and improve control.

changes.raw: Added `/settings` as an alias for the `/config` command
changes.summary: 新增 /settings 别名
changes.why_matters: 提供更方便的命令入口，降低记忆和输入成本。
changes.why_matters_en: This adds a more convenient command entry point and reduces typing and recall effort.

changes.raw: Fixed @ file reference suggestions incorrectly triggering when cursor is in the middle of a path
changes.summary: @文件补全更准确
changes.why_matters: 避免在路径中间误触发补全，减少输入干扰和错误建议。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents incorrect completions in the middle of paths, reducing distracting and wrong suggestions.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP servers from `.mcp.json` not loading when using `--dangerously-skip-permissions`
changes.summary: 跳过权限时仍加载 MCP
changes.why_matters: 即使跳过权限检查，也能正常加载 MCP 服务器，避免功能不可用。
changes.why_matters_en: MCP servers now load even when permissions are skipped, preventing feature breakage.

changes.raw: Fixed permission rules incorrectly rejecting valid bash commands containing shell glob patterns (e.g., `ls *.txt`, `for f in *.png`)
changes.summary: 放行合法通配符命令
changes.why_matters: 修复权限规则误拦截，确保常见 shell 通配符命令可以正常执行。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes false rejections so common shell glob commands can run normally.

changes.raw: Bedrock: Environment variable `ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_BASE_URL` is now respected for token counting and inference profile listing
changes.summary: Bedrock 基址配置生效
changes.why_matters: 使用自定义 Bedrock 地址时，计费统计和模型列表会更准确。
changes.why_matters_en: Token counting and model listing are now correct when using a custom Bedrock base URL.

changes.raw: New syntax highlighting engine for native build
changes.summary: 原生构建语法高亮升级
changes.summary_en: New syntax highlighting engine for native build
changes.why_matters: 提升原生构建下的代码可读性和编辑体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves code readability and the editing experience in native builds.

signals.title: Claude Code gets native LSP support
Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Show HN: Mysti – Claude, Codex, and Gemini debate your code, then synthesize
Show HN: Local Privacy Firewall-blocks PII and secrets before ChatGPT sees them
Show HN: Superset – Terminal to run 10 parallel coding agents

changes.raw: Added Enter key to accept and submit prompt suggestions immediately (tab still accepts for editing)
changes.summary: 回车可直接接受建议
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更快提交提示建议，减少编辑和确认的操作成本。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can accept and submit prompt suggestions faster with less friction.

changes.raw: Added wildcard syntax `mcp__server__*` for MCP tool permissions to allow or deny all tools from a server
changes.summary: 支持服务器通配权限
changes.why_matters: 可一次性管理某个 MCP 服务器下的所有工具权限，简化授权配置。
changes.why_matters_en: It simplifies permission management by allowing or denying all tools from one MCP server at once.

changes.raw: Added auto-update toggle for plugin marketplaces, allowing per-marketplace control over automatic updates
changes.summary: 插件市场可关自动更新
changes.why_matters: 用户能按市场单独控制更新策略，减少不必要的变更和干扰。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can control update behavior per marketplace, reducing unwanted changes and interruptions.

changes.raw: Added `current_usage` field to status line input, enabling accurate context window percentage calculations
changes.summary: 状态栏上下文更准确
changes.summary_en: Accurate context usage in status line
changes.why_matters: 上下文占用百分比更准确，帮助用户更好地判断剩余可用空间。
changes.why_matters_en: Accurate context percentage helps users judge remaining available space more reliably.

changes.raw: Fixed input being cleared when processing queued commands while the user was typing
changes.summary: 排队命令不再清空输入
changes.summary_en: Queued commands no longer clear input
changes.why_matters: 用户输入不会在后台处理队列时丢失，避免误操作和重输。
changes.why_matters_en: User input is preserved while queued commands run, preventing accidental loss and retyping.

changes.raw: Fixed prompt suggestions replacing typed input when pressing Tab
changes.summary: Tab补全不覆盖已输入内容
changes.summary_en: Tab no longer replaces typed input
changes.why_matters: 提示建议只会按预期补全，避免用户正在输入的内容被意外替换。
changes.why_matters_en: Prompt suggestions now behave as expected without overwriting what the user has already typed.

changes.raw: Fixed diff view not updating when terminal is resized
changes.summary: 终端缩放后差异视图刷新
changes.summary_en: Diff view updates on terminal resize
changes.why_matters: 窗口大小变化时差异视图能正确重绘，提升查看代码变更的体验。
changes.why_matters_en: The diff view now redraws correctly when the terminal is resized, improving review usability.

changes.raw: Improved memory usage by 3x for large conversations
changes.summary: 大对话内存占用降三倍
changes.summary_en: 3x lower memory use for large chats
changes.why_matters: 长对话更省内存，能提升稳定性并降低资源消耗。
changes.why_matters_en: Large conversations use much less memory, improving stability and reducing resource usage.

changes.raw: Improved resolution of stats screenshots copied to clipboard (Ctrl+S) for crisper images
changes.summary: 截图复制更清晰
changes.why_matters: 复制到剪贴板的统计截图更清晰，便于分享和查看细节。
changes.why_matters_en: Copied stats screenshots are sharper, making them easier to share and inspect.

changes.raw: Removed # shortcut for quick memory entry (tell Claude to edit your CLAUDE.md instead)
changes.summary: 移除#快速记忆入口
changes.why_matters: 原有快捷入口被移除，用户需要改用新的记忆编辑方式。
changes.why_matters_en: The old shortcut is gone, so users must switch to the new memory editing flow.

changes.raw: Fix thinking mode toggle in /config not persisting correctly
changes.summary: 思考模式开关可保存
changes.why_matters: 配置项能正确保存，避免每次重启后设置丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: The setting now persists correctly, preventing it from resetting after restart.

changes.raw: Improve UI for file creation permission dialog
changes.summary: 文件创建权限弹窗更友好
changes.why_matters: 权限确认界面更易理解，降低创建文件时的操作负担。
changes.why_matters_en: The permission dialog is easier to understand, reducing friction when creating files.

signals.title: Claude Code gets native LSP support
Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Launch HN: Nia (YC S25) – Give better context to coding agents
Show HN: Local Privacy Firewall-blocks PII and secrets before ChatGPT sees them
Show HN: I open-sourced my Go and Next B2B SaaS Starter (deploy anywhere, MIT)

changes.raw: Minor bugfixes
changes.summary: 修复若干小问题
changes.why_matters: 提升整体稳定性，但对用户影响较小。
changes.why_matters_en: It improves overall stability, but the user impact is small.

signals.title: Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Launch HN: Nia (YC S25) – Give better context to coding agents
Show HN: Local Privacy Firewall-blocks PII and secrets before ChatGPT sees them
Show HN: I open-sourced my Go and Next B2B SaaS Starter (deploy anywhere, MIT)
Ask HN: How are you LLM-coding in an established code base?

changes.raw: Fixed IME (Input Method Editor) support for languages like Chinese, Japanese, and Korean by correctly positioning the composition window at the cursor
changes.summary: 修复中文日文韩文输入法定位
changes.why_matters: 让中文、日文、韩文用户在输入时能正确显示候选窗，提升编辑体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets CJK users type with the composition window correctly placed at the cursor, improving editing experience.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where disallowed MCP tools were visible to the model
changes.summary: 隐藏禁止的MCP工具
changes.summary_en: Hide disallowed MCP tools from the model
changes.why_matters: 避免模型看到不应使用的工具，降低越权调用和安全风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents the model from seeing tools it should not use, reducing unauthorized access and security risk.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where steering messages could be lost while a subagent is working
changes.summary: 修复子代理中丢失引导消息
changes.summary_en: Fix lost steering messages in subagents
changes.why_matters: 确保子代理工作时仍能收到关键指令，避免任务偏离预期。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures subagents keep receiving key instructions, preventing task drift.

changes.raw: Fixed Option+Arrow word navigation treating entire CJK (Chinese, Japanese, Korean) text sequences as a single word instead of navigating by word boundaries
changes.summary: 修复CJK词边界导航
changes.summary_en: Fix CJK word navigation with Option+Arrow
changes.why_matters: 让光标按词移动更符合中日韩文本习惯，提升文本编辑效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes cursor movement by word behave better for CJK text, improving editing efficiency.

changes.raw: Improved plan mode exit UX: show simplified yes/no dialog when exiting with empty or missing plan instead of throwing an error
changes.summary: 退出计划模式更友好
changes.summary_en: Improve plan mode exit confirmation UX
changes.why_matters: 在计划为空时给出简化确认，减少报错和操作阻塞。
changes.why_matters_en: This provides a simpler confirmation when the plan is empty, reducing errors and friction.

changes.raw: Add support for enterprise managed settings. Contact your Anthropic account team to enable this feature.
changes.summary: 支持企业托管设置
changes.summary_en: Add support for enterprise managed settings
changes.why_matters: 让企业可以集中管理配置，满足组织级部署和合规需求。
changes.why_matters_en: This enables centralized configuration management for enterprise deployment and compliance needs.

signals.title: Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Launch HN: Nia (YC S25) – Give better context to coding agents
Show HN: Local Privacy Firewall-blocks PII and secrets before ChatGPT sees them
Show HN: I open-sourced my Go and Next B2B SaaS Starter (deploy anywhere, MIT)
Ask HN: How are you LLM-coding in an established code base?

changes.raw: Thinking mode is now enabled by default for Opus 4.5
changes.summary: Opus 4.5默认开启思考模式
changes.summary_en: Thinking mode enabled by default for Opus 4.5
changes.why_matters: 默认开启后，用户无需手动配置即可获得更强的推理体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Users get stronger reasoning behavior without needing to enable it manually.

changes.raw: Thinking mode configuration has moved to /config
changes.summary: 思考模式配置移至/config
changes.why_matters: 集中配置入口让相关设置更易发现和管理。
changes.why_matters_en: A centralized config location makes the setting easier to find and manage.

changes.raw: Added search functionality to `/permissions` command with `/` keyboard shortcut for filtering rules by tool name
changes.summary: 权限命令支持搜索过滤
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更快定位特定工具的权限规则，提升管理效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can quickly find permission rules for a specific tool, improving management efficiency.

changes.raw: Show reason why autoupdater is disabled in `/doctor`
changes.summary: doctor显示自动更新禁用原因
changes.summary_en: Doctor now shows why autoupdater is disabled
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户更快排查为什么自动更新不可用。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users quickly understand why auto-updates are unavailable.

changes.raw: Fixed false "Another process is currently updating Claude" error when running `claude update` while another instance is already on the latest version
changes.summary: 修复更新时误报进程冲突
changes.why_matters: 避免在已是最新版本时仍被错误阻止更新操作。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents users from being incorrectly blocked during update checks when already on the latest version.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP servers from `.mcp.json` being stuck in pending state when running in non-interactive mode (`-p` flag or piped input)
changes.summary: 修复非交互模式MCP挂起
changes.summary_en: Fixed MCP servers hanging in non-interactive mode
changes.why_matters: 让脚本和管道场景下的 MCP 服务器能稳定启动并返回结果。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes MCP servers start and respond reliably in scripted and piped workflows.

changes.raw: Fixed scroll position resetting after deleting a permission rule in `/permissions`
changes.summary: 删除权限规则后不再跳回顶部
changes.summary_en: Fixed scroll reset after deleting a permission rule
changes.why_matters: 减少在长列表中管理权限时的视图中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces view disruption when managing permissions in long lists.

changes.raw: Fixed word deletion (opt+delete) and word navigation (opt+arrow) not working correctly with non-Latin text such as Cyrillic, Greek, Arabic, Hebrew, Thai, and Chinese
changes.summary: 修复非拉丁文本词操作
changes.summary_en: Fixed word navigation/deletion for non-Latin text
changes.why_matters: 提升对多语言代码和文本编辑的可用性，避免误操作。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves usability for multilingual code and text editing and avoids incorrect cursor actions.

changes.raw: Fixed `claude install --force` not bypassing stale lock files
changes.summary: force安装可绕过旧锁文件
changes.summary_en: claude install --force now bypasses stale locks
changes.why_matters: 用户在安装卡死或残留锁文件时可以强制继续安装。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can force installation to continue when stale lock files block progress.

changes.raw: Fixed consecutive @~/ file references in CLAUDE.md being incorrectly parsed due to markdown strikethrough interference
changes.summary: 修复CLAUDE.md连续@~/解析
changes.summary_en: Fixed consecutive @~/ refs parsing in CLAUDE.md
changes.why_matters: 避免文档中的文件引用被错误解析，减少配置失效。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents file references in docs from being parsed incorrectly and breaking configuration.

changes.raw: Windows: Fixed plugin MCP servers failing due to colons in log directory paths
changes.summary: 修复Windows插件MCP日志路径
changes.summary_en: Fixed Windows plugin MCP log path issue
changes.why_matters: 解决 Windows 上因路径格式导致的插件 MCP 启动失败。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes plugin MCP startup failures on Windows caused by path formatting.

signals.title: Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Launch HN: Nia (YC S25) – Give better context to coding agents
Show HN: Local Privacy Firewall-blocks PII and secrets before ChatGPT sees them
Ask HN: How are you LLM-coding in an established code base?
Claude Code's DX is too good. And that's a problem

changes.raw: Added ability to switch models while writing a prompt using alt+p (linux, windows), option+p (macos).
changes.summary: 输入时可切换模型
changes.why_matters: 用户在写提示词时就能切换模型，减少中断并提升交互效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can switch models mid-prompt, reducing interruptions and improving workflow speed.

changes.raw: Added context window information to status line input
changes.summary: 状态栏显示上下文窗口
changes.summary_en: Show context window in status line
changes.why_matters: 让用户更直观看到剩余上下文，便于控制输入长度和避免超限。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users monitor remaining context and avoid exceeding limits.

changes.raw: Added `fileSuggestion` setting for custom `@` file search commands
changes.summary: 支持自定义文件搜索建议
changes.why_matters: 可为 `@` 文件搜索命令配置更合适的候选项，提升检索效率。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets users tailor `@` file search suggestions for faster and more relevant lookup.

changes.raw: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_SHELL` environment variable to override automatic shell detection (useful when login shell differs from actual working shell)
changes.summary: 可覆盖默认 Shell 检测
changes.why_matters: 当登录 shell 与实际工作 shell 不一致时，用户可手动指定，避免命令执行异常。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can set the correct shell when login and working shells differ, preventing command execution issues.

changes.raw: Fixed prompt not being saved to history when aborting a query with Escape
changes.summary: 取消时保留提示历史
changes.why_matters: 按 Escape 中止查询后仍能保存输入内容，减少重复输入。
changes.why_matters_en: Aborted prompts are still saved to history, reducing retyping.

changes.raw: Fixed Read tool image handling to identify format from bytes instead of file extension
changes.summary: 按字节识别图片格式
changes.why_matters: Read 工具读取图片时不再依赖扩展名，能更可靠地处理真实文件内容。
changes.why_matters_en: The Read tool now handles images more reliably by detecting format from file bytes instead of extensions.

signals.title: Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Launch HN: Nia (YC S25) – Give better context to coding agents
Show HN: Local Privacy Firewall-blocks PII and secrets before ChatGPT sees them
Ask HN: How are you LLM-coding in an established code base?
Claude Code's DX is too good. And that's a problem

changes.raw: Made auto-compacting instant
changes.summary: 自动压缩更即时
changes.why_matters: 减少等待时间，让长会话中的上下文整理更顺滑。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces waiting time and makes context compaction smoother in long sessions.

changes.raw: Agents and bash commands can run asynchronously and send messages to wake up the main agent
changes.summary: 代理与命令可异步唤醒
changes.summary_en: Async agents and bash wake main agent
changes.why_matters: 让后台任务并行运行并主动通知主代理，提高复杂任务处理效率。
changes.why_matters_en: It enables parallel background work that can notify the main agent, improving complex task throughput.

changes.raw: /stats now provides users with interesting CC stats, such as favorite model, usage graph, usage streak
changes.summary: /stats 增加使用统计
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户了解自己的使用习惯和偏好，但不影响核心功能。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps users understand their usage patterns and preferences, but does not affect core functionality.

changes.raw: Added named session support: use `/rename` to name sessions, `/resume <name>` in REPL or `claude --resume <name>` from the terminal to resume them
changes.summary: 支持命名会话续接
changes.why_matters: 用户可以更容易找回并继续重要会话，提升长任务连续性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can more easily find and continue important sessions, improving continuity for long-running work.

changes.raw: Added support for .claude/rules/`.  See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory for details.
changes.summary: 支持 .claude/rules 记忆规则
changes.why_matters: 允许为项目注入持久规则和偏好，让助手行为更贴合仓库上下文。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets projects define persistent rules and preferences so the assistant behaves more in line with repo context.

changes.raw: Added image dimension metadata when images are resized, enabling accurate coordinate mappings for large images
changes.summary: 图片缩放保留尺寸元数据
changes.why_matters: 让大图坐标映射更准确，提升图像相关交互的可靠性。
changes.why_matters_en: It makes coordinate mapping more accurate for large images, improving reliability of image interactions.

changes.raw: Fixed auto-loading .env when using native installer
changes.summary: 修复原生安装器 .env 自动加载
changes.why_matters: 避免环境变量丢失导致的配置问题，减少安装后故障。
changes.why_matters_en: It prevents missing environment variables from causing configuration issues after installation.

changes.raw: Fixed `--system-prompt` being ignored when using `--continue` or `--resume` flags
changes.summary: 修复续接时系统提示失效
changes.why_matters: 确保用户自定义系统提示在续接会话时仍然生效，避免行为偏差。
changes.why_matters_en: It ensures custom system prompts still apply when resuming sessions, avoiding behavior drift.

changes.raw: Improved `/resume` screen with grouped forked sessions and keyboard shortcuts for preview (P) and rename (R)
changes.summary: /resume 界面更好用
changes.why_matters: 分组和快捷键让查找、预览和重命名会话更高效。
changes.why_matters_en: Grouping and shortcuts make it faster to find, preview, and rename sessions.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added copy-to-clipboard button on code blocks and bash tool inputs
changes.summary: VSCode 代码块可一键复制
changes.summary_en: Copy button for code blocks in VSCode
changes.why_matters: 减少手动选择复制的操作成本，提升编辑器内使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: It reduces manual copy effort and improves the in-editor experience.

changes.raw: VSCode: Fixed extension not working on Windows ARM64 by falling back to x64 binary via emulation
changes.summary: 修复 Windows ARM64 扩展
changes.summary_en: Fix VSCode extension on Windows ARM64
changes.why_matters: 让 ARM64 Windows 用户能够正常使用扩展，恢复关键平台兼容性。
changes.why_matters_en: It restores compatibility so Windows ARM64 users can use the extension normally.

changes.raw: Bedrock: Improve efficiency of token counting
changes.summary: Bedrock 计数更高效
changes.why_matters: 降低令牌统计开销，提升调用效率和响应速度。
changes.why_matters_en: It lowers token-counting overhead, improving efficiency and response speed.

changes.raw: Bedrock: Add support for `aws login` AWS Management Console credentials
changes.summary: 支持 AWS login 凭据
changes.why_matters: 让 Bedrock 用户可直接使用 AWS 管理控制台登录凭据，简化接入。
changes.why_matters_en: It lets Bedrock users use AWS Management Console credentials directly, simplifying setup.

changes.raw: Unshipped AgentOutputTool and BashOutputTool, in favor of a new unified TaskOutputTool
changes.summary: 统一输出工具接口
changes.why_matters: 旧的输出工具被移除，依赖相关接口的集成需要更新。
changes.why_matters_en: The old output tools are removed, so integrations depending on them need to be updated.

signals.title: Ask HN: How can I get better at using AI for programming?
Show HN: Fresh – A new terminal editor built in Rust
Launch HN: Nia (YC S25) – Give better context to coding agents
Show HN: Local Privacy Firewall-blocks PII and secrets before ChatGPT sees them
Ask HN: How are you LLM-coding in an established code base?

changes.raw: Added "(Recommended)" indicator for multiple-choice questions, with the recommended option moved to the top of the list
changes.summary: 多选题推荐项更醒目
changes.why_matters: 让用户更容易识别推荐选项，并将其置顶以加快选择。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes the recommended option easier to spot and faster to choose.

changes.raw: Added `attribution` setting to customize commit and PR bylines (deprecates `includeCoAuthoredBy`)
changes.summary: 可自定义提交署名
changes.why_matters: 用户可以按团队或个人偏好配置提交和 PR 的署名方式。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can tailor commit and PR bylines to match team or personal preferences.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate slash commands appearing when ~/.claude is symlinked to a project directory
changes.summary: 修复重复斜杠命令显示
changes.summary_en: Fix duplicate slash commands with symlinks
changes.why_matters: 避免在符号链接场景下出现重复命令，减少界面混乱。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents duplicate commands in symlink setups and reduces UI confusion.

changes.raw: Fixed slash command selection not working when multiple commands share the same name
changes.summary: 修复同名命令选择失效
changes.summary_en: Fix slash command selection for same-name commands
changes.why_matters: 当多个命令同名时，用户现在可以正确选择目标命令。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can now reliably select the intended command when names collide.

changes.raw: Fixed an issue where skill files inside symlinked skill directories could become circular symlinks
changes.summary: 修复技能目录循环链接
changes.summary_en: Fix circular symlinks in skill files
changes.why_matters: 防止符号链接目录中的技能文件损坏，提升文件系统稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents skill files from becoming corrupted by circular symlinks and improves filesystem stability.

changes.raw: Fixed running versions getting removed because lock file incorrectly going stale
changes.summary: 修复运行版本被误删
changes.why_matters: 避免因锁文件过期判断错误而删除正在使用的版本，减少中断。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents active versions from being removed due to a stale lock-file bug.

changes.raw: Fixed IDE diff tab not closing when rejecting file changes
changes.summary: 修复拒绝变更后标签页不关
changes.summary_en: Fix IDE diff tab not closing on reject
changes.why_matters: 拒绝文件变更后界面会正确关闭差异页，提升编辑体验。
changes.why_matters_en: The diff tab now closes correctly after rejecting changes, improving the IDE workflow.

changes.raw: Reverted VSCode support for multiple terminal clients due to responsiveness issues.
changes.summary: 回退多终端客户端支持以提升响应
changes.why_matters: 撤回该功能可缓解 VSCode 中的响应卡顿，提升日常使用流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: Reverting this feature helps reduce responsiveness issues in VSCode and improves day-to-day usability.

changes.raw: Added background agent support. Agents run in the background while you work
changes.summary: 支持后台代理并行运行
changes.why_matters: 让用户在继续编码时把任务交给后台代理处理，提高并行效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users offload work to background agents while continuing to code, improving parallel throughput.

changes.raw: Added --disable-slash-commands CLI flag to disable all slash commands
changes.summary: 可禁用所有斜杠命令
changes.why_matters: 可通过命令行关闭斜杠命令，减少误触和不受控操作风险。
changes.why_matters_en: A CLI flag can disable slash commands, reducing accidental or uncontrolled actions.

changes.raw: Added model name to "Co-Authored-By" commit messages
changes.summary: 提交信息加入模型名
changes.summary_en: Add model name to commit messages
changes.why_matters: 让协作提交记录更清晰，便于追踪由哪个模型生成。
changes.why_matters_en: Makes co-authored commit history clearer by showing which model generated the change.

changes.raw: Enabled "/mcp enable [server-name]" or "/mcp disable [server-name]" to quickly toggle all servers
changes.summary: 可快速启停全部MCP服务
changes.summary_en: Quickly enable or disable all MCP servers
changes.why_matters: 让用户能一键管理所有 MCP 服务，提升集成控制效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Lets users toggle all MCP servers at once, improving control over integrations.

changes.raw: Updated Fetch to skip summarization for pre-approved websites
changes.summary: 预批准网站跳过摘要
changes.why_matters: 对可信网站直接获取内容，减少不必要的摘要处理和延迟。
changes.why_matters_en: Trusted sites can be fetched directly, reducing unnecessary summarization and latency.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added support for multiple terminal clients connecting to the IDE server simultaneously
changes.summary: VSCode支持多终端同时连接
changes.why_matters: 多个终端可同时接入 IDE 服务，提升团队或多会话协作能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Multiple terminals can connect to the IDE server simultaneously, improving multi-session collaboration.

changes.raw: Added --agent CLI flag to override the agent setting for the current session

changes.why_matters_en: Users can temporarily switch agent settings for the current session without changing global config.

changes.raw: Added `agent` setting to configure main thread with a specific agent's system prompt, tool restrictions, and model
changes.summary: 可为主线程指定代理
changes.why_matters: 可以为主线程绑定特定系统提示、工具权限和模型，提升任务一致性与可控性。

changes.raw: VS Code: Fixed .claude.json config file being read from incorrect location

changes.why_matters: 修复后 VS Code 能正确读取 .claude.json，避免配置失效。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures VS Code reads .claude.json from the correct location so settings actually take effect.

changes.raw: Fixed timer duration showing "11m 60s" instead of "12m 0s"

changes.raw: Windows: Managed settings now prefer `C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode` if it exists. Support for `C:\ProgramData\ClaudeCode` will be removed in a future version.

changes.raw: Added feedback input when rejecting plans, allowing users to tell Claude what to change

changes.raw: Added setting to enable/disable terminal progress bar (OSC 9;4)

changes.raw: Fixed proxy DNS resolution being forced on by default. Now opt-in via `CLAUDE_CODE_PROXY_RESOLVES_HOSTS=true` environment variable
changes.summary: 修复代理DNS默认强制解析
changes.summary_en: Proxy DNS resolution is now opt-in
changes.why_matters: 避免代理环境下默认改写DNS行为，减少连接异常和意外网络路径。
changes.why_matters_en: This avoids unexpected DNS behavior by default in proxy setups, reducing connection issues and unintended network paths.

changes.raw: Fixed keyboard navigation becoming unresponsive when holding down arrow keys in memory location selector
changes.summary: 修复内存选择器方向键卡死
changes.summary_en: Fix arrow-key navigation in memory selector
changes.why_matters: 提升键盘操作稳定性，避免在选择记忆位置时界面失去响应。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves keyboard reliability and prevents the selector from becoming unresponsive.

changes.raw: Improved AskUserQuestion tool to auto-submit single-select questions on the last question, eliminating the extra review screen for simple question flows
changes.summary: 单选提问自动提交更省一步
changes.why_matters: 减少简单问答流程中的确认步骤，让交互更快更顺畅。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes an extra confirmation step in simple question flows, making interactions faster and smoother.

changes.raw: Improved fuzzy matching for `@` file suggestions with faster, more accurate results
changes.summary: 优化@文件联想更快更准
changes.why_matters: 提高文件补全的速度和命中率，帮助用户更快选到目标文件。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves file suggestion speed and accuracy, helping users pick the right file faster.

changes.raw: Plan Mode now builds more precise plans and executes more thoroughly

changes.why_matters: 计划与执行质量提升，能减少返工并提高复杂任务完成率。
changes.why_matters_en: Better planning and execution reduces rework and improves completion on complex tasks.

changes.raw: Usage limit notifications now easier to understand

changes.why_matters: 用户更容易理解剩余额度与限制，减少误解和打断。

changes.why_matters_en: The command output returns to a more intuitive percent format for quick status checks.

changes.raw: Fixed handling of thinking errors

changes.why_matters: 当推理过程出错时，工具现在能更稳定地处理并继续工作。
changes.why_matters_en: The tool now handles reasoning errors more reliably and can keep working.

changes.raw: Fixed performance regression

changes.why_matters: 恢复原有性能，避免用户在日常使用中感到变慢。

changes.raw: Improved clarity of usage limit warning message

changes.raw: Added support for Microsoft Foundry! See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/azure-ai-foundry
changes.summary: 支持 Microsoft Foundry
changes.why_matters: 让用户可以将 Claude Code 接入 Microsoft Foundry，扩展企业云与模型生态的使用场景。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets users connect Claude Code to Microsoft Foundry, expanding enterprise cloud and model ecosystem use cases.

changes.raw: Added `PermissionRequest` hook to automatically approve or deny tool permission requests with custom logic
changes.summary: 新增权限请求自动处理钩子
changes.why_matters: 可用自定义逻辑自动批准或拒绝工具权限请求，提升自动化程度并减少人工干预。
changes.why_matters_en: Custom logic can automatically approve or deny tool permission requests, increasing automation and reducing manual intervention.

changes.raw: Send background tasks to Claude Code on the web by starting a message with `&`
changes.summary: 支持发送后台任务到网页端
changes.why_matters: 用户可通过前缀命令把后台任务发到 Claude Code 网页端，提升跨端协作与任务处理效率。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can send background tasks to the Claude Code web app with a prefix, improving cross-device collaboration and task handling efficiency.

changes.raw: Added `permissionMode` field for custom agents
changes.summary: 自定义代理支持权限模式
changes.summary_en: Custom agents can set permission mode
changes.why_matters: 让自定义代理能明确控制权限策略，提升自动化执行的可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets custom agents control permission policy more clearly, improving safe automation.

changes.raw: Added `tool_use_id` field to `PreToolUseHookInput` and `PostToolUseHookInput` types
changes.summary: 工具钩子可获取调用ID
changes.why_matters: 便于在前后置钩子中关联同一次工具调用，增强追踪和编排能力。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes it easier to correlate the same tool call across hooks for tracing and orchestration.

changes.raw: Added skills frontmatter field to declare skills to auto-load for subagents
changes.summary: 子代理可自动加载技能
changes.why_matters: 让子代理按声明自动带上所需技能，减少手动配置并提升任务适配性。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets subagents auto-load needed skills from declarations, reducing setup and improving task fit.

changes.raw: Added the `SubagentStart` hook event
changes.summary: 新增子代理启动钩子
changes.why_matters: 允许在子代理启动时插入自定义逻辑，增强工作流编排能力。
changes.why_matters_en: This enables custom logic when a subagent starts, improving workflow orchestration.

changes.raw: Fixed nested `CLAUDE.md` files not loading when @-mentioning files
changes.summary: 修复@提及时未加载嵌套文档
changes.why_matters: 确保引用文件时能正确继承嵌套配置，避免上下文缺失导致行为不一致。
changes.why_matters_en: This ensures nested config is loaded when referencing files, preventing missing context and inconsistent behavior.

changes.raw: Fixed duplicate rendering of some messages in the UI
changes.summary: 修复消息重复渲染
changes.why_matters: 减少界面重复内容，提升对话可读性和使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes duplicated content in the UI, improving readability and the chat experience.

changes.raw: Fixed some visual flickers
changes.summary: 修复界面闪烁
changes.why_matters: 改善视觉稳定性，让交互过程更顺滑。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves visual stability and makes interactions feel smoother.

changes.raw: Fixed NotebookEdit tool inserting cells at incorrect positions when cell IDs matched the pattern `cell-N`
changes.summary: 修复Notebook单元插入位置错误
changes.why_matters: 避免在特定单元ID模式下写错位置，减少笔记本编辑损坏风险。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents cells from being inserted in the wrong place for certain IDs, reducing notebook edit corruption risk.

changes.raw: Added `model` parameter to prompt-based stop hooks, allowing users to specify a custom model for hook evaluation
changes.summary: 停止钩子支持自定义模型
changes.summary_en: Prompt stop hooks can use custom model
changes.why_matters: 用户可以为钩子评估指定更合适的模型，提高自动化判断的灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can choose a better-suited model for hook evaluation, improving automation flexibility.

changes.raw: Fixed slash commands from user settings being loaded twice, which could cause rendering issues
changes.summary: 修复用户设置命令重复加载
changes.summary_en: Fix duplicate loading of user settings commands
changes.why_matters: 避免命令重复渲染带来的界面异常和混乱。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents rendering glitches and confusion caused by duplicate command loading.

changes.raw: Fixed incorrect labeling of user settings vs project settings in command descriptions
changes.summary: 修正设置来源标签显示
changes.summary_en: Fix user vs project settings labels
changes.why_matters: 帮助用户准确理解命令来自哪里，减少配置误判。
changes.why_matters_en: This helps users understand where commands come from and avoid misconfigurations.

changes.raw: Fixed crash when plugin command hooks timeout during execution
changes.summary: 修复插件钩子超时崩溃
changes.summary_en: Fix crash on plugin hook timeout
changes.why_matters: 钩子超时不再导致 CLI 崩溃，提升稳定性和可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Hook timeouts no longer crash the CLI, improving stability and availability.

changes.raw: Fixed: Bedrock users no longer see duplicate Opus entries in the /model picker when using `--model haiku`
changes.summary: Bedrock 模型列表去重
changes.summary_en: Remove duplicate Opus entries in model picker
changes.why_matters: 模型选择器更干净，避免用户误选或困惑。
changes.why_matters_en: The model picker is cleaner, reducing confusion and mistaken selections.

changes.raw: Fixed broken security documentation links in trust dialogs and onboarding
changes.summary: 修复安全文档链接失效
changes.why_matters: 用户在信任提示和引导中能正确查看安全说明，减少误导。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can reach the correct security guidance in trust dialogs and onboarding.

changes.raw: Fixed issue where pressing ESC to close the diff modal would also interrupt the model
changes.summary: ESC 关闭差异框不再中断模型
changes.summary_en: ESC closes diff modal without interrupting model
changes.why_matters: 关闭弹窗不会误伤正在运行的模型任务，减少意外中断。
changes.why_matters_en: Closing the modal no longer interrupts the running model, preventing accidental disruption.

changes.raw: ctrl-r history search landing on a slash command no longer cancels the search
changes.summary: Ctrl-R 命中命令不再取消搜索
changes.summary_en: Ctrl-R search no longer cancels on slash command
changes.why_matters: 历史搜索体验更连贯，减少中断和重复操作。
changes.why_matters_en: History search is smoother and less likely to be interrupted.

changes.raw: SDK: Support custom timeouts for hooks
changes.summary: SDK 支持钩子自定义超时
changes.why_matters: 开发者可按场景调整钩子等待时间，提升集成灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: Developers can tune hook wait times per scenario, improving integration flexibility.

changes.raw: Allow more safe git commands to run without approval
changes.summary: 放宽更多安全 Git 命令
changes.summary_en: Allow more safe Git commands without approval
changes.why_matters: 减少不必要的审批，提升常见 Git 操作效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This reduces unnecessary approvals and speeds up common Git workflows.

changes.raw: Plugins: Added support for sharing and installing output styles
changes.summary: 插件支持共享与安装输出样式
changes.summary_en: Plugins can share and install output styles
changes.why_matters: 插件生态可以分发统一的输出样式，增强可复用性和一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: The plugin ecosystem can distribute reusable output styles for more consistent experiences.

changes.raw: Teleporting a session from web will automatically set the upstream branch
changes.summary: 网页接管会自动设置上游分支
changes.summary_en: Web session teleport sets upstream branch
changes.why_matters: 跨端接管会自动补齐分支关联，减少后续 Git 配置步骤。
changes.why_matters_en: Cross-device session handoff now sets branch tracking automatically, reducing Git setup steps.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug with subagents and MCP servers related to "Tool names must be unique" error
changes.summary: 修复子代理与MCP工具名冲突
changes.summary_en: Fix subagent and MCP tool name conflicts
changes.why_matters: 避免工具名重复导致的报错，提升子代理和 MCP 集成的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents duplicate tool-name errors and improves stability for subagents and MCP integrations.

changes.raw: Fixed issue causing `/compact` to fail with `prompt_too_long` by making it respect existing compact boundaries
changes.summary: 修复/compact过长失败
changes.why_matters: 让压缩命令遵循已有边界，减少因上下文过长而失败的情况。
changes.why_matters_en: Respecting existing compact boundaries reduces failures caused by overly long context.

changes.raw: Fixed plugin uninstall not removing plugins
changes.summary: 修复卸载插件残留问题
changes.why_matters: 卸载后能正确清理插件，避免残留配置或功能干扰后续使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Plugins are now properly removed on uninstall, preventing leftover state from interfering later.

signals.title: How I use every Claude Code feature
Claude Code can debug low-level cryptography
I've been loving Claude Code on the web
Please stop asking me to provide feedback #8036
Show HN: Erdos – open-source, AI data science IDE

changes.raw: Added helpful hint to run `security unlock-keychain` when encountering API key errors on macOS with locked keychain
changes.summary: macOS钥匙串错误提示更清晰
changes.why_matters: 在 macOS 钥匙串锁定时给出明确修复提示，能减少 API key 报错排查时间。
changes.why_matters_en: A clear fix hint for locked macOS keychains reduces time spent debugging API key errors.

changes.raw: Added `allowUnsandboxedCommands` sandbox setting to disable the dangerouslyDisableSandbox escape hatch at policy level
changes.summary: 策略层禁用沙箱逃逸
changes.why_matters: 允许在策略层禁用危险的沙箱逃逸口子，能显著提升执行安全性。
changes.why_matters_en: Disabling the dangerous sandbox escape hatch at policy level significantly improves execution safety.

changes.raw: Added `disallowedTools` field to custom agent definitions for explicit tool blocking
changes.summary: 自定义代理可禁用工具
changes.why_matters: 通过显式阻止工具，用户可以更精细地控制代理能力边界。
changes.why_matters_en: Explicit tool blocking gives users finer control over an agent's capability boundaries.

changes.raw: Added prompt-based stop hooks
changes.summary: 支持提示词触发停止钩子
changes.why_matters: 可基于提示内容触发停止逻辑，增强自动化流程的可控性。
changes.why_matters_en: Stopping workflows based on prompt content improves control over automated flows.

changes.raw: VSCode: Added respectGitIgnore configuration to include .gitignored files in file searches (defaults to true)
changes.summary: VSCode可搜索忽略文件
changes.why_matters: 默认包含 .gitignored 文件能让文件搜索更完整，适合需要查看隐藏内容的场景。
changes.why_matters_en: Including .gitignored files by default makes searches more complete for hidden-content workflows.

changes.raw: Enabled SSE MCP servers on native build
changes.summary: 原生版支持SSE MCP服务
changes.summary_en: Native build supports SSE MCP servers
changes.why_matters: 扩展了对 MCP 服务器的连接方式，提升与外部工具生态的兼容性。
changes.why_matters_en: Adds another way to connect MCP servers, improving compatibility with the external tool ecosystem.

changes.raw: Deprecated output styles. Review options in `/output-style` and use --system-prompt-file, --system-prompt, --append-system-prompt, CLAUDE.md, or plugins instead
changes.summary: 弃用输出样式配置
changes.why_matters: 现有输出样式配置需要迁移，否则可能影响自定义提示和工作流。
changes.why_matters_en: Existing output-style setups need migration or custom prompting workflows may be affected.

changes.raw: Removed support for custom ripgrep configuration, resolving an issue where Search returns no results and config discovery fails
changes.summary: 移除自定义ripgrep配置支持
changes.why_matters: 修复搜索无结果和配置发现失败的问题，恢复代码搜索的稳定性。
changes.why_matters_en: Fixes empty search results and config discovery failures, restoring stable code search.

changes.raw: Fixed Explore agent creating unwanted .md investigation files during codebase exploration
changes.summary: 探索代理不再乱建md文件
changes.summary_en: Explore agent no longer creates md files
changes.why_matters: 避免在探索代码库时生成多余文件，减少工作区污染。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents unnecessary files during codebase exploration, reducing workspace clutter.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where `/context` would sometimes fail with "max_tokens must be greater than thinking.budget_tokens" error message
changes.summary: 修复/context令牌预算报错
changes.why_matters: 避免上下文命令偶发失败，提升长会话中的可用性。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents occasional /context failures and improves reliability in long sessions.

changes.raw: Fixed `--mcp-config` flag to correctly override file-based MCP configurations
changes.summary: MCP配置可正确覆盖文件
changes.summary_en: MCP config flag now overrides files
changes.why_matters: 命令行参数优先级恢复正确，便于临时切换 MCP 配置。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores correct CLI precedence, making it easier to temporarily switch MCP configs.

changes.raw: Fixed bug that saved session permissions to local settings
changes.summary: 会话权限不再写入本地设置
changes.summary_en: Session permissions no longer saved locally
changes.why_matters: 防止会话级权限意外持久化，降低权限污染和误授权风险。
changes.why_matters_en: Prevents session permissions from persisting unexpectedly, reducing permission leakage and accidental grants.

changes.raw: Fixed MCP tools not being available to sub-agents
changes.summary: 子代理可用MCP工具
changes.why_matters: 恢复子代理对外部工具的访问，避免复杂任务执行能力受限。
changes.why_matters_en: Restores sub-agent access to external tools, preventing capability loss in complex tasks.

changes.raw: Fixed hooks and plugins not executing when using --dangerously-skip-permissions flag
changes.summary: 跳过权限时钩子仍可执行
changes.why_matters: 确保在跳过权限模式下仍能执行钩子和插件，维持自动化链路完整。
changes.why_matters_en: Ensures hooks and plugins still run when permissions are skipped, preserving automation flows.

changes.raw: Fixed delay when navigating through typeahead suggestions with arrow keys
changes.summary: 补全键盘联想切换延迟修复
changes.why_matters: 改善键盘操作响应速度，提升日常交互体验。
changes.why_matters_en: Improves keyboard responsiveness and makes everyday interaction smoother.

changes.raw: VSCode: Restored selection indicator in input footer showing current file or code selection status
changes.summary: 恢复输入栏选择状态指示
changes.summary_en: Restore selection indicator in input footer
changes.why_matters: 让用户能直观看到当前文件或代码是否被选中，减少操作时的状态不确定性。
changes.why_matters_en: It helps users clearly see whether a file or code is selected, reducing uncertainty during use.

Show HN: Erdos – open-source, AI data science IDE

changes.raw: Plan mode: introduced new Plan subagent
changes.summary: 新增 Plan 子代理
changes.why_matters: 让规划步骤可以由专门子代理处理，提升复杂任务的拆解与执行效率。
changes.why_matters_en: This lets planning be handled by a dedicated subagent, improving task decomposition and execution efficiency.

changes.raw: Subagents: claude can now choose to resume subagents
changes.summary: 可恢复子代理会话
changes.why_matters: 子代理可以继续未完成的工作，减少重复启动和上下文丢失。
changes.why_matters_en: Subagents can continue unfinished work, reducing restarts and context loss.

changes.raw: Subagents: claude can dynamically choose the model used by its subagents
changes.summary: 子代理可动态选模型
changes.why_matters: 系统可按任务自动匹配更合适的模型，提升质量与成本平衡。
changes.why_matters_en: The system can automatically match better models to tasks, improving quality and cost balance.

changes.raw: SDK: added --max-budget-usd flag
changes.summary: SDK 支持预算上限
changes.summary_en: SDK adds max budget USD flag
changes.why_matters: 用户可以控制调用成本，避免 SDK 运行超出预算。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can control usage cost and prevent SDK runs from exceeding budget.

changes.raw: Discovery of custom slash commands, subagents, and output styles no longer respects .gitignore
changes.summary: 自定义命令不再受忽略限制
changes.why_matters: 自定义 slash 命令、子代理和输出样式更容易被发现和使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Custom slash commands, subagents, and output styles are easier to discover and use.

changes.raw: Stop `/terminal-setup` from adding backslash to `Shift + Enter` in VS Code
changes.summary: 修复 VS Code 回车转义问题
changes.summary_en: Fixed VS Code Shift+Enter backslash issue
changes.why_matters: 避免终端设置破坏编辑器快捷键，提升输入体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents terminal setup from breaking editor shortcuts and improves typing experience.

changes.raw: Add branch and tag support for git-based plugins and marketplaces using fragment syntax (e.g., `owner/repo#branch`)
changes.summary: Git 插件支持分支标签
changes.summary_en: Git plugins now support branches and tags
changes.why_matters: 用户可从指定分支或标签安装插件，便于获取稳定版本或特定修复。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can install plugins from specific branches or tags, making stable versions or fixes easier to target.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where macOS permission prompts would show up upon initial launch when launching from home directory
changes.summary: 修复 macOS 首次启动提示
changes.summary_en: Fixed macOS permission prompt on first launch
changes.why_matters: 减少首次启动时不必要的权限弹窗，降低用户困扰。
changes.why_matters_en: This removes unnecessary permission prompts on first launch and reduces user friction.

changes.raw: Various other bug fixes
changes.summary: 修复多项其他问题
changes.why_matters: 整体提升稳定性和使用体验。
changes.why_matters_en: This improves overall stability and user experience.

changes.raw: Added Haiku 4.5 to model selector!

changes.why_matters: 用户可以直接选择更新的模型，获得更合适的性能与成本平衡。
changes.why_matters_en: Users can pick the newer model directly for a better performance-cost balance.

changes.raw: Haiku 4.5 automatically uses Sonnet in plan mode, and Haiku for execution (i.e. SonnetPlan by default)
changes.summary: 计划用 Sonnet，执行用 Haiku
changes.summary_en: Use Sonnet for planning, Haiku for execution
changes.why_matters: 自动分配不同模型处理规划和执行，可提升任务质量并减少手动配置。
changes.why_matters_en: Automatically routing planning and execution to different models improves task quality and reduces manual setup.

changes.raw: 3P (Bedrock and Vertex) are not automatically upgraded yet. Manual upgrading can be done through setting `ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL`
changes.summary: 第三方平台暂不自动升级
changes.why_matters: 使用 Bedrock 或 Vertex 的用户需要手动设置，避免误以为已自动切换到新模型。
changes.why_matters_en: Users on Bedrock or Vertex must set it manually, avoiding confusion about automatic model upgrades.

changes.raw: Introducing the Explore subagent. Powered by Haiku it'll search through your codebase efficiently to save context!
changes.summary: 新增 Explore 子代理
changes.why_matters: 子代理可高效搜索代码库并节省上下文，提升大项目中的协作与探索效率。
changes.why_matters_en: The subagent can search the codebase efficiently and save context, improving exploration in large projects.

changes.why_matters_en: Telemetry can now be sent more reliably through proxies in restricted network environments.

changes.why_matters: 关闭非必要流量时也停止拉取发布说明，减少不必要的外联和数据暴露。
changes.why_matters_en: Disabling nonessential traffic now also stops release notes fetching, reducing unnecessary outbound requests and exposure.

changes.why_matters: 便于在不同运行环境下启动命令，增强集成和执行灵活性。
changes.why_matters_en: This makes it easier to launch commands with the right environment, improving integration and execution flexibility.

changes.raw: Hooks: Exposed PermissionDecision to hooks (including "ask")
changes.summary: Hook 可获取权限决策
changes.why_matters: 钩子可以感知是否允许、询问或拒绝操作，便于实现更细粒度的治理逻辑。
changes.why_matters_en: Hooks can now see allow, ask, or deny decisions, enabling finer-grained governance logic.

changes.raw: Hooks: UserPromptSubmit now supports additionalContext in advanced JSON output
changes.summary: 提交提示支持附加上下文
changes.summary_en: Support additional context in prompt submit
changes.why_matters: 高级 JSON 输出可携带更多上下文，提升提示处理和自动化集成能力。
changes.why_matters_en: Advanced JSON output can now carry more context, improving prompt handling and automation integration.

changes.raw: Fixed issue where some Max users that specified Opus would still see fallback to Sonnet
changes.summary: 修复 Opus 回退到 Sonnet
changes.why_matters: 避免高阶用户指定模型后被错误降级，保证预期能力和输出一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: This prevents unintended model downgrades and preserves the expected capability and output consistency.

changes.raw: Settings: /doctor can now help you identify and fix invalid setting files

changes.raw: Fixed an issue with handling user directories with spaces for shell snapshots

changes.raw: OTEL resource now includes os.type, os.version, host.arch, and wsl.version (if running on Windows Subsystem for Linux)

changes.why_matters_en: This ensures custom slash commands are found and run correctly in subdirectories.

changes.raw: Plan mode: Fixed issue where rejected plan from sub-task would get discarded

changes.raw: Disabled IDE diffs for notebook files, fixing "Timeout waiting after 1000ms" error

changes.raw: Fixed config file corruption issue by enforcing atomic writes

changes.raw: Updated prompt input undo to Ctrl+\_ to avoid breaking existing Ctrl+U behavior, matching zsh's undo shortcut

changes.why_matters_en: Ensures transcripts stay correct after /clear and hooks fire properly when loops end.

changes.raw: Custom slash commands: Restored namespacing in command names based on subdirectories. For example, .claude/commands/frontend/component.md is now /frontend:component, not /component.

changes.raw: Increased default otel interval from 1s -> 5s
changes.summary: 默认 OTEL 采样间隔调大

changes.raw: Fixed edge cases where MCP_TIMEOUT and MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT weren't being respected
changes.summary: 修复 MCP 超时参数生效

changes.raw: Fixed a regression where search tools unnecessarily asked for permissions
changes.summary: 搜索工具不再误弹权限
changes.why_matters: 减少无意义的权限确认，提升搜索工具使用流畅度。
changes.why_matters_en: It removes unnecessary permission prompts and makes search tools smoother to use.

changes.raw: Added support for triggering thinking non-English languages

changes.why_matters: 让不同语言用户更自然地触发思考模式，提升可用性。

changes.raw: Improved compacting UI

changes.raw: Renamed /allowed-tools -> /permissions

changes.raw: Migrated allowedTools and ignorePatterns from .claude.json -> settings.json
changes.summary: 配置迁移到 settings.json
changes.why_matters: 配置项位置变更会影响升级后的可用性，用户需要迁移设置才能继续正常使用。
changes.why_matters_en: Moving config fields affects upgrade compatibility, and users must migrate settings to keep working normally.

changes.raw: Deprecated claude config commands in favor of editing settings.json

changes.why_matters_en: The old configuration workflow is being phased out, so users should switch to editing settings.json directly.

changes.raw: Fixed a bug where --dangerously-skip-permissions sometimes didn't work in --print mode
changes.summary: 修复跳过权限在打印模式失效
changes.why_matters: 这修复了一个会导致权限绕过参数不生效的 bug，提升了自动化运行的一致性。
changes.why_matters_en: This fixes a bug where a permission-bypass flag could fail, improving consistency in automated runs.

changes.raw: Improved error handling for /install-github-app

changes.why_matters: 更清晰的错误处理能帮助用户更快定位安装问题并减少排障时间。

changes.raw: Bugfixes, UI polish, and tool reliability improvements

changes.raw: Breaking change: Bedrock ARN passed to `ANTHROPIC_MODEL` or `ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL` should no longer contain an escaped slash (specify `/` instead of `%2F`)
changes.summary: Bedrock ARN 改用未转义斜杠
changes.summary_en: Use unescaped slash in Bedrock ARN
changes.why_matters: 这会影响模型环境变量的配置方式，旧写法可能导致模型无法正确加载。
changes.why_matters_en: This changes how model environment variables must be configured, and the old format may prevent models from loading correctly.

changes.raw: Removed `DEBUG=true` in favor of `ANTHROPIC_LOG=debug`, to log all requests
changes.summary: 调试日志改用 ANTHROPIC_LOG
changes.why_matters: 这会影响现有调试开关的使用方式，需要改用新的环境变量才能记录请求。
changes.why_matters_en: This changes the debug toggle users rely on, requiring a new environment variable to log requests.

changes.raw: Breaking change: --print JSON output now returns nested message objects, for forwards-compatibility as we introduce new metadata fields

changes.why_matters_en: This can break scripts and integrations that depend on the old JSON shape, requiring parser updates.

changes.raw: Introduced settings.cleanupPeriodDays

changes.why_matters_en: This makes the key-helper cache duration configurable for different security and refresh needs.

changes.raw: Introduced --debug mode

highlights.highlight_summary:
Task 工具开始真正进入执行层。它不再只是给出方向，而是可以直接写入文件、运行命令，把代理式编程向前推进了一步。

与此同时，动态生成的 API Key 也获得了刷新能力。对长期运行的工作流来说，这意味着连接更稳，节奏更连续。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
The Task tool now steps into execution. It no longer just points the way; it can write files and run commands, pushing agentic coding one step further.

At the same time, dynamically generated API keys can now refresh. For long-running workflows, that means steadier connections and a more continuous flow.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新把 Claude Code 从“会思考的助手”推进到“能完成工作的代理”，开始具备真正闭环执行的能力。
highlights.highlight_why_en: This release moves Claude Code from a thinking assistant toward a working agent, giving it the first real shape of an end-to-end execution loop.

blog_post.title: Best Practices for Agentic and Claude Code

top_changes.raw: Task tool can now perform writes and run bash commands
top_changes.summary: Task 工具可写入并执行命令

top_changes.raw: Added support for refreshing dynamically generated API keys (via apiKeyHelper), with a 5 minute TTL
top_changes.summary: 支持动态刷新 API Key

highlights.highlight_summary:
这次更新先改造了输出的底层形态。--print 不再只是给出结果，而是开始承载更丰富的消息结构，为后续能力预留空间。

同时，--debug 让排查更直接，配置与凭证生命周期也开始变得更可控。产品正在从“能用”走向“可扩展、可运维”。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release reshapes the foundation of output. --print no longer returns a simple result; it now carries richer message objects, creating room for future capabilities.

At the same time, --debug makes troubleshooting more direct, while configuration and credential lifecycles become more controllable. The product is moving from merely usable to extensible and operationally ready.
highlights.highlight_why: 这是一次面向未来的接口升级：先把承载能力铺好，后续能力才能持续叠加而不打断用户。
highlights.highlight_why_en: This is a future-facing interface upgrade: the foundation is being laid first so new capabilities can keep arriving without breaking users.

这一版把环境配置推向了更清晰、更一致的方向。模型与日志的设置方式开始收拢，产品体验也随之变得更可预期。

对使用者来说，这不是一次功能扩张，而是一次边界收紧。Claude Code 正在把“能跑”升级为“更稳、更易维护”。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release pushes environment configuration toward a cleaner, more consistent shape. Model and logging settings are being aligned, and the product becomes more predictable as a result.

For users, this is not about adding surface area. It is about tightening the foundation so Claude Code feels steadier and easier to maintain.
highlights.highlight_why: 当配置开始统一，产品就从可用走向可规模化。
highlights.highlight_why_en: When configuration becomes consistent, the product moves from usable to scalable.

highlights.highlight_summary: Claude Code 终于走向正式可用。它不再只是一个新鲜的编码助手，而是开始承担更稳定、更关键的工作。与此同时，Sonnet 4 和 Opus 4 的加入，为它提供了更强的推力。
highlights.highlight_summary_en: Claude Code has arrived in general availability. It is no longer just a clever coding assistant; it is becoming a dependable part of the workflow. With Sonnet 4 and Opus 4, the product now has more power behind it.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次发布的意义，不在于功能清单本身，而在于 Claude Code 从可用走向可依赖，开始进入真正的生产阶段。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The significance of this release is not the feature list itself, but the shift from usable to dependable, marking Claude Code’s move into real production use.

highlights.highlight_title: 上下文能力走向全平台
highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 的上下文能力，开始覆盖更多企业级部署环境。Bedrock 与 Vertex 也能使用 /context，意味着同一套工作流不再被平台边界切开。

与此同时，HTTP 观测链路补上 mTLS 支持，安全与可观测性开始并肩前进。产品正在从“能用”走向“可规模化地用”。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code’s context capability now reaches more enterprise deployment environments. With /context available on Bedrock and Vertex, the same workflow no longer stops at platform boundaries.

At the same time, HTTP-based observability gains mTLS support, bringing security and visibility forward together. The product is moving from simply usable to ready for scale.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的关键，不是单点功能增强，而是把核心能力与企业落地所需的边界条件一起补齐。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not a single feature gain, but the pairing of core capability with the conditions required for enterprise adoption.

highlights.highlight_summary_en: Claude Code 2.0 moves the experience into the developer’s most familiar workspace. A native VS Code extension brings the agent out of the terminal and directly into the coding flow. With dynamic subagents and conversation rewind, collaboration becomes more continuous — and far more controllable.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次发布的关键，不是新增了几个功能，而是把 Claude Code 从“会回答”推进到“能嵌入日常开发流程”。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not the feature list itself, but the shift from a tool that answers to one that is embedded in the daily development workflow.

它不是一次高调的功能扩张，而是一次体验打磨。产品正在朝着更可靠、更适合日常高频使用的方向继续前进。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release returns focus to the essentials: input, login, and recovery. For users, Claude Code becomes harder to trip up and easier to stay in flow.

It is not a headline-grabbing expansion of features, but a refinement of the experience. The product continues moving toward something more reliable, and better suited to everyday use.
highlights.highlight_why: 当基础交互和身份链路都更稳定时，Claude Code 才真正具备成为日常工作入口的条件。
highlights.highlight_why_en: When core interaction and identity flows are stable, Claude Code is finally ready to serve as a daily work surface.

highlights.highlight_title: 告别旧入口，走向新平台
highlights.highlight_title_en: Leaving the Old Entry Point Behind
highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 这次不只是更新，而是明确切换了产品重心。旧的 SDK 入口被移除，新的代理 SDK 成为唯一面向未来的路径。

这意味着 Claude Code 正在从“可用工具”走向“平台级能力”。对开发者来说，迁移是代价；对产品来说，这是边界清晰、方向统一的一步。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release is more than an update. It marks a clear shift in product focus, as the legacy SDK entrypoint is removed and the agent SDK becomes the path forward.

Claude Code is moving from a useful tool to a platform-level capability. For developers, migration is the cost; for the product, it is a decisive step toward a cleaner, more unified direction.
highlights.highlight_why: 移除旧入口，意味着 Claude Code 不再维持双轨兼容，而是把未来押注在新的代理平台上。
highlights.highlight_why_en: Removing the legacy entrypoint ends dual-track compatibility and places Claude Code’s future squarely on the new agent platform.

top_changes.raw: Removed legacy SDK entrypoint. Please migrate to @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk for future SDK updates: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/migration-guide
top_changes.summary: 移除旧版 SDK 入口

highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 进入了更成熟的控制层。策略可以直接约束高风险命令，定制代理也能明确封锁工具，安全边界开始由产品本身定义。

与此同时，停止机制变得更灵活，输出样式则退场，让系统提示、插件和项目级配置成为新的表达方式。产品不再只是执行任务，而是在为规模化使用建立秩序。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code has moved into a more mature control layer. Policies can now block high-risk commands directly, and custom agents can explicitly deny tools, bringing safety boundaries into the product itself.

At the same time, stop behavior becomes more flexible while output styles step aside, making room for system prompts, plugins, and project-level configuration. The product is no longer just executing tasks; it is setting the rules for scale.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的关键，不是新增了多少能力，而是 Claude Code 开始把安全、控制和表达方式收拢到统一的产品治理框架里。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not the number of features added, but that Claude Code is now consolidating safety, control, and presentation into a single product governance model.

top_changes.summary: 支持提示词触发停止钩子

highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 开始更自然地融入自动化流程。SDK 模式现在可以在空闲后自动退出，让脚本和批处理任务少一步等待，多一分确定性。

与此同时，产品的边界也在重新整理。项目级忽略规则迁移到本地权限设置，配合更顺手的命令搜索和更一致的 VS Code 字体体验，整体使用感更连贯。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code is fitting more naturally into automated workflows. SDK mode can now exit automatically after being idle, giving scripts and batch jobs one less thing to wait on and one more thing to trust.

At the same time, the product’s boundaries are being cleaned up. Project-level ignore rules have moved into local permission settings, while command search and the VS Code font experience both feel more fluid and consistent.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的关键，不是单点功能，而是让 Claude Code 更像一个可编排、可收尾的执行环境。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point here is not any single feature, but Claude Code becoming a more orchestrated, self-finishing execution environment.

highlights.highlight_summary: Claude Code 这次把边界和手感一起抬高了。MCP 权限可以按服务器一键放行或拦截，插件市场也拥有更细的自动更新控制。与此同时，输入不中断、建议可直接回车提交，交互终于更像一款成熟的生产力工具。
highlights.highlight_summary_en: Claude Code raises both control and polish in the same release. MCP permissions can now be granted or denied by server in one move, and plugin marketplaces gain finer control over automatic updates. At the same time, typing stays intact, suggestions submit faster, and the interface feels more like a mature productivity tool.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的关键，不是单点功能，而是让 Claude Code 在规模化使用时同时具备更强的治理能力和更顺滑的日常体验。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not any single feature, but a product that is becoming easier to govern and easier to live with at scale.

Claude Code 不再只停留在终端里。借助 Claude in Chrome，Claude 现在可以直接接管浏览器，把代码之外的真实工作流也纳入同一个代理体验。

highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code is no longer confined to the terminal. With Claude in Chrome, it can now take direct control of the browser, bringing real-world workflows into the same agentic experience.

The release also makes everyday interaction faster and steadier. File suggestions are quicker, context handling is more reliable, and the product is moving closer to an always-ready execution layer.
highlights.highlight_why: 这是 Claude Code 从代码代理走向通用执行代理的关键一步。
highlights.highlight_why_en: This marks a key step in Claude Code’s shift from coding agent to general-purpose execution agent.

highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 进入了更成熟的工作阶段。技能可以热更新，子代理也能在分叉上下文中执行，产品开始围绕持续工作流而不是单次会话来组织能力。

同时，恢复会话、跨平台安装和日志安全都被补齐。它不只是更顺手了，也更像一个可以长期托付的开发环境。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code has moved into a more mature phase of work. Skills now hot-reload, sub-agents can run in forked contexts, and the product is starting to organize around continuous workflows rather than one-off sessions.

Session resume, cross-platform installation, and log security have all been tightened as well. It is not just smoother now; it feels more like an environment that can be trusted over time.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的关键，不是单点功能增强，而是让 Claude Code 更接近一个可持续运转的开发平台。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not any single feature, but Claude Code’s shift toward a platform that can keep working continuously.

highlights.highlight_summary:
这一版把 Claude Code 的工作边界向前推了一步。大输出不再被草率截断，而是落盘保存，让模型能够读取完整结果，继续推进更复杂的任务。

与此同时，底层稳定性和安全性也被补齐。长会话更耐久，引用内容更可靠，执行链路也更值得信赖。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release pushes Claude Code’s working boundary forward. Large outputs are no longer cut short; they are saved to disk so Claude can read the full result and keep moving on complex tasks.

At the same time, stability and security get a serious upgrade. Long sessions last longer, referenced content is more reliable, and the execution path is more trustworthy.
highlights.highlight_why: 它标志着 Claude Code 从“看见结果”走向“掌握完整结果”，让代理真正具备持续执行复杂工作的能力。
highlights.highlight_why_en: It marks the shift from merely seeing results to holding the full result, giving the agent the continuity needed for serious work.

highlights.highlight_summary:
这次更新把“已授权”真正变成了“可执行”。当信任对话被接受后，相关能力会在同一会话中立即生效，Claude Code 的工作流因此更连贯，也更可靠。

与此同时，系统开始主动识别无效权限规则，并给出来源与修复建议。产品不再只是执行命令，而是在帮助用户把环境整理得更清晰、更可控。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release turns “approved” into truly actionable. Once the trust dialog is accepted, trust-requiring capabilities take effect in the same session, making the workflow feel immediate and dependable.

At the same time, the system now spots unreachable permission rules and explains where they came from, plus how to fix them. Claude Code is becoming not just an executor, but a guide to a cleaner, more controllable setup.
highlights.highlight_why: 它标志着 Claude Code 从“能做什么”走向“能稳定做成什么”，信任、权限和会话状态开始真正对齐。
highlights.highlight_why_en: It marks the shift from what Claude Code can do to what it can reliably complete, as trust, permissions, and session state finally come into alignment.

highlights.highlight_summary:
这一版把 Claude Code 推向更完整的工作流中心。它不仅更安全，也更懂得在项目深处自动找到可用能力，让代理开始真正跟着代码结构行动。

同时，导入、权限与后台进程这些细节被一并打磨。产品的边界更清晰，执行也更可靠。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release pushes Claude Code further into the center of the workflow. It is not only safer, but also better at finding the right capabilities deep in a project, so the agent can act more naturally with the codebase.

Import flows, permissions, and background processes are all tightened up as well. The product’s boundaries are clearer, and execution is more dependable.
highlights.highlight_why: 当安全、发现能力和工作流可见性同时成熟，Claude Code 就不再只是一个会回答问题的工具，而是在项目里持续承担执行责任的代理。
highlights.highlight_why_en: When security, capability discovery, and workflow visibility mature together, Claude Code stops being just a tool that answers questions and becomes an agent that can reliably carry execution inside a project.

top_changes.raw: Fixed permission bypass via shell line continuation that could allow blocked commands to execute
top_changes.summary: 修复续行绕过命令拦截

top_changes.raw: Fixed `mcp list` and `mcp get` commands leaving orphaned MCP server processes
top_changes.summary: 修复 MCP 进程残留

top_changes.raw: Added automatic discovery of skills from nested `.claude/skills` directories when working with files in subdirectories
top_changes.summary: 自动发现子目录技能

highlights.highlight_summary:
这次更新把 Claude Code 在高负载场景下的稳定性再往前推了一步。长会话、并行工具调用、MCP 连接恢复，这些最容易卡住工作流的环节，开始变得更可依赖。

同时，MCP 工具搜索的自动启用阈值变得更灵活，Hooks 也能向模型注入更多上下文。产品不只是更稳了，也更懂得在关键时刻补齐信息。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release pushes Claude Code further into dependable territory under heavy use. Long sessions, parallel tool calls, and MCP reconnection are all less likely to interrupt the flow.

At the same time, MCP tool search gets a more flexible auto-enable threshold, and Hooks can now pass richer context back to the model. The product is not only steadier — it is better at filling in the right information at the right moment.
highlights.highlight_why: 当代理开始承担更长、更复杂的工作流时，可靠性本身就成了产品能力的一部分。
highlights.highlight_why_en: As the agent takes on longer and more complex workflows, reliability itself becomes part of the product’s capability.

highlights.highlight_summary:
这次更新把 Claude Code 的使用体验推向了更成熟的工作流。VSCode 里的会话分叉与回退向所有用户开放，意味着探索、试错、撤回，都可以在同一条上下文里完成。

同时，命令参数访问更直接，任务系统也保留了平滑切换的余地。产品开始更像一个可控的执行环境，而不只是一个对话入口。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release pushes Claude Code into a more mature workflow. Session forking and rewind in VSCode are now available to everyone, making exploration, experimentation, and rollback part of the same context.

At the same time, command arguments are easier to address, and the new task system keeps a temporary escape hatch for a smoother transition. The product is starting to feel less like a chat surface and more like a controlled execution environment.
highlights.highlight_why: 真正的转折不在于新增了多少功能，而在于 Claude Code 开始把“可回退、可分叉、可继续”变成默认能力。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not the number of features added, but the fact that Claude Code is making rewind, branching, and continuation feel native.

highlights.highlight_title_en: Putting Stability Back Front and Center
highlights.highlight_summary: 这次更新没有追逐喧哗的功能点，而是把最影响日常体验的两处摩擦先行修平。认证刷新更稳了，深层目录路径也不再轻易触发失败。
highlights.highlight_summary_en: This release does not chase headline features. It smooths out two of the most disruptive frictions in daily use: auth refresh is more reliable, and deeply nested paths no longer fail so easily.
highlights.highlight_why: 当基础体验开始变得可依赖，Claude Code 才真正具备持续进入更复杂工作流的资格。
highlights.highlight_why_en: Once the basics become dependable, Claude Code earns the right to move deeper into more complex workflows.

top_changes.summary: 修复认证刷新失败

top_changes.raw: Fixed ENAMETOOLONG errors for deeply-nested directory paths
top_changes.summary: 修复深层目录路径过长错误

highlights.highlight_summary:
这次更新没有追求更响亮的口号，而是把 Claude Code 的执行层打磨得更可靠。多环境代理、后台任务、插件加载和 macOS 临时文件都被逐一修正，产品开始更像一台可以持续托付的工作机器。

同时，内存占用也不再随着大输出无上限增长。对重度使用者来说，这意味着更长时间的运行、更少的中断，以及更接近生产级的体验。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release does not chase a louder headline. It hardens the execution layer, making Claude Code more dependable across multi-provider agents, background tasks, plugin loading, and macOS temp-file handling.

Memory usage is also brought under control for large shell outputs. For power users, that means longer sessions, fewer interruptions, and a more production-ready experience.
highlights.highlight_why: 当一个代理产品开始优先消除运行中的摩擦，平台属性就真正压过了演示属性。
highlights.highlight_why_en: When an agent product starts prioritizing runtime friction over flashy features, it has crossed from demoware into platform territory.

top_changes.summary: 修复后台任务完成时崩溃

highlights.highlight_summary: 这次更新先守住了最关键的一道门。bash 权限判断不再凭空“脑补”匹配结果，执行边界因此更可靠。与此同时，长会话的内存占用被持续压低，Claude Code 在更久的任务里也能保持轻快。
highlights.highlight_summary_en: This release tightens the most important boundary first. Bash permission checks no longer invent matching descriptions, making execution safer and more trustworthy. At the same time, long-session memory use drops further, keeping Claude Code responsive over extended work.
highlights.highlight_why: 当代理开始真正执行任务时，可信的权限判断和稳定的长会话能力，就成了产品从“能用”走向“可托付”的分水岭。
highlights.highlight_why_en: As the agent moves from suggesting work to carrying it out, trustworthy permissions and stable long-session behavior become the dividing line between something that works and something that can be trusted.
