top_changes.raw: Fixed the bash permission classifier to validate that returned match descriptions correspond to actual input rules, preventing hallucinated descriptions from incorrectly granting permissions
top_changes.summary: 修复 bash 权限误放行

top_changes.raw: Fixed compaction failing when conversation contains many PDF documents by stripping document blocks alongside images before sending to the compaction API (anthropics/claude-code#26188)
top_changes.summary: 修复含 PDF 的压缩失败

top_changes.raw: Improved memory usage in long-running sessions by releasing API stream buffers, agent context, and skill state after use
top_changes.summary: 长会话更省内存

highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 正在把“能做”推进到“能稳地做”。工作树隔离让主线任务与实验性操作分离，子代理也开始拥有更清晰的执行边界。

与此同时，交互体验变得更可靠：后台代理不再悄然吞掉中断信号，用户对运行中的任务拥有更直接的控制感。产品的重心，正从单点辅助转向可并行、可隔离、可接管的执行体系。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code is moving from “can do” to “can do it safely.” Worktree isolation separates the main line from experimental work, and subagents now operate with clearer execution boundaries.

At the same time, the interaction model becomes more dependable: background agents no longer swallow interrupt signals, giving users more direct control over running tasks. The product is shifting from single-point assistance to a parallel, isolated, and controllable execution system.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的关键，不是新增了多少能力，而是把 Claude Code 推向了更成熟的执行架构：更强的隔离、更清晰的控制、更少的摩擦。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not the number of features added, but the execution architecture they reveal: stronger isolation, clearer control, and less friction.

highlights.highlight_summary:
这次更新把 Claude Code 的连续性抬到了新的层级。恢复会话更可靠，长时间运行也更稳，不再让用户在关键时刻失去上下文。

同时，工作区隔离开始拥有更完整的生命周期钩子。产品正从“能跑”走向“可编排、可托管”。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release raises Claude Code’s continuity to a new level. Resumed sessions are more reliable, and long-running work stays stable instead of losing context at the critical moment.

At the same time, worktree isolation now has a fuller lifecycle hook model. The product is moving from something that runs to something that can be orchestrated and governed.
highlights.highlight_why: 真正的代理体验，不只在于能开始任务，而在于任务中断后仍能无缝接续。
highlights.highlight_why_en: A true agent experience is defined not by starting work, but by resuming it seamlessly after interruption.

top_changes.raw: Fixed a bug where resumed sessions could be invisible when the working directory involved symlinks, because the session storage path was resolved at different times during startup. Also fixed session data loss on SSH disconnect by flushing session data before hooks and analytics in the graceful shutdown sequence.

top_changes.raw: Fixed unbounded memory growth in long sessions by capping file history snapshots
top_changes.summary: 限制文件历史快照内存增长

top_changes.raw: Added `WorktreeCreate` and `WorktreeRemove` hook events, enabling custom VCS setup and teardown when agent worktree isolation creates or removes worktrees.
top_changes.summary: 新增工作树创建/移除钩子

highlights.highlight_summary: Claude Code 开始把本地环境变成可被外部构建调用的执行面，协作边界被进一步拉开。规划与执行的分离不再只是使用方式，而是产品能力本身。与此同时，安全与稳定性也被同步抬升，关键交互更适合进入真实工作流。
highlights.highlight_summary_en: Claude Code now turns the local environment into an execution surface that external builds can call into. The separation between planning and execution is no longer just a usage pattern; it is becoming part of the product itself. At the same time, security and reliability move up together, making core interactions fit for real-world workflows.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新把 Claude Code 从单一助手推进为可被外部系统编排的执行层。
highlights.highlight_why_en: This release moves Claude Code from a single assistant toward an execution layer that external systems can orchestrate.

highlights.highlight_title: 从模型选择到默认智能
highlights.highlight_title_en: From Model Choice to Smart Defaults
highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 继续把复杂性收进后台，把更合适的能力直接推到前台。Opus 4.6 成为新的默认节奏，更多用户将先感受到速度与深度之间更平衡的体验。

同时，系统开始主动接管旧模型的迁移，让用户不必为版本分叉停留。"ultrathink" 的回归，则为关键时刻保留了更高强度的思考开关。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code keeps moving complexity out of the way and putting the right capability in front. With Opus 4.6 as the new default rhythm, more users will feel a better balance between speed and depth.

At the same time, the system now takes over legacy model migration so users do not have to live with version forks. The return of "ultrathink" preserves a high-effort switch for moments that need it most.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的关键，不是单纯换了模型，而是 Claude Code 开始用默认值和自动迁移，定义用户应该如何与智能协作。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not the model swap itself, but Claude Code using defaults and automatic migration to define how users should work with intelligence.

highlights.highlight_summary_en: This release raises Claude Code’s reliability to a new level. Complex permission prompts no longer derail sessions, and large bursts of skill-file changes no longer freeze the workflow. For users, the tool starts to feel like an execution partner that can be trusted with long-running work.
highlights.highlight_why: 真正的转折不在于新增了多少功能，而在于 Claude Code 开始稳定承接更复杂、更连续的真实工作负载。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not how much was added, but that Claude Code can now reliably carry more complex, continuous real-world workloads.

highlights.highlight_title: 让长上下文成为默认能力
highlights.highlight_summary:
Claude Code 这次把 1M 上下文窗口直接带给更多高阶计划用户，不再把大容量思考留给额外开销。对复杂项目、长链路任务和持续迭代来说，产品边界被明显推高了。

与此同时，稳定性和上下文管理也同步补强。会话更不容易中断，工具调用更可靠，模型也能更准确地判断何时该压缩上下文。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
Claude Code now brings the 1M context window to more premium plans by default, instead of treating deep context as an extra. For complex projects, long-horizon tasks, and ongoing iteration, the product’s ceiling has moved up.

At the same time, stability and context handling got sharper. Sessions are less likely to break, tool calls are more reliable, and the model is better at knowing when to compact context.
highlights.highlight_why: 这次更新的意义不在于单个修复，而在于 Claude Code 正在把“长时间、长上下文、持续执行”变成默认体验。
highlights.highlight_why_en: The turning point is not any single fix, but Claude Code making long-running, long-context execution feel like the default experience.

highlights.highlight_summary:
这次更新把 Claude Code 推向更稳定的长时运行。远程会话、桥接连接和延迟工具都更可靠，任务不再因为环境回收、断线或上下文压缩而中途失手。

同时，MCP 交互式引导让外部服务器可以在任务中途继续索取结构化输入。再加上大仓库的稀疏检出支持，Claude Code 正在更像一个能深入项目、持续推进的执行平台。
highlights.highlight_summary_en:
This release pushes Claude Code further into reliable long-running execution. Remote sessions, bridge connections, and deferred tools are now more resilient, so work is less likely to stall from idle reaping, disconnects, or context compaction.

At the same time, interactive MCP elicitation lets external servers ask for structured input mid-task. Combined with sparse checkout support for large monorepos, Claude Code is becoming a platform that can stay inside the codebase and keep moving.
highlights.highlight_why: 它标志着 Claude Code 的重心从“能做任务”转向“能把任务稳定做完”。
highlights.highlight_why_en: It marks the shift from being able to start tasks to being able to finish them reliably.

capabilities.summary: Claude Code 从读代码走向能在真实工作区中稳定执行多步任务。
capabilities.summary_en: From reading code to reliably executing multi-step tasks in real workspaces.

samples.raw: Added `--bare` flag for scripted `-p` calls — skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks; requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or an `apiKeyHelper` via `--settings` (OAuth and keychain auth disabled); auto-memory fully disabled
samples.summary: 新增脚本裸模式

samples.raw: Fixed a crash on Node.js 18
samples.summary: 修复 Node18 崩溃

samples.raw: **Security:** Fixed silent sandbox disable when `sandbox.enabled: true` is set but dependencies are missing — now shows a visible startup warning
samples.summary: 沙箱缺依赖时不再静默关闭

samples.raw: Fixed `.git`, `.claude`, and other protected directories being writable without a prompt in `bypassPermissions` mode
samples.summary: 修复绕过权限下受保护目录可写

capabilities.name: 记忆与长上下文
capabilities.summary: Claude Code 逐步具备更长的任务记忆、更稳的会话延续与更大的上下文吞吐。
capabilities.summary_en: Progressively gained longer task memory, stabler session continuity, and larger context throughput.

samples.raw: Added `--bare` flag for scripted `-p` calls — skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks; requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or an `apiKeyHelper` via `--settings` (OAuth and keychain auth disabled); auto-memory fully disabled
samples.summary: 新增脚本裸模式

samples.raw: Fixed auto-updater starting overlapping binary downloads when the slash-command overlay repeatedly opened and closed, accumulating tens of gigabytes of memory
samples.summary: 修复更新器重复下载占内存

samples.raw: Fixed a race condition where stale-worktree cleanup could delete an agent worktree just resumed from a previous crash
samples.summary: 修复工作树清理误删

samples.raw: Added 1M context window for Opus 4.6 by default for Max, Team, and Enterprise plans (previously required extra usage)
samples.summary: 默认开放百万上下文

capabilities.name: 自动化与无人值守
capabilities.summary: Claude Code 开始承担持续运行、定时触发和后台完成的工作。
capabilities.summary_en: Began handling continuous, scheduled, and background tasks autonomously.

samples.raw: Added `--bare` flag for scripted `-p` calls — skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks; requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or an `apiKeyHelper` via `--settings` (OAuth and keychain auth disabled); auto-memory fully disabled
samples.summary: 新增脚本裸模式

samples.raw: Fixed infinite loop when API errors triggered stop hooks that re-fed blocking errors to the model
samples.summary: 修复停止钩子导致的死循环

samples.raw: Fixed auto-updater starting overlapping binary downloads when the slash-command overlay repeatedly opened and closed, accumulating tens of gigabytes of memory
samples.summary: 修复更新器重复下载占内存

samples.raw: Fixed PreToolUse hooks returning `"allow"` bypassing `deny` permission rules, including enterprise managed settings
samples.summary: 修复钩子绕过拒绝规则

capabilities.name: 委派与协作
capabilities.summary: 工作逐渐可以拆给多个子代理、团队成员和远端入口协同完成。
capabilities.summary_en: Work can now be split across subagents, team members, and remote endpoints.

samples.raw: Fixed a race condition where stale-worktree cleanup could delete an agent worktree just resumed from a previous crash
samples.summary: 修复工作树清理误删

samples.raw: Fixed several Remote Control issues: sessions silently dying when the server reaps an idle environment, rapid messages being queued one-at-a-time instead of batched, and stale work items causing redelivery after JWT refresh
samples.summary: 修复远控会话与消息重发问题

samples.raw: Fixed memory leak where long-running teammates retained all messages in AppState even after conversation compaction
samples.summary: 修复长会话中队友消息泄漏

samples.raw: Added research preview agent teams feature for multi-agent collaboration (token-intensive feature, requires setting CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1)
samples.summary: 新增多智能体协作团队

capabilities.name: 连接器与生态扩展
capabilities.summary: Claude Code 从单体工具扩展为连接外部系统、插件、技能与 SDK 的平台。
capabilities.summary_en: Expanded from a standalone tool into a platform connecting external systems, plugins, skills, and SDKs.

samples.raw: Added `--bare` flag for scripted `-p` calls — skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks; requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or an `apiKeyHelper` via `--settings` (OAuth and keychain auth disabled); auto-memory fully disabled
samples.summary: 新增脚本裸模式

samples.raw: Fixed infinite loop when API errors triggered stop hooks that re-fed blocking errors to the model
samples.summary: 修复停止钩子导致的死循环

samples.raw: Fixed `deny: ["mcp__servername"]` permission rules not removing MCP server tools before sending to the model, allowing it to see and attempt blocked tools
samples.summary: 权限拒绝规则现可屏蔽 MCP 工具

samples.raw: Fixed PreToolUse hooks returning `"allow"` bypassing `deny` permission rules, including enterprise managed settings
samples.summary: 修复钩子绕过拒绝规则

capabilities.name: 多模态与交互界面
capabilities.summary: 输入输出方式从纯终端文本扩展到图片、PDF、语音、桌面与远程界面。
capabilities.summary_en: I/O expanded from terminal text to images, PDFs, voice, desktop, and remote interfaces.

samples.raw: Fixed Claude Desktop sessions incorrectly using the terminal CLI's configured API key instead of OAuth
samples.summary: 修复桌面会话认证串用

samples.raw: Fixed several Remote Control issues: sessions silently dying when the server reaps an idle environment, rapid messages being queued one-at-a-time instead of batched, and stale work items causing redelivery after JWT refresh
samples.summary: 修复远控会话与消息重发问题

samples.raw: Fixed bridge sessions failing to recover after extended WebSocket disconnects
samples.summary: 修复桥接会话断连后无法恢复

samples.raw: Fixed session crashes in Desktop/SDK when Read returned files containing U+2028/U+2029 characters
samples.summary: 修复含特殊字符文件导致崩溃

capabilities.name: 安全、权限与治理
capabilities.summary: 随着能力增强，Claude Code 也持续补强权限、安全审计与企业治理。
capabilities.summary_en: As capabilities grew, permissions, security auditing, and enterprise governance kept pace.

samples.raw: Fixed `deny: ["mcp__servername"]` permission rules not removing MCP server tools before sending to the model, allowing it to see and attempt blocked tools
samples.summary: 权限拒绝规则现可屏蔽 MCP 工具

samples.raw: **Security:** Fixed silent sandbox disable when `sandbox.enabled: true` is set but dependencies are missing — now shows a visible startup warning
samples.summary: 沙箱缺依赖时不再静默关闭

samples.raw: Fixed `.git`, `.claude`, and other protected directories being writable without a prompt in `bypassPermissions` mode
samples.summary: 修复绕过权限下受保护目录可写

samples.raw: Fixed PreToolUse hooks returning `"allow"` bypassing `deny` permission rules, including enterprise managed settings
samples.summary: 修复钩子绕过拒绝规则
